Name: Livspace
Description: Livspace is one of the largest and fastest-growing home interiors and renovation companies. Using its proprietary technology, Livspace provides a one-stop renovation solution for homeowners—from design to managed last mile fulfillment for all rooms in a home. The Brand Has organized a fragmented industry, bringing together designers, brands, manufacturers and contractors to enable an eCommerce-like trusted and predictable experience. Livspace currently serves the Middle East, and Singapore, as well as 50+ metro and non-metro areas in India. Livspace has showcased phenomenal growth since its launch, having delivered over 120,000 rooms and selling over 5 million SKUs through its platform. The company has raised around USD 450 million in capital from some of the top global investors including KKR, Ingka Group Investments (part of largest IKEA retailer Ingka Group), TPG Growth, Goldman Sachs, Kharis Capital, Venturi Partners, FFP (Peugeot Group’s Holding Company), EDBI, Bessemer Venture Partners, Jungle Ventures, Helion Ventures and UC-RNT.

Bangalore | Hyderabad | Chennai | Coimbatore | Pune | Kolkata | Noida | Thane | Ghaziabad | Gurugram | Navi Mumbai

Name: Kristina Zanic Consultants
Description:
Dubai | London | Riyadh | Bangkok | Philippines
 
At Kristina Zanic Consultants, we don't just design spaces; we craft captivating environments that offer exceptional experiences and resonate with all who encounter them. 

We are a collective force driven by curiosity, creativity, and passion. With a global footprint spanning over 20 countries and a portfolio of more than 300 projects, we provide interior design and art curation services across a spectrum of sectors including hospitality, dining, wellness, corporate, and residential spaces.

We partner with clients on every aspect of the design journey from conceptualization to realization. We have extensive experience with renovations, conversions, and new builds. Our services include concept development, schematic design, FF&E selection, design development, and site supervision.

What sets us apart is our diverse team of over 200 creatives from all walks of life, bringing together a rich mix of cultural influences and professional expertise from different countries.

With offices located in Dubai, London, Riyadh, Bangkok, and the Philippines, our global presence enriches our creative process, ensuring that each project is imbued with depth and originality.

Name: Truww
Description: Imagine the next-gen way of designing your home.. where everything is automated to be picture perfect. No details missed from design to execution. That's Truww...Talk to our team to know more about us!

Name: Design Infinity
Description:
Established in 2012, Design Infinity is a prominent interior fit-out and design firm based in Dubai, with a licensed branch in Abu Dhabi. The company specializes in delivering high-end, turnkey interior solutions for commercial spaces ensuring that each project meets the unique needs and ambitions of its clients. 

Our notable projects are Accor, International Media Investments (IMI), Det Norske Veritas (DNV), Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA), Odoo, Emaar, Dubai South Headquarters, Landmark Group, VFS Global, RAKBANK, Dtec, Unique Properties, Aya Universe, Zayed University, Urla, Pullman, Fly Dubai ,Novotel, Himalaya Global Research Centre, Banya Forrest, and Nissan & Infiniti showrooms. 

Design Infinity’s expertise spans across several industries, including banking, hospitality, retail, corporate offices, and more, making it a preferred partner for businesses looking to enhance their work environments. With a dedicated team of over 1,400+ skilled professionals and 100,000 sq.ft joinery, metal & glass, signage, and upholstery in Dubai Investment Park.

Name: GUBI
Description:
Positioned at the point where the beauty of history meets the thrill of right now, GUBI is the creative force and curator behind the world’s most extraordinary design from the 20th century onwards. Whether diving into archives or driving the designs of today, GUBI is responsible for a timeless, inventive, and intercontinental collection of furniture, lighting and interior objects that merge function with meaning, enhancing every space. As well as rediscovering and reintroducing lost treasures of design history for the present generation, GUBI collaborates with a hand-picked global roster of visionary design studios to create icons for tomorrow. Inspired by the past, always looking to the future, GUBI makes and shares stories that resonate with design lovers around the world, inspiring moments and memories to treasure.

Headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, GUBI employs more than 100 people internationally, and collaborates with specialist manufacturers across the globe, sharing its collection with modern-design aficionados via gubi.com and retail partners around the world. 

Visit gubi.com/company/careers for current opportunities.

Name: ELE Interior Design
Description: Established in 2017 by Leali Ezzat, ELE Interior boasts years of expertise in luxury interior design, serving the United Arab Emirates and the wider Middle East. Led by a team of multicultural designers driven by a passion for detail, craftsmanship, and materiality, the firm excels in high-end residential, commercial, hospitality, and leisure projects. Ezzat and her team prioritize perfection, approaching each project with a deep understanding of the client's brief. From conceptualization to completion, they transform exceptional ideas into finished spaces.  With a commitment to delivering distinctive designs, ELE Interior seamlessly provides a comprehensive range of services.

Name: House of Aida Interior Design & Supply
Description: Since 2016 House of Aida has provided business, private and public sector, nationwide in the UAE and abroad with consultancy, design and furniture. Long-lasting partnerships have been based on outstanding customer service. We seal the experience of two decades in materials and design-product with the same fresh approach that is required to meet nowadays market demand. Our aim is to provide the best customer service and quality in the furniture industry, mostly Made In Italy, fueling our growth and profitability.

Name: Minimalix
Description:
Welcome to Minimalix, where the essence of minimalist living breathes life into every space we touch. Located in the bustling heart of Gurugram, Haryana, India, our journey began in 2020 with a mission to redefine the aesthetics of living spaces in Tier-1 cities through the lens of minimalism. At Minimalix, we embrace the philosophy that joy and contentment stem not from abundance, but from the presence of just the right elements that meet our needs and enrich our lives.

Our Commitment to You:

1. Your Budget Is Sacred: At Minimalix, we honor your budget as if it were our own. We pledge to deliver our projects within the initial quotation, ensuring no surprises or hidden costs.

2. Tailored Design Solutions: We understand that every space tells a unique story. That's why we offer a bespoke design experience, from contemporary elegance to bohemian flair, all while keeping your personal requirements and desires at the forefront.

3. Function Meets Elegance: Our designs speak the language of modern living—practical, yet infused with an understated elegance that celebrates simplicity and space.

4. On-Time Project Completion: Our operations team is dedicated to bringing the minimalist living experience to you without delay. We value timely execution as much as we value the craftsmanship of our designs, ensuring you can quickly immerse yourself in the tranquility of your newly transformed space.

Minimalism is more than a design principle for us; it's a lifestyle. A commitment to focusing on what truly matters and letting go of the unnecessary. Our vision is to guide you towards a life filled with meaning, surrounded by beauty and simplicity that reflect your true self.

What We Seek in Our Founding Team:

- Clarity of Purpose: A clear vision and a dedicated pursuit of that vision are paramount.
- Collaborative Spirit: A culture of support, teamwork, and mutual respect is essential.
- Passion and Curiosity: A genuine enthusiasm for minimalism, design, and the continuous

Description:
We are one of the most creative and effective interior design companies in the Middle East. ALGEDRA Interior Design is specialized in providing extremely excellent interior design services that combine creative space planning, designing, and project management for both residential and elegant commercial projects.

Our people come from a variety of backgrounds, cultures, and places. From seasoned professionals to emerging talents, we are united by a singular passion to create designs that work.
We are a global team with local understanding.

ALGEDRA has impressed the middle east with innovative designs and ideas by creating a perfect combination of the customer's style and our expert designers in order to have extraordinary and unique solutions. ALGEDRA has combined Eastern and Western cultures by combining Greek architectural art and Italian style along with British innovation.

Name: DLIFE Home Interiors
Description:
D’LIFE is a greatly respected, award-winning, most reliable name in 100% customized and contemporary style home interiors including modular kitchens, bedrooms, living and dining. With an experience of 20+ years, D'LIFE now has completed 12000+ interior projects, has 1400+ employees,  and owns state-of-the-art factories to create beautiful interiors. We have 28 experience center's across India that are strategically located to provide excellent service to our customers. We also have a marketing office in the UAE. With our attention to detail and commitment in giving the best services to our beloved customers, we provide interior design services from the concept stage right through to the completion and handover that are specifically tailored to our client's requirements and personal brief. Our products are of the highest quality and go through several quality checks at every stage to offer you a tension-free experience. Moreover, we offer a lifetime service guarantee which we are really proud of- just in case you ever need it. A lifetime of happiness is our promise to our customers.
#BringHappinessInside

Name: HTS Interiors
Description:
HTS Interiors | Bringing Happiness To Spaces Since 2011

At HTS Interiors, we believe in delivering exceptional value through superior-quality projects that meet our clients' budgets. Our philosophy is simple: never compromise on quality. This commitment extends to our skilled workforce, trusted supply chain, and dedicated partners.

With a knowledgeable and experienced team, we provide turnkey solutions that guide your project from initial concept to operational handover. As your design and build partner, we focus on exceeding your expectations by reducing delivery timelines and costs, ultimately bringing happiness to your space.

For inquiries, WhatsApp or call 0565455234 or email us at info@htsinteriors.com

Name: Artemest
Description:
Artemest is a company specialized in Italian craftsmanship and contemporary design with over 1,000 of Italy’s finest artisans and brands. With offices in Milan, London, Dubai, Miami, and New York, Artemest serves private clients, interior designers, and large-scale development projects across the globe. Founded in 2015 by the shared vision of CEO Marco Credendino and Creative Director Ippolita Rostagno, Artemest mission is to share the beauty and uniqueness of Italian craftsmanship with the world.

CB Insights recently included ARTEMEST in its annual Luxury Tech Market Map: 60 startups changing the way we buy, sell, and perceive luxury.

Name: The BNK Group
Description: Experience bespoke luxury that combines architecture and interior design solutions with panache, class and elegance at The BNK Group. #thebnkfactor

Name: Kinnarps Group
Description:
At Kinnarps we produce and deliver interior design solutions for offices, schools and healthcare facilities. Our natural heritage derives from the Scandinavian design tradition. On top of that, we’ve infused it with international influences and applied our Kinnarps’ philosophy.

The entire value chain is characterised by high quality and low environmental impact – from raw materials to finished solutions. We are one of Europe's biggest manufacturers of interior design solutions with operations in 40 countries.

Our six production facilities is located in Sweden. Production and assembly are carried out in Kinnarp, Jönköping, Skillingaryd, Vinslöv, Tranås (2). 

Kinnarps was founded in 1942 by Jarl and Evy Andersson in Kinnarp, Sweden. It is still today a wholly-owned family business. With boundless curiosity, we are committed to delivering attractive interior solutions that help you and your organisation stay motivated, productive and happy. We call this successful interiors. 

Kinnarps Group designs, develops and markets the following trademarks: Kinnarps, Materia, Skandiform, NC Nordic Care, Drabert and MartinStoll.

Name: Verve Design & Build
Description:
At Verve Design & Build, we create places where people want to be. As a dynamic design and fit-out firm in Dubai, we deliver innovative and functional spaces that reflect each client’s individuality and create tangible value, the Verve way. 

With a team of experienced architects, designers and project managers, we offer end-to-end design and fit-out solutions from concept development to final execution. Our mission is to deliver exceptional environments that meet budget requirements without compromising on quality.

Schmidt, France's leading manufacturer, specialises in bespoke home living solutions. We offer innovative, elegant and functional solutions for every room of the home (kitchens, dressing rooms, living rooms, bathrooms, etc.) and for all types of professional facilities (restaurants, shops, medical centres, offices, and so on).

French expertise for over 60 years! As part of our close relationship with our customers, we support them throughout their projects, from design through to decoration.

Our commitment: create home living solutions that respect the environment and our customers' health!

At IDA, we bring your vision of beautiful, functional design to life.  Our award-winning team provides a comprehensive and thoughtful process that promises to deliver exceptional interior design.

We believe that with careful attention to design and detail, every space can be beautiful and functional.  That's why we work diligently to translate our clients' visions for each project into stunning reality.

At IDA we have decades of history as industry leaders in interior design, and we are committed to planning and executing the finest end product in the market.

Name: THE FITOUT
Description:
THE FITOUT has established itself as one of the top leading companies in the UAE, providing “total interior solutions”, consistent with the highest standards of quality and services since the company’s inception in 1987. Driven by the core values of teamwork and process ownership on an individual level, the company’s headcount stands at over 750 highly qualified and dedicated employees.

Guided by the company’s core value of delivering excellence, we provide a comprehensive range of services such as fit-out contracting, manufacturing, design & build and project management. THE FITOUT was incorporated with the vision of becoming the regional benchmark for quality finishes as it continues to be recognized as one of the best providers of high-end bespoke joinery and fit-out works.

The company’s environmental policies and management system are based on ISO 14001 standards and include measures encouraging ecological awareness among all employees. THE FITOUT’s commitment to green construction through early adoption and ongoing education on emerging techniques and products has resulted in works that are in sync with the environment and also satisfy client needs.

THE FITOUT’s list of prestigious clients and projects includes Ritz Carlton, Marriott, Blue Waters, Green Community, Mall of the Emirates, Crowne Plaza, The Address Hotel, twofour54, Palazzo Versace, Abu Dhabi Commercial Bank, Cleveland Clinic, Creek-side Residence, Nikki Beach Resort, Emirates National Oil Company, W Hotel, Rotana, RTA, UP-Town Mirdiff, Motor City, Citibank, FIVE Palm Jumeirah, Index Tower, Dubai Autodrome, Skynews, SLS Hotel, RIU Hotel, University of Wollongong and many more.

Description:
Ocean Lifespaces India Private Limited, formerly known as Ocean Interiors Ltd., was established in 1996 and specializes in general contracting for MEP, Facade, Construction, and Design & Build projects.

Name: UMI GROUP
Description:
UMI is your one-stop shop in UAE for experiential marketing and design. Over 15 years of events management, interior design and exhibition services experience.

Ultimately we are experts who understand the challenges of today’s ever changing world.

Since 2005, our most notable strength is grounded in implementing each of our clients’ demands into customized high-standard solutions in every stage of their business cycles; from branding, to interior design all the way to event management. 
With a family business mindset; every client is top-priority. However large or small a requirement is, we pride ourselves on attitude, service levels and flexibility; all whilst offering solutions that meet specified budgets.

We do not aspire to be the biggest marketing firm on the planet, nor do we feel the need to be the most famous . Our goal is to develop a close partnership with you so that we can understand how you think and what makes you tick. 

This approach is vital as it helps us create the perfect solution that will truly make a difference to your business. Then, with an innovative strategy and a personalized methodology we will prove to be the essential ingredient needed to help you face challenges and to grow to your fullest potential.

Name: CUISINELLA
Description:
Cuisinellà est fière d'être une marque de Schmidt Groupe, premier fabricant français, certifié B Corp, et de s'associer à ce mouvement contribuant à une économie plus inclusive, plus équitable et plus régénératrice ! 

La marque réunit des hommes et des femmes animés par la même passion : l’aménagement personnalisé à prix accessible.

Première marque en notoriété spontanée chaque année depuis 2010, Cuisinella compte plus de 300 magasins en France, Dom-Tom, Suisse et Belgique. 

Fabriquer et consommer responsable, évoluer et faire évoluer, s’adapter, prendre soin des consommateurs, travailler avec des entreprises humaines, locales et familiales, sont autant de principes que Cuisinella défend au quotidien.Ses produits exclusifs, astucieux et innovants permettent de mieux consommer au quotidien en tout simplicité. 

Marque créative par excellence, elle propose à ses clients des décors tendance et originaux pour des aménagements totalement personnalisés. 

Depuis plus de 30 ans, Cuisinella se donne pour mission de réunir des talents à la fois uniques et complémentaires. Nous sommes persuadés qu’un collaborateur heureux rend le client heureux. C’est pourquoi nous créons les conditions propices à l’épanouissement de nos équipes, ainsi qu’à la satisfaction de nos clients. 

Notre devise ? Toujours à l’écoute de vos (en)vies professionnelles, nous recherchons des personnalités aussi audacieuses que pétillantes !

Name: MBDS
Description:
Martin Brudnizki Design Studio (MBDS) is an internationally acclaimed interior architecture and design studio based in London and New York. 

Founded by Martin Brudnizki in 2000, the team is composed of over 100 interior designers, architects, lighting designers, product designers and art consultants and has experience creating hotels, restaurants, bars, private members’ clubs; alongside residential developments and helping a select number of people design their dream homes.

At the heart of the Studio’s work is a profound commitment to the individual and their experience of an interior. Through the careful study of a project’s context and a client’s lifestyle, a dedication to functionality and a love of layering different materials, textures and styles, the Studio hand-crafts environments that enable our clients to develop personal and long-lasting relationships with their interiors.

"We create experiences not spaces." - MBDS

Name: Fitout Bureau Interiors
Description: Fitout Bureau Interiors is one of the leading interior design and fitout company in Dubai. With a passion for creating stunning spaces, we specialize in providing comprehensive architectural and interior design solutions, fitout services, joinery, MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing), authority approvals, and custom-made bespoke furniture production. Since our establishment in 2013, we have consistently delivered exceptional results that exceed our clients' expectations.

Name: Pierre-Yves Rochon (PYR)
Description:
PYR was founded by Pierre-Yves Rochon in 1979 to create luxury hospitality and residential interior environments. Every aspect of the guest experience is enhanced by seamless integration of each property’s location, culture and history with its design.  Our design philosophy centers on creating a refined, comfortable atmosphere that celebrates elegance and warmth while providing a timeless backdrop for an ever-changing modern culture.

PYR has been entrusted with iconic historic landmarks as well as new, cutting-edge developments around the world as a direct result of the creative integrity, authenticity and craftsmanship we bring to every project.  Our design achievements deliver award-winning results for major international hospitality brands such as Four Seasons, Ritz-Carlton, Waldorf Astoria, Fairmont, St. Regis, Peninsula, Shangri-La, Sofitel, InterContinental, and numerous boutique hotels. In addition, PYR has created restaurant environments for some of the world’s most innovative chefs, such as Joël Robuchon, Alain Ducasse, Paul Bocuse, Gérard Boyer, and Jean-Georges Vongerichten.

Offices in Paris and Chicago work collaboratively on projects throughout North America, Europe, Middle East and Asia.  Designers and technical staff are organized into integrated project teams offering a full spectrum of interior design services. PYR’s design leadership is fully engaged in every aspect of the design process, approaching each project with decades of experience and the goal of transforming business and strategic objectives of clients into successful design solutions.

Name: Muraspec Polska
Description:
Muraspec jest międzynarodowym liderem w sektorze tapet komercyjnych produkowanych seryjnie i na zamówienie. Nasze dziedzictwo sięga lat 50-tych XIX wieku. Już od tamtej pory stawiamy na jakość, styl oraz wsparcie techniczne produkcji. 
Ogólnoświatowa renoma naszych produktów potwierdza ich wyjątkowość. Zaufanie klientów zawdzięczamy również naszej kreatywności oraz innowacyjności. 
Kolejna kwestia to fakt, że tapety Muraspec produkowane są na wymiar. Możemy spełnić każde życzenie klienta, nawet te najbardziej wymagające. Nasze tapety cechują się trwałością i odpornością na uszkodzenia, dzięki czemu cieszą się popularnością w obiektywach użyteczności publicznej.
Tapety Muraspec można znaleźć w wielu prestiżowych miejscach na całym świecie, w tym w hotelach, restauracjach oraz biurach. To potwierdzenie, że nasze produkty są synonimem jakości i dobrego gustu. 
Oferujemy również szeroki wybór tapet z nadrukiem cyfrowym, co daje nieograniczone możliwości w kwestii personalizacji. Nasze tapety to produkty przyjazne środowisku, wyprodukowane z materiałów z recyklingu. 
Muraspec to firma z wieloletnim doświadczeniem, oferujemy produkty doskonałej jakości, oryginalny styl oraz wsparcie techniczne na każdym etapie. Zaufaj nam i przekonaj się sam!

Name: gin design group
Description:
gin design group creates bold, artistic interiors that resonate with culture‑forward hospitality brands.

At the heart of our practice is a commitment to creating bespoke environments that are dramatic, diverse, and conceived with originality, integrity, and intention.

Working primarily in the hospitality space, we bring a deep awareness of industry-specific needs and nuances, navigating the required consultant coordination and rigorous timelines with rigourous collaboration and accountability. 

We don’t rely on a house style or a standard design toolkit. We don’t repeat details or follow a formula. Instead, we learn each client’s visual language and translate it into spaces that are multi-sensory, emotionally resonant, and carefully composed.
 
Our design sensibility is inherently theatrical, shaped by founder Gin Braverman’s background in production design. This foundation fuels our instinct for storytelling through space, choreography of movement, and sensory layering. Our intentional use of color, texture and lighting contributes to a powerful sense of place and a palpable energy shift upon arrival.

Description: Le studio KLR intérieur est situé à Lacenas à proximité de Villefranche-sur-Saône dans le beaujolais. C’est un studio d’architecture intérieure créatif dirigé par Claire Augoyat. Tout en portant une grande attention à vos besoins et à vos goûts, KLR vous propose de vous aider à concevoir un intérieur original et fonctionnel. Il faut bien sûr échanger énormément pour répondre correctement aux besoins des clients, ainsi une relation de confiance est primordiale dans notre métier. Je vous propose de l’écoute et un accompagnement personnalisé pour concevoir ensemble votre intérieur idéal. Je mets à votre service mes 12 ans d’expérience en agence ou j’ai pu travailler sur près de 200 projets pour des particuliers et des professionnels. J’ai également eu la chance de participer à 45 émissions de la maison France 5 dans la rubrique changer, ce qui m’a donné l’envie de me lancer en indépendant pour pouvoir répondre à des problématiques quotidiennes et aider mes clients à améliorer leurs intérieurs. Toutes les problématiques sont intéressantes lorsque l’on essaye d’y répondre de manière originale et personnelle, c’est pour cela que je n’ai pas de forfait fixe, chaque demande est étudiée afin de vous proposer un devis personnalisé. Vous souhaitez agrandir chez vous, rénover l’intérieur ou vous approprier une nouvelle résidence ? contactez-moi et commençons à échanger sur votre projet.

Description:
Wuestman BV, opgericht in 1870, is totaalleverancier voor kantoren en ontmoetingsruimten en bestaat uit de onderstande vier divisies:

1. Projectinrichting
    meubilair - stoffering - raambekleding - verlichting - ergonomie

2. Audiovisueel
    beeld - geluid - licht - besturing

3. Office Supplies
     kantoorartikelen - computersupplies - cartridges - facilitaire producten

4. Document Solutions
    afdruksystemen - scanoplossingen

Onze medewerkers kenmerken zich door hun diepgaande en actuele expertise en toegepaste ervaring. En bovendien: door hun enthousiasme, proactieve houding en affiniteit met innovatieve oplossingen. We hebben passie voor het vak en zetten onze expertise volledig in voor klanten. 

Projectinrichting & Audiovisueel
Wuestman is ánders. Als enige in Nederland richt de organisatie volledige kantoren en ontmoetingsruimten in. Medewerkers van de divisies Projectinrichting en Audiovisueel geven advies, maken interieurontwerpen en richten kantoren in met meubilair, stoffering, raambekleding, verlichting, beeld, geluid en audiovisuele besturing. Zowel standaard oplossingen als maatwerkoplossingen en zowel verkoop als verhuur voor entree, kantoor, vergaderruimte, pantry, lounge, boardroom, raadzaal, leslokaal en bedrijfsrestaurant. 

Office Supplies & Document Solutions
De divisie Office Supplies is hét adres voor alle kantoorartikelen en computertoebehoren. Van standaard kantoorbenodigdheden, koffiezetapparatuur, koffie-ingrediënten en sanitaire benodigdheden tot oplossingen voor documentprocessing, postverwerking en datadragervernietiging. 
Document Solutions is de divisie voor multifunctionals, netwerkprinters, copiers en bijbehorende software-oplossingen voor het digitaal opslaan, uitwisselen, (re)produceren, zoeken en wijzigen van documenten. Met als resultaat: lagere kosten en een hogere productiviteit.

Wuestman: 'Complementaire specialismen voor toonaangevende organisaties' 

Samen maken we het verschil!

We believe everyone deserves to live in a space that brings them joy and makes their lives easier. So, our key aim is to create a home that improves the quality of your life through our design decisions. 

And the result is a unique space that’s beautiful and functional. Helping you and your family live your best lives in a home you’re proud of.

HOW WE WORK:
> We work closely with you to plan your space with everything designed around your needs. Incorporating innovative solutions to give you a home that allows you to live with ease and flow. 

> We work with your architect to ensure there’s cohesion between their plans for building work and your design needs for the interior.

> We take care of your whole project. From the initial design stage, through to supply and installation. And you’ll have one point of contact throughout. 

WE OFFER A RANGE OF SERVICES INCLUDING:
> Complete home refurbishments - re-configuring a space and introducing a new layout. 
> Redesigning an existing space - retaining or restoring original features.
> Introducing a new extension.
> Designing and installing a bespoke kitchen or bathroom.
> Providing a design and supply package only.

We help you decide on a scheme you love, then manage our dedicated team of designers and fitters to complete your project to perfection. 

As a family-run business, we build lasting relationships with our clients. And we share an extra sense of pride and purpose in creating that space for you. Taking as much care with your home as we would if it was our own. 

Follow us to get design inspiration for your home from the posts we share.

To chat about how we can help you with your next home improvement project, send us a DM.

Name: Decoroom
Description:
Pracownia Architektury Wnętrz Decoroom jest obecna na rynku od 2009 roku i z wieloma sukcesami na koncie pozycjonuje się jako jeden z pionierów usługi kompleksowego wykończenia mieszkania „pod klucz”. Decoroom zaprasza Klientów do dwóch flagowych showroomów połączonych z biurem zlokalizowanych w Warszawie oraz we Wrocławiu. Ofertę wyróżnia kompleksowość i najwyższy standard obsługi – w jednym miejscu Klient otrzymuje projekt, materiały, sprawdzoną ekipę wykończeniową, gwarancję na wykonane usługi i pomoc doświadczonych specjalistów na każdym etapie współpracy. Firma współpracuje z czołowymi przedstawicielami branży wykończeniowej, a swój wizerunek w branży zawdzięcza profesjonalnemu podejściu, wysokiej jakości usług i doświadczeniu budowanemu przez lata. W ofercie Decoroom znajdziemy 3 pakiety: Standard, Premium oraz Designer, które odpowiadają potrzebom najbardziej wymagających klientów. Decoroom prężnie działa także w segmencie PRS.

*** Decoroom jest laureatem European Property Awards – Best Office Interior Europe (2015-2016)
*** Decoroom jest laureatem European Property Awards – Best Office Interior Poland (2022-2023)
*** Decoroom jest Członkiem Wspierającym Polskiego Związku Firm Deweloperskich.

Name: Visievormgevers
Description:
Bij Visievormgevers ontwerpen we funtionele ruimtes voor kantoren, winkels, horeca en scholen. Met een doordacht proces, van de juiste vragen stellen tot het realiseren van een spraakmakend ontwerp, zorgen we voor ruimtes die werken, inspireren en verbinden.

Wij vertalen jouw identiteit naar een interieur dat klopt. Geen standaardinrichting, geen snelle stylingtrucs. Wij ontwerpen doordachte ruimtes die voelen als een verlengstuk van je organisatie. Van beleving tot gebruik.

De beste ontwerpen beginnen met de juiste vragen. Als ruimtelijk vormgevers duiken we samen met jou in de kern van jouw vraagstuk en organisatie: waar loop je tegenaan en wat heeft jouw bedrijf écht nodig? Door in de beginfase meer aandacht en tijd te investeren, creëren we een solide basis voor een ruimte die niet alleen functioneel en toekomstbestendig is, maar ook perfect past bij jouw identiteit en ambities.

Met scherpe inzichten en heldere uitgangspunten ontstaan nieuwe mogelijkheden. Het ontwerpproces wordt een intuïtieve reis richting een omgeving die naadloos aansluit bij jouw visie en merk. Het resultaat? Een plek waar mensen samenkomen, zich verbonden voelen en geïnspireerd raken. Een ruimte die niet alleen functioneert, maar ook energie geeft en stimuleert.

Name: SPOON AND ROOM
Description:
Spoon & Room, ou comment passer de la cuisine au bureau en un instant pour vivre sans transition dans des espaces esthétiques et vivants ! Cette toute nouvelle marque dépoussière le design et revoit les concepts d’aménagement en créant des habitats durables, cohérents esthétiquement et désirables. 

Spoon & Room conçoit des meubles modulables, beaux et bons pour créer des intérieurs qui vivent librement au rythme de toutes les vies. 
L’usage, l’usage, l’usage... Le mantra incontournable de la marque casse les traditions. Plutôt que de proposer mille produits pour mille usages, Spoon & Room invente LE meuble pour mille et une vies, renverse les codes de l’aménagement et choisit simplement la liberté durable.

Spoon & Room est une marque de Schmidt Groupe, fabricant français d’aménagements intérieurs pour l’habitat, labellisé B CorpTM. Cette certification exigeante démontre l’engagement du groupe et sa volonté de s’inscrire dans une démarche d’amélioration continue, tant sur le plan industriel et économique que social, sociétal et environnemental.

Name: Real Art Company Limited
Description:
Real Art Company Limited, established in Saudi Arabia, is a leading name in the region’s interior design and fit-out industry. Expanding from our strong presence in the UAE, we launched Real Art Company Limited to bring our innovative design solutions and exceptional craftsmanship to the Saudi market. With a focus on creating functional yet aesthetically stunning spaces, we have become a trusted partner for clients across various sectors, including commercial, residential, hospitality, and retail.

Building on our experience and success in the UAE under Real Art Interior LLC, we’ve grown our expertise in delivering custom interior designs that combine elegance, creativity, and functionality. Our team of skilled designers, architects, and craftsmen works closely with each client to bring their vision to life, ensuring every project is completed to the highest standards.

At Real Art Company Limited, we understand the unique demands of the Saudi market and are committed to offering bespoke solutions tailored to the needs of our clients. Whether it's transforming corporate offices, luxury residences, or vibrant commercial spaces, our goal is always to deliver timeless designs that make a lasting impression.

With a focus on quality, precision, and client satisfaction, we continue to expand our portfolio, building a reputation for excellence across Saudi Arabia and the wider Gulf region. From concept to completion, we aim to create spaces that are not only visually captivating but also practical and enduring.

Real Art Company Limited is proud to be part of the Afih Group, a name synonymous with innovation, design excellence, and craftsmanship. Through our dedication to quality and a passion for creating inspiring spaces, we continue to lead the way in the interior design industry, shaping the future of interiors across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

⸻

Art Solutions | Curating Iconic Photography for Digital Spaces

Name: MOITIÉ STUDIO
Description:
MOITIÉ STUDIO è uno studio di architettura e design con sede a Milano, nato da un’idea di Francesco Gennaro e Giorgia Rossi. 
Francesco e Giorgia, rispettivamente di Cuneo e Treviso, uniscono le loro origini alla maturata identità milanese, lavorando in diversi rami dell’architettura d’interni: progettazione di spazi commerciali di lusso, residenze private, spazi dell’accoglienza e installazioni temporanee, coordinando figure professionali di alto livello internazionali e locali nella gestione di ogni progetto. 

“Ci piace creare un immaginario contaminato che è frutto di ciò che vediamo, osserviamo, immagazziniamo, reinterpretiamo. Attingiamo dal mondo dell'arte, della moda, della musica, dei viaggi… linguaggi emotivi diversi che vengono poi tradotti in soluzioni estetiche e tecniche uniche, studiate ad hoc per ogni cliente.”

Da marzo 2024 entrano nel corpo docente del Corso di Interior Design presso lo IED di Milano.

Da aprile 2025 firmano collezioni di arredo e
illuminazione per alcuni noti brand del design
italiano: CASAMILANO, CONTE
CASA,TISETTANTA e OFFICINE MORELLI.

Name: La Cuisine
Description:
La Cuisine est un concept store parisien où le design intérieur devient une véritable expérience sensible et sur-mesure. Fondée et dirigée par un créateur passionné, notre vision dépasse celle d’un showroom haut de gamme : La Cuisine est un lieu hybride, à la croisée de l’agence d’architecture, de la galerie d’art, de l’espace coworking et de l’atelier culinaire. Plus qu’un espace, c’est un laboratoire d’inspirations où l’art de vivre se réinvente, à la recherche de l’harmonie parfaite.

Qu’il s’agisse de cuisine, de salon ou de tout autre espace de vie, chaque projet est une composition singulière, un accord subtil entre esthétisme, fonctionnalité et émotion. Comme une recette unique, il révèle l’identité de nos clients, dans des intérieurs pensés pour durer et se vivre pleinement.

Notre approche est résolument collaborative. Grâce à notre outil de conception 3D immersif, nous offrons à chacun la possibilité de visualiser et d’affiner son projet en temps réel. Nous accompagnons nos clients pas à pas, avec exigence, intuition et sens du détail.

Nous tissons des liens exclusifs avec des marques d’exception et des artisans au savoir-faire remarquable. Ensemble, nous créons des lieux uniques, porteurs de sens et de beauté.

La Cuisine est bien plus qu’un espace de conception : c’est un lieu de transmission, de partage et de création. Ancrée au cœur de Paris, elle dialogue avec les commerçants et artisans du quartier pour proposer une expérience locale, humaine et inspirante.

Un espace coworking accueille également les professionnels de l’intérieur et les esprits créatifs, dans une atmosphère élégante et stimulante. 

 À La Cuisine, chaque projet se cuisine comme une œuvre intime, relevée de passion, servie avec émotion et destinée à être savourée au quotidien.

Description:

Although we have been in business for 21 years, we like to think of ourselves as a startup. The excitement, innovation, and passion from all of our team members allow us to stay current and relevant. We are never satisfied.

Name: By Kepi
Description:
We started the ByKepi dream in the year 1994, in a 60 square meters workshop. A whole world of dreams had fit into this 60 square meters…

Since 2001, when our first factory of 24 thousand square meters was found in İzmir, Sarnıç, through our ByKepi brand, we cater to all the furniture needs of your home from your dining room to bedroom, from the living room to the kitchen, in an “haute couture” style of service with designs unique to you.

With a holistic approach for design and production, and a modern, tasteful vision, we do furniture tailoring and make every space we touch a timeless and extraordinary place. In truth, we are redesigning the magnificence!

Here in the ByKepi family, we approach every detail from reliefs on a small mirror’s frame to the curves of a leg that carries a large chair with scrupulousness of a tailor, while finding our inspirations in both life and you for designing the original and elite furniture that you will use. Thus, every original product, designed uniquely for you, carries the signature and textures of your lifestyle.

So far, we have beautified many living spaces not only in Turkey but also in many places all over the world…

We never compromised on the principle of truthfulness that is the foundation of philosophy that forms the quality of our services. Keeping our promises, working in a customer satisfaction focused approach, and sincerity have always been ahead of our commercial goals.

Name: FlatPackCo
Description:
Imagine you want to open a restaurant. Normally, this involves weeks or months of planning, dealing with design iterations, multiple contractors, and facing unpredictable costs and delays. It's like piecing together a massive jigsaw puzzle from scratch.

FlatPackCo changes all that. We're like the IKEA of restaurants, but with a professional touch. We pre-make up to 70% of your fit-out works offsite. These parts are designed to fit together easily, like a giant, grown-up Lego set.

We manufacture, assemble, and install through our path breaking methodology. Unlike traditional contracting, this parallel activity to onsite work reduces the go-to-market time by over 50%.

This approach ensures consistent quality (because everything is made in a controlled factory environment), reduces costs (by streamlining the process), and minimizes the chaos typically associated with traditional fit-outs. Our integrated design-to-build process, coupled with real-time project tracking, makes the entire experience seamless and predictable. It's faster, more efficient, and positions your business for profitability.

Fixed Interior Elements
Loose Furniture

Façade
Kiosk Formats
Commercial Kitchen Equipment
Signage
Lighting

At FlatPackCo, we empower entrepreneurs to scale rapidly in today’s competitive market. 

Experience the future of restaurant fit-outs—efficient, hassle-free, and tailored to your vision. Discover solutions that are built easy, built right.

Name: Sawtar LuxeInteriors
Description:
At Sawtar Luxe Interiors, we are redefining luxury in the interior design industry, focusing on sophistication, comfort, and innovation. As generations advance and civilisations grow, industries like AI demonstrate the rapid pace of change. However, when it comes to luxury interiors in India, a significant gap persists due to factors like GDP, manpower, and accessibility. 

People easily associate brands like Apple for phones, Samsung for refrigerators, or Bugatti for cars, but when it comes to interiors, there is often confusion due to the lack of prominent and trustworthy brands. That’s where we step in. 

We specialize in crafting exceptional spaces tailored to the unique tastes and needs of our clients. From residential masterpieces to commercial showpieces, we blend creativity, cultural roots, and cutting-edge aesthetics with functional elegance to transform every vision into a reality. Proudly established as the first corporate interior design firm in Jharkhand, our mission goes beyond design—we aim to contribute to the development of our state by creating employment opportunities and fostering growth. 

Our evolved business model ensures we deliver high-quality services on time and within budget, making luxury accessible without compromising emotional and relational values. With a commitment to excellence, our expert team ensures each project is as rewarding as the final result. 

Our Vision: To set a benchmark in the interior design industry by providing innovative, elegant, and culturally rooted designs that redefine luxury. 

Our Mission: To build lasting relationships with our clients by respecting their emotions, values, and aspirations while delivering unmatched quality and service. 

Our Slogan: Let’s crack it and make it! 

Join us as we transform spaces and elevate experiences—because at **Sawtar Luxe Interiors**, we don’t just design; we inspire.

Name: Ecolattice
Description:
Revolutionising sustainability with advanced tech and customisable structures, shaping tomorrow's innovations. EcoLattice offers a versatile solution applicable in various interior spaces and automotive environments. Utilizing recycled Thermoplastic Elastomers (TES)  , EcoLattice develops advanced foaming technology to create lightweight and resilient cellular cushions. These cushions, personalized through generative design and AI-driven customization, excel in shock absorption, durability, and protection.

Whether integrated into interior spaces like office furniture or automotive seating, EcoLattice cushions provide superior comfort and support. Their eco-friendly lattice structures degrade under specific conditions, ensuring optimal performance while minimizing environmental impact. Additive manufacturing and foaming technology enable cost-effective production, making EcoLattice accessible across different industries

Name: Vangor Interior Design
Description:
A Vangor é uma marca portuguesa que atua em sistema de franchising na área da Decoração de Interiores e comercialização de mobiliário e acessórios. O seu posicionamento inovador no mercado e sua missão clara de levar uma decoração profissional a toda a classe média em Portugal, revelam-se como mais-valias de um negócio diferente, altamente atrativo, com uma alta rentabilidade. 

A VANGOR pertence ao Grupo NBRAND. Um Grupo com mais de 17 anos de história e um percurso de criação de marcas e negócios de sucesso. Uma dela diz respeito à Urban Obras, uma das marcas mais proeminentes e com quem a VANGOR estabelece uma relação umbilical e sinérgica. Após 12 anos de atividade e milhares de projetos de obras, decoração e mobiliário executados a nível nacional pelos seus ateliers, a Urban Obras sentiu um crescente aumento da procura dos clientes por serviços complementares, na área do design de interiores e fornecimento de mobiliário. Assim nasceu a VANGOR, vindo preencher um espaço novo e esquecido no mercado entre as marcas de mobiliário e os pequenos decoradores independentes.

Focada na crescente procura classe média a média-alta, pretende satisfazer um público que não se revê, nem na oferta massificada de baixo custo, nem na oferta estandardizada das marcas de mobiliário tradicionais.

A VANGOR assegura um modelo de negócio de sucesso. Assiste os seus parceiros franqueados com todo o suporte de negócio necessários, desde o momento inicial, passando pela captação central e contínua de novos clientes locais e posterior envio destes para as lojas, assegurando assim uma das componentes mais críticas no sucesso do negócio.

Name: Nicole Hogarty Designs
Description:
As an experienced principal designer and business owner, Nicole Hogarty expertly hones her intuitive sense for imagining residential spaces that evoke a deep sense of beauty and wellbeing. She is personally involved in all aspects of each project—from the interior architecture to the design, logistics, and communication. Every NHD project begins with forming a creative, collaborative connection to the client. 

A boutique, full-service design firm based in SOWA, the heart of artistic Boston, NHD is rooted in New England but has a studio presence nationally. Each project taken on is unique in scope, and confidently managed by Nicole with the support of a highly skilled team of six. Whether it’s designing a single-family brownstone in the city for a young family, conceiving a sophisticated coastal compound, or following clients to new locations across the country, Nicole conducts the transformation. 

The NHD aesthetic is intended to awaken emotion—from the serene, modern foundation to the layered details, textures, and careful attention to proportion. There is remarkable craft at work in the architectural features, yet the space is never obvious or over-designed. In this perfectly imperfect environment, everything has a purpose and even the smallest details matter—like the unexpected hardware in a private elevator, the bespoke display cabinet for a serious horologist, or the lush mohair throw draped across a favorite lounge chair.

Every home is fully attuned on a cellular level to the nuances of the client’s lifestyle and character—whether that’s tailored and refined or bold and unapologetic. The true luxury lies in the way the design process is one hundred percent customizable according to what excites the client.

The firm’s work spans residential and commercial projects and has been featured in international press, magazines, and design books.

The team is also the creative force behind West | Out East, a set of design showrooms that present modern furniture, lighting, kitchens, rugs, closets, and accessories. Name: ZIMANO STUDIO
Description:
ZIMANO DESIGN STUDIO

ZIMANO is a creative design studio that specializes in interior decoration. Our primary objective is to find innovative solutions to reduce landfill waste while creating fresh, beautiful, and energetic surroundings for our customers through our handcrafted products. To achieve this goal, we design new materials using solid waste as raw materials in the production of decorative items. 

ZIMANO is all about our lives as humans and the life of our planet, which sustains us. We introduce a new approach to waste management. Instead of treating trash as useless and throwing it away, we can be more mindful of our waste and find ways to repurpose it into valuable, functional, and beautiful items. This approach not only reduces waste but also conserves non-renewable resources for future generations. Therefore, ZIMANO is not just a brand; it's a lifestyle that encourages sustainability and responsible consumption.

Name: BRAND VAN EGMOND
Description:
Brand van Egmond was founded by William Brand in 1989. Graduated from the School of Arts as an architect and sculptor, he wanted to create with complete autonomy. The atelier, based in The Netherlands, is currently presented in 90 countries across the globe.

William believes spaces - and people - deserve a lighting sculpture that evokes emotions and adds character. His clientele is as eclectic as his collections: ranging from Royals to Rappers. His work is used with the same ease in some of Europe oldest castles, as in the latest hotels and on yachts. While they are effortlessly applied in different styles of interiors, they are always inspirational and characterful.

Working hand in hand with architects around the world, some of the most beautiful projects of the atelier have been realised. Every collection can be customised into any dimension. Besides, there is also the truly unique possibility of creating a commissioned lighting sculpture. 

Given their artisan approach towards lighting, it comes as no surprise that luxury brands like Louis Vuitton, Chopard and the W Hotel have embraced the work of Brand van Egmond for their public spaces.

Curious to learn more? Explore the website, social media or contact us directly to discuss the possibility of translating any of your wishes into handcrafted reality!

Name: HIDECOR
Description:
For ten years, we’ve been building workspaces for the companies shaping what’s next. 
Instead of adding more vendors to an already chaotic industry, we operate as a single Design and Build partner that owns the journey from strategy to handover so businesses can scale without friction.

We started with a clear observation. Commercial real estate moves slower than the companies driving today’s economy. GCCs expanding fast. Healthcare needing precision. Global teams expecting consistency across markets. Traditional models weren’t built for this reality, so we built one that was.

Our FMF framework brings structure to the three points where things usually fall apart, Find the right property, Make the complete design and build with integrated teams, and help funding companies so companies stay agile. 
One partner. One flow. No fragmentation.

With a 65+ member team across design, architecture, engineering, procurement, and project management, we focus on Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, and Chennai, delivering pan India with a growing footprint in the US and Singapore.

What anchors everything is our culture. A team that takes ownership, pushes standards, celebrates wins, and actually enjoys building together. No silos. No passengers. Just a driven, collaborative crew that shows up with accountability and energy.

We specialise in workspaces, healthcare, GCCs and complex commercial environments. Spaces designed & built for today’s workflows and tomorrow’s ambitions.

If you’re building for scale or looking to join a team that takes outcomes seriously and culture even more seriously, you’ll fit right in at Hidecor.

Name: TAPIS ROUGE Milan
Description:
Tapis Rouge is an iconic custom-tailored design brand for fine rugs, bringing the concept of on-trend design together with superior quality of textures and materials. With headquarters in Milan and production in Nepal we deliver our fine rugs to over 120 countries, creating bespoke pieces of art for private houses, residences, yachts and lounges. 
Our team of artists, colour specialists, interior designers aims to offer tailored service for those who choose and enjoy a high end design object. 
Manufactured in artisanal hand-knotting techniques, with highest knot density per inch, the fine rugs by Tapis Rouge are the centerpieces of interiors, developing the art of space, tone, rhythm and composition.


Brand Story
Fine rugs have always been our core business thanks to our family traditions and in-depth knowledge of fine materials. The appreciation and gratitude to the classical rug heritage is in our brand’s DNA and a key ethical compass in creating all our designs. We attract talented artists, designers, colorists, illustrators and craftsmen who share our passion for Beauty and Design creating cutting-edge, trend-setting fine rugs of superior quality.
Pursuing a sustainable approach to business management, we have find out the ways to save and imply the craft techniques of Persian rugs, following the Tradition practiced by artisans for hundreds of years.
In 1970s we have turned from the family business into an internationally recognized fine rug brand with headquarters in Milan, Italy, production facilities in Nepal, as well as strong network of partners and representative offices, delivering to over 120 countries of the world.
We also do produce beautiful designs and create knotted rugs for a more democratic segment - there we substitute silk with viscose or bamboo-silk and can also offer more democratic variants for hotels, apartments, etc.

Name: cc-tapis
Description:
cc-tapis is an Italian rug maker which produces contemporary hand-made rugs.
The company was founded by Nelcya Chamszadeh and Fabrizio Cantoni in France who have been producing hand-knotted rugs in Nepal for over 20 years. In 2011 cc-tapis moved to Milan where the company is now based where a team of designers lead by Daniele Lora, art-director and partner, innovate through a new approach to traditional methods.

                    

A strong respect for the materials and for the culture of this ancient craft is reflected in the company’s eco-friendly approach to every step of production, ranging from the hand spinning of the softest materials to the use of purified rainwater for the washing of the final products, making each one of cc-tapis rugs unique.

                    

Far from mass production, cc-tapis aims to offer a tailored service to those who understand and enjoy a high-end product which contains the story of an ageless culture.

Como estudio multidisciplinar, nos especializamos en la ejecución de proyectos en diversos ámbitos, desde espacios residenciales hasta comerciales, restaurantes, oficinas y hoteles. Nuestro equipo de profesionales altamente capacitados aborda cada desafío con una visión única y una pasión incansable por crear ambientes inspiradores y funcionales.

En Ferruz Studio, entendemos que cada cliente y proyecto es único. Nos comprometemos a escuchar atentamente sus necesidades y deseos, y a traducirlos en diseños personalizados que reflejen su estilo y personalidad. Nuestra filosofía se basa en fusionar la estética y la funcionalidad, creando espacios que no solo cautivan visualmente, sino que también mejoran la calidad de vida de quienes los habitan.

En resumen, en Ferruz Studio ofrecemos un enfoque integral de diseño y construcción, respaldado por nuestra experiencia, pasión y compromiso. Estamos listos para convertir sus sueños en realidad y transformar cualquier espacio en una obra maestra arquitectónica y de diseño.

Name: IIDA Mid Atlantic Chapter
Description:
The Mid-Atlantic Chapter of the International Interior Design Association (IIDA MAC) is a premier professional organization committed to advancing interior design knowledge and fostering greater awareness of the industry. We aim to expand the appreciation of interior design, not only among professionals but also within the broader public.

Formed in 1999 through the merger of the IIDA Washington Metro and IIDA Baltimore Chapters, IIDA MAC serves the dynamic region encompassing the District of Columbia, Maryland, and Northern Virginia. This includes Arlington, Fairfax, Loudoun, Prince William, Stafford, and Fauquier counties, along with the independent cities of Alexandria, Falls Church, Fairfax, Leesburg, Middleburg, Warrenton, Manassas, Manassas Park, and Fredericksburg.

As part of the global IIDA network, we are dedicated to fostering community, advocacy, and education for interior design professionals and promoting the impact of design on the spaces where people live, work, and play.

Discover more about IIDA MAC and how we support the interior design community at www.iidamac.org

 Notre promesse : un aménagement personnalisé à votre image, respectant vos délais, votre budget et vos valeurs.

Name: danfloor Uk Ltd
Description:

Available in a wide range of colours, patterns, and textures, our products are compatible with underfloor heating, supported by comprehensive warranties, and meet rigorous industry certifications for quality and performance.

Sustainability is central to our ethos; many of our carpets hold Environmental Product Declarations (EPD), providing transparent insight into their life-cycle impact and enabling responsible specification choices.

At danfloor, our ongoing commitment to quality assurance and certification gives you confidence that our carpets consistently meet and exceed the highest standards of design, performance, and environmental responsibility.

Follow us for design inspiration, sustainability insights, and real-world project stories that showcase how danfloor carpets are shaping safer, smarter, and more sustainable interiors across the UK and Europe.

Name: Layan Halwani Interior Architecture
Description:
LAYAN HALWANI INTERIOR ARCHITECTURE is a boutique studio based in Dubai, designing distinctive, emotionally resonant interiors across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia.

Founded by Layan Halwani, the studio is built on a quiet passion for crafting spaces that feel personal, thoughtful, and rooted in cultural awareness. With over 25 years of international experience, LHIA works closely with private clients, developers, and lifestyle brands to shape interiors that are not only elegant, but deeply connected to those who live and work within them.

We don’t follow trends. Instead, our work reflects a balanced design language that merges timeless aesthetics, regional sensitivity, and refined materiality. Every project, whether a serene residence, a branded workspace, or a signature boutique development, is approached with care, discretion, and an eye for enduring quality.

Our studio offers:
• Bespoke interior architecture for private and commercial spaces
• Concept design and creative direction with cultural depth
• FF&E and furniture curation through international sourcing partners
• Advisory on façade refinements and architectural integration
• Project involvement from concept to completion, always hands-on

We believe design is more than a service, it’s a relationship. One built on trust, intuition, and an understanding of how beauty and purpose can quietly elevate daily life.

 Based in Dubai | Working internationally
Instagram: @layanhalwaniofficial

Name: Grande Design House
Description: Grande Design House is a full-service design firm specializing in creating stunning interior and exterior spaces with fine finishing. Our team of skilled designers and craftsmen work collaboratively to bring your vision to life, whether you're looking to redesign your home or business. From concept to completion, we'll guide you through the design process, ensuring every detail is accounted for. Our expertise extends to all aspects of design, including furniture selection, lighting, color schemes, and materials. At Grande Design House, we take pride in transforming spaces into breathtaking experiences that reflect your unique personality and style.

Name: Bentuk Ruang
Description:
At Bentuk Ruang, we believe that every space tells a story—one of creativity, functionality, and refined taste. Established in 2000 and initially based in Jakarta, we have grown to become a leading full-service interior design and construction firm, now expanding our reach to Bali.

With over two decades of experience, we specialize in transforming spaces that blend aesthetics with functionality. Our work spans a diverse range of spaces, from luxury residences, vacation homes and villas, commercial spaces, to governmental buildings.

Guided by our motto, "Tastefully Done," we approach every project with a dedication to quality, creativity, and attention to detail.

Our process is collaborative, ensuring that we understand our clients' unique needs and vision. From initial concept to completion, we ensure each detail is meticulously considered, creating spaces that are visually striking and purposefully designed.

Name: Me_High
Description: Me_high, established in 2021, is an innovative interior design firm founded by a young and dynamic interior designer. Specializing in complete home renovation and turnkey project services, Me_high brings a fresh and contemporary approach to transforming living spaces. With a keen eye for design trends and a commitment to client satisfaction, the firm aims to create personalized and aesthetically pleasing environments that reflect the unique style and preferences of each client. Me_high is dedicated to delivering high-quality and comprehensive interior solutions, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable experience for those seeking to enhance their homes.

Name: Britacan
Description:
Britacan is a full service interior design firm with an approach has been rooted in core design principles. With over 40 years of experience in corporate design, our team is dedicated in providing the highest level of strategy, design and service to our clients.
Our exceptional experience includes workplace strategy, interior design, furniture procurement and project management from inception to completion. As a mid-sized firm we able to successfully manage projects of varying complexity while always remaining nimble and responsive. 

Britacan takes pride in bringing our clients workplace vision to life, while inspiring you to enjoy each step along the way.

Name: Huber Design Studio
Description: Huber Design Studio is a multi-disciplinary design and architecture studio driven by passion, simplicity, local materials, and holistic design.

Name: IDLN
Description:
At IDLN, we're on a mission to make luxury interior design accessible to all. As a global design studio, we are redefining modern luxury by blending opulence with practicality, ensuring that everyone can experience the beauty and functionality of a well-designed space.

Our journey began in 2023 with a bold vision: to democratise access to high-end interior design by removing barriers like hidden fees and budget limitations. We believe that your home should be a true reflection of your personality and lifestyle, without the need for compromise. Whether it’s a cozy living room, a chic fashion boutique, or a tranquil spa-inspired bathroom, we make luxury design possible for every space and budget.

Our process is simple yet powerful. We start with AI conceptualization to bring your ideas to life, followed by realistic 3D renders and detailed technical drawings that guide the transformation of your space. Each project is a collaboration, where our clients are at the heart of every decision, ensuring the final design is not just beautiful but deeply personal and functional.

At IDLN, we're not just about creating stunning interiors; we're about creating experiences that elevate everyday life. As we grow, so does our commitment to transparency, quality, and making luxury design available to all.

Join us in our mission to transform spaces and lives. Connect with us for design inspiration, project updates, and insights into the evolving world of interior design.

Description:
We are an international Office Design and Build company, trusted and invested by a reputed Australian partner in Office Design industry. 

At Han Spaces, we empower our clients by creating work environments that enhance productivity and well-being. Our design and construction solutions are tailored to each client’s unique needs, ensuring that their office space not only reflects their brand identity but also promotes a culture of innovation and collaboration. By focusing on both functionality and aesthetic appeal, we help businesses unlock their full potential and create spaces where employees feel inspired and valued.

Name: Evento Designs
Description:
Evento Designs is a multi-award winning interior design and architecture firm With many years of experience since founded in 2011 , based in Egypt, UAE and KSA. specialized in the Design and implementation of all Administrative, Commercial, Residential buildings and it provides integrated turnkey services aiming to merge artistic thinking with geometric functions to provide creative designs and projects that never get out of style.
Our services  :
Architecture ,Interior& Exterior Design ,Landscape Design ,Structural Design, Construction for Interior &Exterior projects and landscape execution.

Name: SkyDec Engineers
Description:
Welcome to SkyDec Engineers, formerly known as Kaizen Interior! We are a passionate team of talented and experienced professionals dedicated to designing functional, innovative, and beautiful spaces that cater to our clients's needs.

With several years of experience in the industry, we have developed a specialization in healthcare interiors. We have also received the 'SME Excellence Award' and the 'Pride Bharat Award' for our outstanding work in Healthcare Interior Design. Alongside healthcare projects, we have also successfully worked on various projects including hospitality interiors and architectural services. We pride ourselves on our ability to create designs that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also practical and sustainable.

On our journey, we've worked with renowned clients like Siemens, Philips, Fortis, CK Birla Hospital, Birla IVF, Cannon Medical System, Bluestar, Suraksha Diagnostic, Vijay Diagnostic, and many more. These partnerships have given us a deep understanding of healthcare interior design.

Name: Ravindra Interiors Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Ever heard of breath-taking interiors and exceedingly well functioning designs, this is where it’s made possible!
With an expertise of over 2 decades in designing and building the interiors of corporate offices, top hotels, resorts, educational institutions, residential spaces and much more, RIPL offers its clients with the latest designs and solutions that they would need to elevate their spaces! 
With each client, we strive to go beyond conventional layouts and create the most contemporary & innovative designs to deliver an unparalleled product with the utmost satisfaction.

Name: Green Zen
Description:
Green Zen is redefining luxury interiors with a fusion of biophilic design, wellness, and sophistication in Dubai.

We create transformative environments for high-end offices, residences, and hospitality spaces, seamlessly integrating nature with modern elegance.

From lush vertical gardens to custom-designed zen retreats, our bespoke solutions enhance well-being, productivity, and aesthetic excellence.

Experience a new standard of luxury where tranquility meets innovation

Name: R Fair Architecture Mimarlık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş
Description:
R Fair Architecture olarak 2011 yılından beri sayısız stand tasarımı ve iç mimari projelerinde başarıyla yer alıyor; sanatı yaşam alanlarına entegre ediyoruz.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana farklı fonksiyon ve kapsamdaki A'dan Z'ye yürüttüğümüz
projelerde ise; bir çok stand tasarımı, iç mimari, çok amaçlı ofis, ev, yaşam alanlarını özgün bir bakış açısıyla, edindiğimiz bilgi ve birikimlerin ışığında, dünyada her an değişmekte olan tasarım trendlerini de takip ederek; insan odaklı, efektif ve öznelleştirerek tasarladık.

Yurt içinin yanı sıra yurt dışında elde ettiğimiz başarıları ve layık görüldüğümüz ödülleri, her biri alanında uzman bir kadroyla hizmet veriyor olmamızın doğal bir sonucu olarak görüyoruz.
Çünkü biz inanıyoruz ki her projeye sıra dışı bir yaklaşım getirmek, ancak profesyonel birekibin uyumlu çalışmasıyla gerçekleşir.

Bugün itibarıyla başlangıçta belirlediğimiz hedeflerimize ulaşmış ve hatta çok daha ilerisine geçmiş olmaktan kıvanç duyuyoruz. Şimdi sıra, geleceğin tasarımlarını oluşturmakta ve uzmanlıktan aldığımız gücü yeni projelere yansıtmakta. Yenilemek veya değiştirmek istediğiniz yaşam alanlarınızı en efektif şekilde projelendirirken; tasarım prensiplerine matematik ve sanatı dahil ederek hayallerinizi tecrübemizle buluşturuyoruz.

İhtiyacınız doğrultusunda bizimle iletişime geçin; R Fair Architecture Ekibi olarak sizin için en uygun projeyi hayata geçirelim.

Description:
Fabio Mazzeo Architects is a unique Italian Company with significant experience in architecture and bespoke interior design. 

Our vision is focused on creating a “one of a kind” projects, as symbol of elegance, class, high quality, and taste.
 
Our company offers a full range of services (from Architectural to Landscaping and Interior Design) and for what concerns the interiors, it leads the creative process from the initial concept to the final realization of each single part of any project (mock ups and final production if required). 

The taste for all beautiful things, a precise idea of main characteristics of the Italian way of life, together with an attention to detail, make us a provable example of excellence. We guarantee our clients the possibility to see their dreams come true, in a unique style and based on a client oriented creative approach.

Fitted accordingly to the specific needs and requests of their clients, GEO_ID covers all creative levels that are necessary to bring identity and soul to each design.

Name: Studio Ezube
Description:
Founded in 2013, built on the foundation of creativity, innovation and unmatched services, Studio Ezube is one of the finest and growing Architecture and Interior Designing company in Delhi and NCR.
