Name: Moy Design Studio
Description:
We are a boutique interior design consultancy based in Dubai, dedicated to creating soulful, wellbeing-driven interiors across residential, commercial, and hospitality projects. Our work blends emotional design with functional precision — every material, form, and texture chosen to enhance how people live, work, and connect.

From family villas to boutique clinics and offices, we design environments that balance beauty, comfort, and purpose. Our process is collaborative and transparent — built on listening, empathy, and meticulous attention to detail.

At Moy, design is more than aesthetics — it’s about crafting spaces that uplift, heal, and inspire. We don’t just design interiors; we design how people feel inside them.

Name: BLAK Interiors
Description:
BLAK Interiors is a boutique design studio located in Dubai
Marina operating on various residential and commercial
projects in Dubai since 2020. Our studio understands that as
a homeowner, it can be an overwhelming process to design
a home undergoing major renovations. Consequently, we
aim at supporting our clientele in budgeting, sourcing high
quality materials, finding qualified contractors, and visualising
the design outcomes in their personalised interiors.

Therefore, if you are looking for a turnkey-ready solution, then
our 360° approach to interior design is right for you. From our
wide range of material libraries, our reliable contractors, and
our knowledgeable team of designers, BLAK Interiors creates
bespoke interiors fitted to your unique taste.

Name: RavenThorn Interior Design
Description:
RavenThorn Interior Design is the cornerstone of the RavenThorn Group, offering high-end residential and commercial design solutions. Specializing in bespoke luxury interiors, we combine contemporary aesthetics with the natural beauty of Mexico’s coastline. Our services include custom furniture design, luxury textile sourcing, and full interior renovations. By integrating sustainability, quality craftsmanship, and attention to detail, we create sophisticated spaces tailored to our clients’ unique needs.

As part of the RavenThorn Group, we collaborate with Designers & Contractors M (D.C.M.), Studio Madera, and Grupo Nom.a to provide a seamless experience from concept through completion. This partnership allows us to offer architectural design, custom carpentry, and ongoing property management, ensuring every project is approached holistically. With access to international design resources and local artisanal craftsmanship, we deliver interiors that are globally inspired yet deeply rooted in local culture.

At RavenThorn Interior Design, we believe in the power of great design to transform spaces. By blending innovative solutions with a commitment to sustainability, we create environments that enhance our clients’ lifestyles. From modern oceanfront condos to majestic villas, our team is dedicated to turning visions into reality, all while maintaining the highest standards of luxury, quality, and environmental care.

Name: ecofab integrated solutions
Description: Introducing Ecofab , a pioneer force in sustainable design. Specializing in innovative acoustic panels, Our products redefine interior spaces by seamlessly blending aesthetics with acoustic excellence. Ecofab is committed to creating eco-friendly solutions that enhance both form and function. Elevate your surroundings with our sound-conscious designs, as we embark on a journey to harmonize style and sustainability

Name: Sawyer
Description:
Sawyer is a premier New York-based luxury design studio renowned for creating sophisticated and innovative interiors for hospitality, residential, and resort properties worldwide. Founded by award-winning designer Tracey Sawyer, the firm has been crafting exceptional design experiences for international brands, bespoke boutique projects, and brand prototypes since 2010.

Embracing a holistic approach to design, Sawyer integrates a project's unique identity and neighborhood culture, curating timeless spaces that are elegant and authentic. Their unparalleled expertise lies in the ability to conceive inspiring and captivating interior and design concepts through compelling narrative development and interior architecture.

Sawyer approaches each project with a profound appreciation for the synergy between the interior and exterior, the local context, and historical backdrop while meticulously considering the experiences of residents and guests.

The firm boasts a diverse portfolio, collaborating with luxury and lifestyle clients on world-renowned hotels under leading global brands, elite residential projects, restaurants, cruise ships, and airports.

Sawyer is proudly WBE Certified in New York City, New York State, the Port Authority of NY and NJ, and nationally, and is an esteemed member of the Forbes New York Business Council.

Name: THOMAR Interior
Description: THOMAR Interiors is a leading interior design and furniture manufacturing company based in India, specializing in creating innovative and custom-designed spaces for residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors. Known for their attention to detail, quality craftsmanship, and contemporary aesthetics, THOMAR Interiors has earned a reputation for delivering high-end interior solutions.

Name: AMBIENCE HOME DESIGN SL
Description:
Ambience is a multiple award-winning and market-leading interior architecture firm that brings creative, inspirational residential and retail projects to life around the globe. The luxury brand provides a tailored approach and hands-on service, committed to the detailed execution of our clients' briefs and desires.

Our collective experience encompasses architecture, and all aspects of interior design from international homes, world-class hotel developments, and hospitality projects, through furniture, lighting, product, and accessory design.

Name: Palm Living Interiors
Description:
Palm Living Interiors is a Dubai based studio offering a complete 360° approach to transforming residential, commercial and retail spaces. From interior design and renovations to full fit outs, we bring every project to life with creativity, precision and a keen eye for detail.

Our expertise extends beyond interiors to include landscaping, full joinery, bespoke furniture and styling. As a British-owned company, we proudly manufacture everything in house at our factory in Dubai Investment Park, where over 100 skilled professionals craft each piece with care and quality.

At Palm Living Interiors, we believe in creating spaces that are not only beautiful but also functional and tailored to everyday living. We work closely with our clients from start to finish, ensuring a smooth, collaborative and inspiring design journey.

Looking to collaborate or learn more? We’d love to connect, get in touch today!

Name: Dahliaa Interior Studio
Description:
Dahliaa is a creative house of spectacle & execution created for home lovers.We create masterpieces in collaborative environments enabling us to deliver the client’s ultimate vision.

Our designs are current , yet possess a timeless style generating broad market appeal. With passion for design we constantly pursue fresh inspiration and continually search for most compelling design styles with the highest quality of materials and fixtures.

At Dahliaa we like to work with artists and artisans from around the country, we take pride in empowering Indian craftsmen.

Name: THETA Furniture & More
Description: Since 2008, THETA has been among Romania’s leading fit-out and custom made furniture manufacturers, offering superior quality interior design & fit out solutions for offices, as well as commercial, industrial and residential spaces. We are general contractors of integrated project management services, comprising in architecture & MEP Design, fit-out, maintenance services, consulting and implementation services for standard and custom-made furniture for industries across the economic spectrum.

Name: o cactuu
Description:
O Cactuu a contemporary, conceptual and sustainable Portuguese brand that aims to promote the decoration of interior spaces through art produced by hand in Portugal.

More than a brand, we want to create minimalist spaces that convey comfort, well-being and emotions. All the designs created are thought about the durability and quality of the products. “Buy better, keep forever!”

Based on a passion for authentic product design and functionality, we challenge ourselves to shape the future and we are proud to create ceramic and home textile products based on our core values.

Handmade
All ceramic pieces are produced 100% by hand. The production of the textile is carried out locally within the family.

Zero Waste
Each package is stamped with the slogan “Zero Waste – Recycle me” to reinforce the reuse of our packages.

Exclusive and Limited Productions
We ensure the maximum quality of our products through the creation of limited and exclusive productions.

Sustainability
Handmade requires less energy and natural resources, which results in significantly lower carbon footprints than products made on mass production assembly lines. The materials chosen for home textiles have an extra account for the planet. We bet on fabrics like 100% linen, 100% cotton and organic cotton that reduce the impact on the environment.

Name: acoya design house
Description: At acoya design house, we embrace simple elegance, rich textures and balanced proportions. We create seamless interiors using an artistic approach blending sophisticated, functional and intricate details. We interlace neutral and contrast colours to achieve an airy and harmonious ambiance throughout each space.

Name: INNOSPACE
Description:
INNOSPCAE; Where Innovation Meets Heritage.

At INNOSPCAE, we believe exceptional interior design is a symphony – a harmonious blend of vision, technical expertise, and a deep respect for the architectural foundation.

We specialize in crafting luxurious interiors for discerning clients in the United Arab Emirates & Egypt; Our passion lies in creating spaces that resonate with modern aesthetics and seamlessly integrate with the architectural framework you've meticulously designed.

Here's what sets INNOSPCAE apart:
- Bridging the Gap: We understand the importance of respecting the architectural intent while incorporating contemporary elements. Our team, comprised of seasoned designers and architectural enthusiasts, excels at finding the perfect balance between tradition and innovation.

- We foster strong partnerships with architects as part of our collaborative spirit. As a result, your vision remains at the forefront of our design process. Collaboration and open communication are essential to creating a truly cohesive luxury space.

- Modern Expression: Inspired by the rich heritage of Arabic design, we translate its elegance and cultural significance into contemporary aesthetics. We believe in creating spaces that not only impress but also tell a unique story.

- Technical Expertise: Our designers combine their creative flair with a strong understanding of architectural principles. This ensures that our interior design solutions enhance the aesthetics and are structurally sound and functional.

Name: Innov Arch
Description:
At Innov Interiors & Architects, we believe great design should inspire, function, and reflect your identity. Based in Sector 64, Noida, we specialize in crafting bespoke interiors and architectural solutions that elevate every square foot – whether it’s a luxury residence or a commercial masterpiece.

 Our Expertise Includes:
Modular Kitchen Design & Wardrobe Systems
Luxury 2BHK / 3BHK / 4BHK Home Interiors
Contemporary School Architecture & Institutional Planning
Trendy Café, Restaurant & Bar Interior Design
Smart Space Planning & Turnkey Execution

 What Sets Us Apart:
We fuse modern aesthetics with functional design, backed by meticulous detailing and client-first collaboration. Every project is a story of transformation — tailored to our client’s lifestyle, brand, and budget.

 Let’s design your dream space. DM us or contact us via our website.

Name: Aristo Atelier
Description:
Our business is a franchise model of the premium Russian brand, Aristo. We provide premium home interior solutions. Our products (wardrobes, kitchens, partitions & other furniture) are crafted for the perfect balance between design and functionality. We have a strong design and sales team who are well trained and are updated with global trends. This helps us give our customers a collaborative solution for their dream home. We closely work with end customers as well as architects and interior designers.

Aristo Atelier is an exclusive experience center for Aristo, where you could see and experience the entire range of aristo products. Aristo-India has done an excellent job in designing the space as a fabulous experience center for wardrobes in Bangalore.

We are the first Aristo Atelier store in the country. We strongly believe in this business model and our showroom was launched in September 2021. We are proud to say that, within this short time, we completed over 150 projects.  I have been working in the interior design industry for different companies including Aristo for the past 7 years and clearly, I see a great opportunity with Aristo.

Name: Fawn Galli Interiors
Description: Fawn Galli Interiors is a full-service residential and commercial firm based out of New York City and Paris with extensive experience in interior design and construction management. Renowned for its masterful use of color and texture, the firm brings a fresh eye and modern approach to every project. With a nod to the past and a focus firmly tuned to today, Fawn Galli Interiors creates inspired, layered interiors that meld the traditional and the contemporary and are distinctive, memorable, and reflective of each client’s taste and lifestyle. The firm’s expert design team finds inspiration in diverse spaces, including fashion, textiles, 70s disco, and nature. Recent projects include a Newport estate, homes in Connecticut and the Hamptons, a West Village townhouse, Soho offices for a film company, and a classic Brooklyn brownstone. The studio’s work has graced the pages of Elle Décor, Architectural Digest, House Beautiful, Domino, The New York Times, and The Wall Street Journal, among other leading outlets.

From concept to completion, The House of Kalaa is your one-stop shop for all your interior design needs.

We get that your project's timing and financial constraints are crucial. We make it possible to purchase furniture and fixtures from international markets and ship them.

Name: LOUISE ROE
Description:
Louise Roe Andersen, the danish designer who founded LOUISE ROE in 2010, has shaped her eponymous brand with a strong artistic vision and a deep appreciation for European craftsmanship. Her designs, rooted in minimalism yet infused with an avant-garde sensibility, emphasize sculptural forms and the inherent character of natural materials. Through artisanal techniques, she creates objects and furniture that are both timeless and enduring.
 
In 2018, she opened LOUISE ROE GALLERY in the heart of Copenhagen. Today, the flagship store attracts visitors from around the world, offering an immersive experience alongside its café, THE ROE BAR.

Name: C.CONCEPT Architecture
Maxalto
Description:
The philosophy of Maxalto centers around the principles of design excellence, hospitality, and the culture of living.

With over 40 years of experience, the brand conceives lifestyle interiors through outstanding craftsmanship and refined materials, offering a complete range of sophisticated and elegant furnishings with a modern classic soul. 

The Maxalto collections represent the practical extension of the aesthetic ideal of architect and designer Antonio Citterio, resulting in exclusive domestic scenarios characterized by a unique sense of beauty –contemporary yet deeply rooted.
Interior design and the concept of lifestyle are linked and no longer viewed as simply a collection of objects and decorative elements but rather as an immersive experience that can only be fully appreciated when it is tailored to the dynamic and personal contours of the domestic space, leading to an endless interaction between product and architecture. 

The Maxalto collections evolve to reveal a project of interior culture through dynamic balances that vary from one room to another, incorporating distinct shapes, materials, colors, and designs to express the identity of the space.

Name: Virtualistic Interiors
Description: At Virtualistic Interiors, we specialize in transforming spaces through cutting-edge virtual design. Our services include eDesign, 3D renderings, fly-through videos with animation, and virtual reality experiences tailored for residential, commercial, and new development projects. With over 10 years of design expertise, we offer innovative solutions that help real estate agents, developers, and homeowners visualize and market their properties effectively. Our passion for design and commitment to excellence ensure that each project is uniquely crafted to meet your needs. Explore the future of interior design with Virtualistic Interiors – Creative Interiors, Virtually Designed.

Grâce à un solide réseau de partenaires engagés – ingénieurs, artisans, éditeurs de mobilier et de luminaires – nous combinons des compétences artistiques et techniques pour offrir des solutions créatives sur mesure.

Name: U1 space design
Description:
Firmám pomáháme řešit pracovní prostředí komplexně od pochopení jejich provozu, lidí a způsobu práce až po kompletní realizaci prostoru.

Prostor nevnímáme jako dekoraci, ale jako nástroj. Nástroj, který ovlivňuje výkon týmů, spolupráci i každodenní fungování firmy. Proto každý projekt stavíme na analýze reálných potřeb a dlouhodobých cílů organizace.

Navrhujeme, koordinujeme a realizujeme interiéry v rámci jednoho řízeného procesu. Díky tomu mají naši klienti jasnou kontrolu nad rozpočtem, termíny i výsledkem bez zbytečných překvapení během realizace.

Naše řešení dnes využívají mezinárodní korporace, technologické firmy i výrobní společnosti, mimo jiné Avast, Siemens, IBM, Infosys, Miele, STRV, Atlas Copco, Continental, Konica Minolta, Pilsner Urquell, RE/MAX nebo Kyndryl.

Součástí našich projektů je i vlastní nábytková řada Only1 navržená pro flexibilní pracovní prostředí a současné způsoby práce.

Name: Wells Interiors Ltd
Description:
Wells Interiors was established in 2010 by husband and wife duo Mick and Natalie Wells. Our team of specialist wallpaper installers has a wealth of experience in installing all types of wallcoverings, including delicate hand-painted and embroidered silk Chinoiserie, paper-backed fabrics, grasscloths, digital prints and roomscapes.
 
The core belief of our dedicated and growing team is that installing wallcoverings is a master craft. We are constantly striving to set new standards of excellence within the industry and are proud to be included in the prestigious list of Recommended Installers of Fromental and de Gournay, as well as being actively recommended by Altfield, Phillip Jeffries, Holland & Sherry and many other Design Centre Chelsea Harbour showrooms. Testimonials from previous clients, including interior designers, property developers and contractors, praise the quality and professionalism of our work.
 
Our team works across the UK as well as internationally on projects as diverse as private residences, hotels and superyachts. London is one of our key territories, with its elegant period properties across areas including Mayfair, Knightsbridge, Belgravia, Kensington, Chelsea and Pimlico.

Our range of services includes initial measurements, ordering, hand trimming and aftercare, ensuring a stress-free installation process for our clients. We can also source and supply wallcoverings to trade and non-trade customers.

We approach every project with a commitment to providing the highest possible level of service, focusing at all times on communication, flexibility and flawless execution. 

As our business expands we are looking for talented new installers to join our team. Get in touch with us if you take great pride in your work, strive to be the best in your field, have the grit and great personality - regardless of your background!

Name: MD DESIGN & FITOUT

Name: Studio Tattva By Aditi
Description:
As the Founder and Principal Designer of Studio Tattva, Aditi draws inspiration from the best of modern living to create designs that are both beautiful and livable. We create fresh, elegant, comfortable, and timeless homes that reflect each client’s distinct personality and life history.

Aditi Savani has worked with some of the best design firms in India where she has executed projects within the country and Abroad. Known for creating both contemporary and versatile interiors of originality, she approaches each project with a highly tailored individualized brief. She strives for an environment that is unique, layered, and most importantly personal. Budgets are adhered to with an emphasis on quality and value. Each project is handled professionally and completed in a timely manner. We understand that designing one's space can be overwhelming. Our approach is to make the process enjoyable and fun. 

A multi-layered, stimulating sensory experience is at the centre of Aditi’s design approach through an exploration of materiality, colour, forms and an intuitive juxtaposition of modern contemporary and classic designs, she curates a wealth of experiences into every space.

Name: Illuminee

Name: Studio Boud
Description:
Studio Boud is een creatieve denktank voor de herontwikkeling van bestaande panden in omgeving Eindhoven. Ons werk wordt gevoed door een gemeenschappelijke passie, namelijk het creëren van oogstrelende ruimtes. Een aangename sfeer die iedereen omarmt zodra je binnen stapt, dat is ons doel. Dit bereiken we door de lat hoog te leggen wat betreft de afwerking en te kiezen voor hoogwaardige duurzame materialen. Naast een mooi eindresultaat streven wij ook naar een uitvoering die zich richt op de toekomst zodat de eindgebruikers van een pand hierin voor de komende jaren ook met een aangename gemoedstoestand kunnen genieten van het object. 

Naast dat wij onze klanten helpen bij esthetische (materiaal)keuzes met betrekking tot het in- en exterieur, helpen wij ook bij het maken van de juiste keuzes die komen kijken bij de renovatie. Dus van de rozenstruik in de tuin en het kunstwerk aan de muur, tot aan de vergunningsvrije bouwmogelijkheden en EPC waardes van het pand, Studio Boud biedt oplossingen voor de totaalervaring.

Van interieurontwerp tot realisatie, Studio Boud begeleid uw gehele projectrenovatie.

Nieuwsgierig naar wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen? Of het nu gaat om een concept- of interieurontwerp, het sparren over de herontwikkeling van uw vastgoed, de verduurzaming van uw object of heeft u interesse om te investeren in vastgoed? Wij denken graag mee en hebben ook voor u een op maat gemaakte oplossing. Onze diensten zijn hierbij als totaalpakket of afzonderlijk af te nemen. Van idee tot ontwerp, van renovatie tot realisatie, wij begeleiden uw project naar een succesvol eindresultaat.

Name: Fitout 360 Interiors LLC
Description:
Fitout 360 is a Dubai-based commercial interior design and fit-out company delivering end-to-end solutions from concept design to project handover — with complete authority approvals managed in-house.

We specialize in office, retail, and commercial fit-outs, ensuring every project meets Dubai authority standards including DMCC, Concordia, Dubai Municipality, Dubai Civil Defense, DDA, and relevant master developers.

What sets us apart is our approval-first approach.
Our experienced team prepares drawings, submissions, and executions strictly in line with authority requirements, helping clients avoid delays, cost variations, and rework.

Our Services

• Interior design & space planning
• Authority drawings & approvals
• Fit-out execution & project management
• MEP coordination & compliance
• Work permits, inspections & completion certificates

At Fitout 360, we act as a single point of contact, offering transparency, accuracy, and controlled timelines — so clients can focus on their business while we deliver spaces that are built to perform and designed to comply.

Name: Design House India Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Design House India Pvt. Ltd. is a leading interior design & turnkey solutions company, delivering intelligent, innovative, and brand-centric spaces for the modern retail and corporate world. For over two decades, we have been transforming showrooms, offices, retail kiosks, exhibitions, and commercial environments with a perfect blend of creativity, craftsmanship, and functionality.

At Design House India, design is not just about aesthetics — it’s about creating experiences. Every project we undertake is powered by deep research, strategic planning, and a commitment to elevate the brand identity of our clients. Our in-house team of designers, architects, engineers, and fabricators work seamlessly to provide end-to-end solutions: from concept development and 3D visualization to production, installation, and project management.

What We Specialize In:
• Retail Showrooms & Shop-in-Shop Concepts
• Corporate & Office Interiors
• Retail Kiosks & Display Fixtures
• Exhibition Stall Design & Fabrication
• Modular & Custom Furniture
• Branding, Signage & Visual Merchandising
• Complete Turnkey Interior Solutions

With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and PAN-India project execution capability, we ensure timely delivery, international-quality standards, and unmatched precision in every detail. Our goal is simple — to create smart, functional, and visually powerful spaces that help brands stand out and grow.

We don’t just design spaces.
We design experiences that inspire, engage, and deliver results.

Let’s build your next space, beautifully and intelligently.

Name: Envirohacking
Description:
COOOP Design Studio is an award-winning design collective of Architects, Interior Architects, and Engineers based in Sydney Australia and Dubai UAE. 

We base our design approach on 2 fundamental principles. 

1. Design for Behaviour : This is the application of the insights gained from predictive human behavioural studies in order to create highly successful experience spaces within the built environment.

2. Envirohacking : This is a look at already completed and/or existing architectural typologies and finding ways in which these environments could be amended or "hacked" to enhance desired physical and mental wellbeing.

Name: Nova Wrap
Description:
In the heart of Dubai, Nova Wrap stands as a testament to ingenuity and expertise in the field of vinyl wrapping. We don’t just see walls, furniture, or appliances; we see potential canvases awaiting transformation. As we venture into the future of interior design and space personalization, Nova Wrap leads the charge, merging innovation with imagination.

Our ethos revolves around not just the beautification of spaces, but also adding value to every object we touch. Whether it’s giving a kitchen a fresh face, making a living room piece the center of attention, or ensuring an office reflects brand identity, our work speaks volumes. We pride ourselves on the precision and care we put into every wrap, ensuring it not only looks stunning but also stands the test of time.

Name: Jade Aden Interiors
Description:
Jade Aden Interiors is one of the South's leading office fit-out and industrial refitting and refurbishment companies, serving Dorset, Hampshire, Wiltshire, Sussex and the Home Counties including London. 

Our vast expertise enables us to tackle a wide variety of projects from creating partitions in your office or industrial space to the installation of suspended ceilings, mezzanine floors, storage areas and much more. We are Cat A and Cat B fit-out specialists.

We strive to complete work in the shortest time frame possible, with little to no disruption to our customers’ premises. Quality service is our number one priority and customers can be absolutely sure that their refurbishment project is not only timely but also adheres to the highest standards. 

We have carried out work for a number of leading companies across the UK. Take a look at our portfolio to find out more: http://www.jade-aden-interiors.co.uk/case-studies.html

Name: Interieurmaker Fijn Timmerwerk
Description:
Bij Fijn Timmerwerk staat een gepassioneerd team van vakmensen klaar om jouw meubelwensen tot leven te brengen. Als ervaren meubelmaker werk ik samen met mijn team aan unieke maatwerkmeubels voor particulieren, waarbij we uitsluitend hoogwaardige materialen gebruiken zoals gefineerd plaatmateriaal, massiefhout en gespoten MDF.

Ons proces begint altijd met persoonlijk overleg, gevolgd door een 3D-ontwerp dat jouw wensen perfect weerspiegelt. Na goedkeuring van het ontwerp stellen we een transparante offerte op, en na akkoord starten we met de productie. Elk meubelstuk wordt met zorg gemaakt en door onszelf geplaatst, zodat de kwaliteit gegarandeerd is, van begin tot eind.

Op zoek naar maatwerk dat jouw stijl en ruimte volledig respecteert? Wij staan klaar om jouw ideeën werkelijkheid te maken.

Name: Bonkers
Description:
Depuis 2011, Bonkers vous permet de vous démarquer en proposant des expériences innovantes et singulières. Nous intervenons sur l’aménagement de vos hôtels, bureaux et locaux commerciaux. Nous valorisons votre image de marque afin qu'elle soit alignée avec les enjeux environnementaux et nous rendons vos lieux de travail et d'accueil ergonomiques, séduisants, afin d'attirer et retenir vos talents et clients.

2013, début du partenariat avec ANTICAFÉ. Nous réalisons l'intégralité des espaces et accompagnons le lancement en franchise, avec une ambition de 50 ouvertures en 6 ans !

2014, la foncière ICADE nous donne carte blanche pour imaginer la plus belle colocation de startups : la Maison des startups GrowUp ! (900m2 et 20 startups) Nous sommes très heureux d’entretenir cette collaboration.

2015, le groupe STUDIALIS nous contacte pour réaliser les espaces et la signalétique de son Campus Innovation de 10000m2, à Paris 13. Nous concrétisons de nombreux campus ensemble.

2017, nous rencontrons le groupe hôtelier HONOTEL. Notre nouveau défi : la rénovation d’un hôtel 4* dans Paris. Notre collaboration continue.

En 2018, nous renforçons nos forces de travail pour accompagner SODEXO sur la transformation de son siège social.

2019, ACCOR rejoins nos partenaires et de beaux projets se concrétisent depuis.

2020, une grande marque de fenêtres nous confit la conception de leur siège social pour répondre aux enjeux des espaces de travail post COVID. Objectifs: qualité de vie au travail, espaces adaptés aux nouveaux usages, impact sur son environnement maîtrisé.

En chiffre : 
- 2011 : création du collectif
- 2014 : création de la société
- 3 associés et 3 architectes
- 2 bureaux : Paris - Aix en Provence
- + de 126 projets réalisés
- + de 100 clients accompagnés
- + de 50 000 m2 aménagés

Ils partagent notre vision : ACCOR, SODEXO, RENAULT, ICADE, HERMES, HONOTEL, UNIBAIL-RODAMCO, STUDIALIS, EUROSPORT et beaucoup d’autres

Appelez-nous :
contact@bonkers.fr ou 06.73.42.19.42

En Laura Yerpes Estudio de Interiorismo creamos espacios que combinan estética, funcionalidad y bienestar, con un estilo mediterráneo, elegante y atemporal. Desarrollamos proyectos integrales para viviendas, clínicas, restaurantes y hoteles, cuidando cada detalle desde el concepto hasta la ejecución.

En los últimos años, el estudio se ha consolidado como referente en el diseño de clínicas, aportando una visión cálida, humana y profesional al entorno sanitario. También estamos impulsando con fuerza el área de restauración, creando espacios gastronómicos que transmiten identidad, confort y una experiencia sensorial completa.

Nuestra metodología va más allá del diseño: unimos creatividad, sensibilidad y rigor técnico para traducir la visión de cada cliente en espacios vivos, funcionales y memorables. Detrás de cada proyecto hay un equipo comprometido, cercano y detallista, que diseña soluciones a medida para reflejar la esencia de cada persona o marca.

Con sede en Valencia y proyectos en toda España, contamos con más de 20 años de experiencia. Esta trayectoria, unida a una mirada siempre actual y en vanguardia, nos permite ofrecer una combinación única de profesionalidad, innovación y calidez.

Founded by Farah Agarwal, our approach blends artistic vision with global sensibilities. We work closely with clients through open dialogue and design workshops to translate personal narratives into tactile, lived experiences.

From sculptural furniture to evocative palettes, every element is custom-crafted to serve the space’s story. Our work balances aesthetics and purpose, without subscribing to trends — favoring timeless materials, textures, and details that evolve with time.

We collaborate with local and international artisans, marrying traditional techniques with modern design principles to create spaces that are warm, intentional, and entirely one of a kind.

At Chestnut Storeys, we don’t just design homes — we build environments that feel lived in from the moment you walk in.

Name: InHouse
Description:
A whole new way to furnish your home.

InHouse builds a digital twin of your actual apartment, then lets you design, customize, and shop it — all in real time. Try different layouts. Swap products. Apply designer-curated styles. Everything is guaranteed to fit, and everything is shoppable — with exclusive pricing up to 70% off from hundreds of premium brands.

Right now, furnishing a home means scrolling through thousands of product tiles with no sense of how anything looks together. You measure obsessively and still get it wrong. You wait weeks for deliveries that don't fit. You spend $5-10K on an interior designer, or you just give up and live with whatever you have.

InHouse fixes that. We turn your floor plan into an interactive 3D space where you can see exactly how everything looks and fits — before you spend a dollar. Professional design in minutes, not months. No guesswork, no tape measure, no regrets.

Backed by Bucketplace and New England Development. Based in New York.

tryinhouse.com

Name: Re_vuelta Estudio
Description:
Los espacios que diseñamos se habitan y se sienten. Nacimos en 2020 y dirigidos por José Luis Revuelta Ibáñez, nos dedicamos a transformar viviendas y lugares en algo más que refugios: los convertimos en parte de la memoria de quienes los viven. Desde Euskadi, trabajamos con la firme creencia de que un espacio puede cambiar vidas, y lo hacemos a través de la luz, que ilumina y narra la historia de cada rincón y cada sombra.
Nos mueve la innovación, pero la que respeta la esencia de las cosas. Con modelos 3D que anticipan el futuro y realidad virtual que permite caminar por lo que aún no existe, damos a nuestros clientes la oportunidad de recorrer sus espacios antes de que las paredes se levanten. Cada simulación lumínica busca capturar cómo la luz, al rozar una superficie, convierte lo común en extraordinario. Es un proceso preciso, casi artesanal, donde cada detalle se afina con paciencia, sabiendo que los resultados cumplirán y revelarán algo nuevo.
Comprometidos con la sostenibilidad, creemos que el diseño no puede separarse de la tierra que lo sustenta. Por eso, cada proyecto lleva dentro el respeto por el entorno. Reducimos el uso de papel, minimizamos desplazamientos y diseñamos espacios, no solo bellos, también responsables: que protejan el cielo nocturno, que cuiden la biodiversidad y que respiren en armonía con el planeta. Un pacto entre quienes habitan y el mundo que los rodea.
Nuestra mirada está puesta en el futuro, en quienes continuarán lo que hoy empezamos. Nos integramos en la comunidad educativa, siendo docentes en instituciones como IED Kunsthal y siendo parte de asociaciones como EIDE, APDI y Slowlight. En el aula y en ponencias, compartimos lo que sabemos, aprendiendo también de quienes imaginan el diseño diferente a nosotros.
Cada espacio que creamos es un encuentro entre luz, tiempo y vida. Diseñamos para hoy, pero también para el mañana, para que esos espacios se conviertan en memorias compartidas, un legado para las personas y el planeta.

Description:
At willowlamp, we design and manufacture bespoke lighting installations that live at the intersection of sculpture, architecture, and light.

From suspended chandeliers and statement pendants to large-scale ceilingscapes, every willowlamp piece is conceived as a response to space — and created to transform it.

Founded in Cape Town by architect and designer Adam Hoets, willowlamp draws on sacred geometry, natural structure, and symbolic form to create works that are as meaningful as they are visually striking.

Each design begins with a laser-cut stainless steel frame and is brought to life through our patented notch system — a unique technique that allows metal ball chains to flow in layered, veil-like arrangements. This signature system enables us to translate complex ideas into precision-built, handmade light sculptures.

“We’re not just making chandeliers.
We’re bringing soul into objects. We’re creating light.”
— Adam Hoets, Founder

Whether commissioned as a one-of-a-kind installation or tailored from our core collections, every willowlamp piece is made by hand in our Cape Town studio and delivered worldwide.

We work in close partnership with architects, interior designers, lighting consultants, and collectors to realise highly customised, concept-driven lighting projects — from residential and hospitality spaces to commercial and cultural interiors.

At willowlamp, we specialise in the design and production of custom lighting installations for luxury residential, hospitality, and commercial spaces. Our services include:

✦ Bespoke chandeliers and pendants
✦ Large-scale ceilingscapes and light sculptures
✦ Tailored finishes, dimensions, and mounting systems
✦ Concept development in collaboration with architects and interior designers
✦ Global shipping and remote project support

Name: Griffon 1950
Description:
Griffon conçoit depuis 1950 des toilettes design et durables, alliant esthétique, performance et savoir-faire français.

Marque pionnière du design d’intérieur de toilettes haut de gamme, Griffon transforme un élément fonctionnel en un objet décoratif à part entière.

Fabriquées en France et labellisées Origine France Garantie pour son modèle L'Original, nos créations incarnent un savoir-faire industriel d’excellence et une exigence de qualité, robustesse et réparabilité.
Chaque modèle reflète notre engagement en faveur d’une économie circulaire et éco-responsable, grâce à des matériaux choisis pour leur durabilité et leur recyclabilité.

Nos deux modèles signature expriment deux visions du design :
-L’Original, au style rétro, célèbre les lignes des années 1950 dans un esprit décoratif, raffiné et intemporel.
-Le Tube, au contraire, se distingue par son minimalisme contemporain, sa silhouette graphique et sa modularité.

Chez Griffon, la couleur est bien plus qu’un choix esthétique : c’est une signature.
Notre nuancier exclusif de 22 couleurs (du bleu profond Abysse au noir texturé Charbon pailleté, en passant par les nuances minérales Sable et Récif) compose une véritable palette d’ambiances décoratives.
Chaque couleur incarne une émotion, une matière, un univers, et participe à l’identité du lieu qu’elle habille.
Et parce que chaque projet est unique, notre studio créatif et notre service premium développent des teintes personnalisées sur demande, pour que chaque toilette Griffon devienne une pièce unique.

Pensées pour les architectes, décorateurs, hôteliers, restaurateurs et particuliers exigeants, les toilettes Griffon s’intègrent dans les projets les plus ambitieux, associant design d’intérieur, personnalisation et performance environnementale.

Grace à Griffon, les toilettes ne sont plus un détail.

Carla's keen eye for detail and ability to create highly bespoke spaces made her a sought-after designer for superyachts. Her debut project Lady Lene won recognition at the BOAT International World Superyacht Awards 2022. Further, she was recognized as the Best Interior Designer during the 2023 Superyacht Design Festival. With a team of highly qualified professionals across architecture and interior design disciplines, Carla Guilhem Design is now considered one of the leading yacht interior design studios in the world.

Over the years, the studio has gained deep experience in designing luxury residences, residential condo developments, commercial, hospitality projects, and has worked on projects throughout the USA, Europe, and Latin America.

At SprintCo, we're like storytellers, but instead of words, we use design to tell your story. For over 25 years, we've been helping restaurants, cafes, and bars across India create spaces that people love and remember.

When we design a space, we're not just thinking about how it looks. We want to make sure it feels right for your brand and helps your business grow. We use clever ideas and new technologies to make spaces that are not only beautiful but also good for the environment.

Our team is like a family of creative problem-solvers. We have experienced architects who love to sit down with you and understand your dreams for your space. Then, we use smart tools to make those dreams come true efficiently. We also help with branding, ensuring that every aspect of your space reflects your brand's identity and vision.

We believe that every brand has a unique story, and we'd love to help you tell yours through your space. If you're thinking about opening a new place or want to give your current one a fresh look, we'd be happy to chat. Let's work together to create a space that your customers will love and remember.

A company that speaks a universal yet extremely recognisable language.

Every KDLN product is the fruit of a strong concept and tells the story of a specific creative and technological journey. All are consistent with the corporate philosophy that has always combined an unconventional approach and the search for new aesthetics with a deep knowledge of materials and technologies.
KDLN lamps are characterised by a sense of colour and geometry that is always fresh and with high creative content, drawing inspiration from time to time from different worlds.

Name: Formica México
Description:
Formica Group es proveedor líder de soluciones de diseño para revestimiento de superficies, para clientes comerciales o residenciales a nivel mundial. Como el fabricante más grande del mundo de laminado de alta presión (HPL), nuestra red internacional de diseño, fabricación, distribución y ventas mantiene el reconocimiento de Formica como una marca a nivel mundial.

La herencia y la reputación de la marca del grupo de empresas Formica se basa en la calidad, servicio y líneas de productos innovadores. Hemos desarrollado una experiencia inigualable que garantiza que los productos cumplan con las necesidades de sus aplicaciones, así como con las exigencias del mercado.

Trabajando muy de cerca con los arquitectos, diseñadores y constructores, la empresa está estratégicamente situada para ofrecer productos nuevos y soluciones de revestimiento que complementan las tendencias actuales de diseño. Nuestro diseño constante de productos y proceso de desarrollo pone de relieve nuestro compromiso con la innovación.

Además, proporcionamos a nuestros clientes residenciales los materiales de revestimiento que necesitan, ya sea para encimeras y cubiertas de laminado para una renovación en la cocina, o para la cubierta del tocador en la remodelación del baño, la renovación de los gabinetes, que puedes hacer tú mismo, u otros innumerables proyectos. En 2019 Formica Group fue adquirido por Broadview Holding, una empresa con base en los Países Bajos, con importante presencia en tecnología de materiales y energía.

Broadview Holding también es dueño de Trespa (el líder global en revestimiento HPL para exterior), Arpa (bien conocido por su innovadora línea de producto, Fenix), y Westag ( fabricante de puertas, elementos y superficies con una significativa presencia en Alemania). Con la adquisición de Formica Group, Broadview y Formica Group fortalecieron su posición como líderes  globales en materiales para superficies.

Name: MYCOTEX by NEFFA
Description:
Multi-award winning MYCOTEX by NEFFA is the first next-gen biomaterial suitable for the NEFFA | New Fashion Factory, the ground breaking automated manufacturing method allowing for custom products made from biomaterials. Biomass is robotically applied around affordable, configurable and recyclable 3D moulds.

This innovative supply chain is giving brands unlimited design freedom, is circular and based on automation. This patented process gives customers (B2B) unprecedented design freedom to create silhouettes and textures that were never possible with traditional manufacturing processes. It is circular and based on natural materials that are biodegradable, eliminating waste and deadstock. And automation is making local and on-demand production possible, whilst eliminating overproduction. 

MYCOTEX by NEFFA is the new manufacturing method next to cutting and sewing. We are providing a lean and flexible supply chain with a limited number of stakeholders, creating a local and fully transparent process that is adaptable to constant change.

Name: AGENCE VICE VERSA
Description:
L’Agence Vice Versa est spécialisée dans l’architecture d’intérieur, l’aménagement et la rénovation d’espaces professionnels et résidentiels en Île-de-France. Depuis près de 10 ans, nous accompagnons entreprises, professions libérales, administrations publiques, investisseurs et particuliers dans leurs projets, en apportant une vision créative et pragmatique. Notre rôle : transformer vos espaces pour qu’ils soient à la fois fonctionnels, esthétiques et porteurs d’identité.

Pour les espaces professionnels :

Nous concevons et réaménageons des surfaces allant de 50 à 5000 m² : bureaux, open spaces, salles de réunion, halls d’accueil, espaces de convivialité. Chaque projet est pensé pour améliorer la qualité de vie au travail, favoriser la collaboration et refléter l’image de l’entreprise.
Nous assurons une gestion globale, de la conception à la réalisation : démarches administratives, coordination des corps de métier, suivi de chantier, jusqu’à la livraison clé en main. Grâce à notre réseau d’entreprises partenaires fiables, nous garantissons une exécution sans contraintes et dans le respect des délais.

Pour le résidentiel :

En parallèle de notre expertise professionnelle, nous intervenons également comme courtiers en travaux pour les projets privés. Nous vous accompagnons dans la rénovation complète d’appartements, de maisons ou d’immeubles, ainsi que dans vos projets d’agrandissement. Notre valeur ajoutée : concevoir des aménagements sur mesure, sélectionner pour vous les meilleures entreprises labellisées et piloter les travaux afin de sécuriser votre projet de A à Z.

Que ce soit pour repenser un siège social, rénover un cabinet libéral, transformer un plateau de bureaux ou moderniser votre résidence principale, Vice Versa met son savoir-faire au service de vos ambitions.

 Faites de vos espaces – professionnels comme résidentiels – un véritable levier de performance, de confort et d’attractivité !
 Découvrez nos réalisations sur www.agenceviceversa.com

Name: Capper: furniture agency + consultancy
Description:
Die Capper GmbH ist eine Einrichtungsagentur und Beratungsfirma mit Sitz in Zürich, Schweiz. Das Unternehmen wurde 2023 von Ben Capper gegründet, einem Spezialisten für Möbel und Innenausstattung aus Grossbritannien mit 25 Jahren Erfahrung auf dem europäischen Markt. 

Nachdem Ben 17 Jahre lang ein renommiertes, preisgekröntes Innenberatungsunternehmen in Manchester, GB, besessen hatte, verkaufte er das Unternehmen 2015 und zog nach Zürich, Schweiz. 

In den folgenden Jahren sammelte Ben Erfahrung bei der Gewinnung und Umsetzung von hochkarätigen Arbeitsplatz-, Freizeit- und öffentlichen Innenausstattungsprojekten bei einem führenden Zürcher Inneneinrichtungsunternehmen, bevor er sich 2021 als unabhängiger Berater selbstständig machte. 2023 wurde die Capper GmbH gegründet, um breitere Dienstleistungen in diesen Bereichen anzubieten, inklusiv Agentur und Verkauf in der Schweiz.

Name: Hempstatic
Description:
We make sound insulation from plants. Our products are used in interior spaces to reduce echo and noise transmission. They are chem- and toxic-free and sequester CO2. 

They stand out with natural fire-, pest- and mould resistance.  The design is based on four circular principles: re:use | re:manufacture | re:pair | re:generate. 

We work towards increasing the rate of biogenic raw materials in buildings while reducing CO2 emissions and waste generation at the end-of-life stage.

The future building is green. Let´s co-create it together!

Name: FRAKO - totaalproject | interieur | keuken | kantoor
Description:
FRAKO is 100% made in de Kempen, 100% onafhankelijk. We doen alles zelf, van ontwerp tot plaatsing bij de klant. Alles begint met een goed gesprek. Verwacht je niet aan holle verkoopspraatjes maar aan persoonlijk advies, met een brede waaier van realisaties zoals keukens, dressings, badmeubels, kantoorinrichting en totaalinterieurs die je zullen inspireren. 

Je weet wat je wil? Dan zet ons designteam je plannen om in een ontwerp op maat. En dat maatwerk mag je letterlijk nemen. In ons atelier kunnen we dankzij ons vakmanschap en het gebruik van spitstechonolgie alles tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig maken. Zelfs voor kunstzinnige creaties kan je bij ons terecht. 

De mogelijkheden zijn eindeloos. En het resultaat is altijd uniek, sterk en duurzaam. Ongeacht je budget. De ervaren plaatsingsdienst zorgt nadien voor een mooie afwerking van jouw project. We werken voor particulieren, architecten en projectontwikkelaars.

Name: UniAcoustic
Description:
At UniAcoustic, we believe that great spaces don't just look good—they feel good, too. 

We’re on a mission to transform ordinary environments into extraordinary experiences. By embracing circular economy, we turn repurposed materials into 100% recyclable acoustic solutions, crafting soundscapes that are as kind to the planet as they are to the ears.

We offer highly customized designs suited for a variety of environments—from dynamic workspaces and hotels to convention centres and cultural venues. 

Inspired by European design and powered by India’s largest state-of-the-art manufacturing facility, we provide an extensive range of sustainable PET acoustic panels in a vibrant palette of colors and textures, granting architects and designers the flexibility to create visually stunning and acoustically optimized environment. Walls, ceilings, partitions, or bespoke acoustic installations - we design with one goal in mind: quiet elegance.

We’re not just reducing noise; we’re reducing our footprint, proving that sustainability and stunning design can—and should—coexist. 

Central to our craft is our game-changing patented VMT Technology – known for its design output, unmatched sound absorption and minimal environmental impact. This approach has paved the way for visual innovation and have won us the coveted Red Dot Design Awards.

UniAcoustic can turn your existing acoustic challenges into design opportunities. 

Got a daring design idea?  Let’s Uniacoustic bring it to life and make your space sing—or rather, let it bask in sweet silence.

Nous mettons le savoir-faire industriel du groupe Schmidt au service du sur-mesure, au millimètre près, pour concevoir des espaces aussi fonctionnels qu’esthétiques. 
 
Notre mission : imaginer, concevoir et piloter des solutions d’agencement sur mesure pour tous les professionnels. Notre catalogue a une profondeur de gamme inégalée, des matériaux durables certifiés PEFC, des engagements concrets à travers notre labellisation BCorp, et des solutions pensées pour répondre à tous les besoins d’aménagement et d’agencement : des bornes d’accueil, de la cuisine à la salle de bain, du dressing aux rangements sur-mesure, des bureaux aux solutions d’accessibilité... Chez ID PRO, chaque projet bénéficie d’un interlocuteur unique et de délais garantis, de la conception à la pose. Parce que les professionnels ont besoin de partenaires fiables et créatifs, ID PRO transforme l’agencement en levier de performance et d’image. 
 
ID PRO, c’est aussi, pour tous ceux qui sont passionnés par l'agencement avec l’envie d'une aventure entrepreneuriale, un modèle original et différent avec zéro droit d’entrée et zéro redevance mais avec des moyens spécifiques et dédiés, une équipe terrain renforcée.

Description:
A design-driven philosophy 
We are an architectural interior design practice founded by Lorène Faure and Kenny Kinugasa-Tsui, who are chartered UK ARB RIBA and French architects, with a team of international designers. Our designs are distinguished for their freshness, taste and elegance. We foster a collaborative atmosphere with our clients by involving them in the design process from start to finish. To ensure success, we work with leading specialists and suppliers to provide the best products and results possible. 

Narrative Approach 
Architecture is an emotional, spatial experience produced by both the user and the creator. Our inspirations stem from the observation, speculation and analysis of contextual aspects such as historical, environmental, cultural and social factors. We poetically interpret the exchanges of these factors to create humanistic narratives for our designs. We are passionate about using artistic representations of drawings and models to explore ‘out-of-the-box’ ideas. These are the driving forces for us to create designs rich in intellectual and imaginative qualities.

Description:
Bienal roots date back to 1967 and one of longest-standing luxury living spaces specialists in the market.

Today, with a factory area of 400.000 square feet, making it one of the largest custom furniture manufacturing facilities, and with over 55 years of experience in the furniture and construction industry, we continue to provide for global commercial and residential projects with fit-out solutions.

We also provide fire rated doors, loose and fixed furniture, and decorative panels.

Having provided our services to over 30 countries with more than 150 commercial & 4500 residential projects around the world including major capitals such as Doha, Baku, and NYC, Bienal continues to expand internationally exporting its unmistakable style beyond geographical boundaries. A three-generation family group with international dimension, yet firmly rooted in the territory where it all began, maintaining the values and traditions of yesteryear.

Name: Insulti Luminosi
Description:
Insulti Luminosi è un' idea partorita nel 2021 a Milano da Gabriele Locci, iniziando ad utilizzare strisce led per comporre frasi ironiche. 

Ben presto il team si è allargato con l’aggiunta di Noemi Cornalba, responsabile Social&Marketing, e Letizia Marzi, Business Development Manager, che insieme curano le collaborazioni B2B.

Nel corso del 2022 abbiamo mosso i nostri primi passi nell'intricato mondo dell'imprenditoria conquistando migliaia di clienti privati e non, tutti pronti a farsi illuminare. 

Ma non facciamo solo insegne, perché annoiarsi è un attimo. 

Creiamo anche gadget carini seppur spesso inutili e con il nostro contagioso sarcasmo abbiamo costruito una potente community di rancorosi.

Non solo curiamo il prodotto nei minimi particolari (anche se mentre lo facciamo ci lamentiamo spesso), ma continuiamo a farci venire brutte idee per migliorarlo ed evolverci.

Name: Studio MTX
Description:
Studio MTX forms part of the Montex Haute Couture embroidery atelier, which joined the CHANEL Maisons d’art in 2011. It was founded in 2013 to introduce embroidery to a new area of expression: interior design. Studio MTX brings a fresh interpretation to embroidery, expanding its boundaries and constantly redefining its scope. At once design studio and production workshop, the atelier conceives, creates, and presents new materials to interior decorators and architects. A unique combination of techniques from various areas of applied arts – embroidery, weaving, tapestry, and leather goods – imbues these materials with their distinctive originality. Studio MTX designs are applied to furniture or adapted to architecture. Functional and decorative in equal measure, they enhance the architectural project in a myriad of ways: by dividing up the space, guiding the gaze, punctuating volumes, and adorning surfaces.

Rattaché à l’atelier de broderie haute couture Montex qui a rejoint les Maisons d’Art de CHANEL en 2011, le Studio MTX a été créé en 2013 pour donner à la broderie un nouveau terrain d’expression : l’architecture intérieure. Studio MTX propose une interprétation de la broderie qui en repousse les limites et la redéfinit en permanence. À la fois bureau de création et atelier de production, le studio imagine, réalise et conseille aux décorateurs et aux architectes d’intérieur des matières inédites, nées de la combinaison unique de techniques qui empruntent à différents champs des arts appliqués, parmi lesquels la broderie, le tissage, la tapisserie ou encore la maroquinerie. Les créations de Studio MTX s’intègrent à l’échelle du mobilier ou se déploient à celle de l’architecture. À la fois fonctionnelles et décoratives, elles accompagnent le projet architectural de bien des manières : elles compartiment l’espace, filtrent le regard, rythment les volumes, habillent les surfaces…

Name: Bean Buro
Description:
A design-driven philosophy 
We are an architectural interior design practice founded by Lorène Faure and Kenny Kinugasa-Tsui, who are chartered UK ARB RIBA and French architects, with a team of international designers. The studio was founded in 2013 in Hong Kong and has gained an international reputation for its consistent production of award-wining projects. 

Tasteful & distinguished designs 
We bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to our luxury residential, commercial, hospitality, F&B, retail and mixed-use projects. Our designs are distinguished for their freshness, taste and elegance. We foster a collaborative atmosphere with our clients by involving them in the design process from start to finish. To ensure success, we work with leading specialists and suppliers to provide the best products and results possible. 

Narrative Approach 
Architecture is an emotional, spatial experience produced by both the user and the creator. Our inspirations stem from the observation, speculation and analysis of contextual aspects such as historical, environmental, cultural and social factors. We poetically interpret the exchanges of these factors to create humanistic narratives for our designs. We are passionate about using artistic representations of drawings and models to explore ‘out-of-the-box’ ideas. These are the driving forces for us to create designs rich in intellectual and imaginative qualities.

Description:
Affreschi & Affreschi is the exclusive atelier where designing tailored walls with a material born to surprise. What amazes those who touch the wallpaper plaster for the first time is its materiality. We had never seen a wall that rolls up and does not crumble before. The wallpapers are manufactured with a 1 mm layer of plaster obtained with a mixture of precious raw materials, such as Carrara marble and Roman travertine, on which the masterpieces of Italian art history have been carved. 
Today, with the same material, the artisan company coats the walls of international projects to make them real masterpieces. The result is a natural surface, to the touch and to the sight, that evokes that of the ancient frescoes. Affreschi & Affreschi's mission is to make art, beauty and made in Italy travel through its handcrafted creations to bring inner well-being and value anywhere in the world.

Description:
Creada en 2005, Elementos Argentinos se dedica al diseño y venta de alfombras tejidas a mano en telar en pura lana.
Trabajamos con más de 360 tejedoras y artesanos de 12 provincias, contamos con 2 tiendas en la ciudad de Buenos Aires: Gurruchaga 1881 y Lezica 4301 (donde además está la casa central, control de calidad, oficinas y depósito), venta online y exportamos a más de 12 países. 
En 2017, 2021, 2022 y 2024 recibimos el Sello Buen Diseño Argentino; en 2018 el Kaufman Award por Outstanding Social Impact otorgado por ISPI en la Embajada de Estados Unidos en Buenos Aires, y en 2019 el Premio Exportar 2019 en la categoría Economías Regionales.
Elementos Argentinos es Empresa B Certificada  internacionalmente. Las Empresas B son empresas con fines de lucro que cumplen con los más altos estándares en términos de desempeño económico, social y ambiental, transparencia y responsabilidad empresarial.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: LENSEN
Description:
Wij zijn Lensen. Aangenaam!
Van harte welkom bij Lensen, de projectinrichter die sinds 1978 betrokken is bij en verantwoordelijk is voor spraakmakende interieurs en totale interieurbeleving. Als deskundig en betrokken partner bij de inrichting van (complexe) (woon)zorgomgevingen bieden wij, vanuit onze inspirerende showroom in Zaltbommel, originele maatwerk oplossingen voor elk interieurvraagstuk.

Bij het ontwerpen van een interieur staan de eindgebruikers centraal. Een interieur is van invloed op de emotionele beleving en het welzijn van mensen, daar zijn we van overtuigd. Daarom vormen in het creatieve ontwerpproces hun leefwijzen, behoeften en wensen altijd ons uitgangspunt. Met die gegevens als leidraad en een gezonde dosis lef maken we de juiste interieurkeuzes die leiden naar een optimale vertaling en een innovatieve, praktische en verrassende invulling van het interieur. Onze uitdaging hierbij? Verwachtingen overtreffen! Jouw specifieke, door ons samengestelde interieur, vertelt en verbeeldt het verhaal van jouw instelling of organisatie. Spraakmakend, functioneel, professioneel en verrassend door onze eigen wijze van benadering. De mensen die leven en werken in een door ons gerealiseerde (zorg)omgeving ervaren meer plezier en een hoger gevoel van comfort en welbevinden.

Lensen is er om je volledig te ontzorgen en kan alle facetten die horen bij het realiseren van je ideale interieur uit handen nemen. We zijn de schakel tussen architect, opdrachtgever en uitvoerder. Van ontwerp tot deurmat. Turn key.

Name: Aknan Alomran
Description:
يعد مكتب أكنان العمران للاستشارات الهندسية مكتب هندسي في مجال توفير الحلول الهندسية الشاملة لكافة التخصصات الهندسية والتي تقدم مشاريع ذات جودة عالمية، وتوفر هذه المشاريع بدورها أنظمة متكاملة من التصميم المعماري والهندسة بكافة تخصصاتها (الانشائية، الميكانيكية الكهربائية، المساحية) وأعمال التصميم الداخلي وأعمال السلامة عبر فريق من المهندسين الاستشاريين والمتخصصين.

وتركز شركة الكيان على اعمال التصميم المعماري وفق أحدث الانظمة المعمارية وإيجاد الحلول التصميمية الاقتصادية ووفق احدث الطرز المعمارية لنجمع للعميل بين الشكل والوظيفة ونضمن لهم انجاز تصاميمهم في الوقت المحدد بأعلى جوده، في حين تركز مكتب أكنان العمران لتولي الاعمال بشكل مستقل بصفتها شركة بناء رئيسية وعقد شراكة على كافة المستويات مع شركات هندسية محلية ودولية.

ويعتبر مكتب أكنان العمران مكتب ذات سمعة طيبة وناجحة بتوفيق الله بفريق عملها المتخصص والمتقن، وستساهم في العديد من المشاريع في المملكة العربية السعودية. صممت الشركة العديد من التصاميم الرائعة والتي تم تنفيذها لعملاء على مستوى الأهالي وكذلك المشاريع التجارية. ولما تقوم به الشركة من تركيز كبير على التخصص والرغبة للحصول الى اعلى التصنيفات مع النمو وبناء الأصول للشركة ستكون مكتب أكنان العمران مرادفة للتميز بإذن الله تعالى.

Every project is a canvas where our designers blend artistry and precision, tailoring each detail to reflect your unique essence. 𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀:
» Design Consultation

We focus on these five important aspects of designing spaces:

❃ 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗙𝘂𝗻𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 - We create designs that are not only visually stunning but also highly functional, ensuring every inch of space is utilized effectively.

❃ 𝗣𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻- Your space should reflect your personality and style. We tailor our designs to your unique preferences and needs, creating a space that feels truly yours.

❃ 𝗔𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗼 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹- From the choice of materials to the placement of furnishings, our meticulous attention to detail ensures a cohesive and harmonious design.

❃ 𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 - Our designs prioritize ease of maintenance, ensuring your space remains beautiful and functional with minimal effort.

❃ 𝗔𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗲𝗮𝗹 - Our designs are crafted to be timeless and elegant, enhancing the beauty and comfort of your space.

Name: MEMO Koncept
Description:
MEMO staat voor Milieu, Economie, Mens en Organisatie. Dit zijn de 3 klassieke P’s van het duurzaamheidsdenken (Planet, Profit, People), aangevuld met Performance. “Performance” betekent het beste van elke medewerker en elke organisatie naar boven brengen en daardoor de veerkracht vergroten. Dat kan volgens ons alleen door mensen en organisaties met elkaar te verbinden, de individualisering en het gepolariseerde éénrichtingsdenken open te breken en de klassieke denkpatronen te verbreden. We noemen het graag: “zenuwbanen herstellen”. “Organisatie” mag je in de breedste zin van het woord interpreteren: elke plek waar mensen interageren.

Koncept staat voor conceptueel denken, maar anders. We willen niet richtinggevend zijn, maar integendeel samen met u en onze partners alle richtingen verkennen. Geen denktank, maar een reflectievat. Op die manier willen we mee helpen bouwen aan een duurzamere wereld.

We zijn kantoorinrichters in hart en nieren. We zijn ervan overtuigd dat er een enorme transitiekracht schuilt in onze ondernemingen die ons mee op weg kan helpen naar een duurzamere toekomst. Daarom denken we mee met onze klanten en onze partners hoe zaken op een toekomstgerichte duurzame manier aan te pakken.

Name: Hermann's Finland
Description:
Hermann's Finland Ltd is a production technology company which specializes in demanding interior solutions. Company has 5300 square meter production facilities in Raisio, Finland, where they have CNC machines for glass, stone, metal and wood, and in addition, a top class surface treatment station and 3D design system for interior solutions. Hermann’s has done projects in shipbuilding and construction industry and areas have included for example restaurants, bars, receptions and atriums. Hermann's strengths are modular and intelligent interior components and furniture as well as 3D planning and modern CNC manufacturing machines.

Europlan Engineering Ltd is the leading project management and design business company within marine industry in Finland. In its core business, Europlan focuses in challenging turnkey deliveries in domestic and foreign shipyards. In addition to this, Europlan has a wide experience in international technology projects in offshore, petro chemistry and construction industry. Europlan’s business idea is based on turnkey supply concept: we can offer our customers complete turnkey solutions starting from planning and design to material procurement, installations and post-delivery support. Our knowhow is based on strong in-house expertise and cost-effective project management and in addition, a wide range of cooperation partners allows us to find the best solution for each customer and for each case.

Name: Asaf Atelier Wood Art Design
Description:
Hello!
Our company, based in Ankara, specializes in producing unique and custom-designed furniture. Our mission is to enrich the living spaces of our customers with one-of-a-kind pieces made from walnut trees aged between 300 and 400 years.

With our expert team of woodworkers, interior designers, and artists, we carefully design and craft each of our products. Our focus is on combining aesthetics and functionality while preserving the natural beauty of the wood. Each piece is a work of art that brings the texture of the past into the present.

Name: henneveld.office GmbH
Description:
Transformation im Büro – wie funktioniert das eigentlich? 

Reicht da die farbenfrohe Couch, die gut sortierte Barista-Bar oder das flexible Mobiliar auf Rollen aus, um den neuen Ansprüchen an eine inspirierende und innovative Bürowelt gerecht zu werden? Sicher nicht. Und da kommt henneveld.office ins Spiel, denn unsere ganzheitlichen Ansätze garantieren eine analytische und vollumfängliche Herangehensweise an diese Thematik. Unsere Konzepte basieren nicht nur auf konzeptionellen und interessanten Planungen, nein, wir erarbeiten gemeinsam mit Euch anhand von verschiedenen Tools das exakte Anforderungsprofil, um ein ideales Arbeitsumfeld für Euch und Eure Mitarbeiter zu schaffen. Wir können sehr frühzeitig im Prozess starten, z.B. mit der Analyse des Gebäudes, führen Mitarbeiterbefragungen durch, inszenieren und leiten Workshops, analysieren die Führungskultur, begleiten den Kulturwandel in Eurem Unternehmen und tauchen sehr tief in die Prozesse Deines Unternehmens ein.
Das Ergebnis dieser Analysen ist das Spiegelbild, welches wir Dir und Deinem Unternehmen dann final präsentieren. 
Das wir - basierend auf diesen Resultaten - Euch die entsprechende Umsetzung in Form von inspirierenden Layouts, innovativen Lösungen und fantastischen Produkten anbieten können ist natürlich selbstverständlich. 

Dafür steht Henneveld seit fast 80 Jahren. 
Das ist unser Credo
Das ist unser KnowHow 
Das ist unsere Stärke.

Name: The Carpet Cellar
Description:
The Carpet Cellar is a specialist Gallery for the finest hand woven treasures. Conceived by India’s most respected curator of carpets, late Mr  Sheel Chandra, The Carpet Cellar is considered a Mecca for certified antique carpets, perfectly executed recreations, modern and Contemporary Carpets and Rugs as well as kilims, durries, shawls and textiles.
The Carpet Cellar houses a range of hand woven and hand knotted masterpieces, carefully selected by Mr. Chandra for their uniqueness and brilliance over the past four decades.
The collection  reveals a variety of styles and designs that will appeal to a wide range of both  Modern rugs ,contemporary rugs as well as Classic Traditional tastes. 
Our selection illuminates the culture of areas stretching from the Black Sea to China including Mongolia, the former Soviet Union, Tibet, Turkey, Mesopotamia, Persia, Afghanistan, Baluchistan, India, Egypt and Morocco, as expressed through carpet design and artistry.
The family behind the Carpet Cellar leverages its wool, cashmere and weaving enterprises to provide the finest raw material, facilities, and classically trained artisans to facilitate the creation of all new pieces. 

This form of vertical integration is unique to the Carpet Cellar and enhances our capability to ensure the quality of the end product.

The Carpet Cellar is proud to have leading museums around the world borrow from our collections for exhibitions.

 Our patrons have publicly acknowledged the uniqueness and beauty of The Carpet Cellar’s collection over the years and our carpets can be found in the most distinguished homes and businesses both in India and abroad.

The Carpet Cellar is a rare representation of the art of oriental weaving at its best and is the largest collection of its kind in India.

the ****Hotel Ridderkerk - 140 rooms, 3 restaurants, and 14 conferance rooms.

Name: Carré Inside
Description:
Chez Carré Inside, nous savons que l’environnement de travail est bien plus qu’un espace physique : c’est un levier stratégique pour le bien-être, la performance et l’expression de vos ambitions. C’est pourquoi notre accompagnement commence bien avant l’aménagement. Nous analysons vos enjeux, vos usages et vos objectifs pour définir une stratégie claire et construire un projet cohérent.

Ensuite, nous concevons des espaces uniques qui reflètent l’identité de votre entreprise tout en répondant à vos besoins spécifiques. Chaque projet devient ainsi une expérience sur mesure. Bienvenue dans l’univers Carré Inside, où stratégie et design se rencontrent pour donner vie à des espaces qui font sens.

Au-delà de la conception et de la réalisation, nous vous accompagnons dès les phases stratégiques pour définir les orientations qui guideront votre projet.

Nous assurons une gestion intégrée dans le cycle de vie d’un espace, de la phase conseil et audit, depuis sa conception à la réalisation des travaux et du mobilier, jusqu’à l’exploitation continue du site.

Nous intervenons aussi en rénovation, même en site occupé. Inutile de déménager ou de repartir dans des bureaux neufs pour transformer vos espaces : repenser l’existant peut souvent offrir autant — voire plus — de valeur. Dans cette logique, nous intégrons pleinement les enjeux de décarbonation et de performance énergétique : décret tertiaire, labels…

Nous vous aidons à conduire le changement. Transformation organisationnelle, déménagement ou réaménagement : ces étapes sont l’occasion de repenser les modes de travail, d’impliquer les équipes et de créer des espaces qui favorisent engagement et performance. Grâce à nos audits, à l’analyse des pratiques et à la conception d’espaces adaptés à chaque métier, nous élaborons une stratégie cohérente et alignée sur vos valeurs.

Welcome to NY Estilo, our esteemed interior designing company, where excellence meets creativity and luxury finds its true expression. With over 25 years of unparalleled experience in the industry, we have honed our craft to perfection, delivering bespoke interior solutions that leave a lasting imprint of opulence and sophistication. 

It all started when our founder, Mr. Y Martin set his journey to design his dream house. It didn’t take long to notice how difficult it was to navigate the industry, with many challenges like finding the right professionals, coordinating with one another, and ensuring fair, affordable pricing and quality many customers had to face.

To offer homeowners a more pleasant experience, Mr. Y Martin and his team established a factory with state-of-the-art germen machines and our in-house team of seasoned designers, architects, and artisans is driven by a passion for creating timeless spaces that transcend trends and reflect the unique personalities of our esteemed clientele.

From prestigious residences to high-end commercial spaces, we have curated an extensive portfolio of remarkable projects that bear testimony to our commitment to perfection and attention to detail. Our design philosophy revolves around combining premium materials, cutting-edge technology, and artistic finesse to create spaces that exude elegance and grandeur. 

Throughout the years, we have garnered a reputation for delivering exceptional service, unwavering quality, and a seamless customer experience. Our dedication to exceeding client expectations has earned us accolades and a loyal clientele that continues to trust us with their most cherished spaces.
As we embark on new ventures, our journey remains guided by a relentless pursuit of excellence and an unwavering commitment to creating extraordinary living experiences. We invite you to visit our factory, explore our world of luxury interiors and witness the seamless fusion of art, innovation, and timeless elegance.

Door onze bijzondere relatie met een aantal moderne klassiekers en nieuwe meesterwerken zijn de mogelijkheden eindeloos. We hebben de merken en fabrieken persoonlijk bezocht en kennen de ontwerpers, materialen en extra mogelijkheden.

Name: Sally Conran - Interior Design
Description:
Sally Conran Studio is a London Based Interior Design studio founded and led by Sally Conran and supported by her creative partner Wenda Harrison. This dynamic duo are known for creating elegant interiors with an enduring individualistic style.

We work across both residential and commercial interior design and pride ourselves in our personal, tailored and professional approach. Positive relationships, based on trust and collaboration, are key to our work ethic; be it with our clients, customers, suppliers, manufacturers and craftspeople whom we collaborate with.

Unswayed by the influences of passing trends and fashions each project is designed to compliment the architecture and interior spaces of the property while reflecting the tastes and lifestyle of those who inhabit them.

“We always try to put ourselves in our client’s shoes and imagine what they would like to do in a space and how it would make them feel.”

We curate items that go beautifully together to create homes or bars, hotels and restaurants that our clients want to spend time in. We are also creative with colour and love to mix vintage pieces with contemporary designs. Ultimately we create relaxed luxury.

There is an emphasis on quality in all our projects and this tailored approach means that every project is uniquely personal and timeless.

Lighting is another key element to our designs as we feel it is an important element to creating mood and atmosphere. We truly believe that the ambience of a space is elevated by a creatively layered and thoughtfully designed lighting scheme and we have successfully enhanced many projects in this way.

Art is also a passion of ours and has a place in all the interiors we design. It adds unique character and soul to the interiors we design and incredible focal points.

Ultimately for us, Interior Design is a fine balancing of carefully curated elements, which when put together create a whole that is bigger than the sum of its parts.

Name: Merci René
Description:
"Merci René !" c'est ce que nous disent nos clients à la fin du projet parce que nous savons concevoir et aménager les espaces en prenant en compte l’impact environnemental et social de leurs choix, avec la philosophie de faire renaître le mobilier et plus largement les territoires.

Merci René est une Société Coopérative (SCOP) qui propose des services d’aménagement d’espaces de vie et de travail, avec des solutions issues de l’économie circulaire et locale, pour les professionnels privés et publics.

Nous proposons 3 services cumulables :

1. L’accompagnement vers la Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises : intégration de la démarche locale & circulaire dans la stratégie de l’entreprise ; conseil en achats responsables ; ateliers de sensibilisation à l’économie circulaire & locale ; mise en réseau avec les acteurs de l’aménagement éco-responsable.

2. La conception et le design d’espaces sur mesure réalisés par nos designers et architectes d’intérieur. Cela inclut la réalisation de plans d’ambiance, plans 2D ou 3D, des carnets mobilier, etc.

3. Le sourcing, la livraison et l’installation de mobilier issu du réemploi, du surcyclage ou du neuf responsable. Notre réseau de 250 partenaires offre un large éventail de choix selon les envies et les besoins. Qu’il s’agisse de produits d’occasion, catalogue ou personnalisés, nos fournisseurs sont sélectionnés avec soin pour délivrer du mobilier de qualité et contrôlé.

À la clé, Merci René fournit un bilan des impacts du projet au niveau local, social et environnemental. En complémentaire, nous proposons la création de supports de communication pour sensibiliser et informer les collaborateurs ou bénéficiaires.

Clients : CD 31, MAIF, Groupe des chalets, Biocoop, Pierre & Vacances, In'li, Promologis, Groupe SERL, Carbone 4, SACVL, Mairie de Villeurbanne, Mairie de Grenoble....
