Y nos encantó desde el primer momento, nos gustaban las personas con las que trabajábamos, nos gustaba crear espacios, combinar colores y texturas, nos enamoraba atender a los clientes y sobre todo nos gustaba tener sueños. 

Hoy, contamos con nueve tiendas de gran formato, una tienda en centro comercial y dos puntos de venta de Tugó Proyectos Corporativos. DISEÑO + PRECIO JUSTO+ DISPONIBILIDAD + COBERTURA + RESPALDO 

Combinando así un gran surtido, calidad, diseño innovador y precios accesibles llevando el diseño al alcance de todos. Por eso, hoy somos más que muebles y objetos, somos TUGÓ, DISEÑO PARA TODOS.

Quinti, Pinetti, Toulemonde Bochart, et bien d’autres encore à découvrir dans nos showrooms casablancais.

Interlux Group est structuré en 3 divisions spécialisées :

Interlux Pro : Dédié aux solutions d’aménagement professionnel pour les bureaux, hôtels (agencement – Lots FF&E), espaces publics et établissements spécialisés.
Mobilier pour bureaux, auditoriums, stades, cliniques, aéroports, hôtels, promotion immobilière, universités, écoles, urbain

Interlux Agencement : Propose des solutions sur-mesure et clés en main pour vos projets d'agencement résidentiels.
Cuisines, dressings, systèmes de rangement, agencement sur-mesure, parquets, menuiserie bois, portes, mobilier de salle de bain, saunas & hammams

Interlux Home : Spécialisé dans l’aménagement résidentiel des espaces intérieurs et extérieurs.
Mobilier, luminaires et accessoires élégants et contemporains.

Grâce à son bureau d’études intégré avec ses architectes d’intérieur et agenceurs, Interlux Group accompagne ses clients à chaque étape de leurs projets, offrant une expertise complète en tant qu’interlocuteur unique. A découvrir :

5 showrooms à Casablanca – Triangle d’Or – Bvd Abdellatif Ben Kaddour

The firm’s core ideals stem from the ideology of a peaceful rebellion, going off-piste from the charted route through a conceptual design process that revolves around the intuitive culture of the team who creates it, and the foundational values of the people who inhabit it. In return, this approach curates a space that is grown with the seeds of love and dedication and continues to thrive with that same vitality for life and an artful way of living.

Ariel Fox Design has partnered on projects for a coveted group of renowned developers and property groups, including Alliance, Dinerstein Companies, Greystar, Holland Partner Group, Millcreek, Omni Group, Trammel Crow, and more…are you next?  View our Portfolio to peer into our world.

Sean espacios de oficina, hoteles, viviendas, gimnasios, centros educativos, clínicas, retail... necesitan de una buena consultoría de espacios para funcionar de la mejor manera posible.

We pride ourselves on exceptional customer service, timely delivery, and high-quality products. Whether it's a vibrant balloon arch or an exquisite floral arrangement, 7 Days Balloons & Flower Art promises to add a touch of magic to your special moments. 

Let us help you bring your event to life, one bloom and balloon at a time!

Name: 201 Lyvn
Description: At 201 Lyvn, we believe that every space tells a story. Headquartered in the heart of London, our mission is to transform interiors into inspiring, functional, and deeply personal environments that reflect the lifestyles and aspirations of our clients. By blending timeless elegance with contemporary innovation, we craft spaces that are not only visually stunning—but truly meaningful.

Name: Studio Plum
Description:
At Studio Plum, we bring unbuilt spaces to life through photorealistic 3D visuals that reflect your design intent with clarity and emotion. Founded by designers for designers, we understand how crucial it is to communicate concepts convincingly — especially during the early design phase when every detail matters.

We work with interior designers, architects, and real estate developers, helping them present their ideas with compelling, high-quality renderings. Whether it's for a residential project, commercial interior, or architectural concept, our 3D visuals offer a level of realism and refinement that helps you win trust and approvals faster.

What We Offer:
1. Photorealistic Interior & Exterior Renderings
2. Conceptual & Mood-Based CGI
3. Social Media-Ready Styled Shots
4. Cinemagraphs
5. Walkthrough videos
6. Flexible CGI Packages for Design Studios & Developers

Why Studio Plum?
We combine a solid background in interior design with cutting-edge 3D visualization expertise, giving us a unique edge in understanding what fellow designers and architects truly need. Our approach is collaborative and detail-focused, allowing for seamless communication of your design language, materiality, and visual tone.

Our team knows how to translate moodboards, sketches, and floor plans into images that not only look beautiful but also serve a purpose — helping you pitch better, communicate more clearly, and impress your clients.

Our Vision
We’re building Studio Plum to be at the forefront of CGI services over the next 5 years, driven by our insight into the design process and the pain points that creative professionals face when outsourcing visuals.

We believe that CGI is more than just rendering — it’s about storytelling, problem-solving, and bringing intangible ideas into believable form. And we’re here to support you in doing just that.
 Reach out to discuss your project: info@studiopluminteriors.com // https://www.visualsbyplum.com/contact

Name: Homezop
Description:
Starting in 2015 with just 3 people at the core, today we’re a strong team of 30+ corporate crafters and 100+ site operatives redefining modern living in Delhi-NCR. Led by Prateek Rathee (Founder & CEO), we’ve evolved from an interior startup to a trusted real-estate developer creating ready-to-move homes that truly feel like home.

With a passion for creating inspiring and functional spaces, we have established ourselves as a dynamic force in the world of interior design. Our journey began with a simple yet profound belief: that every space should tell a unique story. We understand that your home is a reflection of your personality, and your workplace is an extension of your brand. With this in mind, we set out to craft interiors that not only captivate the eye but also enhance the way you live and work.

Name: Myah | Patriarche
Description:
Myah | Patriarche offers customised interior design services, from the study of needs and uses to the turnkey delivery of furnished and operational spaces.
With the help of digital tools and a range of integrated skills such as narrative design, architectural design, furniture, wayfinding and signage, we aim to encourage future users to take ownership of the space and to showcase our clients' identity.
Myah strives to design and create innovative, virtuous and evolving environments, adapted to the uses of today and tomorrow.

Narrative design | Interior design | Furniture design | Wayfinding and Signage

Name: Danish Design Art
Description:
Established in 2020 by Danish Siddiquee, Danish Design Art is a renowned interior design company that specializes in providing opulent, comprehensive design solutions. With a varied portfolio that includes commercial, industrial, and residential projects, we take great satisfaction in designing elegant, useful spaces that are customized to meet the specific needs of each client. We are a reliable partner for converting common areas into remarkable settings because of our meticulous attention to detail, dedication to excellence, and enthusiasm for creative design.

We provide experience and creativity to every project, whether it's a private home, business, or industrial setting, guaranteeing a smooth and joyful experience from start to finish.

Allow Danish Design Art to realize your design goals with grace, accuracy, and a commitment to quality.

Name: DWm4 Intrends Ltd.
Description: DWm4 Intrends Ltd. is a studio operating out of Bangladesh to facilitate the design and construction of interiors. The mission of the firm is to make innovative and avant-garde interior design available to clients of Bangladesh in addition to a holistic turnkey solutions. Therefore, clients may enjoy the functionality of aesthetic interior spaces without having to deal with multiple craftsmen and suppliers related to this field.

Name: IMADA Interior Design & Decoration Works
Description:
IMADA Interior Design and Decoration Works is headquartered in Abu Dhabi KIZAD Area, with over 200 skilled professionals and a fully equipped factory specializing in marble, granite, and natural stone fabrication.
Our facility features advanced machinery, including Water Jets, CNC Machines, Bridge Cutters, Profile Machines, Cutting, Polishing, and Bush Hammer systems—ensuring unmatched quality and precision. We source premium stones from Italy, Spain, Turkey, Greece, Portugal, China, India, Saudi Arabia, and Oman.

IMADA has established a strong reputation in the UAE as a trusted partner for luxury projects, delivering bespoke stone and interior solutions for hotels, villas, palaces, and large-scale developments.
In addition to our core stone works, we proudly operate a dedicated Fit-Out Division, offering complete turnkey interior contracting services—from design to execution—for both residential and commercial spaces.

Backed by a talented team of designers, engineers, and project managers, IMADA delivers excellence, reliability, and timely execution across all our services.
We look forward to collaborating on your next project and building a lasting partnership.

Name: arkhe
Description:
Arkhe vzniklo v roce 2021 jako samostatná divize studia Perspektiv a zaměřuje se na rezidenční projekty pro koncové klienty.

Arkhe reprezentuje architektonické a realizační studio v jednom. Navrhovat domovy pro naše klienty považujeme za velkou výsadu. Ve spolupráci s nimi formujeme interiér, ve kterém žijí, tvoří nebo pracují. Tím však nekončíme. Rozvíjíme a řídíme každý detail – od prvotního konceptu až po předání hotového interiéru. Prostřednictvím služby Design&Build neboli návrhu a realizace na klíč, figurujeme jako hlavní partner celého projektu a díky tomu můžeme zaručit, že vše dotáhneme k dokonalosti.

Na každý projekt pro vás vybíráme tým, který odpovídá profilu vašeho zadání. Chceme, aby rezonoval s vaší povahou i vkusem. Pracovat s arkhe znamená, že budete v kontaktu se stejným týmem od okamžiku, kdy se poprvé setkáme, až do chvíle, kdy vám předáme dokončený interiér. Díky úzké spolupráci tak můžeme projekt maximálně přizpůsobit vašim potřebám a přáním.

Věříme, že zážitek ze stavby má být pro investora příjemný a bezstarostný. Díky velkému penzu dokončených projektů máme osvědčenou dodavatelskou strukturu a klientovi jsou schopni doručit i komplikované zakázky. Využíváme znalosti a know-how z velkých zakázek. Na klientovi už nechceme experimentovat.

Name: REESHA INTERIOR DESIGN
Description:
REESHA INTERIOR DESIGN is an interior architecture firm specializing in interior architecture and design established in Dubai, the heart of the United Arab Emirates, in 2019.

With an excellent team of interior designers, architects, engineers, technicians, and artists, we create comprehensive smart spaces and innovative designs in authentic and emotional experiences and execute them in the forms of luxurious, sophisticated, and innovative spaces in the UAE, GCC, and ME.

Name: FÉLIE home&interiors
Description:
At FÉLIE Home & Interiors, we elevate spaces and enrich lives through bespoke design, curated homeware, and expert mentorship, transforming homes and inspiring the next generation of designers.

At FÉLIE  we promote and embrace self-care and well being through the world of home décor and believe that ones space should be their sanctuary hence our online community #feliehome where we are building an empire of beautiful homes. Since the pandemic we recognise the constant yearn for society to feel at home, but also to admire the space they are in, hence the rise in hotel reservations which tends to provide its audience with the ambiance and atmosphere that they truly desire.

Well why not bring that into your home? All in all, FÉLIE  endeavours to deliver décor collections that are not only specific, but a reflection of the individual consumers lifestyle.

FÉLIE  will provide you with exquisite interior design solution and décor pieces for spaces of all shapes and sizes with assistance and specialist knowledge from our team. 

Elevating spaces, Enriching lives

Name: Cirkulär Interiör
Description:
Vi på Cirkulär Interiör strävar efter att ta fram hållbara inredningslösningar och produkter med tanke på miljö och kvalitet som i slutändan ger ökad prestation på jobbet. Att återanvända är bra!

Era begagnade inventarier kan säljas eller skänkas till andra vilket minskar belastningen på miljön och framför allt: gör din avveckling både mer lönsam och hållbar. Det vi inte lyckas köpa eller skänka återvinns på ett miljöriktigt sätt.

Efter att avvecklingen är genomförd sammanställer vi en rapport på vad som har köpts, skänkts och återvunnits. Detta material har ett kommunikativt värde då handlingen är ett bevis på ert frivilliga miljö och sociala ansvar.

Name: Grupo idemo
Description: En Grupo Idemo queremos darle vida a todas las ideas de mobiliario existentes, desde islas para centro comerciales, hasta tiendas de autoservicio y boutiques, contamos con la infraestructura para lograr el mejor diseño y layout. Description: We at Luxora are thrilled to announce the successful completion of our Luxury Experience Center, designed for those who desire luxury in every aspect of their spaces. As the only brand offering a one-stop solution for interiors—from land acquisition to welcoming guests—we continue to redefine luxury living. This milestone reinforces our commitment to delivering unparalleled elegance and convenience.

Name: SpaceIN
Description:
Jsme SpaceIN, odborníci na inspirativní pracovní prostředí. 

Maximalizujeme potenciál vašeho prostoru. Inspirativní prostory zvyšují produktivitu zaměstnanců a fungují jako vizitka vaší firmy. Je úlevou, když se nemusíte starat o realizaci návrhu. Postaráme se o vše od konceptu až po realizaci, abyste se mohli soustředit na svůj byznys.

Jsme s vámi od začátku až do konce. Společně prozkoumáme možnosti vašeho prostoru, společně zkonkretizujeme vaše přání. Vaše představy získají tvar. Abstraktní se stává konkrétním. Náš tým rozumí jedinečnosti každého projektu a přináší originální, časově odolná řešení na klíč.

Name: Navrasa
Description:
Based out of Gurugram, we are a team of town’s best craftsmen you will come across. Giving our best to understand your persona, we create a space which you can call your home; technically home.
Navrasa has serviced 100+ homes in a journey of 4 years; dealing into design consultancy, material selection, interior styling and execution. Always keeping your requirements a priority we pledge to design and serve you better.
The space designed will not only be aesthetically pleasing but also extremely functional
with absolute transparency since day 1.
As the name speaks, Navrasa defines the 9 emotions a living being showcases. Similarly, we here focus on all nine expressions – seven elements of design plus two which we think are the most important.
These are space, line, forms, light, color, texture and pattern. Plus (two without which every design is incomplete) a designer’s perspective and client’s perspective.
We combine the best of both worlds to bring out the best space for you!
Welcome Home!

Our clients entrust their decor to us so that we can attend to the finest details. We coordinate with specialised professionals and we manage the logistics of the whole process.

Our aim is that our clients feel those spaces as their own, genuine, where every element forms part of a design perfectly adapted to the client’s personal taste.

Name: KATZ Interiors
Description:
Katz is a leading luxury interior design and architectural company renowned for creating exceptional properties in the world’s most desirable locations.
Specializing in residential, retail and hospitality properties worldwide, we provide a comprehensive and seamless service to meet our clients’ requirements and fulfil their aspirations. This ranges from concept design to bespoke furniture and turn-key dressing

Katz Origin
Founded in 2006 by Dmitry Holomyov and Stan Katz - both outstanding professionals in their own field – they made an ultimate creative-business tandem. Katz has a 10-year heritage of delivering exceptional results within the luxury real estate sector and our wealth of experience continues to grow through prime residential projects and select hospitality or retail projects.

Brand Vision
Known for augmenting a classic style with an unexpected modern appearance, Katz creates outstanding interiors for intellectual individuals who understand what a perfect design is and who strive for excellence in any point of their life. Katz’s philosophy is to deliver thought-provoking, yet ultra-functional ideas in creating inspiring splendours of living areas and commercial spots.

Our People
Our diverse and multi-disciplined team are the DNA of Katz that gives us the expertise to push boundaries for clients who want to achieve the truly extraordinary. As a multidisciplinary studio of Interior Designers, Architects, Constructors and Project Managers - we all share a passion for design excellence, impeccable attention to detail, unsurpassed service and professional integrity.

Projects
Numerous objects realized in the most reputable areas of London, Paris, Monaco, The French Riviera, Miami, Barcelona, Moscow, Paris, Riga and Jurmala, including private apartments, villas and public spaces interiors.

Name: Shubhvastu interior design studio
Description: Shubhvastu Interior Design Studio is a premier interior design firm based in Gurgaon, known for transforming everyday spaces into elegant, functional, and personalized environments. With a deep understanding of aesthetics, comfort, and modern lifestyle needs, we specialize in residential and commercial interior design solutions. From luxurious living rooms and stylish kitchens to smart home automation and digital locks, we blend creativity with innovation to deliver interiors that inspire.

Description: Elysian Design Studio is a full-service interior design firm,  specializing in residential ,commercial and hospitality design. Whether you need a quick refresh of furniture and paint colours, or an extensive whole-house renovation, we can provide the expertise to make sure the project runs smoothly and gives you the best results possible. We are committed to delivering inspired designs that fulfil client expectations through collaboration and exceptional service. Our goal is always to create designs tailored to our clients’ unique personal styles and practical needs.

Description:
Somos un universo inspirador para arquitectos, interioristas, desarrollistas, constructores y gente que apuesta a hacer de su casa un espacio único y personal.

Somos importadores, distribuidores y comercializadores de Revestimiento, Loza Sanitaria, Grifería, Mobiliario de Cocina y Complementos que llegan a Uruguay desde todo el mundo.

Nuestro slogan “Lo que imaginás existe”, es una promesa y también un compromiso con el que trabajamos desde 1965.

Agathus Studios is a boutique real estate investment & design firm specializing in transforming luxury single family residences in Orange County, California.

Name: SOMOS ACAI
Description:
La Asociación Colombiana de Arquitectura Interior (ACAI), fundada en 2020, es la asociación dedicada a representar, apoyar y fortalecer el sector de la arquitectura y el diseño interior en Colombia. 

Con más de 60 empresas asociadas y una red de más de 55 aliados estratégicos, ACAI impulsa la profesionalización, la innovación y la sostenibilidad en la industria, consolidando estándares técnicos, fomentando el compromiso ético y promoviendo la conexión entre arquitectos, empresas, instituciones, gobierno y el público en general. 

ACAI promueve iniciativas colaborativas, con el proposito de generar espacios de educación, información y visibilidad a través de una plataforma que potencia la importancia del diseño interior como herramienta clave para el bienestar y la sostenibilidad.

The company offers a range of services, including interior design, renovation, and technology upgrades, which can be customized to meet the specific needs and preferences of our clients. Our design process involves close collaboration with our clients to ensure that the final design is tailored to the client's lifestyle, taste, and budget.

Description:
deation is an innovative design company that offers services such as graphic design, interior design, landscape design, and exhibition stand design. We are passionate about what we do and will work hard to bring each vision to life. Name: Riwaq Interiors

Name: Tonini Serramenti
Description:
Tonini è un azienda specializzata in produzione di serramenti, nasce nel 1998 e inizia a produrre infissi in PVC offrendo ai propri clienti prodotti Made in Italy di alta qualità. 
La nostra offerta è la creazione di infissi che soddisfino i criteri di sicurezza, sostenibilità e design all’avanguardia. Serietà e affidabilità sono i principi su cui si fonda l’azienda impegnandosi sempre di più nel miglioramento dei risultati.
Tonini sceglie materie prime di qualità del Made in Italy lavorandole con impianti tecnologicamente avanzati per la realizzazione di prodotti innovativi. 
Tonini si avvale di collaboratori specializzati e qualificati nel settore del PVC che rendono l’esperienza unica e straordinaria.
La nostra missione è  “Pensare con amore” a finestre che regalino sensazioni di benessere integrandosi con l’ambiente che le circonda e " creare con passione" qualcosa di bello, ricercando forme e modi che portino alla massima soddisfazione dei nostri clienti. La casa rappresenta per noi un ambiente di stabilità, serenità ed equilibrio interiore.
Negli ultimi anni Tonini ha ampliato la propria rete commerciale, contando sempre più Partner su tutto il territorio nazionale. 
Tonini fa parte delle aziende promotrici dell’associazione Anfit nata nel 2010 con lo scopo di promuovere le finestre di qualità pensate, progettate e realizzate interamente in Italia da aziende italiane.

Name: Varma And Associates
Description:
VARMA & ASSOCIATES has offices in Bangalore, Hyderabad, and Vijayawada. Our guiding concept is the combination of economic viability and sustainability. Amidst the influx of modern construction technologies, VARMA & ASSOCIATES aligns with client expectations, providing easily marketable solutions with anticipated returns.

With almost 7 years of experience, we have won praise for our superiority in the design of commercial, institutional, hotel, and residential projects of all sizes. Our team of over ten specialists upholds a practical and design-focused approach, prioritizing a close relationship with clients, integrity in design, and a well-structured work environment.

Name: Spazay
Description:
Spazay Interiors is a premium interior design and renovation company on a mission to make home design simpler, smoother, and more joyful.

Born from the frustration of navigating an unorganised, opaque industry, we set out to create a transparent, reliable, and design-driven alternative for homeowners. Our approach blends global design sensibilities, sharp execution, and a human-first mindset to deliver homes that are as functional as they are beautiful.

From concept to completion, we ensure a seamless, stress-free experience — with clear communication, transparent pricing, and uncompromising quality.

We bridge the gap between what homeowners dream of and what the market delivers, transforming everyday spaces into inspiring, personalised homes.

Our Promise: Premium design, transparent processes, and exceptional experiences — every time.

Name: Retush Interior Decoration
Description:
About Us

Retush Interior Design Company was established in the United Arab Emirates, a country where we gained our experience. The company is managed and led by our dedicated interior design team and in-house carpentry workshop, enabling us to partner with a diverse range of clients. We consistently meet project deadlines, provide innovative solutions, and deliver the best value through cost-saving measures while maintaining high technical standards that set us apart from competitors.

Our contracts or turnkey interior projects typically include partitions, ceilings, flooring, cladding, marble and tiling works, as well as specialized carpentry. We take pride in everything we do and have a capable team ready to execute a wide variety of projects, differing in size and requirements.

Name: Carolina Darocas Design
Description:
Carolina Darocas Design was established in Qatar 2017 as a high-end interior design studio with branches in Qatar and Spain. We specialise in luxury interiors for private clients and governmental projects, offering a highly personalised custom-made service. 
We place great importance and commitment to building strong client relations, tailoring our process to meet each client’s needs, delivering a full interior architecture, furniture design and turn-key styling service from concept to completion. Our projects combine a detail driven meticulous approach with a signature elegant and luxurious style.

Name: ASHE LEANDRO LLC
Description: ASHE LEANDRO is a company based out of 611 Broadway, New York, New York, United States.

Name: DHK Designs
Description: Providing a client focused service through the responsible culture of designing with high quality materials, we endeavor to leave not traces but long lasting marks on every clients' project & space that we work on.

Name: Lindas Dekor
Description: Lindas Dekor startet i 2010 på Værøy i Lofoten. I dag holder nettbutikken til i Trøndelag og er en familiebedrift som spesialiserer seg på raske, enkle og billige oppussingsvarer til hjemmet. Vår misjon er å gjøre oppussing enklere slik at enhver kan skape drømmehjemmet sitt, uavhengig av budsjett eller situasjon. Lindas Dekor har Norges største utvalg av selvklebende folie til møbler, interiør og vindu, i tillegg til flere innovative nyheter som gjør oppussing enkelt og hjemmet fint.

Name: Enrico Colombo
Description:
Fondata nel 1952 da Enrico Colombo, l’azienda si consolida sin da subito nel settore del legno, divenendo un punto di riferimento per i numerosi artigiani della Brianza. Gestita oggi dalla terza generazione della famiglia, Enrico Colombo si presenta come una realtà dinamica e versatile nel settore del legno e della fornitura di pannelli di alta qualità per arredi, affermandosi oggi leader in Italia per i materiali e le finiture di design. L’azienda offre servizi di squadratura e bordatura interna e conta due sedi, a Cesano Maderno e a Cantù, strutturate in modo tale da garantire la massima velocità nell’evasione degli ordini e nel controllo delle spedizioni. 

Sempre attenta alle esigenze della propria clientela, è un punto di riferimento per il piccolo e medio artigiano della Brianza e non solo.

Disponibilità, competenza, giovane età ed entusiasmo dei collaboratori sono i punti di forza che la contraddistinguono oltre ad un ambiente familiare tramandato dal fondatore Enrico Colombo agli eredi che proseguono la "staffetta" imprenditoriale.
La successive generazioni hanno raccolto il testimone di un'attività molto legata a Seveso e alla sua storia, tenendo sempre lo sguardi verso il futuro fatto di innovazione e progresso.
Ora Enrico Colombo Sas ha due magazzini nei quali vengono svolte le lavorazioni e dai quali partono le forniture di pannelli in legno.
Gli uffici amministrativi sono attaccati alla produzione per poter garantire maggiore velocità dell'evasione degli ordini e nel controllo delle spedizioni.

Our fully bespoke and holistic approach to design spans both creative and spatial direction to guide every stage of the process, from interior architectural conceptualisation to furniture creation and styling.

Description:
Slang - Innovazione nell'Arredo per Farmacie e Retail.
Siamo una startup fondata da architetti e professionisti con decenni di esperienza nell'arredo per farmacie, attivi su tutto il territorio nazionale con un team di tecnici altamente qualificati.
La Nostra Offerta Rivoluzionaria:
Offriamo arredi modulari e aggiornabili, progettati per rispondere alle esigenze del settore farmaceutico e retail. I nostri "UPPERs" sono componenti intelligenti che permettono restyling e aggiornamenti a costi contenuti, senza interventi strutturali. 
I Nostri Principi Chiave:
1.	Desiderabilità: Cosa ha senso per le persone e i clienti?
2.	Flessibilità: Cosa sarà tecnicamente possibile nel prossimo futuro?
3.	Vitalità: Come garantire che l’evoluzione continua del design del punto vendita sia sostenibile?
Realizziamo arredi che possono essere aggiornati o modificati periodicamente, utilizzando componenti di qualità e sistemi tecnologici avanzati. Come una cover per smartphone, offriamo un look rinnovato sostituendo semplicemente parti in legno, metallo e vetro. Il nostro approccio garantisce che ogni farmacia e negozio rimanga al passo con i tempi, senza compromessi.
I Nostri Servizi:
o	Creiamo aree servizi su misura, integrando le ultime tecnologie e materiali di alta qualità per garantire comfort e funzionalità, ottimizzando lo spazio e offrendo un ambiente professionale per i tuoi clienti.
o	Realizziamo grafiche personalizzate per migliorare la comunicazione visiva e migliorare l’esperienza d'acquisto. 
o	Progettiamo il layout della tua farmacia o negozio seguendo le regole del marketing e del neuromarketing, massimizzando la visibilità dei prodotti, ottimizzando il flusso dei clienti e creando un'esperienza di acquisto piacevole e intuitiva.
o	Offriamo programmi di formazione per aiutare i dipendenti a utilizzare al meglio l'arredo/progetto acquistato, comprendere le tecniche di visual merchandising e migliorare l'interazione con i clienti.

Name: Ujo + Partners
Description: A good design is one which transforms a good idea into the best solution for the customer. This requires an exhaustive control of all phases of the project: from the conception of the idea to the supervision of the manufacturing processes and construction. For this reason, in addition to dealing with the concept and the development of the Project, our team always proposes the possibility of managing and coordinating the recruitment and construction of works, offering an integral solution. The future of design and architecture goes through the global control of the whole process: design, planning, construction and maintenance of buildings and spaces.

Name: Mayze Atelier
Description:
Mayze Atelier is a contemporary design house specializing in handcrafted statement furniture and lifestyle pieces that merge architectural elegance with poetic expression. Rooted in a reverence for natural materials and intentional living, each creation is a reflection of artful restraint and timeless luxury.

Founded on the belief that beauty should be both bold and quiet, Mayze Atelier is defined by its sculptural silhouettes, minimalist palettes, and deeply tactile finishes. From Italian travertine coffee tables to custom brass-accented consoles and curated interior accents, every piece is designed to anchor a space with presence, emotion, and purpose.

What sets Mayze apart is our commitment to craft—each item is made-to-order in close collaboration with skilled artisans and stonecutters, sourced from quarries and workshops across Europe and North America. We don’t just offer furniture; we offer heirloom works of design that tell stories through texture, tone, and touch.

With an eye toward sustainability and a heart rooted in intention, Mayze Atelier plants one tree for every order through its Green Earth Movement—a small but meaningful promise to give back to the planet that inspires our work.

Mayze is more than a brand. It’s a lifestyle philosophy.
Elegant, grounded, and uncompromisingly original.

For those who desire furniture that speaks softly but stands firmly—welcome home.

Each work is born from a collaborative process where materials, form, color, and scale are thoughtfully considered, resulting in timeless creations that blend artistry, design, and refinement.

Guided by tradition and brought to life by master artisans, every piece reflects patience, skill, and enduring quality, crafted from the finest natural materials.

Description:
“Designing the New Mediterranean”

Ibiza Interiors, founded by interior architect Jurjen van Hulzen, is a full service project company to help professional developers and private clients to build their dream project on Ibiza.

From small residential renovations to commercial spaces, Ibiza Interiors has grown to be an internationally recognized studio where a team of architects and interior designers work hand in hand with Ibiza Exteriors to provide conceptual driven architectural projects.

Name: El Club AD
Description:
Como fundador del Club del Interiorista, FEDE es el motor de este exclusivo refugio de creatividad y diseño. Lideramos este proyecto con la pasión y dedicación que nos caracteriza, colaborando con las mejores marcas para garantizar que cada proyecto refleje el más alto nivel de sofisticación y personalización. Somos el puente entre la tradición y las últimas tendencias en alta decoración, brindando a los profesionales del interiorismo la oportunidad de explorar y personalizar cada detalle de sus proyectos.

Creemos que los pequeños detalles marcan la diferencia; por eso, cada interruptor, enchufe y accesorio que fabricamos es una obra de arte que realza la sofisticación de cualquier ambiente. Con una sólida tradición artesanal, FEDE crea productos únicos en latón y materiales nobles que no solo cumplen una función, sino que también embellecen y transforman los espacios.

Nuestros talleres en Barcelona son el epicentro donde la innovación se une a la artesanía, dando vida a colecciones que combinan la más alta calidad con un diseño impecable.

Visitar el Club del Interiorista es una oportunidad única para conocer de cerca nuestra visión y descubrir cómo podemos ayudarte a crear espacios verdaderamente excepcionales. En el Club, FEDE no solo ofrece productos de lujo, sino una visión que redefine el diseño de interiores. Te invitamos a explorar un mundo donde cada detalle cuenta, y donde la excelencia en diseño es nuestra máxima prioridad.

No solo fabricamos productos; creamos experiencias que perduran en el tiempo y elevan cada espacio a su máxima expresión de lujo y sofisticación.

Name: Choicedge
Description:
At Choicedge, we believe that your home is a reflection of your personality, and we're here to help you transform it into a place that inspires and uplifts you. We are a one-stop solution for your interiors. We provide turnkey projects that are top-knotch in the industry. 

Our team of talented designers have years of experience and expertise in creating bespoke designs. Our interiors are timeless and innovative which stand the test of time. Join us on this creative journey to make your living space a masterpiece of beauty and functionality. Follow us on LinkedIn for design inspirations, industry insights, and updates on our latest projects.

Name: ZONOMA Studio
Description:
ZONOMA - Elevando Espacios, Creando Belleza y Funcionalidad

 Bienvenido a ZONOMA, donde el arte y la funcionalidad convergen para transformar espacios en obras maestras vivientes. Somos una apasionada empresa de diseño de interiores que se dedica a dar vida a tus sueños de entornos perfectamente equilibrados.

 En ZONOMA, nuestra obsesión es más que simplemente diseñar interiores. Cada proyecto es una oportunidad para fusionar el arte y la funcionalidad, creando ambientes cautivadores que cuentan historias únicas. Nuestro equipo de diseñadores altamente talentosos está comprometido con la creación de espacios personalizados que superan tus expectativas y reflejan tu estilo de vida y visión.

 Nuestro enfoque se basa en la colaboración cercana con nuestros clientes. Entendemos que cada espacio es especial y merece atención individualizada. Escuchamos atentamente tus deseos y necesidades, y luego aplicamos nuestra experiencia y creatividad para dar vida a tus ideas en formas que nunca imaginaste posibles.

 Lo que nos distingue es nuestra pasión por los detalles y la búsqueda incansable de la excelencia. Cada elemento, desde la selección de colores y texturas hasta la disposición de muebles y la iluminación estratégica, está meticulosamente considerado para lograr la armonía perfecta entre belleza y funcionalidad.

 Con cada proyecto que emprendemos, creamos espacios que no solo son visualmente impactantes, sino también altamente funcionales y adaptados a las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Ya sea un hogar acogedor, una oficina inspiradora o un espacio comercial que destaque, ZONOMA se compromete a brindar resultados que transforman vidas y dejan huellas duraderas.

Unite a nosotros en esta travesía de diseño excepcional y descubrí cómo podemos convertir tus ideas en realidad. Juntos, vamos a crear experiencias que trasciendan el tiempo y el espacio en ZONOMA! 

#ZONOMA #DiseñoDeInteriores #ArteYFuncionalidad #AmbientesPersonalizados

tasmay (ta-s-may)

Name: Design It Studio
Description:
Design It Studio as a company specializes in high-end decoration with years of experience as a supplier of products for luxury interior design projects. Our studio is a leader in the field of design, decoration, and millwork production. We work with the best materials, products, and brands to ensure a durable outcome and an interior of the highest quality. 
Our product catalogue includes thousands of references and covers all styles: classic, modern, contemporary, country, colonial, or avant-garde. 
We create high quality projects and offer bespoke, personalized designs. Our dedicated team of talented decorators and architects create exceptional interiors, whether classic, contemporary, cutting edge or a balanced blend of styles. Our vast experience, along with our wide selection of international top brands allows us to achieve the desired result according to the design and budget specified by our client.

Name: Designo Temple Store
Description: "Designo Temple Store" is a pioneer in the world of Corian craftsmanship, offering an array of exquisite products consisting of Corian Temples, Wall Panels, Name Plates, and  Wall Mounts. Founded in 1999 by visionary entrepreneur Karan Kumar Shah, he was the first person to bring Corian designs in Delhi, marking the beginning of our journey. Our journey began with a vision to blend innovation with tradition, crafting timeless pieces that resonate with our customers' hearts and homes.

Name: Rosetta Fitout / Interior
Description:
Rosetta Stone Decoration was founded in 2007. We provide high quality interior services to our customers across UAE.
Whether the project is a Interior designing, fit out contractor, renovation works, maintenance work, carpentry, marble and furniture works, office shifting or staging service, our highly experienced team strives to meet clients needs. Our team has over 15 years of collective design experience.

Name: DyeLot
Description: DyeLot is a design studio specializing in creating unique, hospitality-driven spaces that prioritize sustainability, well-being, and local culture. DyeLot’s integrated services – interior design, architecture, branding, and procurement – create streamlined projects, ensuring cost-effective and cohesive results for owners, brands, and architects.

Name: Keypact
Description: At Keypact, We specialize in creating innovative and functional spaces that cater to our clients’ needs. With a team of experienced designers, project managers, and contractors, we strive to deliver high-quality interior solutions for commercial and residential projects. From concept to completion, we are committed to bringing your vision to life and transforming your space into a modern and stylish environment. Contact us today to discuss how we can help you with your next fit out project.

Name: Platinum Interiors LLC
Description:
Platinum Interiors LLC is a design and general fit-out and joinery contracting company that provides our discerning clientele with bespoke solutions that meet the highest standards with a focus on flawless execution and expeditious delivery. We conceptualize, design, and manufacture, to ensure that quality control is maintained throughout the process.

We have in-house design (architects / interior designers/engineers) and execution (Masons/carpenters/electricians/painters/landscaping specialists etc) teams, supported by the latest technology& equipment to cater to all client requirements.

We have our manufacturing facilities (specialist industrial woodworking machinery) and strategic partnerships for complementary glass/flooring etc.

PLATINUM INTERIORS LLC will be the one-stop shop for our clients, with all project management and execution overseen and guaranteed (varies by product /service).

Name: CROSS
Description:
CROSS is a residential design-build firm with an established customer base in San Antonio and the surrounding area.  We pride ourselves on sound ethical business principles and a strong desire to provide complete client satisfaction.

Through our business process and project management skills, coupled with a pursuit of quality through all phases of the project timeline, we have demonstrated substantial positive results for our customers.  It has been said that our attention to detail and respect for the homeowner’s privacy and property reflect throughout the project.

Our goal is a completely satisfied customer who enjoys sharing their CROSS experience with others.  We take pride in the testimonials provided by our customers as a gauge of how we are performing our projects.

We have developed a systemic quality approach to the renovation and building process that yields proven results.  Our employees reinforce this philosophy every day.  A culture of quality and integrity, and effective communication with our clients and suppliers assure a well-managed project and a great renovation and building experience for the homeowner.

At CROSS our business process is cemented in our concept of in-house craftsmen.  With skilled tradesmen completely under company supervision, we can manage schedules, quality control and budget, and the timely completion of your project can be consistently achieved.

Description: The Space Specialist.

Description: Design & Details is a professional leading designer, manufacturer and exporter of wholesale, quality Modular Wooden Furniture, kitchen cabinets, Sofa, Almira, bathroom, cabinets and wardrobes, providing ‘one stop’ service and huge savings.

Name: Kanika Design
Description: Founded in 2008, Kanika Design is an award-winning interior design firm specializing in design and remodeling solutions to create stunning homes from concept to completion. Through the years, Kanika Design has earned a reputation for its daring and distinctive designs and unwavering commitment to exceptional service. Named as the Best Interior Designer of 2025 in the San Francisco Bay Area, we offer full-service interior design solutions—prioritizing design, functionality, and attention to detail to create spaces that are a true reflection of our clients.

Name: WEMA friends of work!
Description:
"WEMA – friends of work! 
Gemeinsam für Moderne Arbeitswelten

Wir sehen uns als Teil Ihres Teams bzw. einer langfristigen und partnerschaftlichen Zusammenarbeit. Gemeinsam mit Ihnen und Ihren Mitarbeitern schaffen wir moderne und agile Arbeitswelten, die einer hohen Akzeptanz unterliegen. Für uns stehen der Mensch, der Raum und die Technologie beim Schaffen neuer Arbeitsumgebungen immer im Vordergrund. Genauso wichtig sind aber ein klares Budget für die Umsetzung sowie die jeweiligen Erwartungshaltungen.

Bei WEMA – friends of work! finden Sie ein Team bestehend aus Workplace Consultants, Innenarchitekten, Planern, Back-Office-Mitarbeitern, Monteuren und Auszubildenden. Wir sind mit unserem Team von über 30 Mitarbeitern immer am Puls der Zeit. Die Mitarbeiterteams bringen ein hohes Maß an Wissen und Branchenerfahrung mit ein, bilden sich im Rahmen von Schulungen und Trainings weiter und besuchen nationale und internationale Messen, um stets am Puls der Zeit zu sein.

Erfolgreiche Konzepte entstehen aber mit und für Menschen, daher verstehen wir uns als Partner auf Augenhöhe, möchten Sie von uns und unserer Begeisterung zur Raumgestaltung überzeugen und Sie für eine partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit begeistern.

Verstehen Sie uns als „Friends of Work“!

Based in the heart of Ghana, we specialize in creating beautifully crafted, functional, and personalized interior designs that capture the essence of both contemporary and traditional African aesthetics.

Name: ID Luxury Interior Design
Description:
ID is a luxury interior design company that creates interiors which are both liveable and luxurious. Our projects are undertaken internationally, and we have a strong presence in the Middle East, UK, and Spain. 

Our team of designers has a wealth of experience in the luxury sector, and our mission is to provide creative interior design services that add value to our clients' lives. Whether it's a residential property or a commercial or hospitality project, we always aim to deliver an exceptional level of service and create spaces that our clients will love spending time in.

Our difference lies in our ability to deliver excellence – we are uncompromising in our quest for the best results for our clients. Whether you’re looking for a timeless aesthetic or something more cutting-edge, we have the talent and experience to make your vision a reality.

Name: Nordic Green Design
Description:
Nordic Green Design – Låt oss plantera en idé

Vi tror på kraften i gröna miljöer. Genom att kombinera växtinredning med hållbar design skapar vi arbetsplatser som inte bara ser bra ut – de känns bra. Varje växt, varje återbrukad kruka och varje lösning vi levererar är ett steg mot en mer levande och hållbar framtid.

Med kreativitet, återbruk och omtanke i fokus förvandlar vi kontor och offentliga rum till gröna oaser där människor trivs, utvecklas och inspireras. Vi är 65+ engagerade specialister med bas i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö – och vi hjälper över 1000 företag att växa, bokstavligen.

 Nordic Green Design – Låt oss plantera en idé som förändrar din miljö.

Name: Future of the Office
Description:
Future of the Office is a people-first workplace strategy and office design consultancy, helping organisations create future-ready, inclusive, and sustainable work environments that drive employee wellbeing and business performance.

We specialise in workplace transformation, hybrid work solutions, neurodiverse office design, and agile design & build services. Our end-to-end approach delivers spaces that inspire innovation, foster belonging, and attract top talent.

Follow us for the latest insights, trends, and case studies on workplace culture, office design, hybrid work, and the future of work. Learn how to create a high-performance work
Our approach goes beyond traditional office design. We craft dynamic, adaptable environments that align with the values and needs of today’s workforce, including the bold ambitions of Gen Z and the emerging expectations of Gen Alpha. By integrating cutting-edge technology, sustainability, and inclusivity, we transform workspaces into strategic assets that inspire engagement, foster well-being, and deliver measurable business outcomes.

We believe in the Power of Difference, celebrating diversity in all its forms. Our designs honour neurodiversity, support multigenerational teams, and reflect the unique identities of the people who use them. Solutions like our modular FuturePod meet the demands of hybrid work, collaboration, and employee well-being.

Sustainability is at the core of what we do. From upcycled materials to energy-efficient systems, we create workspaces that reduce environmental impact and align with ESG goals, helping organisations build a legacy of care and responsibility.

Future of the Office is proud to lead the B2P (Business-to-People) Revolution, placing humanity at the centre of every decision, design, and strategy. Let us help you reimagine your workplace as a purpose-driven, people-first environment that inspires innovation, attracts top talent, and leaves a lasting positive impact on people and the planet.

Name: Lion Interiors
Description:
Lion Interiors, merkezi İstanbul'da bulunan ve tasarımdan uygulamaya tüm süreçleri yöneten bir iç mimarlık firmasıdır. Çalışmalarımız, başta kuyumcu mağazaları olmak üzere ticari mekanlar, kurumsal ofisler ve konut projeleri için bütüncül çözümler sunmaya odaklanmıştır. Deneyimli ekibimiz, ilk tasarım konseptinden projenin tamamlanmasına kadar tüm süreci yöneterek her işin yüksek kalite, fonksiyonellik ve hız ile bitirilmesini sağlar. 

Lion Interiors, estetik vizyonu pratik uygulama ile birleştirerek mekanlara somut bir değer katar.

Name: Leza Design
Description: Leza Design providing a variety of services through a group of creative professionals who were committed to designing spaces that were comfortable, luxurious, and functional for both the occupants and the environment. With the needs of the client in mind, we are committed to creating a design and construction process that inspires beauty.

Name: Robin Sprong Wallpaper
Description:
We’re a bespoke print and design studio offering a full-service approach to surface design for interiors. Our work covers custom-designed wallpapers, vinyls, upholstery fabrics, printed acoustic panels, and privacy films for glass — all tailored to suit each project’s unique needs.

What truly sets us apart is that we’re not just a printing facility. We offer in-house design services, and we’ve built our business on creative flexibility. Many print companies stop at production — we begin with the design. Our team works closely with interior designers, architects, and clients to turn ideas into high-quality, original design work.

We also represent a carefully selected group of local and international artists, offering clients exclusive access to design work they won’t find anywhere else. These artists earn royalties for every print — it’s our way of investing in creativity and sustaining meaningful collaboration.

Attention to detail, colour accuracy, and quality materials are at the core of our production process. Our equipment and materials are top-tier, and our turnaround times are fast. Whether it’s a one-off feature wall or an entire hotel fit-out, we maintain the same commitment to quality and consistency.

We also offer nationwide installation, partnering with highly skilled wallpaper installers across South Africa. This means we can manage the full journey — from concept and design through to print and final install.

Some of our recent work includes projects like the Hilton Canopy Hotel in Cape Town (wallpapers and bathroom ceilings), Nando’s Flame Studio at Constitution Hill (acoustic design + print), and our ongoing collaboration with Zanele Muholi and Southern Guild — with prints featured in exhibitions globally, including the Tate Modern.

Other notable projects include The Marley Hotel, The Bay Theatre in Camps Bay, Le Residence in Franschhoek (using artwork by Uta Naumann), Londolozi, Life Hilton Private Hospital (with Rumour Has It), Pricewaterhouse

Name: CBH Interiors
Description:
Founded by Carissa Byrne Hebert, CBH Interiors is a full service interior design studio, serving Jersey City, Hoboken, and the Greater NYC Area. Carissa is a Certified Interior Designer, with over 15 years of Interior Design experience.  Her varied experience working on corporate interiors and residential interiors has given her valuable insight into successfully running projects, managing relationships, and leading the renovation process.
Carissa is an expert at helping clients decipher what they truly want and need in their space.  She believes that every client and every project is unique and should be treated so.  A mom of a little and a busy professional herself, Carissa understands the needs of busy individuals and families.
CBH Interiors believes everyone deserves a home that they love; a place that’s a haven for them to retreat to, as well as a space that fulfills all of their needs.  Let Carissa be your guide and help you create a space that brings you joy.

Name: Bolero Estudio

Name: Curtis Rowe Interiors
Description:

We believe that designing and organizing spaces should be inclusive for all budgets and all projects; big or small. Name: MON ARCH
Description:
MON ARCH არის არქიტექტურისა და ინტერიერის დიზაინის საპროექტო. MON ARCH ესაა იდეა, რომელიც ადამიანის ცხოვრების /დროის მაქსიმალურად ეფექტურ მატერიალიზებას ემსახურება. შეიქმნა იმისთვის, რომ პრაქტიკულ და კომფორტულ გარემოში ცხოვრების შესაძლებლობა არსებობდეს. ადამიანი იყო, არის და დარჩება ჩვენი მთავარი ფასეულობა, ვისთვისაც ვქმნით ცხოვრების სცენარს. ჩვენ გვჯერა დიზაინის ძალის, რომელიც ცხოვრების ხარისხის გაუმჯობესებას ემსახურება.

ინოვაციური მეთოდები და მუდმივი განვითარების პროცესი არის ის, რაც ჩვენთან ერთად ჩვენს პროექტებს განსაკუთრებულ ინდივიდუალიზმს სძენს. სწორედ ეს გვაძლევს საშუალებას არ დავკარგოთ არცერთი შესაძლებლობა და შევქმნათ შტრიხები სამყაროს სრულყოფილებისთვის, სადაც ადამიანი, ბუნება და არქიტექტურა ჰარმონიაშია.

MON ARCH is an architecture and interior design firm. MON ARCH is an idea that serves the most efficient materialization of human life/time. It was created so that there is an opportunity to live in a practical and comfortable environment. A person was, is and will remain our main value, for whom we create a life scenario. We believe in the power of design to improve the quality of life.

Innovative methods and a continuous development process are what give our projects a special individuality with us. This is what allows us not to lose any opportunity and create strokes for the perfection of the world, where man, nature and architecture are in harmony.

Name: Ali Budd Interiors
Description:
Celebrating our 11th year in 2021, Ali Budd Interiors is a full-service design studio, Toronto-based but globally available.

We built our studio on the belief that there’s a big difference between a house and a home. That’s why we sweat the details. Why we take the time to understand the needs of every person (and pet) that we work with. 

Our work is comprised of curated and bespoke pieces, carefully tailored to each unique space. It lives in exclusive neighborhoods, in decadent country escapes, and in modern professional and commercial spaces. Consistent across all you’ll find an aesthetic that is contemporary, timeless and livable.

We’re proud to provide a holistic design service, including: space planning, construction drawing packages, project coordination, bespoke furniture and millwork design and fabrication, lighting design, interior styling, art curation… and if there’s something particularly unique you require, we can likely make that happen too.

functional. We are dedicated to guiding our clients seamlessly from conceptualization to completion, ensuring that every 
design truly captures their essence. Committed to transparency, quality and timely delivery, we strive to establish a 
legacy where customer satisfaction isn't just a catchphrase but a genuine reflection of our work.

We’re architects with a particular focus on interior design and a profound dedication  to our love for beautiful things.
In 2012, Davide and Michael founded Ding Dong with a clear vision: to infuse our client’s lives with ease, luxury, and comfort , through the creation of carefully curated spaces.
For us, interior design is about creating something to be lived in and felt, adding layers of different materials and furnishings, harmoniously intertwined.
After over a decade of crafting stunning spaces, our portfolio boasts multiple accolades and features in multiple renowned publications. From sleek urban residences to holiday retreats, Ding Dong work can be found in beautiful homes scattered around the world.

Name: ARID Builders Pte Ltd
Description:
ARID Pte. Ltd. is an expert in commercial office renovation in Singapore. For 12 years, we specialize in helping our clients find the most suitable office design to suit their requirements. ARID is investing in better systems and workflow processes in the Philippines, as we adapt to the current trends and aim to make Building Information Modeling (BIM) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology part of our overall strategy moving forward. 

Our team of professionals focuses on “Commercial Interior Design” and is well recognized for having the most comprehensive office design and technical knowledge for commercial renovation projects in Singapore.

Established on May 5, 2011, ARID started out as an office interior design consultancy firm under the name ARID + Associates. The desire to be a turn-key commercial contractor prompted the organization to re-brand and change its name to ARID Builders Pte Ltd (UEN no. 201304240Z) to reposition itself to be a design and build company offering office & retail renovations.

Since 2013, ARID has been working on numerous office designs and retail shop renovation projects ranging from 1000 to 25,000sq.ft as of this year ARID Builders has already completed more than 320,000sq.ft of office and retail space. 

We take pride in being a Bizsafe3 and Building Construction Authority (BCA) registered contractor in Singapore. We ensure that we keep a track record (Form-D) of all our projects to comply with the BCA accreditation guidelines.

Lastly, ARID has Integrated Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) solutions as one of its key expertise with the inclusion of the LumenAire Air Disinfection and Real-Time IAQ assessment service. Our commitment to Environmental, Social & Corporate Governance (ESG) will shape how our new management will propel ARID into the future.

Name: The Jordan Group
Description:
The Jordan Group is a full-service interior design firm that helps companies define their brand through innovative and memorable built environments. With over a decade of industry experience serving clients across Texas, our creative team listens and responds to each client’s unique needs and goals, delivering high-performance spaces and timeless design.

We strive to create places that do more. Places that are more connected, more engaging, and more inspiring. Places that help organizations and the people within them unlock their true potential.

For over a decade, we have had the privilege of working with developers, building owners, landlords, brokers, and property managers across Texas. Relationships are the foundation of our firm. We are committed to service, and our reputation speaks for itself.

As a leading luxury interior organizing company in the UAE, we take pride in offering a comprehensive one-stop solution tailored to meet the diverse needs of our clientele. Backed by our commitment to excellence, we ensure that every project is executed with precision and finesse, from conceptualization to execution.

At the heart of our success lies our skilled team of experts and visionary leadership. Each member of our team is dedicated to transforming our clients' visions into reality, delivering results that consistently exceed expectations.

Join us in elevating your living or working space to new levels of comfort and style.

Name: Susan Marinello
Description: Led by the firm’s namesake, Susan Marinello is a multi-disciplinary interior design practice where in addition to style and sophistication, the signature element is how occupants feel. From our offices in the heart of Seattle, Washington, we oversee comprehensive installations both locally and internationally, including bespoke furniture design and procurement services, for commercial and private commissions. Since our inception, our philosophy has always been to enhance the quality of life. Collaborating with renowned architects and artisans from around the world, our spaces are celebrated for transforming mood and mindset, improving how people live and how they feel. For over twenty-five years, our principles have remained steadfast—to honor quality over convenience, to design with integrity, and above all, to put the client first.

Name: Peng Space Interiors
Description:
Peng Space Interiors is a high-end interior design & fit-out studio established in Dubai in 2017. With 8 years of excellence, we specialize in crafting refined spatial solutions for luxury residences, private villas, commercial venues, hospitality projects, and office environments worldwide.

Blending contemporary aesthetics with a global design perspective, we create spaces where form, function, and feeling coexist in harmony. Our international team of designers and technical experts brings cross-cultural insight and extensive global project experience.

We deliver EPC-based turnkey interior solutions — from concept & design to execution, installation, and handover — all under one contract, ensuring a seamless journey from vision to reality.

Name: Superyacht Interior Studio
Description:
We meticulously curate and manage your Superyacht interior setup, we ensure that every element is perfectly integrated to create a cohesive and luxurious onboard environment. We assist by visualising the final spaces on board and work with the interior design team to blend where interior design finishes and interior setup begins.

Our services play a pivotal role in bringing together all the elements of an interior space to create a cohesive and harmonious final vision. This involves seamlessly integrating the lifestyle and service details onboard and ensuring that every detail is meticulously considered. 

Our beautifully crafted and creative online studio allows our clients to visualise, view, and share ideas effortlessly via mood boards and notes whilst having easy access to all their interior project details.

 This innovative approach ensures that real-time data is always at your fingertips. 

 Much like a dance, the final vision requires the perfect choreography

Description:
DKT Artworks are specialists in the design and production of bespoke decorative finishes and site-specific artworks.

We are a team of highly skilled and talented individuals, able to deliver on the widest range of projects – bas-reliefs, sculptures, murals, trompe l’oeil, paint finishes, decorative designs, gilding, Verre Églomisé, antiqued mirrors, hand-crafted mosaics, illuminated artworks, polished plaster – both in the UK and worldwide.

Name: Evlin Jarad Studio
Description:
Founded in Dubai in 2017 by the architect Evlin Jarad. Today, the brand delivers residential and commercial full turn-key interior design projects in addition to architecture and landscape design services all around the UAE. We pride ourselves on delivering projects with precision and efficiency, ensuring our clients' visions become a reality on schedule. With an unwavering commitment to perfection, our team brings expertise and creativity to every detail. 

We completed projects of different styles including but not limited to minimalist, modern, traditional, and industrial. Our wide projects portfolio covers residential and commercial projects including restaurants, cafes, lounges, salons, showrooms, offices, shops, private villas and more.

Name: Coralluzzo Living
Description:
La storia di Coralluzzo è una storia italiana.

Siamo negli anni 50, l’entusiasmo di un paese in rinascita e la voglia di riscatto furono da guida per Alberto Coralluzzo. Fondò l’azienda e ne avvio i primi successi.

La rivoluzione culturale e sociale degli anni 60 e 70 trasformano il paese, Carmine e Maria, figlio e nuora di Alberto, capiscono che è tempo di cambiare. La loro lungimiranza ne segna ancora oggi il nostro carattere.
Il rapporto fiduciario con i fornitori, ampia esposizione e ricerca continua.

In un mondo in continua evoluzione, progettiamo bagni in cui vivere, secondo i desideri delle persone in collaborazione con produttori internazionali.

È sempre stato un equilibrio perfetto, oggi come allora.
In perfetta simbiosi, Milena e Alberto Coralluzzo guidano un gruppo di persone orientato alla massima soddisfazione del cliente.

Name: August Architecture
Description: August Architecture est une agence d'architecture d'intérieur basée à Paris et à Nice.

Name: Vancouver Society of Interior Designers
Description:
We are the Vancouver Society of Interior Design. Our Mission is to unite our industry through various events, educational seminars & social media.

Our Design Community is made up of many amazing and talented people. As such we have formed The Vancouver Society of Interior Design. We will continue putting on events within the Community and promoting our fellow design organizations and members.

We will be working along side of IDIBC, IDC, NEWH, Designer Happy Hour, NKBA, AIA and any other parts of the design community willing to partner with us, to promote Design in Vancouver. Our goal is to bring the Design Community together and establish a place for members, non-members, students, industry partners and anyone else to network, have fun and get to know and support each other. We hope that you will choose to support our community in some way.

Volunteers needed… ENGAGE – PARTICIPATE – CONNECT!  Get involved in your design community by supporting events and volunteering with YVR Design Community - send us an email at vsid.info@gmail.com.

 #yvrdesigncommunity

Name: JP Móveis
Description: Na JP Móveis, transformamos madeira de demolição em peças únicas que contam histórias. Com mais de 10 anos de experiência no mercado, unimos sustentabilidade, design exclusivo e qualidade artesanal para criar móveis que transformam ambientes em lares acolhedores. Cada peça é feita com cuidado, valorizando a beleza natural da madeira e respeitando o meio ambiente. Nosso compromisso é oferecer móveis que não apenas decoram, mas também trazem significado e durabilidade para sua vida.

Name: Carler Interior
Description: Carler Interior grundades 2018 med ambitionen att erbjuda skräddarsydda, personliga & kreativa inredningskoncept till kontor, offentliga miljöer och privata hem. Under åren har vi haft äran att jobba tillsammans med många spännande uppdrag; allt ifrån kontor för konsultbolag i Helsingborg, techbolag i Stockholm och finansbolag i Göteborg. Vi brinner för att realisera våra kunders visioner och att tillsammans skapa miljöer där människor trivs och vill umgås. Nu mer än någonsin tidigare ser vi behovet av inspirerande och hemtrevliga kontorsmiljöer, för att anställda ska känna glädje att välja kontoret framför hemmets bekvämligheter. Vår starka sida är en kreativ och ständigt uppdaterad stil samt en möjlighet att med våra små tajta arbetsteam vara snabba och flexibla.

Name: Meredith Marlow Interiors
Description:
Meredith Marlow’s Interiors has received acclaim and numerous industry accolades. The spaces she designs are sophisticated, refined and unique. They are both softly modern and classically clean lined. She states,

“We are in the business of beautiful spaces and pride ourselves on being able to interpret the unique style of each of our clients. Customer experience is always number one. We see ourselves as advocates for the client as we guide them through the process of creating beautiful and functional spaces.”

It is this approach that has earned Meredith and her qualified team of experts both the trust of clients and a reputation for being at the top of the field.

Meredith holds a degree in Interior Design as well as a Master in English Literature from the University of Miami. She spent over 4 years as a Commercial Designer for San Francisco and Miami based Architecture firm Tsao Design Group. There she designed many hotels, restaurants and retail spaces.

Meredith and her projects have been seen in the pages of Luxe Magazine, Architectural Digest, Apartment Therapy, Voyage Miami, HGTV.com and many others. However, the real satisfaction is in the positive feedback and warm relationships she develops with her clients. MMI is voted a favorite in customer service and continuously receives The Best of Houzz Service Award chosen by a community of homeowners.

Name: Ma déco signée Pauline
Description:
Depuis 2020, je propose mes clients particuliers et professionnels de les accompagner dans leurs projets de décoration d’intérieur et d’aménagement d’espace à BRIVE LA GAILLARDE et sa région.

Pourquoi « Ma déco signée Pauline »?

Je m’appelle Pauline Chassaing, j’ai décidé de vous accompagner selon mes valeurs :
- Mon sens de l’écoute et ma capacité à traduire vos envies.
- M’adapter à votre rythme, à vos habitudes, vos modes de vie.
- Vous créer un projet unique qui reflète votre personnalité ou les valeurs de votre entreprise.

« Ma déco signée Pauline » est ma façon de m’engager sur votre projet avec toute ma créativité.

Name: Unient Global Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to the world of United, where excellence meets innovation in providing bespoke solutions across diverse sectors. Our expertise spans IT, ITES, Hospitality, Health Care, Residential, Auto & Mfg Plants, Petroleum, and more, making us the go-to advisor for projects of all scales.

Our passion lies in crafting remarkable spaces, and our specialty lies in Carpet Flooring, Moveable Walls, Fire Doors, Partitions, Ceilings & Acoustics. Notably, we take pride in our cutting-edge product manufacturers offering an unparalleled range of sustainable and designer options.

With almost two decades of experience, we are driven to extend our influence further and forge meaningful collaborations across Asia, always striving to deliver exceptional products and services to our cherished clientele.

Welcome to a world of limitless possibilities, where we turn visions into reality and elevate spaces into works of art.

Name: Westbury Interio
Description:
Westbury Interio is a premier interior design and home decor company dedicated to transforming spaces into personalized sanctuaries that reflect our clients' unique tastes and lifestyles. With a passion for design excellence and a commitment to customer satisfaction, we offer a comprehensive range of interior design services, furniture, and decor solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of our discerning clientele.

Our team of experienced designers combines creativity with functionality to create spaces that are both aesthetically pleasing and practical. Whether it's a residential project, commercial space, or hospitality venue, we approach each project with a fresh perspective and a focus on delivering exceptional results.

At Westbury Interio, we believe that great design should be accessible to everyone, which is why we offer a diverse selection of furniture, decor accessories, and textiles sourced from around the world. From timeless classics to contemporary trends, our curated collections cater to a wide range of design preferences and budgets

Name: Andringa Studio
Description:
The Andringa Studio is born from a desire to create a plural atelier with a broad scope of work with projects that can go from Interior design, Architecture, Consultancy, to Landscape design.
Rita Andringa refined her interior design referentials by working closely with artists and artisans, learning to respect traditions and understanding the materials and their history. She learned to value the land, proportions, natural light and the way you have to respect these when projecting houses that exceed their functional purpose of providing shelter, but that are also able to fullfill the desire for well being and pleasure.
In addition to her work as an Interior Designer, for the past few years she has been working with Louis-Albert de Broglie, known as Le Prince Jardinier and the owner of the French institution DEYROLLE. Together they have been thinking and designing sustainable ecosystems and beautiful gardens.
Rita has always been driven towards beautiful things and has always been passionate about Art, History, Gardens and Gastronomy so, her pursuit of a career in Design, Architecture and Landscaping was just a natural process.

Nell’era della comunicazione sfruttiamo al massimo internet o gli smartphone per comunicare ed acquisire tutte le informazioni utili al progetto da sviluppare, risparmiando e facendoti risparmiare tempo e denaro! Forme vuole darti la possibilità di vivere in una casa che sentirai veramente tua o di lavorare in un ufficio o in un negozio che ti aiuti a svolgere al meglio e con risultati più soddisfacenti la tua attività lavorativa.  Form Follows Function: Onze benadering is eenvoudig en krachtig: 'Form Follows Function.' Wij geloven in de harmonieuze samensmelting van esthetiek en functionaliteit in elke ruimte.

 Kantoor & Werkplek: Wij begrijpen dat jouw werkplek meer is dan alleen een locatie. Het is het kloppende hart van jouw zakelijke succes en moet vertrouwen en inspiratie uitstralen naar medewerkers en klanten.

 Privé & Thuis: Jouw thuis is een reflectie van jouw persoonlijkheid. Wij zijn er om jou te helpen bij het creëren van een leefruimte die jouw DNA weerspiegelt, waar je energie vindt en volledig jezelf kunt zijn.

 Merkonafhankelijk & Duurzaam: Bij ons gaat het niet om merken of prijzen, maar om de authenticiteit van de producten waarmee je jouw stijl communiceert. Onze merkonafhankelijkheid en toewijding aan duurzaamheid staan centraal in ons werk.

 Diversiteit & Uitdagingen: Wij omarmen diversiteit en houden van uitdagingen in interieurontwerp. Onze aanpak is flexibel en past zich aan jouw wensen en behoeften aan.

Founded in Los Angeles in 2025, Henne Creative was born out of a passion for transforming living and working spaces through aesthetics, functionality, and innovation. We believe that design should not only look good—it should inspire, comfort, and enhance the way you live and work.

Henne Creative is a full-service design studio specializing in both residential and commercial interiors. Whether you're looking to personalize your home or create a dynamic space for your brand, we're here to bring your vision to life.

With a focus on interior architecture, 3D design, and immersive 360° virtual reality experiences, we enable you to explore your space before it's even built. Our services include:

3D Design & Interior Architecture (Residential & Commercial)

360° VR Real-Time Design Experience

Interior Shopping Consultation

Home Decor & Furniture Sales

What sets Henne Creative apart is our ability to blend forward-thinking design with cutting-edge technology, always keeping people at the center. Every project starts with a story—your story. And we're here to help design the chapter where your space truly becomes yours.

Let’s shape your home, your business, and your dreams—together.
