Description:
At Recucina, we redefine luxury living by creating customized, modular solutions that blend functionality with sophistication. We specialize in crafting premium modular kitchens, bespoke wardrobes, designer TV units, elegant consoles, side tables, beds, sofas and more - each piece meticulously designed to reflect the finest standards of craftmanship.

Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every detail. we use German hardware for durability and precision, paired with Italian finishes to ensure a touch of opulence in every creation. With an in-house PU plant and access to imported glass shutters that can be crafted up to 10 feet in height , we deliver unmatched quality, service and timely execution.

Name: Kelly Behun Studio
Description:
Kelly Behun Studio is an interior design firm based in New York City that specializes in the design of interiors, furniture, and decorative accessories. Founded by Kelly Behun, the Studio provides a uniquely hands-on approach to producing customized environments perfectly tailored to each client’s needs. Clients are assured a highly personal experience with an emphasis on collaboration and individualized service. Considered an interior designer with the eye of a gallerist, Kelly’s projects utilize everything from bespoke furnishings and unique designer pieces to offbeat accents and inexpensive vintage finds. The aesthetic relies more on visual and emotional appeal than a particular style or provenance. Kelly has deep connections to the art world and is always seeking new and innovative ways for clients to integrate art into their homes.  Her portfolio includes projects for high-profile individuals in the worlds of technology, entertainment, business, and politics.

Kelly Behun grew up in Pittsburgh, PA, and attended the Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania. Upon moving to New York she joined Ian Schrager Hotels’ in-house Design Studio where she trained under architect Anda Andrei and worked with renowned designers Andrée Putman and Philippe Starck.  While there she was an integral member of the design team that created a number of their most iconic properties including the Delano in Miami, Mondrian in Los Angeles, and Royalton, Paramount, Morgans, and Hudson hotels in New York City.

She later opened Kelly Behun Studio, which has become known for its comprehensive and highly bespoke approach to interior design projects and its exclusive line of furniture and home accessories.  Kelly's design work has been featured in numerous domestic and international design and shelter magazines, books, and television shows. Her line is sold through 1stDibs, the Met Breuer shop, and other exclusive outlets, including The Invisible Collection and L’Objet.

Name: Livin Company
Description: Livin Company is a customer-focused home renovation and interior design company. Pratap Singh founded this company in 2019 with the goal of revolutionizing the industry through the use of augmented reality and machine learning.We currently provide services in four northern Indian cities (Lucknow, Kanpur, Prayagraj, and Fatehpur), with plans to expand further into New Delhi area by 2023.

Name: Lumick France | Luminaires LED personnalisables à votre goût
Description:
Découvrez l'offre de LUMICK, où les luminaires LED sont conçus sur mesure pour s'adapter parfaitement à votre espace et répondre à vos besoins.

Rejoignez notre mission pour éradiquer les plafonds ennuyeux !

LUMICK est né d'une simple question : "Pouvons-nous offrir une alternative aux dalles de plafond blancs monotones que les patients doivent fixer toute la journée ?"
En 2010, LUMICK a entrepris de répondre à cette question, et depuis, nous sommes devenus un acteur majeur sur le marché européen des soins de santé.
Chez LUMICK, nous nous engageons à fournir le meilleur service client et à améliorer constamment nos produits.

Le concept LUMICK en quelques mots :

•	LUMICK crée l'illusion de travailler en plein air sous un ciel bleu
•	Nos LED transforment les espaces sombres en environnements lumineux, ouverts et accueillants
•	Grâce à l’impression d’images personnalisées, nous pouvons créer une ambiance intérieure parfaitement adaptée à vos besoins et à votre espace.
•	LUMICK s'appuie sur des concepts de décoration et d'architecture tels que #evidencebaseddesign (EBD) et #healingEnvironment.

La force du concept LUMICK réside dans sa simplicité :
- Tous nos panneaux LED sont plug-and-play !
- Ils ne mesurent que 3,5 cm d'épaisseur - notre gamme FIRST ne pèse que 2 kg.
- Nos panneaux s'intègrent parfaitement dans les structures des plafonds suspendus, mais peuvent également être installés en saillie ou suspendus par des câbles.

ET AUSSI DES PANNEAUX MURAUX…
Nous proposons également une gamme de panneaux muraux qui créent l'illusion de fenêtres virtuelles. Avec leur qualité d'image, leur cadre biseauté et leur rétro-éclairage, ces panneaux offrent un effet de profondeur garanti.’’

Name: PLASTIC GUYS
Description:
Welcome to our profile! We are proud to represent Plastic Guys, a pioneering company based in the Czech Republic that leads the way in environmental innovation. Our core focus is producing high-quality panels and furniture crafted entirely from 100% recycled plastic.

At Plastic Guys, we revolutionize the way people perceive and use plastic. By emphasising its value and promoting the reduction of single-use plastics, we aim to encourage a more sustainable and environmentally conscious world.

Our product line demonstrates our commitment to sustainability and innovation. Each panel we produce is designed not only for functionality but also with the promise of 100% recyclability. This ensures that even at the end of their lifecycle, our products can be reused, representing the essence of a truly closed-loop system.

Our panels are suitable for a diverse range of applications and can seamlessly fit into both exterior and interior settings.

Join us in celebrating and exploring the world of Plastic Guys, where functionality meets environmental responsibility. We are not just creating products; we are shaping a future where our creations remain kind to the earth, even 200 years down the line.

Please feel free to contact us to discuss recycling solutions, sustainable product design, or to exchange ideas about making our planet greener. Let's innovate for a better tomorrow!

Olemme pureutuneet monimuotoisuuden ja digitaalisuuden tuomien muutosten ymmärtämiseen, jotta voisimme tarjota parempia tilaratkaisuja. Ergonominen kokonaisuus, työn sujuvuus ja vapaus valita sopiva tila, luovat kasvualustan menestykselle.

Name: Cosín Estudio
Description:
Desde 1986, en Cosín Estudio concebimos el diseño de interiores como una disciplina capaz de transformar espacios y mejorar la experiencia de quienes los habitan. Somos un equipo multidisciplinar unido por una misma idea que vertebra todo nuestro trabajo: la Cultura de Proyecto.

Casi 40 años de trayectoria nos han permitido desarrollar una metodología propia, donde cada encargo se aborda desde una perspectiva única, sin repetir fórmulas y con un enfoque que integra funcionalidad, identidad y emoción.  

Nuestro trabajo abarca diferentes ámbitos del diseño de interiores:  

➟ Viviendas: Espacios que reflejan la esencia y necesidades de quienes los habitan.  
➟ Hoteles y restaurantes: Ambientes que crean experiencias memorables.  
➟ Retail: Espacios comerciales que transmiten valores de marca y conectan con el público.  
➟ Espacios de trabajo: Oficinas diseñadas según la identidad de la empresa que fomenten la productividad, la creatividad y el bienestar.  
➟ Amueblamiento contract: Selección y diseño de mobiliario a medida para proyectos de alta exigencia en hoteles, oficinas y espacios de uso intensivo.  
➟ Diseño de mobiliario: Piezas con acento Cosín, concebidas desde la coherencia y la atemporalidad, adaptadas a cada espacio y necesidad.  


 Taller de Proyectos de Cosín Estudio - Calle Denia 3, 46006 Valencia.

Name: Living Design of Sweden AB
Description:
At Living Design of Sweden, we epitomize the art of interior design. Our Stockholm-based studio, founded in 1984, has become synonymous with impeccable craftsmanship and innovation in the Scandinavian design industry. With a legacy spanning four decades, we’ve curated a team of global design talents, consistently pushing boundaries and redefining luxury. As a result, we have emerged as a global leader in crafting and executing distinguished hospitality projects and exceptionally high-end residential properties worldwide, whether through new construction or meticulous renovation, always imbued with a bespoke narrative concept.
Living Design's unparalleled creative vision has steered the success of over 400 projects, both on the domestic and international fronts, encompassing prominent 4 & 5-star hotels as well as upscale residential developments. With an unmatched commitment to innovation, sustainability and a steadfast dedication to excellence and a legacy of 40 years in the field, Living Design has evolved continues to create guest experiences through extraordinary journey.
Hospitality Giants brands such as Marriott, IHG, Kempinski, Hyatt, Hilton, Wyndham and Accor are among our trusted clientele. The company's mission extends beyond Europe, MENA reaching the world's most exclusive travel destinations.
Living Design distinguishes itself by offering tailor-made services to clients and perpetually seeking progressive design approaches. Rather than confining its focus, the company offers flexibility and solutions that bridge the gaps between interior designers, architects, and consultants. This approach fosters positive collaborations that seamlessly blend art and architecture, interior and more.
Over 40 years, Living Design has amassed a portfolio of clients and projects that have garnered numerous excellence awards. The company has claimed several design awards and reached the finals in various prestigious competitions.

Name: MA Design
Description:
With over than 8 years of experience and familiarity with modern technologies and materials, We offer the best interior design solutions in various styles from classic, modern to technological high-tech. We also provide a wide range of services for our clients from furniture and interior design to architecture, landscaping, project management, supervision and putting objects onto operation. Name: Studio Klass
Description:
Bio

Studio Klass is a design and creative consultancy practice based in Milan,
founded in 2009 by Marco Maturo and Alessio Roscini. It specializes in
product design and art direction, working with leading international
companies.
Over the years, Studio Klass has received prestigious awards, including the
German Design Award, Red Dot Award, iF Design Award, and ADI Design
Index. In 2017, it started working with UniFor, designing the Touch Down
Unit, a new type of workstation that redefined mobility in workspaces. Since
2020, the studio has been the creative director for UniFor and Citterio, shaping
their brand identity and communication.
In 2025, Studio Klass was included in the AD100 ranking, which recognizes
the most influential firms in design and architecture.

Approach

Studio Klass brings together new technologies, art, and contemporary culture,
with value creation as the foundation of its design approach.
Understanding complexity is a key part of the studio’s creative process.
Through in-depth research on materials, functions, and contexts, Studio Klass
develops custom solutions that precisely meet each project’s needs.
This intersectional approach, along with extensive experience, allows the
studio to face a wide range of projects with strategic vision and flexibility—
from product and interior design to creative direction.

 Interior design

 Styling

Name: STUDIO GERT VOORJANS
Description:
Gert Voorjans is an interior architect well known for his unique and eclectic style. He has designed homes around the world for the most important residential, hospitaly & retail projects. Gert has created environments that are richly layered with influences from the east and the west, suffused with colours, the results of which are visually stunning. 

Gert Voorjans studied Interior Architecture in Hasselt, has a post-graduate degree in Art History from Siena and a post-graduate degree in Styles & Arts from Sotheby’s in London. He spent the first years of his career at the antiques collector and decorator Axel Vervoordt, for whom he worked for seven years. He built on Vervoordt’s philosophy and added to it his own sense of place, something that brought him to the attention of Belgian fashion designer Dries Van Noten, who commissioned him to design all his retail outlets around the world as from 1995 on. In 1997 he opened his own interior design studio in Antwerp and in 2013 Gert Voorjans Asia Limited was established in Hong Kong. AD Collector & AD France has named him one of the best interior architect.

Name: Felt Right Products
Description:
Felt Right is an e-commerce company in the interior design industry. We provide high quality, PET felt tiles and partitions for commercial and residential spaces with Commercial-Grade or Paint-Safe adhesives included in each order. We also have the ability to do custom printing and cutting with our PET panels. Everything is manufactured and shipped out of Draper, Utah. 

Felt Right is made of 4 brand pillars:

1. Sound Dampening 
Felt Right tiles and partitions absorb roughly 35% of sound waves they come in contact with. They are especially effective in the frequencies of the human voice and higher. These are helpful for those with Sensory Processing Difficulties or who feel over stimulated by unwanted noise. 

2. Customization 
We have a patent-pending Design Studio embedded in feltright.com that allows customers to drag and drop tiles onto a grid and create their perfect design. Every pre-made design has the capability of being customized to different colors and dimensions which shows real time pricing. Studies have shown that color can change the way we feel, so it's important that our customers can choose which colors they want to incorporate in their spaces. 

3. Organization 
Each Felt Right tile is 3/8" thick which allows them to be pinned. These tiles can be used as a pinboard, vision board, or bulletin board alternative. They are great for schools, offices, and homes to have a place to pin notes, photos, etc.  

4. Sustainability 
Felt Right tiles are made from 100% PET plastic, with at least 50% coming from recycled, single-use plastic. Each of our 12"x12" tiles are made from 4 recycled water bottles. This reduces ocean waste and pollution. Felt Right often donates to nonprofits including The Ocean Conservancy.

Name: Dura Garages - Transform Your Garage
Description:
Whether you’re looking to create a home workshop, a private exercise room, or simply a clutter-free storage space, Dura has the professional solution

The garage is often the most untidy and frustrating room in the home, relegated to a dusty, cold, dumping ground. We’ve got so used to thinking of our garage in that way it’s easy to overlook its potential. To transform your garage into a stunning and practical room isn’t an indulgence, it’s simply making sure you don’t waste expensive space. After all, why shouldn’t your garage be as enjoyable and practical as the rest of your home?

A detached garage is one of the most expensive parts of your property to build. Most of us wish we had more room in our homes and go to great lengths and cost to get it with fitted kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, home studies – even the attic, but until now the garage has just not been thought through.

When we pioneered the ‘Fitted Garage’ concept, our aim was simple – to provide the best quality products backed up by the highest levels of design and service. Throughout this website we will show you how we have helped homeowners create their perfect garage space.

Accompagniamo i nostri partner durante l’intero percorso: della realizzazione alla produzione e messa in opera, dalla progettazione alla scelta dei materiali. 

Prima di ogni altra cosa siamo consulenti che credono nei progetti che portano avanti e per questo motivo abbiamo da sempre scelto di mettere al centro dei rapporti con i nostri partner e fornitori quelli che sono i nostri valori aziendali.

Description:
Med snart 50 års erfaring og mere end 500.000 personlige køkkener i bagagen, kan du have ro i maven ved at vælge INVITA, når du skal have nyt køkken, bad, garderobe eller bryggers.

Der findes ikke standard-mennesker og derfor laver vi heller ikke standard-køkkener. Det tror vi på, og det er INVITAs mission. Hvert køkken bliver skræddersyet, og vi begynder først at producere køkkenet, når vi sammen med kunden har fundet den helt rigtige, personlige løsning. Det var faktisk baggrunden for at starte INVITA i sin tid som en ordreproducerende virksomhed i 1974, og det har været vores grundfilosofi lige siden.

Vores vigtigste opgave og vision er at skabe en INVITA løsning, som fungerer i det daglige, og som man kan glæde sig over hver dag. 

INVITA har i dag 21 butikker i Danmark og ejes af svenske Nobia AB, der er Europas største køkkenproducent og står bag 16 europæiske køkkenmærker.

Name: The Design Shop | Dallas, Texas
Description:
The Design Shop offers the following services tailored for the custom home building process. We are your one stop shop for streamlining the design-build process.

Architecture
• Permit ready construction drawings including, site plan, roof plan, exterior elevations, floor plans, electrical plans, exterior elevations, significant construction details, door and window schedules. 
• Detailed custom cabinet and millwork drawings and simple 3D views.
• Concept pool and outdoor living designs and 3D renders.

Interiors
• Design boards with complete selections for exterior and interior finishes top to bottom along with a detailed finish schedule. 
• Trim and millwork selections, paint and stain, lighting, plumbing, tile, door and cabinet hardware and accessories, countertops and wallcovering. 
• Interior elevation drawings including lighting placement, tile and hardware installation, plumbing locations, mirror placement and custom closet details.

Furnishing & Styling
• Space planning, color stories, customized furniture selection, soft goods, custom window coverings, flooring and area rugs, lighting, accessories and art. 
• Product procurement, coordination and management, installation and styling.

Three warehouses in province of Milan we have selected more than 2000 pieces to satisfy every type of need. Our collection consists of a wide selection of styles that start from the early twentieth century up to the 90s. 

The consulting approach of our team will help the customer in choosing and selecting the perfect piece, which can be restored and customized according to tastes and needs.

Description:
Do you own a residence in an exclusive neighborhoods and dream of a bespoke interior designed to the highest standards?

We offer fully personalized interior design services – from concept to implementation – delivering an elegant experience in which you retain full control over your vision. Every collaboration begins as a conversation about your lifestyle, aspirations, and the atmosphere you wish to create in your home.

We work exclusively with 100% original Italian products that blend traditional craftsmanship with contemporary innovation. These pieces bring authenticity, quality, and character to each space – turning your home into a place of clear identity and timeless refinement. Every element, from furniture to finishes, contributes to an interior defined by emotion, value, and discreet elegance.

A successful space is one that makes you feel good every single day. That’s why our design process revolves around you – tailored to your lifestyle, your routines, and your need for harmony. True comfort means more than beauty: it’s about flow, ease of use, and practical solutions hidden behind elegant forms. When function meets beauty, magic happens.

We integrate smart home technology and contemporary solutions that simplify daily life without compromising aesthetics. We choose durable materials with a low environmental impact, supporting a conscious and refined lifestyle. Our interiors become an extension of your values: balance, sustainability, and an appreciation for things done well.

We work with a limited number of clients each year to maintain the exceptional standard of every project. Collaborations are by selection only and begin with a private conversation – about you, your space, and what “home” means to you.

If you’re looking for an interior that truly reflects who you are, inspires you, and enhances your lifestyle, we’re ready to create a soulful space together.

Name: Go Studio | Dallas
Description:
Go Studio is a commercial interior design firm specializing in corporate interiors and office tenant development in class A & B buildings within the Dallas, TX metroplex. We work with building owners, leasing / landlord teams, and tenants. 

OUR STORY
Founded in 2002 by Bretta Maldonado, she envisioned a way of doing business so that awesome experiences would be had by all that encountered the firm. The value Go Studio places on relationships, authenticity, and a “loving what you do and doing what you love” mentality plays a big part in achieving that vision. Equally important, she just wanted a place where she and others would simply enjoy going to work!

OUR WORK
The detailed, deliberate, consistent work we provide for every project we work on… from 400 SF to 40,000 SF… from building standard to high end… ensures that the results you count on are prioritized throughout your experience with Go Studio. It’s true whether it’s for a one-time design project for your office or 20 years of designing for your office building.

Engaged at every stage, our team cares about the fine points, the process, the journey, and the outcomes. We focus on the specifics and won’t leave things to chance, because we know our work brings vision to life.

OUR M.O.
Our way of doing business...our work style...our modus operandi. It's believing we're better together. Our circle extends beyond our team, and we understand that we are all unique. For that reason, we've created an environment where everyone is welcomed, comfortable, and valued. We've developed intentional relationships that are give-give and we pledge to collaborate with a community of people who value one another. Our clients benefit from our commitment to creating long-lasting relationships built on genuineness, respect, and kindness.

Name: FitOut.IN
Description:
Fit Out: The Strategic Execution of Interior Customization

In the realm of project management, a fit out encompasses the strategic process of transforming raw or existing interior spaces into fully operational environments tailored to precise functional, aesthetic, and brand-specific objectives. This critical undertaking aligns seamlessly with stakeholder requirements, driving optimal utilization and value creation within workspaces and lifespaces.

The fit out life-cycle involves comprehensive planning, innovative design development, and meticulous execution to deliver interiors that resonate with the intended purpose. Core components include space optimization, furnishing, and equipping interiors to elevate usability and enhance the occupant experience. This process demands synergy across cross-functional teams, ensuring alignment with project deliverables, budgets, and timelines.

Fit outs may range from targeted renovations addressing specific functional enhancements to extensive remodels requiring a re-imagined spatial configuration. Regardless of scope, successful fit out projects integrate rigorous stakeholder engagement, agile decision-making, and robust quality assurance frameworks to achieve transformative outcomes that embody the client’s vision.

Name: Wildflower
Description:
We source the old, new, and in-between from our network of local and international suppliers, vintage sellers, and custom makers. We go beyond the showroom floor to find something that doesn’t just fit but brings value to a space – every corner considered. 
 
Maybe you’ve seen our work before, you just didn’t know it was us. We are known for our end-to-end design and delivery service. We manage not only the creative but the budgets, logistics, and fine print. Our trade discounts mean you save time, money, and resources. 
 

Overview of service offering: 
− Furniture, object, and art curation 
− Present concepts and schedule 
− Furniture layout planning 
− Liaise with suppliers and makers 
− Manage timeline and budget 
− Coordinate delivery and installation 
− Oversee defects and warranties 
− Provide aftercare support 
− Custom furniture design and production 
 
Our fixed fee transparently sits at 15% and sits within your total furniture spend. This fee covers an end-to-end service.  With access to our trade and wholesale discounts, 85% of your budget goes directly to the furniture in your space. These discounts enable you to purchase more product with your allocated funds. 
 
We’re a team of designers, consultants, and project managers. We love curation. We’re great at procurement. 
 
Hand-picked and arranged by Wildflower.

ما تیم طراحی داخلی و معماری ردباکس هستیم.

ما اول با کمک علم روانشناسی، تورو کاملا میفهیمم و بعد دست به طراحی میزنیم.

یعنی چی؟

تجربه به ما نشون داده که بیشتر آدمها، نمیدونن دقیقا چی میخوان.

آخرکار، فضایی براشون طراحی میشه که دوستش ندارن! 
بعدش یک عمر تلاش میکنن که به زور دوستش داشته باشن!

ایراد از مردم نیست؛ مشخصا تمام مردم نمیتونن علم طراحی و معماری داشته باشن.

این وظیفه تیم طراحی و معماریه که از اعماق وجودت کشف کنه که دقیقا چی میخوای.

ما توی ردباکس با کمک ابزارهای روانشناسی مخصوص خودمون، اول نیاز واقعی تورو درک میکنیم؛ بعد دست به طراحی و اجرا میزنیم.

هدف ما اینه که فضایی رو برات طراحی کنیم که با اعماق ناخودآگاهت ارتباط برقرار کنه و با روحت هارمونی داشته باشه.

طرحی که وقتی اجرا شد بگی:
"این دقیقا همون چیزیه که میخواستم!"

-----------------------------------------------------------

DECOLUXE is a prominent firm based in Marbella, consisting of architects and interior designers specializing in high-end villa renovations and interior design. We offer a 360º contract service, managing everything from initial design to execution and post-sale support, ensuring the highest quality and attention to detail. In our showroom at Nueva Campana, Marbella, opposite the Trocadero restaurant, we showcase an exclusive selection of luxury brands and design bespoke furniture and accessories to create unique and sophisticated spaces.

-------------------------------------------------------------

How do we work? Our specialists, first visit the work, make a real measurement of the project to be designed, and make some plans in 2D, and a 3D in 360 degrees, in which the client can appreciate and see the project with the minimum detail.

Name: Decopreneurs
Description:
Notre vocation
- Aider les entrepreneurs du domaine de la décoration et l’architecture d’intérieur à créer et maintenir une entreprise au service de leur passion.
- Perfectionner un savoir-faire précis et ciblé auprès un public averti, demandeur d’accéder a un niveau supérieur

Un peu d’histoire...
Lorsque j’ai monté mon entreprise, Floortje Interiors, j’écoutais beaucoup de podcasts américains sur le sujet de l’entrepreneuriat dans mon secteur, la décoration et l’architecture d’intérieur. Bien que ça m’ait beaucoup aidé sur des sujets tels que comment fixer ses prix, quels assurances souscrire ou encore la législation en vigueur, aucun n’était adapté au marché français et aucun équivalent francophone n’existait à ma connaissance. De ce constat est né Décopreneurs.

Décopreneurs est un podcast dédié aux Architectes et aux Décorateurs d’Intérieur créé le 22 juin 2020. Le podcast est consacré entièrement à l'aspect business des décorateurs et architectes d’intérieur. J’interview des professionnels du métier qui souhaitent partager leur parcours ainsi que leur “pépites”. Les décisions qu’elles ont prises, les investissements qu’elles ont faits, ou encore les stratégies qu’elles ont menées pour porter leur business. D'autres professions complémentaires passe derrière mon micro, comme des coachs en business, des experts en SEO, des comptables ou même des photographes d’intérieur.
Décopreneurs publie à raison de 2 épisodes par mois.

Name: Studio IB Milano
Description:
Studio IB Milano, the premier design studio based in the vibrant city of Milan. Specializing in Furniture and Interior Design, we are passionate about transforming spaces into exquisite works of art. Drawing inspiration from the rich tapestry of Italian art, materials, and craftsmanship, we infuse every project with a renewed sense of life and essence.

Ina Borisova is the creative force behind Studio IB Milano. With a diverse background in product engineering and interior design, Ina brings a unique perspective to her work, combining technical expertise with artistic sensibilities.

Ina's educational journey began with a focus on product engineering, where she developed a solid foundation in understanding the mechanics and functionality of well-designed products. Building upon this knowledge, she further pursued her studies in interior design in the prestigious Politecnico di Milano, refining her eye for aesthetics and spatial arrangements.
Driven by a desire to create something truly exceptional, Ina founded Studio IB Milano as a platform to express her visionary ideas. Her designs are characterized by a harmonious blend of form and function, seamlessly integrating practicality with captivating aesthetics. In 2019, her unwavering dedication and passion culminated in the launch of her collection of exclusive, tailored-made furniture.

- Your interior design career dreams not coming true? Struggling to land that next, or even first, interior design job? It doesn’t matter if you’re a Graduate, Mid-Weight, or Senior Interior Designer, the ‘Interior Design Career Success’ page is for you. Make sure you follow #InteriorDesignCareerSuccess as we post any jobs we see on LinkedIn on this page too.

- Want interior design business growth? Or to run your interior design business company as a business, not a hobby. Then head to our ‘Grow Your Interior Design Business’ page or follow #InteriorDesignBusiness

- Need a blog strategy that works. Not one that just costs a fortune and takes up your time. Or do you wish you had someone to write content for you? Then ‘How to Blog for Interior Design Business Success’ is for you. And you can follow #InteriorDesignBlogSuccess

- Do you want to be the boss of your interior design career, be your own studio owner? We’ve a page for that too, ‘Start Your Interior Design Business’, #InteriorDesignBusinessStartUp

- Or are you in need of someone to turn to about your life as an interior designer? Someone who knows and understands interior designers. An impartial, honest voice to give you easy-to-implement advice. In which case, go straight to the ‘Coaching for Interior Designers’ page or follow #CoachingForInteriorDesigners

And coming soon, ‘Business Training for Interior Designers’ page. A new, affordable way to learn the business of the interior design business. At your own pace, in your own space. Follow #BusinessTrainingForInteriorDesigners so you don’t miss it!

Wij zijn Buro Bladgroen. Ontwerpers en makers van groene interieurs en buitenruimtes. We werken aan biophilic interieurs met een specialisatie in indoor groenconcepten en plantenwanden en buiten ligt de focus op het versterken van de biodiversiteit.

Onze ambitie is om zoveel mogelijk mensen in contact te brengen met planten, door het ontwerpen van interieurs en buitenruimtes waarbij groen een centraal element vormt. Onze kracht is dat we het interieurontwerp, binnengroen en buitengroen integraal kunnen ontwerpen en realiseren, zodat het resultaat een samenhangend geheel wordt.

Wij gaan graag de samenwerking aan met andere gepassioneerde mensen, omdat dit ons in staat stelt om de beste resultaten te behalen voor elk project. In het bijzonder werken we samen met Studio Jet Tillmann, een architectenbureau dat zich focust op het ontwerpen met biobased materialen en biophilic principes. Door het samenbrengen van disciplines in onze projecten versterken architectuur, interieur en natuur elkaar en gaan een verrassende interactie met elkaar aan. 

Graag delen wij onze passie voor ontwerp en natuur met jou!

Name: ZO!interieurprojecten BV
Description:
Wij ontwerpen, bouwen en regisseren interieurprojecten die merken laten werken. 

Geen losse schakels of eindeloze overlegstructuren — je werkt met één team, één regisseur aan één resultaat: jouw Nieuwe Ruimte.

Brand. Bricks. Business.
Dat is onze dagelijkse drijfveer en de basis van elk project. Onze heilige drie-eenheid waarmee we elk interieurprojecten aanvliegen.

Brand
We vertalen merken naar ruimtes: wat wil je uitstralen, wie ben je als merk en hoe moet dat voelbaar worden voor medewerkers, klanten en bezoekers?

Bricks
Elke vierkante meter telt. We leren je ruimte van binnen én van buiten kennen om eruit te halen wat erin zit — esthetisch, technisch en functioneel.

Business
Een interieur moet kloppen — qua gevoel, functie en afwerking. Pas dan werkt het, voor merk en mens.  

Wij zijn de verbindende factor tussen merk, ontwerp en realisatie.

Eén aanspreekpunt. Eén team. Nul gedoe.

Van kantoor tot gezondheidscentrum. Van showroom tot merkbeleving. Wij zorgen dat het werkt. Letterlijk.

Interieurontwerp |  Interieurprojecten | Kantoorinrichting | Retailinrichting | Turn-key | Projectregie | Merkbeleving in interieur

Name: thies - for work GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
thies vereint vier starke Kompetenzen unter einem Dach – und macht daraus ein funktionierendes Ganzes: Raum, Technik, Konzept und Change. Mit festen Ansprechpartner:innen, viel Erfahrung und einem Ziel – das perfekte New Office für Ihr Team.

Arbeit verändert sich – und damit auch die Räume, in denen sie stattfindet. Doch während Unternehmen Agilität, Effizienz und Innovation fordern, bleibt die wichtigste Frage oft unbeantwortet: 

Unterstützt Ihr Arbeitsumfeld diese Ziele überhaupt? 

Genau hier setzen wir an. thies – for work steht für durchdachte, ganzheitliche Bürokonzepte, die Mensch, Raum und Technik intelligent verbinden. Mit 33 klugen Köpfen, jeder Menge Erfahrung und frischen Ideen entwickeln und realisieren wir Büro- und Lernumgebungen für - die Zukunft. Fürs Jetzt.

  planen & einrichten: Wir beraten, planen und richten Ihr Büro so ein, dass es perfekt zu Ihren Anforderungen und Möglichkeiten passt — mit dem Blick für coole Details!

  drucken & scannen: Ein zeitgemäßes Arbeitsumfeld braucht heute mehr als nur einen Drucker —  wir bieten intelligente, zukunftsgerichtete Ideen zum ganzheitlichen Management von Druck- und Scanlösungen.
 
  präsentieren & anzeigen: Wir konzipieren und implementieren Medientechnik für Lern- und Schulräume öffentlicher Einrichtungen und für Konferenz- und Schulungsräume in Unternehmen.

  räume & arbeitsplätze buchen: Wir bieten intelligente Lösungen für die Themen mobiles Drucken & Scannen, sowie das Buchen von (Besprechungs)Räumen & Arbeitsplätzen.

Wir verstehen die Anforderungen verschiedener Branchen und begleiten Sie von der Beratung über die Konzeption bis zur Umsetzung, Implementierung und nachhaltigen Betreuung bei der Gestaltung Ihres New Office. Ganz auf Ihre Wünsche und Bedürfnisse angepasst.

Schreiben Sie uns gerne, was Ihr Morgen bewegt und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Ideen austauschen - online oder bei einer leckeren Tasse Kaffee in unserem inspirierenden Office in Stadtlohn.

Collaborating with this network of skills allows us to transform every project into a unique masterpiece.

 Fashion Retail

From interior design and furniture to complex projects like libraries and multifunctional spaces, every project is custom-made to provide solutions that balance functionality and elegance.

Name: mockuproom | custom hospitality design
Description:
MockupRoom nace para traducir las necesidades de los clientes del segmento hotelero y lograr llevar a la realidad las mejores experiencias en beneficio de los huéspedes y visitantes, reflejando la identidad de la marca.

¿Quiénes Somos?
Nuestro equipo esta conformado por profesionales y especialistas en el sector hotelero; Arquitectos de interiores, Diseñadores industriales, expertos en marca, arquigrafía y señalización, también contamos con gestores de proyectos con años de experiencia en el diseño y equipamiento de hoteles en diferentes partes del mundo que nos permiten el desarrollo de proyectos Integrales.

¿Qué Hacemos?
Nuestro equipo cuenta con la experiencia y la formación necesaria para llevar a cabo cada una de las actividades que conforman el proceso de conceptualización, diseño y dotación.

En la primera etapa conceptual se plantean la esencia, personalidad e historia a contar del hotel, así como los conceptos en los que deberá estar sustentado.

Posteriormente hacemos el desarrollo de todos los elementos que conforman el proyecto, se realiza el diseño de los elementos arquitectónicos y de diseño interior, incluyendo el mobiliario especial, arquigrafía y señalización.

Por último, se desarrolla la planimetría necesaria para la correcta implementación.

En la etapa final, nuestra firma hace un acompañamiento a la implementación supervisando que ésta se realice de acuerdo a los diseños aprobados y en lo referente a dotación se enmarcan todas las labores dirigidas al control, seguimiento y coordinación de los capítulos de FF&E y OS&E que así conforman:

FF&E
(Furniture – Fixture & Equipment)
• Mobiliario
• Iluminación
• Tapizados
• Revestimientos
OS&E
(Operating Supplies & Equipment)
• Linen
• Amenities
• Equipamiento habitaciones
• Cocinas
• Bares
• Restaurante

• Salas

• Vajilla

Name: DIE RAUMGEBERIN by Ines Reusch
Description:
Wir von DIE RAUMGEBERINgestalten neue Arbeitswelten, wir machen die Marke und die Werte Ihres Unternehmens in Räumen sichtbar und erlebbar. 

Ich bin Ines Reusch, Gründerin von DIE RAUMGEBERIN. Als freiberufliche Raumgestalterin mit über 23 Jahren Erfahrung in der Einrichtungsbranche und einem Blick für die gesamtheitliche Wirkung im Raum, schaffe ich mit meinem Team lebendige Räume, die Menschen begeistern und emotional bewegen. 

Ich bin überzeugt davon, dass Räume immer eine Botschaft aussenden und damit eine Wirkung auf Menschen haben. Daher ist es wichtig die Botschaft zu kennen und die Wirkung gezielt zu nutzen.

In unserer Zusammenarbeit erarbeiten wir ein individuelles Konzept, welches die Botschaft Ihres Unternehmens über die Räume kommuniziert und damit zu einem Wettbewerbsvorteil für Ihr Unternehmen wird.

Wir freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam Ihre Vision für eine neue Arbeitswelt zu verwirklichen, die das Wohlbefinden Ihrer Mitarbeiter*innen fördert und ein produktives Arbeitsumfeld entstehen lässt.

Nos apasionan los momentos especiales, los detalles, el arte, la belleza y trabajamos con gran énfasis para hacerlos realidad.
Pide presupuesto sin compromiso o visita nuestro estudio en Murcia. 
Trabajamos para toda España, realizamos eventos. 
Nuestro lema es respetar la naturaleza, el medio ambiente, la sostenibilidad, vivir en consonancia con la Economía circular y al mismo tiempo crear espacios de Belleza único donde se pueda conseguir que sean limpios y estar en ellos un aporte a la salud de la mente y los sentidos.

Name: Inredningskreatören
Description:
För mig som inredningsarkitekt och inredare handlar inredning om att uttrycka vår personlighet, oavsett om projektet är ett privat hem eller på ett företag. 

Inredningskreatören är det personliga inredningsföretaget som tack vare ett brett kontaktnät och nära samarbetspartners kan ta sig an projekt oavsett om de är stora eller små.

Efter nästan tjugo år i branschen som inredare och inredningsarkitekt har jag hunnit jobba med många spännande projekt och är alltid redo för nya utmaningar. 

Min kunskap har jag inhämtat från Tillskärarakademin via Textilhögskolan i Borås, Art Collage och sedan till Köpenhamn för vidare studier till inredningsarkitekt. 

Under åren har jag haft förmånen att inreda mindre och större hotell och SPA-anläggningar, privata hem, företag och gjort många spännande reportage. Jag utgår oftast från mitt gamla, charmiga hus i Kullavik, två mil söder om Göteborg, men lika ofta kan jag nås på huvudkontoret i Billdal eller på ett tåg till kontoret i Stockholm eller i bilen på väg till kontoret i Torekov. 

Genom att jag delar min tid mellan dessa underbara platser är jag alltid flexibel att möta dig som kund var du än bor.

Ser framemot att höra av Dig och att vi tillsammans ska kunna se hur just vi ska kunna samarbeta och skapa nya projekt.

Lotta

Bulthaup Praha, založené na počátku devadesátých let, je kuchyňské studio s 25letou historií v České republice.

Společnost sídlí na více než 200 metrů čtverečních v moderním komplexu Rohan Business Center v Praze v Karlíně.

V říjnu 2019 však bylo převzato firmou ELITE BATH, patřící do skupiny SIKO koupelny a.s.

Tímto převzetím vznikl nový jedinečný koncept pro nejnáročnější klientelu pod upraveným názvem ELITE BATH+KITCHEN. Jako jediní v České republice přinášíme pro své klienty možnost vyřešení prostoru koupelny a kuchyně na jednom místě, nebo chcete-li pod jednou firmou. A to od počátečního návrhu až po samotnou finální realizaci.

Tento jedinečný koncept spojení koupelen a kuchyní, je doprovázen značkou Gaggenau, která vyrábí prémiové kuchyňské spotřebiče. Na našem showroomu můžete vidět a seznámit se jak s prezentaci nejnovějších a nejprodávanějších modelů z produkce bulthaup, tak i s nejširší nabídkou spotřebičů Gaggenau na českém trhu.

Tak jako v České republice tak i na Slovensku je ELITE BATH+KITCHEN první adresou pro bulthaup kuchyně a spotřebiče Gaggenau.

Name: W2 Moments BV
Description:
Gelukkig leven we in een wereld waarin er veel vrijheid voor het individu mogelijk is. Maar als we eenmaal gebruik van zorg moeten gaan maken, blijkt er toch veel aan regels gebonden te zijn en prevaleert het instituut-denken nog vaak. De mens wordt dan een 'patiënt', terwijl het in het voordeel van ons allemaal zou zijn om deze benadering los te laten en er juist voor te zorgen dat de mens zelf centraal staat. Gelukkig is er veel onderzoek beschikbaar over hoe we dit kunnen doen. Wij streven ernaar deze onderzoeken met de praktijk te verbinden, zodat mensen zich goed en gezien voelen, en er sprake is van bewezen beter beleven in de zorg en welzijn!

Het is de missie van W2 Moments om zorgorganisaties te helpen hun bewoners zich zichtbaar beter te laten voelen door een omgeving en inrichting te creëren die bij hen past. Met een gerichte aanpak willen we de levenskwaliteit en het welzijn van de bewoners van zorgorganisaties verbeteren en kunnen ongunstige gedragsstimuli worden weggenomen. En hier leveren we ook bewijs voor!

Het voordeel voor zorgorganisaties is dat dit zal leiden tot een bewezen vermindering van ineffectieve zorguren die worden besteed aan het bijsturen van gedrag, evenals een aantoonbare vermindering van de hoeveelheid voorgeschreven medicijnen.

De medewerkers van W2 Moments geloven erin dat ‘permanente educatie’ de enige manier is om deze missie en visie te bereiken. Daarom kiezen zijn ervoor om zich voortdurend op te leiden en bij te scholen op het gebied van het vinden, interpreteren en toepassen van de jongste wetenschappelijke inzichten en onderzoeken uit het vakgebied. Door de uitkomsten van deze onderzoeken in adviezen toe te passen ontstaat er een vorm van evidence-based inrichten, waardoor de projecten niet alleen de bedoeling hebben fraai te zijn, maar ook bewezen voordelen opleveren voor bewoners en organisaties.

I Sane mener vi at interiørarkitektur kan bidra til å gjøre samfunnet vårt til et bedre sted å bo, arbeide og leve livene våre. Sane skaper nye rom og gir liv til eksisterende. Vi jobber hardt for at prosjektene våre møter dagens behov, men også ivaretar mulighetene for fremtidige generasjoner. For oss betyr det at vi tilfører prosjektene langsiktig verdi: sosialt, økonomisk og miljømessig.

I alle prosjektene våre forsøker vi å arbeide med ombruk av materialer og møbler. Tydelige miljømål og høye ambisjoner styrer valgene i prosjektene. Prosjektene lærer oss mye, vi må innta nye roller og det blir tydelig at prosessene må endres for å gjennomføre prosjekter med høy grad av ombruk.

Jsme lídrem v oblasti stavebních prvků, kde se snoubí inovace, spolehlivost a špičkový design.

Od svého vzniku v roce 1991 stavíme na tradici české kovovýroby, kterou promítáme do moderní architektury díky neustálým inovacím a hledání nových řešení pro běžný život.

Naší vizí je budovat silnou a stabilní značku, zajišťovat jistotu zaměstnancům a především dosahovat spokojenosti zákazníků a obchodních partnerů.

Jsme tu pro ty, kteří chtějí žít intenzivně a obohatit svůj interiér o esteticky i funkčně dokonalé prvky. Vždy hledáme cesty, jak být o krok napřed.

Name: Loft Interiorismo
Description:
loft emerge en 2001 con el propósito de contribuir a difundir la cultura del diseño, mediante propuestas innovadoras y de alto valor estético, aportando soluciones creativas y fiables que mejoren la calidad de vida de la gente.
Para conseguir dicho propósito, en primer lugar, nos basamos en un espacio expositivo amplio, céntrico, accesible, de gran impacto visual. En él representamos nuestro valor conceptual, desarrollando esa búsqueda de estilo continua y plasmando así nuestras ideas que luego se concretarán en proyectos.
En segundo lugar, nuestra filosofía, nuestro carácter es el de escuchar y aportar, mostrar y compartir, respondiendo a las exigencias que nos demandan y enriqueciendo las necesidades que se nos presentan.
Desarrollamos bajo esa perspectiva, tanto desde el showroom como desde el estudio, nuestro trabajo. Tanto en el ámbito residencial, de oficinas y contract, pero siempre con el objetivo de conseguir la excelencia en el servicio, para nuestros clientes particulares o profesionales.
Somos distribuidores de las mejores firmas internacionales a las que pedimos que compartan nuestros valores, inspirados en la responsabilidad ética, social y de medio ambiente, con alto grado de investigación e innovación tecnológica, con un diseño sostenible y de calidad.
Todo ello nos lleva a ser hoy referentes en Valencia, a ser diferentes y a tener una modo propio de hacer las cosas. Nuestra finalidad es que la conozcas y que proyectemos juntos una forma nueva de concebir los espacios donde se va a escenificar la vida.
Importante, no?

Name: FOSTO
Description:
Fosto is the company behind Orno and Kera Interior classic lamps, which are manufactured using the original machines and blueprints. The products are still crafted precisely with the same methods that the designers once defined for the lamps.

As a lighting manufacturer Fosto maintains the decades old tradition of uncompromising high-quality, creating durable products with attractive design.

The best lamps are made in the North, due to the long dark winter months of this region, where high-quality lighting remains a prerequisite for enjoyable living conditions. In the summer time Fosto-lamps create light and harmony in their respective surroundings, with timeless beauty.

Fosto's story began when a little boy in a small village of Padasjoki in the Southern Finland dreamed of his own fancy lamps. Those childhood dreams evolved into a burning passion to create quality lighting that would bring joy to fellow people. 

We hope The Bright Scandinavian Design will keep illuminating the world far into the days to come.

Handcrafted in Finland.

Name: Studio Moltrasio
Description:
Studio Moltrasio & Zero4 è uno studio che si occupa di interior design & home restyling,  fondato nel 2005 da Daniele Donegani e Marco Malagni.

Offriamo un servizio a 360° dalla progettazione, alla ristrutturazione, allo sviluppo e realizzazione di allestimenti d’interni per case private, uffici e locali commerciali.

Siamo specializzati nel creare e risolvere situazioni che spaziano dall’arredo d’interni, uffici e locali commerciali avvalendoci della collaborazione di partner specializzati.

Ogni ambiente viene progettato, personalizzato e creato in ogni suo dettaglio per raggiungere un habitat consono ai tuoi gusti. Ti seguiamo nella scelta degli arredi, degli abbinamenti cromatici e nella cura dei particolari, creando una sintonia tra ambienti attuali e funzionali in linea con qualsiasi budget economico.

Progettiamo e seguiamo passo passo tutti gli aspetti operativi, la gestione dei cantieri, dei montaggi, dei collaudi finali, dando vita a tuo ambiente in ogni suo dettaglio.

Nelle nostre realizzazioni non manca una visione innovativa della casa e dell’ufficio tecnologico, nella quale la tecnologia non è vista come bene di lusso, ma come soluzione migliorativa agli standard abitativi.

Il risultato finale è poi rafforzato dall'affidabilità, raggiunta attraverso una pianificazione e un coordinamento attento dei lavori e tempi di consegna.

Le Nostre Competenze
- Progettazione e realizzazione di arredi completi “chiavi in mano”.
- Ristrutturazione immobili completo di opere impiantistiche e finiture interne ed esterne.
- Homestaging & Restyling per abbellire e proporre commercialmente il vostro immobile con budget contenuti.
- Progetto illuminotecnico utilizzando le più aggiornate tecnologie.
- Progettazione e realizzazione di arredi su misura realizzati dalle nostre falegnamerie.
- Progettazione e fornitura di arredi per uffici operativi e direzionali.
- Progettazione e fornitura di arredi per attività commerciali e “RETAIL”.

Ballingslöv har fremstillet produkter med stor omhu siden 1929, på vores fabrik i Ballingslöv, Skåne – tæt på træerne, der er vores vigtigste bæredygtige ressource, og tæt på vores kunder.

Når du køber et køkken, badeværelse eller opbevaring hos os, får du et produkt af den højeste kvalitet, som er fremstillet af naturlige materialer og under ordentlige forhold af engagerede medarbejdere. Vi tager ansvar for et langsigtet og bæredygtigt køkkenliv.

Vi vil være en arbejdsplads, hvor vi igennem
fælles kræfter og gensidig respekt
skaber et endnu stærkere Ballingslöv for fremtiden.

At Clarity, we also work in partnerships with architects, builders and a select group of tradesmen to offer the highest quality and solutions for your home environment. We meet with you to ensure your vision is executed with the best resources we have developed over the last decade of managing high-end luxury projects, both large and small in scale.

В последните години съдействам успешно на моите клиенти при създаването и реализирането на техния мечтан дом.
Вашият интериор за мен не е работа, а мисия. Да превърна пространството Ви в мечтаното място е основна цел в моята работа.
Разработката на всеки един интериор е предизвикателство и удоволствие за мен.

Name: naceR Interiores
Description:
En naceR, elaboramos proyectos de Interiorismo caracterizados por tener sus raíces en el estilo Kinfolk. Nuestro objetivo es crear espacios que promuevan la calma y la serenidad. Consideramos que cultivar un ambiente tranquilo puede ayudar a contrarrestar el ritmo acelerado y estresante del día a día. Y, como respuesta a la agitación de la vida contemporánea, nuestra estética es una invitación a disminuir la velocidad, abrazar lo esencial y encontrar la belleza en lo cotidiano. 

Nos caracterizamos  por fusionar diferentes estilos que van desde lo más industrial, hasta el rústico y nórdico. Buscamos eliminar el exceso en la decoración ganando en sencillez y minimalismo, evitando la saturación visual. Esta simplicidad permite que cada elemento individual  destaque y contribuye a crear un ambiente tranquilo y armonioso, aportando valor a cada elemento y apostando siempre por la calidad por encima de la cantidad. Ponemos en valor la artesanía y nuestra  elección de materiales naturales así cómo piezas únicas hechas a mano, textiles orgánicos, etc. Todo ello nos permite evocar a una sensación de conexión con la tierra y su autenticidad.

Cada proyecto es especial y tiene su propio sello de identidad, por ello en naceR, buscamos huir de las etiquetas, de las tendencias y ayudarte a encontrar tu propio estilo, tu origen, tú esencia. Y así crear juntos un proyecto que sea único, que nos permita conocernos y expresarnos tal y como somos, que sea humano .
Estamos tan acostumbrados a ver tantos estilos y diseños que nos cuesta visualizar cuál es el nuestro. A priorizar lo genuino por encima de las modas, por esa razón te invito a que vivas la experiencia con nosotros y que elijas “Ser auténtico, Ser Real“ .

Contáctanos: info@nacerinteriores.com

Objetivos clave como Emprendedora:
- Enaltecer cada uno de los espacios.

- Crear un espacio con un estilo, único y diferente. Vivencial, de buen gusto.

Te acompaño en la selección de un producto de alta gama con la combinación de muebles hechos a la medida.

Personas y empresas que quieren crear un espacio con un estilo, único y diferente. Vivencial, de buen gusto.

Name: BAUR WohnFaszination GmbH
Description:
Als Familienunternehmen aus dem Schwarzwald zeichnet uns eine besondere Liebe zum Holz aus, die unser Wirken seit vier Generationen prägt. Diese Leidenschaft ermöglichte unsere Unternehmensentwicklung hin zum Experten für kreative, edle, einzigartige Wohn- bzw. Hoteleinrichtungen. Kreativität, hervorragende Qualität, der Hang zur Perfektion, Individualität, Exklusivität und Natürlichkeit sind dabei die Grundpfeiler unserer Arbeit.

Wir, ein Team aus über 110 Innenarchitekten, Fachexperten, Ingenieuren, Schreinern, Vertriebsberatern und Projektleitern brennen dafür, jedes Projekt zu einem einzigartigen Einrichtungserlebnis zu machen.

Dabei bieten wir unseren Kunden, neben unserer Erfahrung und unserem Know-how als Kompletteinrichter, das komplette Leistungsspektrum für ein rundum gelungenes Einrichtungskonzept mit Persönlichkeit aus einer Hand. Von der persönlichen Beratung, über kreative Innenarchitektur, Planung und Bemusterung bis zur meisterhaften Fertigung und dem perfekten Einbau. So erschaffen wir Wohnträume aus Echtholz in privaten Domizilen sowie in Hotels und Gastronomieobjekten in Deutschland, der Schweiz, Österreich und darüber hinaus.

Platz für kreative Ideen bietet auf gut 3.000 m² Ausstellungsfläche unser Einrichtungshaus in Höchenschwand/Deutschland mit Stoffatelier und Wohnboutique. Hier setzen wir Trends und Möglichkeiten für individuelle Wohn- und Küchenträume bzw. authentische Hotel- und Gastronomieambiente perfekt in Szene.

Desarrollamos proyectos de interiorismo residencial y comercial, reformas integrales, exteriorismo y diseño de espacios de hostelería, cuidando cada fase del proceso: análisis, concepto, diseño, selección de materiales, dirección de obra y entrega final.

Nuestra metodología se basa en la escucha activa, el diseño visual detallado (planos y 3D) y una gestión completa del proyecto, garantizando resultados duraderos y bien ejecutados.

Hemos desarrollado proyectos para viviendas particulares, negocios y marcas como La Más Bonita, Ilaollao y otros locales comerciales de referencia.

Name: XIT | Fitout
Description:
At Xit Fitout, we believe that every space has a story — and our job is to bring that story to life. We’re a team of builders, creators, and problem-solvers who care deeply about the details that make a space feel right.

We work closely with our clients, listening to what they need and understanding how they want their space to function, look, and feel. From offices and shops to homes and hospitality projects, we take ideas off the page and turn them into real, well-crafted environments.

For us, quality isn’t just about finishing; it’s about doing things properly, communicating clearly, and making sure the entire experience feels smooth and stress-free. We handle the process from start to finish — materials, coordination, execution, and final handover — so our clients can focus on their vision while we take care of the rest.

At the end of the day, we’re proud of the spaces we build and the relationships we form along the way. Xit Fitout is here to create places that inspire, function beautifully, and simply feel good to step into.

في Xit Fitout نؤمن بأن لكل مساحة قصة خاصة بها ودورنا هو أن نُجسّد هذه القصة ونحولها إلى واقع. نحن فريق من البنّائين والمبدعين وصنّاع الحلول، نهتم بكل التفاصيل الصغيرة التي تجعل المكان يبدو صحيحًا ويشعر بهويته.

نعمل جنبًا إلى جنب مع عملائنا، نستمع لما يحتاجونه ونفهم كيف يريدون لمساحتهم أن تعمل، وتبدو، وتُشعِرهم. سواء كانت مكاتب أو محلات أو منازل أو مشاريع ضيافة، نحول الأفكار من مجرد خطوط على الورق إلى بيئات حقيقية مُتقنة التنفيذ.

بالنسبة لنا، الجودة ليست مجرد تشطيب نهائي؛ إنها طريقة عمل. هي الالتزام بالإنجاز الصحيح، والتواصل الواضح، وجعل الرحلة كلها سلسة وخالية من التوتر. نتولى العملية من البداية حتى النهاية, من اختيار المواد والتنسيق إلى التنفيذ والتسليم ليتمكن عملاؤنا من التركيز على رؤيتهم بينما نتكفل نحن بالباقي.

وفي نهاية المطاف، نفخر بالأماكن التي نبنيها وبالعلاقات التي نخلقها على طول الطريق. في Xit Fitout نصنع مساحات تُلهم، وتعمل بكفاءة، وتمنح كل من يدخلها شعورًا جميلًا ومتوازنًا.

Name: Hana Design
Description:
Realizujemy kompleksowe usługi od indywidualnego projektu, poprzez dobór wyposażenia i mebli, aż po dostawę i montaż. 

Naszą misją jest kreowanie przestrzeni do pracy, w których chce się przebywać.

Z doświadczenia wiemy, że odpowiednio zaaranżowane i wyposażone wnętrza stwarzają warunki do efektywnej i kreatywnej pracy. Jednocześnie są ważnym elementem budowania wizerunku firmy, zachęcając do współpracy pracowników, partnerów biznesowych i klientów.

Każdy projekt traktujemy jako wyjątkowe wyzwanie, dbając o każdy szczegół, na każdym etapie współpracy.

W efekcie powstają wnętrza jednocześnie estetyczne i komfortowe, a także funkcjonalne i ergonomiczne. Wnętrza, które spełniają wszystkie wymogi, realizują potrzeby i sprzyjają budowaniu produktywnego środowiska pracy.

Description:
COMPANY

KATJA KESSLER KREATION ist ein junges dynamisches Team aus Architekten, Interior-Experten und 3D-Artists rund um Founderin Katja Kessler. Wir glauben daran, dass Räume und Orte Geschichten erzählen.


WOFÜR STEHEN WIR?

Office-Homes. 
Die Vereinbarkeit von Funktionalität, Arbeitsstättenrichtlinienbestimmungen und Emotionalität im Office-Bereich. (Doch, das geht.)
Häuser, Residenzen, Feriendomizile. 
Konzipieren/ Bauen/ Sanieren/ Stagen im „Vinterior“-Look, einem Mix aus modernem Interior mit Vintage-Elementen. Ergebnis: Wohnen zum Dahinschmelzen – stylisch, charmant, relaxt und so gemütlich, dass man nicht mehr gehen mag.
Kurzum:
Eigentlich können wir auch Weltraumstationen und Bohrinseln.


ÜBER KATJA

Katja Kessler ist studierte Zahnärztin, Journalistin und Autorin. Seit zwanzig Jahren baut sie aus Leidenschaft Häuser und Residenzen um. 2019 gründete sie ihre eigene Firma Katja Kessler Kreation. Zu ihren B-to-B-Projekten zählt das Re-Design des STEPSTONE-Headquarters in Düsseldorf mit 5000 qm, die ehemalige Ullstein-TV-Halle in Berlin, die Dachterrasse des neuen REM-Koolhaas-Baus in Kreuzberg sowie das Interior-Lead-Design des alten Telecom-Towers in Bielefeld mit 17 Stockwerken. Für die Visualisierung ihres Design-Konzepts arbeitet Katja Kessler Kreation mit modernsten Techniken wie 3D-Animationen,  fotorealistischen Renderings und Teleportation.

Our lighting experts have vast experience within the European and Middle East construction markets delivering high profile interior projects alongside senior design practices and contractors.

Curve Workplaces was originally created as a Furniture Consultancy by Mark Bessant in 2006. 

In 2016 Michael Potter and Andy Wilkinson joined the business bringing over 40 years of expertise in the Design & Build sector. This transformed the business by providing clients with a full service of rigorous, inventive and inspirational fit out services.

Our work blends contemporary aesthetics with practical elegance. Whether it’s a residential sanctuary or a commercial experience, each space we design is a canvas of individuality, crafted with bold creativity and sharp attention to detail.
With a foundation rooted in integrity, collaboration, and craftsmanship, Karla Interiors is more than a design firm — it's a curator of experiences that stand the test of time.

Founded by Nina Dubarry, our firm draws on her international experience at prestigious universities and studios in London, Dessau, Munich, Madrid and Barcelona, as well as her own family background in the world of art, home decor and antiques.

Our mission is to create thoughtful spaces that reflect the essence of every individual. Therefore, we focus on fostering a strong bond with our clients in order to craft a unique, creative and completely personalised experience for them.

We walk the client through all stages of the project: from initial conceptualisation and proposal presentation (through plans and 3D renders), to the supervision of the work and meticulous furniture selection. 

Combining noble materials and organic shapes, our style results in minimalist, Mediterranean, timeless projects. With a focus on sustainability and a keen eye for detail, our aim is to achieve the seamless balance between aesthetics and the sensorial experiences that resonate with our client’s energy and well-being, turning every space into a sanctuary of everlasting elegance and functionality.

Met onder andere een flinke dosis kennis, creativiteit en een hands-on, no-nonsense aanpak zijn wij het creatieve ontwerpbureau voor zakelijke interieurs die jouw verhaal en visie vertaalt naar een persoonlijk interieur met impact.

𝗗𝗘 𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗩𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗩𝗢𝗢𝗥 𝗝𝗢𝗨𝗪 𝗕𝗘𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗝𝗙
Wij weten als geen ander hoe we het werkgeluk van je medewerkers kunnen verhogen en een omgeving kunnen creëren waarin jouw klanten meteen vertrouwen krijgen in jouw bedrijf. Zo wordt je nieuwe kantoorinrichting niet alleen een bron van trots, maar ook een slimme investering.

𝗢𝗡𝗭𝗘 𝗘𝗫𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗧𝗜𝗦𝗘
Onze interieurarchitecten zijn gespecialiseerd in het creëren van functionele, toekomstbestendige werkomgevingen die bijdragen aan werkgeluk, productiviteit en betrokkenheid. Een goed doordacht interieur verhoogt niet alleen het welzijn van je medewerkers, maar versterkt ook de identiteit en uitstraling van je organisatie. Benieuwd naar hoe we dit aanpakken? Lees verder

𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗜𝗝𝗗 𝗘𝗘𝗡 𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗘𝗞 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗣𝗧
Onze interieurconcepten zijn altijd uniek doordat ze ontstaan uit de identiteit, cultuur en kernwaarden van onze opdrachtgevers. Zo helpen we bedrijven ook om hun verhaal krachtig uit te dragen, zodat zij de juiste talenten aantrekken, talent behouden en hun kernwaarden laten terugkomen in de manier waarop mensen werken en samenwerken.

𝗟𝗘𝗧'𝗦 𝗚𝗘𝗧 𝗜𝗡 𝗧𝗢𝗨𝗖𝗛!
Als klaar bent voor een inspirerend interieur, waar je energie van krijgt en dat het verhaal verteld van jouw organisatie! Of je nu nog aan het oriënteren bent of al concrete plannen hebt, we denken graag met je mee! Bel, mail of kom eens langs – helemaal vrijblijvend. We horen graag wat jouw plannen zijn en kijken samen hoe we je het beste kunnen helpen. Tot snel!

Name: Coton House
Description:
Who We Are | Coton House

Coton House is a boutique luxury firm offering a seamless blend of real estate and interior design, providing a fully integrated, concierge-level experience. Whether you’re searching for the perfect home, transforming a space, or building from the ground up, our expert team ensures every detail reflects your vision and lifestyle.

Led by Laurie Coton, our firm embodies The Art of Living, delivering sophisticated design and curated real estate solutions that elevate how you live. With a refined, client-focused approach, we specialize in:
	•	Turnkey Interior Design – A full-service experience, from space planning to final styling, creating move-in-ready luxury interiors.
	•	Building Design – Guiding homeowners and developers in architectural planning, interior layouts, and finish selections for a cohesive, well-designed build.
	•	Furnishings Design – Sourcing bespoke furniture, artwork, and accessories to craft a harmonious and polished aesthetic.
	•	Hourly Design Consultations – Expert guidance for material selections, styling, and design direction tailored to your needs.
	•	Luxury Real Estate Services – Helping clients buy and sell exceptional properties with an eye for both investment value and design potential.

At Coton House, we go beyond transactions—we create experiences. Our expertise, attention to detail, and passion for design set us apart as Houston’s premier destination for luxury real estate and interiors.

Name: Isa Design Guatemala
Description:
En Isa Design Guatemala creemos que cada espacio merece un toque único.
Somos especialistas en mármol, cuarzo y granito, ofreciendo fabricación e instalación de encimeras que combinan estilo, resistencia y durabilidad.

Con más de 10 años de experiencia, hemos ejecutado cientos de proyectos en cocinas, baños y espacios residenciales y comerciales en toda Guatemala.
Nuestro equipo acompaña a cada cliente desde la selección del material hasta la instalación profesional, asegurando un servicio confiable y resultados duraderos.

Nuestros materiales de cuarzo, mármol y granito son altamente versátiles y se utilizan en cocinas, baños, mesas, barras, chimeneas y más, combinando durabilidad, resistencia y belleza natural.

También trabajamos con productos complementarios como papel tapiz, lavaplatos y griferías de lujo, ofreciendo soluciones completas de diseño y funcionalidad.

Name: Vasta Stone
Description:
Vasta Stone is the first luxury sintered stone brand in Vietnam, with a passion for innovation, sustainability, and excellence that sets us apart from our competitors. Our commitment to delivering the highest quality sintered stone products, backed by a team of skilled artisans, has made us a trusted and reputable name in the industry.

Proudly made in Vietnam, our sintered stone products reflect the remarkable craftsmanship that has made the country renowned for its artistry and skill. 

We have a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility equipped with the latest technology that allows us to produce sintered stone products that are not only beautiful and sophisticated but also environmentally sustainable.

We take pride in our exquisite Italian design, which serves as the foundation for our creative and innovative approach to every project we undertake. Our design team works tirelessly to bring together the latest design trends with traditional techniques to produce sintered stone products that are both unique and captivating.

At Vasta Stone, we understand that every customer is unique and has specific needs and requirements for their projects. Therefore, we offer a wide range of sintered stone products that are versatile and customizable, making it easy for our customers to find the perfect fit for their space. Our products are ideal for various applications, from luxurious bathrooms to modern kitchens, and even outdoor living spaces.

We take sustainability seriously at Vasta Stone, and we are proud to be part of the solution to protect the environment. Our sintered stone products are manufactured with the highest level of eco-friendliness, making them an ideal choice for environmentally conscious customers who want to reduce their carbon footprint without sacrificing quality or design.

Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is unwavering, and we strive to provide the best possible experience for our customers.

Name: LYA CREATEUR D'ESPACE
Description:
LYA Créateur d’Espace est positionné parmi les experts de l’aménagement sur-mesure avec une offre complète et personnalisée. Depuis plusieurs années, nous accompagnons nos clients dans la création et la rénovation d’espaces professionnels et commerciaux à travers la France.

Nous intervenons dans plusieurs domaines d’activité :

- Commerce et retail : franchises, magasins indépendants et chaînes.
- Espaces de travail : bureaux, co-working, tertiaire, industrie
- Hôtellerie et restauration : aménagements innovants pour offrir des expériences uniques.

Grâce à notre bureau d’études intégré, nous proposons des expertises en architecture d’intérieur, conception et suivi de chantier. Notre équipe de chargés d’affaires garantit un suivi rigoureux et un accompagnement sur-mesure, avec une capacité d’intervention nationale.

Notre engagement repose sur quatre piliers :
- Conseils personnalisés : comprendre vos besoins pour imaginer un espace qui vous ressemble.
- Proactivité: anticipation et réactivité à chaque étape de votre projet.
- Rapidité d’exécution : respect des délais pour minimiser les interruptions d’activité.
- Gain de temps : une gestion clé en main pour vous concentrer sur vos activités ou préparer sereinement votre nouveau projet.

Nos compétences :
- Aménagement sur-mesure - Tout corps d’État
- Pose de mobilier
- Électricité générale et éclairage
- Optimisation d’espace et ergonomie
- Gestion de projet clé en main
- Rénovation des lieux existants
- Sélection de matériaux durables et innovants
- Signalétique et branding intégré
- Création d'espaces collaboratifs

Name: Finike Decor
Description:
Finike Decor specializes in providing high-quality decor goods sourced from reliable third-party manufacturers. The company offers a wide range of home decor products that cater to the preferences and needs of every customer.

To ensure that products meet the highest standards of quality, Finike Decor carefully selects materials that are durable and long-lasting. The selection of materials includes glass, metal, wood, ceramics, fabric, and other synthetic materials.

Finike Decor works with a team of skilled craftsmen who are experienced in the art of producing decor items. Every item is crafted with attention to detail to ensure that it meets the company's high standards.

The production process involves several steps such as designing, cutting, welding, painting, and finishing. The products are designed using the latest software and crafted with precision. The cutting and welding processes are done with advanced machinery. The products are then painted and finished to achieve the desired look and feel.

Finike Decor's decor items are not only aesthetically pleasing but also highly functional. The company offers a wide range of decor items such as vases, candleholders, photo frames, wall art, and other decorative pieces. These items are designed to enhance the beauty of any home and create a warm and welcoming atmosphere.

Apart from offering high-quality decor items, Finike Decor places a strong emphasis on sustainability. The company is committed to using eco-friendly materials and production techniques that minimize their impact on the environment. This approach not only benefits the environment but also ensures that their products are safe and healthy for customers.

Finike Decor prides itself on providing high-quality, eco-friendly decor items sourced from reliable third-party manufacturers. With their attention to detail and commitment to sustainability, the company offers a wide range of decor items that are both stylish and functional.

Description:
Somos la primera plataforma de formación empresarial diseñada exclusivamente para Arquitectos e Interioristas.

Nuestro propósito es ayudarte a liderar tu estudio, transformar tu vida y crecer profesionalmente a tu ritmo, con el respaldo de los grandes referentes del sector.

Sabes que el interiorismo es tu vocación, pero también necesitas que sea un negocio rentable y sostenible. Un negocio que te permita vivir bien, disfrutar de cada proyecto y sentirte orgulloso/a de cómo gestionas tu estudio.

Y sí, es posible.

No se trata solo de aprender, sino de sentirte acompañado/a. De formar parte de una comunidad que te respalde, encontrar el coraje para defender tu valor y el precio de tu trabajo.

Por eso, en Interior Design Experience (IDE) combinamos:
 Aprendizaje práctico con estrategias aplicables desde el primer día.
 Networking exclusivo con profesionales que comparten tu visión.
 Acceso a referentes del sector para que puedas inspirarte y aprender de los mejores.

El aprendizaje con buen gusto.

Name: AN INTERIORS LLC
Description: AN Interiors is one of the most reputable design firms in the UAE. The company is proud to have completed a wide range of interior design and landscaping projects over the past 10 years within the UAE and abroad. AN Interiors has created a body of work that is diverse in style yet always modern in sensibility. Whether boldly inspired or carefully nuanced, AN Interiors is, above all, clean-lined, sophisticated, and highly attuned to each client’s lifestyle.

Name: Zatti Interiors
Description:
Zatti Interiors core business is interior design and construction of public places, prestigious private residences, commercial retail stores and naval furnishing, with the highest profile and quality level.
Thanks to our experience we have selected a group of companies that support us in various areas (marble and stone, textiles, glass, metals processing, ...).
Zatti Interiors has created over the years a number of relationships with world-renowned architects, with whom we had the honor to collaborate, such as Jean-Michel Wilmotte, Norman Foster, Marco Piva, Fred Genin, Simone Micheli, Adam D. Tihany, Massimo Iosa Ghini and many others.
We can manage orders around the world and match the needs of our customers beyond the geographical context and differences in style thanks to our Italian craftsmanship 'know-how' and also a 'know-to-interpret', being used to work 'taylor-made' and 'projects-based'.
We work together with our Customers and Architects developing their initial projects and concepts in our internal 'Design and Engineering' office.
The result of this work, leads to the creation of prototypes (mock-up) often essential to the understanding of the product and to its improvement before proceeding to the actual production phase.
The first phase of production is based on a careful and skilful selection of raw materials, as the purchase of wood and semi-finished products must be carefully evaluated according to the characteristics of the furnishings that must be delivered.
Zatti Interiors can handle every phase of woodworking. We can also provide for paintings and lacquering and we have a dedicated department for metalworks.
A careful and strict control system awards to the final product of Zatti Interiors the highest quality standard (UNI-EN ISO 9001:2008 Quality System).
The hard work and the complexity of the production process of each piece done so far is entirely placed in the hands of our skilled installers.

Name: Elite Decor Solutions
Description:
Welcome to our interior design company! We are passionate about creating beautiful and functional spaces that reflect the unique style and needs of our clients.

Our team of experienced designers and project managers work closely with each client to understand their vision and transform it into reality. We believe in a collaborative approach, where client feedback is valued and incorporated into the design process.

From concept to completion, we ensure that every project is executed with the highest level of attention to detail and craftsmanship. We specialize in a range of design styles, from modern and minimalist to classic and traditional.

Our services include space planning, furniture and decor selection, color consultation, lighting design, and project management. We work with a variety of budgets and timelines, and are committed to delivering exceptional results on time and on budget.

At our company, we are committed to sustainability and environmentally-friendly design practices. We strive to incorporate eco-friendly materials and energy-efficient solutions into our designs whenever possible.

We are dedicated to creating spaces that inspire and delight our clients, and we look forward to working with you to bring your vision to life.

Name: Stoneworks LA
Description:
Rooted in three generations of craftsmanship, Stoneworks LA is where timeless artistry meets modern design. Founded by my grandfather—an early visionary in stone artistry—our family business has long been a tribute to the natural beauty and enduring strength of stone. Today, I’m proud to lead Stoneworks LA as both an artist and entrepreneur, blending traditional techniques with contemporary aesthetics.

With an Art History degree from UCLA and a lifelong passion for creative expression, I’ve shaped Stoneworks LA into more than just a fabrication studio—it’s a creative house where heritage, innovation, and material come together. From sculptural works and bespoke surfaces to architectural installations, each piece is thoughtfully designed to honor the past while speaking boldly to the present.

Based in Los Angeles and working from my witstudio-art space in Joshua Tree, California, I continue to explore new forms and ideas while honoring the legacy that built this business.

Name: Bureau Moderne Group
Description:
Bureau Moderne Group - an all-round partner in creating interior designs for professional and private spaces, based in Luxembourg since 1962.

With an extensive experience & dedicated multi-disciplined team, our expertise lies in planning interior architecture, improving room acoustics, providing interactive solutions, implementing Design&Build projects as well as carrying out practical workshops.

Bureau Moderne Group consists of 4 entities that constantly evolve and interact with each other:

BUREAU MODERNE - the source of a company that debuted in 1962 as an office furniture provider. Today Bureau Moderne designs and completes spacial layouts that reflect & support our clients' company culture, consults on acoustic matters, and carries out Design&Build projects.

FEBRÜ - an office furniture factory based in Germany, focused on ergonomic and quality designs. Since 1993 Bureau Modene became a major stakeholder at Febrü which enables today a close collaboration, provides a high flexibility and control over designs & lead times.

REED&SIMON - a department created in 2007 expanding our design services to private projects. Individual approach combined with highly realistic 3D renderings allows our architects to create interiors that correspond to a taste and a lifestyle of each client. Furthermore, Reed&Simon designs professional spaces adding a contemporary aesthetics of the leading furniture brands.

NEW WORK ACADEMY - the latest branch of the group launched in 2023. Our academy offers a series of workshops where participants do not simply learn the basic principles of a new way of working but also crystallise concrete issues of a company. The aim is to develop specific spacial improvements: create flexible spaces for variety of tasks, provide conditions for enhanced communication&collaboration, build a people-centred environment.

تأسست شركة وودلي كونسبت عام 2024 لتقديم حلول متكاملة في المقاولات والتصميم الداخلي، بالإضافة إلى معرض أثاث متميز يقدم خدمات تصميم وتصنيع الأثاث حسب احتياجات العملاء. نعتمد على مصنعنا الخاص لضمان جودة عالية ودقة تنفيذ مشاريعنا بما يلبي متطلبات العملاء.
