Name: Maillard et Maillard
Description:
L'histoire de Maillard & Maillard en quelques lignes...

Fort de leur patrimoine familial depuis 5 générations, les frères, Eric et Loïc MAILLARD, artisan marbrier, ont repris la suite familiale en 1996. Ayant pour volonté de faire perpétuer ces savoir-faire ancestraux, ils y ajoutent toute la modernité d’aujourd’hui, aux côtés de leurs 25 salariés.

Localisés à MESNIL-ROC'H (35720), les frères MAILLARD sont spécialisés dans l’agencement, le façonnage de la pierre et la restauration de patrimoine en taille de pierre sculpture.

Aménagements de cuisine, salle de bain, sol, revêtement mural, plan vasque, receveur et habillage baignoire et douche... Ils vous accompagnent tout au long de vos projets.

Ils travaillent sur-mesure grâce à leurs métrages proliner de haute précision, scanner 3D et leur centre d’usinage numérique (robot 7 axes, CNC, découpe jet d’eau) et bien entendu avec la dextérité manuelle de leurs artisans tailleurs de pierre.

Leurs équipes d’experts interviennent chez-vous sur tout le territoire, principalement dans le grand ouest, en Normandie et en région parisienne.

« Notre objectif est d’être à votre écoute selon vos différents projets, en y répondant avec expertise, et de vous proposer la solution la plus adéquate afin de vous accompagner au mieux.

Alors si vous souhaitez refaire une beauté à votre intérieur et extérieur en pierres naturelles, nous serons ravis de pouvoir vous accompagner. »

Eric & Loïc MAILLARD

Joinery Production: Custom woodwork solutions.

Interior Design and 3D Rendering: From initial concepts to detailed 3D visualizations.

Why Choose WoodFit?
Choosing WoodFit means choosing excellence. Our commitment to quality, precision, and customer satisfaction sets us apart. We work closely with our clients to ensure their visions are realized with creativity and expertise. Our integrated approach and in-house capabilities allow us to manage every aspect of a project efficiently and effectively.

Description:
Mayze Atelier is a contemporary design house specializing in handcrafted statement furniture and lifestyle pieces that merge architectural elegance with poetic expression. Rooted in a reverence for natural materials and intentional living, each creation is a reflection of artful restraint and timeless luxury.

Founded on the belief that beauty should be both bold and quiet, Mayze Atelier is defined by its sculptural silhouettes, minimalist palettes, and deeply tactile finishes. From Italian travertine coffee tables to custom brass-accented consoles and curated interior accents, every piece is designed to anchor a space with presence, emotion, and purpose.

What sets Mayze apart is our commitment to craft—each item is made-to-order in close collaboration with skilled artisans and stonecutters, sourced from quarries and workshops across Europe and North America. We don’t just offer furniture; we offer heirloom works of design that tell stories through texture, tone, and touch.

With an eye toward sustainability and a heart rooted in intention, Mayze Atelier plants one tree for every order through its Green Earth Movement—a small but meaningful promise to give back to the planet that inspires our work.

Mayze is more than a brand. It’s a lifestyle philosophy.
Elegant, grounded, and uncompromisingly original.

For those who desire furniture that speaks softly but stands firmly—welcome home.

Name: RM-DESIGN - mieszkanie pod klucz
Description:
Tworzymy wnętrza, które żyją Twoim stylem!

Od prawie 5 lat w RM-Design we Wrocławiu z pasją i zaangażowaniem przekształcamy wizje naszych klientów w rzeczywistość. Specjalizujemy się w projektowaniu i kompleksowym wykańczaniu wnętrz pod klucz, oferując przestrzenie w standardzie premium, które zachwycają swoją estetyką i funkcjonalnością.

Zrealizowaliśmy już ponad 150 wyjątkowych projektów, a każdy z nich jest dla nas unikalną historią – historią Twoich marzeń, potrzeb i stylu życia. Dzięki indywidualnemu podejściu, dbałości o najmniejsze detale i współpracy z najlepszymi specjalistami, tworzymy wnętrza, które inspirują, relaksują i pozostają funkcjonalne przez lata.

Nasza misja? Stworzyć przestrzeń, która stanie się Twoim azylem, spełniającym wszystkie Twoje oczekiwania – i jeszcze więcej. Z RM-Design zyskujesz nie tylko piękne mieszkanie, ale i pewność, że każdy etap realizacji, od projektu po wykończenie, przebiega z najwyższą precyzją i profesjonalizmem.

Twój dom. Twoja wizja. Nasza pasja.

Name: Luke Edwards Interior Design
Description:
We Bring Interiors To Life! 

INTERIOR DESIGN

Luke Edwards Interior Design is a premier interior designer based in Liverpool, who specialise in crafting extraordinary hospitality interiors, such as; restaurant interiors, cafe interiors, coffee shop interiors, bar interiors, hotel interiors, and more! With our unique interior design approach which blends together the design principles & philosophies of ‘Method Design’ and ‘Neuro Design’ with your brief. Together they merge the power of storytelling, innovative design, and the intricacies of the human brain to create captivating and unforgettable interior spaces.

WALLPAPER DESIGN

Simple | Bold | Graphical | Timeless

With the inclusion of some Neuro Design ideologies, these are the 4 cornerstone design principles of our wallpapers. They are designed to have the flexibility to be used in all types of interiors, and are sustainably digitally printed in the UK on commercial grade papers.

RUG DESIGN

Hand made in India using the finest quality 100% New Zealand Wool. We can now turn our wallpaper designs into custom made rugs. Suitable for all types of interiors, and available in any shape and size. We'll work with you to find out your requirements and can adjust the designs to best fit with what you need.

-

Although a Liverpool based interior designer, we also offer our exceptional interior design services to hospitality businesses throughout the UK, allowing us to deliver exceptional design solutions wherever your project may be located. Our cutting edge graphical wallpaper & rug products can be delivered worldwide.

As a premier provider of top-notch home styling services, we are dedicated to transforming houses into extraordinary homes, meticulously tailored to reflect our clients' unique lifestyles and aspirations.

At Darna Design, we understand that your home is a reflection of your personality and a sanctuary where memories are made. Our approach is centered on collaboration, ensuring that we truly capture your vision and bring it to life. From the initial concept development to the final touches, our team meticulously plans and executes each stage of the styling process. Name: MIL Design
Description:
“We see spatial design as a series of choreographed moments — shaped from the heart, where flow, emotion, and human experience come together.”
— Mil 

MIL Design is an award-winning interior architecture and design studio founded in 2010 and based in Malaysia. The studio is driven by a people-centric, story-led approach — designing spaces as curated experiences rather than static interiors.

Led by IDr Mak Mil Yung (RMIT University, Melbourne), MIL Design operates as a design-led studio working closely with its affiliated construction arm headed by Edward Lye (Murdoch University, Perth – Project Management), allowing for strong design authorship supported by delivery intelligence.

With over 25 years of experience each, the founders bring depth across hospitality, sales galleries, commercial and education spaces, as well as highly bespoke, large-scale private residences commissioned by prominent individuals and institutions.

The studio is commissioned by clients including Gamuda, Sunway, IJM, Avaland, OCR, Khazanah, and Nottingham University. Key works include the Gamuda Learning Centre & Enabling Academy (31,000 sq ft), bespoke homes for high-profile individuals like Mr Henry Golding, former Malaysia central bank governor and ongoing hospitality projects in the Maldives, alongside prior boutique hotel projects in Melaka and Cambodia.

At the heart of the studio is a design approach grounded in listening — translating how people live, move, and gather into spaces with clarity, flow, and emotional resonance.

Awards & Recognition: 
Shortlisted for the Tatler Homes Award 2025, with multiple awards across Show Unit Interior (2021–2023), Residential Interior (2024), Education, and Public Space categories.
International Award :
Asia Properties Design Awards (2017,2019,2020)
A’Award Milan Silver & Bronze ( 2019,2020)
Society of British Interior Designer SBID shortlisted (2019)

¿Cómo lo hacemos?

PilsFerrer Estudio - arquitectura e interiorismo

Seit über 80 Jahren steht der Name WESTERMANN für anspruchsvollen Innenausbau und professionelle Umsetzung von Architektur- und Gestaltungskonzepten. Unter dem Motto „Entwickeln. Schaffen. Begeistern“ entstehen bei WESTERMANN individuelle Lösungen für Kunden aus dem Verwaltungs-, Industrie- und Dienstleistungssektor. Unter Berücksichtigung komplexer bauphysikalischer Anforderungen wie Brandschutz, Akustik oder Kühlung montieren wir sowohl Systemlösungen als auch individuellen Möbel- und Objektbau.

Produkte aus unserem Portfolio, zu denen Trennwand- und Schranksysteme, Objekteinrichtungen sowie maßgeschneiderte Sonderlösungen gehören, überzeugen allesamt durch eine unverwechselbare Verbindung von Funktionalität, Design und Exklusivität. Von der Beratung und Konstruktion über die Produktion bis zur Montage: Bei WESTERMANN bekommen Architekten und Bauherren alles, was sie von einem erstklassigen Innenausbau-Spezialisten erwarten.

Name: nr.17 - bærekraftsnettverk for interiørarkitektur
Description:
Vi er en gjeng interiørarkitekter som har lyst å dele erfaringer, lære mer, inspirere og inspireres, samt få tips fra arbeidshverdagen med fokus på miljø og bærekraft. Vi har startet arrangement-serien nr.17 og dette forumet, fordi vi skjønner at vi må dele, samarbeide og være flere for å nå målene vi har ovenfor FN og verden samt for å endre bransjen. Hvordan ser fremtidens prosjektering og prosjekter ut når vi nå alle skal inn i den sirkulære økonomien?
Vi er på ingen måte eksperter og forventer ikke at du er det, men vi tenker at ved å snakke sammen kan vi bli bedre og få utrettet mer. Bare i den lille gruppen vår ser vi at alle har ulik erfaring og forskjellige innfallsvinkler. Det som forener, er nysgjerrighet på hvordan dette skal foregå og på hvordan andre jobber med dette.
I dette forumet kan det deles alt som berører temaet; tips til materialer, ting som skjer, løsninger osv. Her kan du lese mer om nr.17s første arrangement "Andre boller" i Arkitektnytt:  https://www.arkitektnytt.no/nyheter/na-blir-det-andre-boller

Name: BOLT BUILDS
Description:
Bolt Builds is a Full Service Design, Build and Fabrication firm located in Greenpoint, Brooklyn.

Our Team was founded on the idea that quality design has the capability of great influence.  Whether cultural, societal, familial, or the haptic sensation of an unsuspecting detail, design can encompass a transformative power. At Bolt we strive to harness that power at all scales of design and reveal it through the unfolding of the narrative journey of each individual space.  Through the careful marriage of classic proportions and innovative design techniques, we bring to life a new design aesthetic that is both familiar and unorthodox.

We understand that architecture is an evolving entity which must embrace its changing surroundings while maintaining its connection with its functional responsibilities.  A well designed space is one that encapsulates its functional goals while pushing the ideas of what a built structure/enclosure can be, thus providing enriched and novel experiences.

Constantly, technology provides the platform to rethink the capabilities of design through new techniques and fabrication processes.  With this technology expanding at an exponential rate, architectural design has been reenergized in its ability to test, execute, and create new means and methods of design realization.

Name: Reevela
Description:
Our mission is to enhance people's buying experience with an ability to feel, touch and use products before they decide to buy them. If you spot a beautiful lamp in your hotel room, enjoy the bed that you slept in, find the candle holders on the breakfast restaurant tables too cute, then reach for Reevela to start scanning and find out more.

Our revolutionary omni-channel concept will turn hospitality venues, such as hotels, restaurants and common workspaces into design showrooms and retail storefronts.

With Reevela guests use their mobile device to scan the objects that arouse their curiosity, hereafter our innovative visual lookup technology and machine learning algorithms ensure instant and accurate results. With the identity of an object uncovered a guest can either click to buy, browse to learn more, or dive deeper into the culture of the local area, thus supporting the craftspeople, designers and artists related to the venue.  
 
We empower guests to reconnect with the importance of discovery by touch, feel and use before the need to buy. With our solution your guests can unveil, learn about and buy everything they love about your hotel, from the furniture, decorations, textiles, accessories, art, fashion, to the lighting and more.

We are free to use for guests and there is no sign up fee or subscription charges for venues, our platform is 100% free. We do all the lead on setting up and maintenance after is minimal. In return we deliver a split revenue model allowing you to earn money per sale of any item that has occurred due to a scan at your property. How often do your fixed assets and design inventory appreciate in value & deliver you ancillary revenue?

Name: ZigZagZurich
Description:
ZigZagZurich is a new lifestyle brand founded and based in Switzerland in 2013. Our fundamental interest in off–stream and our passion for design led us to looking at the ready made home textiles and accessories market and thinking what is missing from it today.

As demand grows for more art and design and less mass commerce in products, ZigZagZurich is a brand for consumers who appreciate originality and good design. We offer consumers a new way to enjoy art whilst supporting artists and discovering new talent. We offer a range of home textiles and accessories produced from the finest luxury materials without the luxury price tag.  ZigZagZurich is a global brand shipping to all continents around the world.

ZigZagZurich sees itself as part of the art and design community. Through ZigZagZurich consumers can discover new artists and follow their work outside of ZigZagZurich, exposing the artists to a large and receptive audience. It is important to us that we work in a positive way with the art community, using high quality materials and traditional production techniques and working closely with them during the design and production process.

The Company

ZigZagZurich is a vertically integrated manufacturer of textiles and accessories.   By controlling the chain of supply from raw materials to finished goods, we are able to offer locally manufactured products that use the finest materials and finishes, combining unique designs and collections, whilst offering our customers true value for money.

Our main production facilities in Italy mean we have direct control over what we produce, how it is produced and under what social and environmental conditions our goods are manufactured. We weave our Alpaca Wool in sustainable mills. Our bed linens and textiles are hand finished, using artisan levels of confection and finishing, normally found on products costing two or three times more.

As we say, our products are Lovingly Made in Italy.

 Moss walls & pictures: Custom-made solutions for offices, hotels, restaurants & public spaces
 Project management & planning: Support from concept to completion, aligned with international standards

 Major projects & renowned clients: Experience working with international teams and brands like Nespresso

Our preserved moss products require no watering or maintenance and offer a long-lasting, eco-friendly alternative to traditional interior greening.

Name: AménageonsVotreIntérieur
Description:
Spécialisée dans l'agencement et l'aménagement de vos espaces de vie, je vous propose des solutions adaptées et personnalisées en fonction de vos envies, besoins et contraintes. De la construction, à la rénovation en passant par le home staging, je vous conseille et recherche des solutions d'aménagements optimales. Je vous aide à vous projeter grâce à de nombreux visuels:
-planche d'inspiration (moodboard)
-plan d'aménagement
-visuels 3D
-vidéo de rendu-réaliste.

Pourquoi faire appel à une décoratrice ?
Parce que vous manquez d'inspiration. 
Parce que vous n'avez pas le temps de tout gérer lors d'une construction, par exemple. 
Parce qu'une décoratrice vous fait profiter de la force de son réseau (entreprises, artisans....). 
Parce qu'une décoratrice se tient informée des nouveautés, des tendances. 
Parce qu'une décoratrice maîtrise les différents outils permettant de réaliser des plans techniques et des visuels vous permettant une parfaite projection de votre projet. 
Parce qu'une décoratrice vous fera gagner un temps précieux et qu'elle vous apportera des solutions auxquelles vous n'auriez pas pensé.

Pourquoi faire appel à mes services ?
Parce que forte de mes expériences et de mes formations, je mettrais tout en œuvre pour vous apportez LA solution. 
Parce que je suis passionnée de ce métier autant que de l'être humain, j'aime mettre mes clients au cœur de mon travail, c’est pour moi une étroite collaboration qui s’installe. 
Parce que chaque projet requiert toute mon attention, que ce soit un coaching ou une rénovation totale de maison. 
J'ai toujours pensé qu'être bien chez soi était primordial pour se sentir bien à l'extérieur, car il est important d'avoir un endroit où se ressourcer et se sentir en sécurité pour affronter les aléas du monde extérieur.
Je suis à votre écoute pour construire le projet qui vous ressemble.
Parce que le bien être vient de l'intérieur, Aménageons Votre Intérieur.

Name: ANTROBUS DESIGN COLLECTIVE
Description:
ANTROBUS DESIGN COLLECTIVE is an Award Winning, multi-disciplinary Interior Design Firm specializing in luxury residential, boutique hospitality projects and unique product collaborations. Founding Principal, Alison Antrobus’ leadership and creative vision is responsible for driving some of the highest record property sales in Florida history.

Artfully blending her Caribbean heritage, professional journey with Design Icons and the eclectic culture of Miami, Alison has mastered what she refers to as ‘creative storytelling’ to deliver one-of-a-kind properties that exude warmth, character and soul. Drawing inspiration from each client’s perspective and guiding vision, her design firm is able to offer diversity in design styles while translating each project through their own unique creative lens.

Interior Design Magazine has referred to Alison as a ‘true multi-hyphenate’ highlighting her innate ability to create through multiple mediums. As it translates into her Interior Design Studio, Alison eloquently explains that “every project is approached as a blank canvas. We don’t adhere to a specific style but rather are guided by the innate sensibility of scale, proportion, circulation and flow, leaving room for all the layers of design to evolve from the DNA of each project and ultimately the human experience. Our mission is to ‘write the story’ of each space through design.”

Alison has gained global recognition for her projects that instantaneously transport her clients into an ultra luxury dreamscape retreat. Through her four signature styles that she dubs as “design flavors”  - Tailored + Timeless, Vintage Glam, Beach House Chic and Luxurious Layers, Alison and her design team effortlessly weave modern and contemporary styles with curated artisanal details for an unparalleled aesthetic experience.

Through Alison’s curated team of top tier professionals, ANTROBUS DESIGN COLLECTIVE will undoubtedly transform your property into an exclusive and luxurious sanctuary.

Their passion for creating sensory friendly spaces was brought to light during the Minnesota stay at home order due to the COVID-19 pandemic, which they saw greatly impacting academic participation, family routines, activity participation, social interaction and peer play, and physical exercise in addition to contributing to the rise of teletherapy services provided. Together, Alexi and Marlee are highly motivated, creative, and strong proponents of FUN! They look forward to meeting and collaborating with you and your family to create a SENSE-ational space where you can continue to build memories with your children for years to come!

Les dessins des élévations sont réalisés en harmonie avec le style désiré : moderne, contemporain, classique, rustique, champêtre ou encore, un mariage de styles! Des lignes pures aux décors vaporeux en passant par l’utilisation de différentes matières, le design est personnalisé. Les perspectives couleurs 3D permettent de visualiser la pièce transformée et assure un résultat final qui correspond à vos attentes. 

Les services de design intérieur, de décoration et de design commercial sont offerts de Montréal à Tremblant. Notre bureau est à Mirabel, dans les Laurentides.

Description:
Hi, I’m Lina, and I run House of ONO. Based in London, we specialise in transforming spaces, with a particular passion for home staging. For us, staging is more than just sprucing up a property—it’s about creating a visceral experience that truly resonates with potential buyers.

W H Y   H O M E   S T A G I N G   M A T T E R S

Home staging is a highly effective strategy that transforms a property into a captivating show home buyers can instantly connect with. It showcases the space’s full potential, making it easier for buyers to envision themselves living there. Staging doesn’t just elevate visual appeal—it creates an emotional experience that often leads to faster sales and higher offers. We also offer renovation services for anyone looking to refresh their property before going on the market.

I N T E R I O R   D E S I G N

While home staging is our focus, we also offer interior design services to help create sophisticated, personalised living spaces. By working closely with our clients, we ensure that each home reflects their individual tastes and lifestyle, balancing beauty with functionality.

O U R   N E T W O R K

We collaborate with talented local artisans, craftspeople, and trusted suppliers to source or commission everything from furniture and lighting to bespoke pieces. With a strong emphasis on quality and value, we thoughtfully curate every detail.

If you’re ready to transform your space—or just thinking about it—get in touch today and book a F R E E consultation.

Name: BORGHINO sas
Description:
Borghino est une entreprise familiale, indépendante, résolument pionnière. Dès 1981, Jean-Claude Borghino, le fondateur, incarna ces valeurs en habillant les premiers intérieurs d’hélicoptères haut de gamme. Avec Marion et Lucas LABAT dès 2009, Borghino devient un acteur incontournable et complet de la sellerie pour l’aviation VIP internationale et les projets automobiles sur-mesure.
Borghino a construit une offre globale d’expertises autour de la Sellerie, pour des projets complets ou des prestations séparées : 
- Sellerie
- Peinture
- Engineering
- Découpe Numérique
- Usinage / Pliage
- Quilting, perforation, embossage ...

La passion du travail bien fini anime les hommes et femmes des ateliers Borghino dans la réalisation de chaque siège, divan et habillage d’intérieur, jusqu’au moindre détail.
Le seul but est de créer une expérience unique et positive pour le client, depuis la conception de son projet jusqu’à la livraison de son intérieur.
Aucune limite n'est fixée, en utilisant toutes les possibilités du geste et du numérique pour une finition haut-de-gamme sans compromis.

La Qualité de l'organisation et des réalisations Borghino est aujourd’hui reconnue par les Certificats et Agréments officiels suivants :
– Norme IS09001 : 2015 : Système de Management Qualité.
– Norme EN9100 : 2018 : Système de Management Qualité Aéronautique.
– Agrément Part145 (FR.145.0713) : Organisme de Maintenance Aéronautique.
– Agrément Part21G (FR.21G.0328) : Organisme de Production Aéronautique.
– Qualification d’OEM majeurs : Airbus Helicopters, Dassault Aviation, Collins (Approved 16G Upholstery Completion/Refurbishment Center) …
– Label « EPV » : Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant.
– Label « La French Fab ».

Description:
Urbanology Designs is an award-winning full-service interior design firm serving clients nationwide. The company was founded by Ginger Curtis, sought-after design/lifestyle authority, speaker, and author of Beauty by Design.

Recognized nationally as one of the country’s top interior design firms, our work has been featured in prominent national media including Architectural Digest, House Beautiful, the Wall Street Journal, Forbes, Better Homes and Gardens, Raw Interiors, and Architecture Today.

• Architectural Digest Pro Featured Designer
• 3X Lux Red Award Winner
• Paper City Design Awards
• American Property Awards
• HGTV Designer of the Year

We create relaxed modern interiors that are elevated, curated and storied. Rooted in authenticity, grounded in luxury, and a departure from the ordinary. 

Our design-forward ethos drives us beyond current trends to create homes with longevity and lasting appeal that embody comfort and character. 

We call it uncommon luxury—that perfectly unfussy feeling that’s authentic and unassuming, embodying comfort and character, and a delicate, thoughtfully imperfect balance of asymmetry. 

Understated elegance and grand intimacy, curated through the lens of both old and new. 

Paired back yet sophisticated—a little less formal, a little more relaxed, a lot more intentional.

An intervention between form and function, with objects and pieces that create harmonious tension.

Rather than putting objects into a home, we craft a way of living through interiors of extraordinary beauty.

Simply put, our unique designs weave a spirit of excellence into each home, enabling our clients to live in a space that nurtures their souls as a place of reprieve, rejuvenation, and inspiration.

Name: Garibaldiarchitects
Description:
Innovazione, emozione e funzione sono le parole che rappresentano la visione creativa e la filosofia dello studio milanese.
Architetto e lombarda, Alessia Garibaldi, ha interiorizzato la lezione estetica del razionalismo internazionale: simmetria formale, ordine volumetrico e funzione spaziale sono definiti dalla scelta di materiali naturali pregiati, dal disegno di finiture artigianali preziose e dal concerto di ambienti privati e pubblici la cui atmosfera riecheggia i fasti di una creatività italiana chiara e riconoscibile, rieditata in chiave contemporanea.
Da oltre venti anni, Garibaldiarchitects si occupa di architettura e interni collaborando con i committenti a progetti innovativi e taylor made che riportano l'uomo al centro. 
Nei progetti confluisce una visione, condivisa con il suo team, dei valori guidati da un piglio umanistico che svelano la passione verso la tradizione architettonica italiana del ‘900 e il progetto su misura.
Creatività, competenze consolidate e obiettivi comuni hanno quindi dato vita a numerosi progetti il cui risultato si contraddistingue per la ricerca creativa, l'esecuzione efficace e l'originalità nell'armonizzare aspetti strutturali, concettuali e tecnologici.
La visione di Alessia Garibaldi può trovare una significativa sintesi nella frase di Bernardo di Chartres che afferma “siamo come nani sulle spalle di giganti”. Un modo di “fare architettura” quello di Garibaldiarchitects che è sempre consapevole del fatto che è spesso difficile dire qualcosa di nuovo ma che è invece fondamentale saper aggiungere, reinterpretare, raccontare una storia in modo nuovo e originale. E se il racconto, la chiave di lettura, sono già nelle matrici stesse del progetto, l’analisi, la ricerca, una sensibilità capace di cogliere il dettaglio può rompere le regole per creare “il nuovo” con cura e attenzione. La costruzione è struttura, integrazione di luce e spazio.

Name: Once Milano
Description:
Once Milano is an Italian company specializing in high-quality linen products designed to dress the home.
Founded in 2012, Once Milano offers sophisticated and modern collections using fine linens, elegant details and that unique craftsmanship so deeply rooted in the Italian territory.
The brand's philosophy is encapsulated in the name itself: to create timeless products designed as it once was, without compromising on quality. 

Once Milano's collections range from table linens to bed and bath linens.
Recently introduced is the Loungewear collection in linen, in which luxury and functionality come together to create comfortable, yet elegant garments.

Craftsmanship, refined detailing and garment dyeing are the flagships of Once Milano. This combination results in soft fabrics and deep color nuances that add uniqueness to each product, combined with the possibility of endless customizations.

Under the passionate creative direction of Allegra Marchiorello and the solid enthusiasm of a dedicated team, Once Milano has grown over the past decade to great international appreciation, thanks in part to numerous interesting collaborations with interior designers specializing in the exploration of new patterns, prints, colors and hand printing.

To date, collaborations include a collection with Studiopepe, a bed and loungewear collection with Studio Toogood and a bed collection with de Gournay.
The brand's sartorial approach has also fostered partnerships with international luxury hotels (Six Senses, Jashita, Borgo Sant'Andrea, L’Albereta), private clubs (Maison Estelle) and wedding & event planners, with the aim of bringing that sense of uniqueness typical of handmade products to a mise en scène where every detail matters.

Butiken är placerad i Göteborgs härligaste innerstadskvarter och med vår webshop servar vi inredningsintresserade runt om i världen. I anslutning till butiken sitter vår egen Inredningsateljé som erbjuder inredningstjänster för både privata och offentliga projekt. Vi skräddarsyr unika lösningar och med hjälp av vår syateljé sköter vi allt från måttagning - till montering av gardiner. 

Hos oss hittar du tapeter, textilier, färg och inredning till privatpersoner, kontor, hotell och restauranger. Vi strävar efter att varje möte med Engelska Tapetmagasinet ska vara minnesvärd och inspirerande, oavsett hur du når oss. Kundupplevelsen är av högsta betydelse för oss och vi sätter alltid kundservice i första rummet, med målet att överträffa dina förväntningar.

Välkommen till vår vackra värld!

Description:
Indivipro is an international brand specializing in tailor-made wall, window, and floor decorations. With its own in-house workshop, Indivipro combines craftsmanship, innovation, and design expertise to create bespoke solutions for high-end interiors.

As a Lutron Premium Fabricator, Indivipro also provides refined, motorized shading solutions — combining cutting-edge technology with timeless elegance for interiors that demand sophistication and comfort.

Description:

Today, experienced artisans collaborate with leading designers and architects around the world to produce entirely handcrafted and hand painted wallcoverings for luxury interiors. All the collections are the result of many years of research, which combines centuries of Italian decorative traditions with precious materials and sustainable production processes. Thanks to the uniqueness of the handmade and the control of the entire creative and manufacturing process, every day we create custom wallpapers, meeting the most different ideas and needs of customers. Today we cover projects for the residential, commercial, hospitality and cruise & yacht sectors.

Our works have appeared in publications such as Vogue Australia, AD France and AD Italy. In our atelier near Turin, we ensure a permanent stock. Today, we have showrooms in partnership, distributors, and agents in Italy and abroad. Hong Kong, Netherlands, Miami and Australia are just some of our points. Driven by a very strong passion and continuously looking for new synergies, we are constantly growing.

Name: Sms 3D studio
Description: SMS 3D Studio se bavi dizajnom enterijera. Fokus nam je na izvodljivom dizajnu. U okviru projekta dobijate informaciju gde se šta može nabaviti, a od nas podršku majstorima na terenu oko bilo koje pojedinosti koja se može javiti na terenu, tako da izveden projekat može da bude baš kao sa rendera. Na terenu smo skoro svakodnevno već 5 godina, tako da smo prikupili mnogo iskustva. U okviru tima imamo i licenciranog arhitektu koji je zadužen za to da projekti ne naruše strukturu objekta. Stručni smo da primetimo da li objekat ima fizičkih problema sa konstrukcijom i u tom slučaju obavezno angažujemo građevinskog inženjera da saniramo konstrukciju. Takođe, po potrebi možemo angažovati pejzažnog arhitektu za uređenje dvorišta. Tokom godina smo upoznali veliki broj kolega koji se bave određenim segmentom projekta, tako da vam lako možemo preporučiti osobe koje su kod nas zavredele poverenje kroz konkretne projekte koje smo zajedno uradili i to vam može uštedeti dosta vremena.

Name: PUUF
Description:
**This is a legacy profile of PUUF Studio (2017-2023)**

PUUF works for a sustainable tomorrow by being an innovative circular design studio & partner for events. We upcycle into a circular system of products that are durable, locally produced, and recyclable.

As a supplier to the event industry and a creative studio, we carry a big responsibility towards our peers and the environment. Every day, we go up against the status quo, we distance ourselves from the classic linear system which focuses on cheap production and disposable materials. Instead, we work with a system in which we design waste away and keep materials in use.

It’s called the circular economy – a new way to create and use within planetary boundaries.

Sustainability is our core value and we embrace it through conscious design decisions and choice of materials.

PUUF materials are: Upcycled, Durable, Locally produced & used, Reusable & recyclable.
PUUF designs are: Modular, Timeless, Repairable, Afterlife & disassembly smart.

In our work, we reduce, reuse, rethink, and experiment. When we design, when we create, when we buy, our aim is to always go for the most environmentally responsible solution.

These practices, PUUF materials and PUUF designs directly correspond to SDGs number 8, 12 and 13. We bring the UN’s 17 Sustainable Development Goals close to our daily work, because even the smallest, local actions have global consequences.

Goals and their targets:

8.4 Use resources efficiently in consumption and production

12.2 Achieve the sustainable management and efficient use of natural resources

12.5 Substantially reduce waste generation through prevention, reduction, recycling and reuse

13.3 Build knowledge and capacity to respond to climate change

Not only do emitted kilograms of CO2  count, zero-waste philosophy is also about motivating and challenging!

Name: La Nouvelle Tannerie
Description:
La Nouvelle Tannerie, dirigée par Sandrine SURREL, est spécialisée dans l'aménagement intérieur et le design d'espaces pour des hôtels, hôpitaux, résidences seniors et étudiantes. 
Basée en Occitanie, l'entreprise intervient sur toute la France et se distingue par son design sensoriel, créant des ambiances uniques qui stimulent les sens et enrichissent l'expérience client (à partir des cahiers des charges des architectes intégrés dans le groupe hotelliers ou moodboards jusqu'à l'installation clé en main par nos poseurs qualifiés en site occupé ou bâtiment neuf). 

Domaine d’Expertise :
• Architecture d’Intérieur et Identité de Projet : Conception de projets avec illustrations 2D et 3D, création de planches d'ambiances. 
• Conception et Aménagement : Design d’intérieur, mobilier sur mesure et standard, signalétique, textiles, literie et décoration. 
• Installation : Sur toute la France. 
• Sourcing et Fourniture de Mobilier : Mobilier sur mesure, revêtements muraux, luminaires, textiles non-feu, papier peint. 
• Coordination et Installation Clé en Main : Gestion complète des projets, de la conception à l'installation finale. 
• Design Sensoriel : Utilisation de lumières, couleurs, sons, textures et fragrances pour créer des environnements immersifs et apaisants. 
 
Points Forts :
• Concept Unique : Outil de soin cosy, mise en avant du « prendre soin ». 
• Expetise Technique : Formation régulière de l’équipe sur les nouveautés techniques. 
• Engagement Environnemental : Utilisation de matériaux durables et locaux. 
 
Valeurs et Philosophie : 
• Proximité Humaine : Engagement envers le client, importance des échanges constructifs, respect des budgets et des délais, circuits courts et "Made in France". 
• Expertise et Réactivité : Forte collaboration avec des usines et ateliers artisanaux, adaptabilité et flexibilité dans les projets. 
• Qualité et Savoir-Faire Français : Utilisation de matériaux et techniques locales.

 **Für Unternehmen:**

 **Für Praxen, Schulen & Co.:**  
Praxen, Apotheken, Schulen und Kindergärten profitieren von funktionalen und einladenden Designs, die Komfort und Effizienz verbinden.  

 **Unsere Mission:**  
Wir begleiten Sie von der ersten Idee über die Planung bis zur Montage. Mit Leidenschaft und Präzision schaffen wir Räume, in denen Menschen sich wohlfühlen und entfalten können – ob im Job, Zuhause oder im Alltag.  

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Ihre Vision verwirklichen!

Name: CONCEPT INTERIOR DESIGN S.A.
Description:
Individuell.
Nachhaltig.
Funktional.

In unserer Arbeit steckt ein klares CONCEPT, wenn wir Räume oder Gebäude gestalten. Dachausbauten, Altbaurenovierungen, Fassadengestaltungen sowie der klassische Innenausbau von A bis Z gehören zu unseren Stärken, genauso wie die Konzeptentwicklung und Innenarchitektur für Büro-, Verwaltungs- und Ausstellungsräume, Messestände und Einrichtungsideen für die Gastronomie und den Einzelhandel. Außerdem zählt die Gestaltung von einzelnen Räumen wie z.B. Küche, Bad, Diele … oder Möbeln regelmäßig zu unseren Aufgaben.

Alles folgt einem Leitfaden, ist schlüssig konzipiert, funktional ausgelegt und harmonisch abgestimmt. Die individuelle Lösungssuche fußt bei uns auf einer langjährigen Expertise. Beim Design schlagen wir den Bogen von klassisch bis modern. Die Suche nach einem zeitlosen, langlebigen Architektur-Design genießt bei uns eine ganz klare Priorität, gegenüber kurzlebigen Modetrends.

Von der Gestaltung bis zur Umsetzung

Sowohl für Unternehmen, öffentliche Behörden als auch Privatkunden sind wir aktiv. Um einen realistischen Einblick in das Projekt zu erhalten, erstellen wir Ihnen vorab 3D-Visualisierungen zur optimalen Veranschaulichung. 

Gerade in der heutigen Zeit spielt das Thema Nachhaltigkeit in Punkto Bauweise, Energieplanung und Materialauswahl eine zentrale Rolle, ebenso wie das Einhalten einer präzisen Budgetvorgabe. All diese Facetten wirken in unseren Arbeitsschritten mit. 

Wir zeigen Ihnen auf, wie aus einer bestehenden Gebäudesubstanz Ihr neu gestalteter und zukunftsorientierter Lebens(t)raum wird. Aus ALT mach NEU – wir führen Sie zu einem einzigartigen Resultat! 

Sollten Sie bei Ihrem Bauvorhaben an einen Neubau denken, bringen wir ihn vom ersten Spatenstich an in die richtige Form. Die Suche nach einer attraktiven, gesamtheitlichen Architekturlösung „INNEN- und AUSSEN-DESIGN“ stellt für uns immer eine besondere Herausforderung dar.

Name: ATRIC Innovations
Description:
Founded in 1998, our firm has been a leading force in interior design and construction for over two decades, with a proven track record of delivering over 1,000 successful projects across both residential and commercial sectors.
We specialize in providing comprehensive turnkey solutions — from innovative design and flawless execution to bespoke furniture production. This integrated approach allows us to manage every stage of the project lifecycle with precision, creativity, and efficiency, ensuring a seamless experience for our clients.

Our team is composed of highly skilled designers, engineers, and project managers, each bringing deep industry expertise and an unwavering commitment to quality. Whether it's a private villa, corporate office, or large-scale residential development, we tailor each project to meet the unique needs and aspirations of our clients.

In recent years, we've expanded our capabilities to focus on mega-scale projects, including the mass production of over 100 residential units per development. This strategic growth allows us to scale our resources while maintaining the same attention to detail, design excellence, and superior craftsmanship.

Quality is at the heart of everything we do. From concept to completion, we ensure that every material, detail, and finish aligns with our high standards — creating timeless, functional, and inspiring spaces that exceed expectations.

We invite you to be part of our journey. Follow us on LinkedIn for project updates, industry insights, and a closer look at how we're transforming spaces through design-driven solutions.

With extensive working knowledge of international projects, we bring a global perspective to our design practice. We are artists, musicians, travelers, meditators, surfers, gardeners, dancers, yogis, parents, and foodies. Currently, there are many renovation matching platforms in the market, mainly focusing on pre-matching services, but generally lacking support after the project has started. This results in a passive role where they are unable to solve customer problems in a timely manner.

DECOLAND, a Hong Kong green, eco-friendly and smart renovation platform, provides professional renovation design matching services. Our renovation specialists will first understand your renovation design needs and provide basic advice, and then match you with multiple designers or renovation teams for you to choose from. We monitor the entire process from quotation to completion, promoting smart home systems, green building materials and technologies. We ensure clear and simple communication and are always available to answer any difficulties you may encounter during the renovation process. We make it easy for you to create your ideal smart and eco-friendly home.

Name: Wood on Wall
Description:
Wood on Wall was founded in 2020 in Helsingborg, Sweden, by a couple of friends with a flaming interest in interior design. 

Most modern houses built today have large open floor plans with high ceilings, hard materials and quite often, there are large window sections. Perfect for sound waves to bounce around in, which very often leads to a poor sound environment. 

This was a problem that we ourselves encountered when building out own houses. 

When we searched for stylish acoustic solutions to improve the sound environment, the range was limited to say the least. This is how the idea for Wood on Wall was born – an acoustic solution that is as effective as it is beautiful.

Our accolades also include Best Design Firm of the Year at the Singapore Interior Design Award 2022 and a Gold and Judge's Choice award for the Sample Space at the Asia Pacific Interior Design Award 2022 in Hong Kong.

932 Design offers Design Consultation and Design & Build Services, transforming various spaces, including Show-Galleries & Units, Commercial Offices & Lobbies, Boutique Hotels, Resorts, Serviced-Apartments, and Retail marvels.

Name: AB ILMONTE
Description:
AB ILMONTE etablerades 1981 av grundarna Gunilla Hansson och Rüdiger Kallenberger.
Företaget drivs sedan ett par år av Peter Vikström och har sitt huvudkontor i Halmstad. 
Den kompletta leverantören för event, teater, skolor och offentlig miljö i Sverige.
Vi står för kunskap, kreativitet och kompetens – ett resultat av många års erfarenhet i branschen.


FÖRETAGSIDÉN var att sälja förstklassiga tillbehör till teatrar i Skandinavien, några av våra
försäljningssuccéer är utan tvekan Ilmo-Rapid podierna från Podest-Bau Kleu och våra brandskyddade textilier från Gerriets GmbH med produkter som Trumpf 95 skenor mm och ett större textilsortiment. Senaste tillskottet i vårt sortiment är teleskopläktare från COS. Övriga produkter i vårt sortiment är salongsstolar, teleskopläktare och scenmekanik. 


I VÅR KONFEKTIONSAVDELNING/SYVERKSTAD skräddarsyr vi hantverk med hög precision, från enkla backdrops, sammets ridåer, enorma tak segel, tyll och rundhorisonter. Men även enkla gardiner tillverkas med sveriges längsta konfektions-/sy-bord och alltid med högsta precision.


FÖRETAGEST INRIKTNING är inredning av bland annat teatrar, tv-studios, biografer, sporthallar, folketshus, hotell, medborgarhus, konferenslokaler, samlingslokaler, multihallar i de skandinaviska länderna. 
Vissa projekt är oförglömliga som Dramaten, Globen, Spectrum i Oslo, Malmö Live osv


FÖRETAGET VÄXER och vi når numera ut till ett ännu bredare kundsegment som kontor, skolor, museer och annan offentlig verksamhet.
Kort sagt: Vi förvandlar goda idéer till framgångsrika lösningar

Name: Home Guide Interior Design & Contracts Pte Ltd
Description:
Home Guide was established since 1992 and have come a long way from a renovation contractor in a small shop house unit to what it is today, we are proud to call ourselves as interior designer. With more than 20 years of experience, Home Guide has rooted its identity as one of the best interior design Singapore Company.

Residential was the very first area that Home Guide ventured into. Through the years, Home Guide has proven itself to be one of top 10 interior designers for residential projects in Singapore. Apart from residential, Home Guide have established two subsidiaries namely SORDC & iRetail which specialises in commercial office and retail projects respectively. Also, through another subsidiary, D’Grandeur, we cater to customers who are looking for a luxurious conceptual design consultancy for their homes without renovation works. By these well-established subsidiaries, the company has been capable of creating a transformative interior design in residential, commercial and retail spaces. In addition, renovation works are managed with stringent quality standards so as to deliver only the best to our clients and remain as their trusted designer.

In delivering our interior design services, Home Guide strives for integrity, design and services excellence. Not only is the company interested in transforming and beautifying the interior of our clients’ living and working spaces, we are also committed to build lasting relationship with all of our stakeholders from Singapore and in other countries. Therefore, we continue to hone our skills & knowledge, which also builds the confidence of associations such as Case Trust and gained bizSafe Level 3 certificate for our workmanship & safety in performing renovation works. Rest assured, we are also part of HDB licensed interior designers & renovation contractors in Singapore.

Name: The Luxury Collection Oman
Description:
The Luxury Collection is an interior & exterior housing solution brand specializing in windows, doors and tiles of several sorts and brand, located in Oman. We specialize in the sale of outstanding doors, windows and porcelain tiles while we look at growing exponentially in our location of business (Oman). As the company develops, we have a critical goal, which is to invest our growth in building our own manufacturing factory, which will allow us to provide swift deliveries and transportation throughout the Gulf, making us the preferred customer for many. To make a fantastic success story, we are considering launching into the real estate development market as our products are similar and we can get the goods at a low cost. The Luxury Collection takes preferences and demands and turns them into high-quality products and function. Our products will be of high quality only yet affordable while we make our customers get value that worth their monetary investment.
The Luxury Collection started on a trial basis in August 2021 with simply an Instagram account and no physical store; today, less than a year later, in June 2022, we've made over 300,000 OMR in sales, which has primarily been used for marketing purposes and to build up our first show room to legitimize our operations. Our company specializes in custom-made doors from China and Russia, which we offer in our market. We have also grown into the importation of windows and tiles. Moving forward, we intend to expand and reinvest our profits in order to expand even further in terms of having our own manufacturing plant, gaining more exposure, developing more distinctive items, and obtaining more commercial projects. We would go the extra mile to deliver our product and services in premium valued quality, bringing customers’ imagination to fruition by creating and customizing items to fit customers’ wishes in respect to the company’s goals.
We also appreciate the power of online presence as one of its biggest appeals

Name: Colours of Mallorca
Description:
DE - COLOURS of MALLORCA steht für exklusive Innenwandfarben, entwickelt aus der Überzeugung, dass der beste Farbdesigner die Natur selbst ist. Mallorca dient als einzigartiges Farblabor: Licht, Landschaft, Architektur und Materialien der Insel werden analysiert und in präzise, zeitlose Farbtöne übersetzt. Die Farben entstehen aus natürlichen Zusammenhängen und sind so aufeinander abgestimmt, wie sie auf Mallorca nebeneinander existieren. Dadurch harmonieren sie selbstverständlich miteinander. Entwickelt für Architekten und Innenarchitekten, die Farbe als integralen Bestandteil ganzheitlicher Raumkonzepte verstehen.

EN - COLOURS of MALLORCA is an exclusive collection of interior wall paints, based on the belief that nature itself is the best colour designer. Mallorca serves as a unique colour laboratory, where light, landscape, architecture and materials are translated into precise, timeless tones. Developed from natural relationships, the colours are inherently balanced and naturally harmonise with one another. Created for architects and interior designers who see colour as an integral part of spatial design.

ES - COLOURS of MALLORCA es una colección exclusiva de pinturas de interior, basada en la convicción de que la naturaleza es el mejor diseñador de color. Mallorca actúa como laboratorio cromático único, donde la luz, el paisaje, la arquitectura y los materiales se transforman en tonos precisos y atemporales.
Los colores surgen de relaciones naturales y armonizan entre sí de forma intuitiva. Dirigido a arquitectos e interioristas que entienden el color como parte esencial del concepto espacial.

Name: Sunday Light
Description:
Sunday Light is on a mission to bring the benefits of sunlight indoors.

Humans evolved in daylight, yet modern life keeps us indoors for most of the day, depriving our bodies of the bright light signals needed to regulate mood, energy, focus, and sleep.

Sunday Light combines innovative engineering, proven science, and a design-led approach to create an environment that replicates the look, feel, and biological impact of being outdoors, seamlessly integrated into everyday spaces.

Sunday Light makes it easy to get meaningful daily light exposure - 30 minutes under Sunday Light gives you your recommended daily dose of bright light -  helping to support circadian rhythm, productivity, and mood.

“Sunday combines clever engineering with beautiful light in a rather beguiling way.” — The Financial Times

Name: Tandem Casa 360
Description:
TANDEM Casa 360° este platforma integrată care transformă un apartament gol într-un activ imobiliar complet funcțional, livrat „la cheie”, standardizat și predictibil.

Cu peste 23 de ani de experiență în producția de mobilier, fabrici proprii și control total asupra calității, costurilor și termenelor, oferim investitorilor și dezvoltatorilor exact ce caută piața astăzi: rapiditate, coerență și rezultat final garantat.

Ce facem diferit?
Nu vindem mobilier. Nu vindem design separat.
Livrăm apartamente complet mobilate și pregătite pentru închiriere sau revânzare, măsurate clar în €/m², prin pachete scalabile, cu garanții reale și termene controlate.

De ce TANDEM Casa 360°
– producție proprie, fără dependențe externe
– pachete clare Essential, Superior, Premium
– garanții până la 5 ani pentru mobilier
– termen de livrare 30–60 zile
– soluție ideală pentru investitori long-term, short-term și dezvoltatori
TANDEM Casa 360° înseamnă mai puțin risc, mai puțin timp pierdut și un randament mai rapid.

 Dacă vrei apartamente „ready to use”, nu promisiuni, hai să vorbim.

Name: Adriana Flores Studio
Description: Tenemos como Visión; planificar, gestionar y dirigir los proyectos de diseño del espacio interno para que sean funcionales, creativos e impacten positivamente en su vida. Nuestra Misión; proyectar y dar forma al habitad humano, es decir, diseñamos espacios para la vida doméstica, pública y laboral con el equipamiento que cada uno necesita para ser habitado a plenitud. Somos profesionales y estudiamos la función y la calidad de los espacios interiores para mejorar la vida, incrementar la productividad y proteger la salud de usted. Del mismo modo, analizamos al cliente y sus necesidades, vale decir diseñamos y conceptualizamos con funcionalidad y estética en estrecha colaboración con los profesionales y técnicos de otras áreas, con quienes revisamos y evaluamos las soluciones de diseño durante la implementación de un proyecto.

Name: NOU Design
Description:
NOU Design, concept store déco design, N°1 du vase design de créateurs Made in France

Un vase est un véritable exercice de style pour un créateur : tant que la fonction est respectée, tout est permis ! Car aujourd’hui, le vase sort du placard, s’affranchit des codes et devient un objet à part entière. C’est un objet libre dans sa forme et son matériau, libre de se déplacer dans votre intérieur, libre de vivre sa vie en solo ou de s’associer à d’autres pour un effet collection. Il peut être minimaliste ou baroque, bavard ou discret, monochrome ou orné, conceptuel ou décalé, désinvolte ou humoristique…

Un vase n’est jamais le fruit du hasard et ce n’est pas par hasard que vous choisirez celui-ci plutôt que celui-là. Un conseil : ne choisissez jamais un vase sur un coup de tête mais sur un coup de cœur ! Avec ou sans fleurs, il deviendra alors un objet de compagnie…

« Le vase donne une forme au vide. » Georges Braque

Name: CEYHUN AKGUL INTERIORS
Description:
Ceyhun Akgul Interiors, 2010 yılında İstanbul merkezli olarak Ceyhun Akgül tarafından kuruldu. Kurulduğu yıldan itibaren lüks mobilya sektöründe tanınmış markalar için ürün tasarımı yapmakta ve seçkin müşteri kitlemiz için konut tasarlama hizmeti vermektedir. 
  Yaptığımız tüm çalışmalarda temel hedefimiz ve gayemiz, her detaya sanat eseriymişçesine yaklaşarak kusursuza ulaştırmaktır. Görünüşle beraber kaliteye de bir o kadar değer verip, işine bizim benimsediğimiz prensiplerle yaklaşan markalarla çalışmaya gayret ediyoruz.  
  Değerler başarılı bir geleceği belirler misyonumuz ile geleneksel tasarım ve çağdaş sanat arasındaki keskin sınırları yavaş yavaş kaldırarak ortaya benzeri olmayan sentezlenmiş tasarımlar çıkarmaktan mutluluk duyuyoruz. Bu misyon ile yeni bir yaşam kalitesi, bireysel çözümler geliştirmek ve en inanılmaz hayallerin gerçekleşmesini sağlıyoruz. 
  Her yeni proje ile gelecekteki tasarım öncüleri arasında yer almak adına sağlam adımlar atıyoruz ve müşterilerimize ayrıcalık duygusunu sağlamak amacıyla kusursuz yaşam alanları yaratıyoruz.

Flou | Designing the art of living
Since its foundation in 1978, Flou has been synonymous with Italian excellence in designer furniture, thanks to its ability to combine innovation, craftsmanship and Italian design.
Its offerings for every room in the home – from the bedroom to the living room to the outdoor – combine functional design and an artistic vision of living, enhancing the aesthetic value of spaces and the well-being of those who live in them.
Unique pieces of furniture, combining beauty, comfort and emotion, to design spaces that inspire, welcome and improve the quality of life with elegance, care and passion.
 
The bedroom:
over 30 models of double beds, single beds, sofa beds and convertible beds in fabric, wood, leather and hide, complete with mattresses, pillows, bed bases and accessories. With a collection of matching textiles and upholstery fabrics in colours and patterns that are updated every year to  reflect the latest trends and fashions.
A complete and customisable bed system, with a range of mattresses, pillows, duvets and toppers that guarantee comfort, well-being and a unique, superior quality sleep experience.
 
The living room:
a collection of sofas and armchairs that combines comfort, design and functionality to create spaces dedicated to hospitality and relaxation with style and personality.
Clean lines, quality fabrics and leathers, and sartorial details make every Flou seat a masterpiece of relaxation and contemporary beauty, with modular solutions that can be adapted to any space requirement.
 
Outdoor furniture:
with its outdoor range, Flou has brought its refined vision of living to the open air. Exclusive furniture that creates aesthetic continuity between the interior and exterior of the home and is dedicated to those who, in any context, refuse to compromise on comfort and beauty.

We are SKETCH. a design studio, your premier South Florida destination for luxury interior design. Our passion lies in crafting bespoke spaces that seamlessly harmonize aesthetics and functionality, resulting in interiors that are not only stunning but also practical.

At SKETCH., we specialize in curating custom interiors that stimulate the senses and satisfy the soul. We create custom, colorful, and approachable interiors with an unwavering commitment to delivering unique and thoughtful design solutions. Our approach is holistic, taking a 360-degree view to ensure that every element of a space, from materials to layout, is meticulously curated to achieve harmony and elegance.

We understand that true luxury goes beyond adorning a room with beautiful materials; it involves the art of ensuring that each space flows seamlessly into the next, creating an environment that exudes luxury and comfort for years to come. This commitment to a 360-degree approach sets us apart in the world of interior design.

Our mission is simple: to transform your visions into unique works of art. Every project we undertake is a blank canvas, ready to be transformed into a masterpiece that reflects your individuality and lifestyle.

Explore our portfolio, and you'll discover a diverse range of projects, each telling its own story of creativity, innovation, and craftsmanship. From chic urban lofts to elegant family homes to sophisticated commercial spaces, we're here to exceed your expectations.

Join us on a creative journey where every brushstroke of color, every texture, and every angle tells a unique story. SKETCH. a design studio is not just a design firm; it's a destination for those who appreciate the artistry of custom interior design.

Let's redefine spaces, transform lives, and create interior magic that resonates with the heart and soul. Welcome to the world of SKETCH., where artistry meets functionality, and luxury finds its true expression.

Where architecture becomes culture, and interiors become narratives.

We are a bureau that creates not spaces, but states of being.
Design Bureau by Elena Melnik operates at the intersection of architecture, art direction, and hospitality psychology—transforming private residences, hotels, and restaurants into emotional landscapes remembered like works of art.

Our work is guided by three principles:

1. Architecture as Emotion

Every project is a precise composition of light, materials, and silence.
We design spaces that are not explained — but felt.

2. Design as Media Value

An interior is not an object.
It is a story meant to be retold.
Each project becomes a cultural artifact in its own right — appearing in media, exhibitions, and professional communities.

3. Hospitality Thinking for Private and Commercial Spaces

We collaborate with developers, hotel groups, restaurants, and private clients through the lens of premium hotel experience:
movement, rituals, comfort, sensoriality, modularity, durability.

Name: projenic
Description:
2013 yılından beri tasarım ve üretim konularında çalışmalarımızı sürdürmekteyiz. Uzun yıllar boyunca edindiğimiz deneyimlerle estetik ve fonksiyonellik arasındaki dengeyi mükemmel bir şekilde sağlamaktayız. Tasarım ve üretim süreçlerini bir arada yöneterek, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına yönelik ürünleri başarıyla ortaya çıkartmaktayız.
2022 yılından itibaren ticari faaliyetlerimize başlayarak müşterilerimize tasarım, üretim, etkinlik ve organizasyon becerilerimiz ile hizmet vermekteyiz. Özellikle etkinlik ve organizasyon alanında uzmanlığımız, müşterilerimizin detayları düşünmeden etkinliklerini başarıyla tamamlamasına yardımcı olmaktadır.
Her projemizde en ince detayları düşünerek, müşterilerimizin hayallerinin üzerine çıkabilmek için çaba göstermekteyiz. Tasarım ve üretim alanındaki bilgi birikimimizle, müşterilerimize sadece tasarım yapmakla kalmayıp, aynı zamanda üretim sürecini de yöneterek kaliteli bir hizmet sunmaktayız. Sonuç olarak, tasarım ve üretim konusunda uzmanlaşmış bir ekip olarak, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını karşılayacak ve beklentilerini aşacak projeler üretmekteyiz. Etkinlik ve organizasyon becerilerimiz ile geniş bir yelpazede hizmet sunarak her zaman müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı çalışmaktayız.

Our Vision
To redefine the contracting industry by delivering exceptional services across architecture, interior design, Electro-mechanical (MEP) systems, Aluminium cladding, and glass and Aluminium fabrication. We aim to create innovative, impactful, and sustainable solutions that push boundaries through creativity, new materials, smart placements, and cutting-edge technology across all our disciplines.

Core Values
Our values form the foundation of how we approach every project:
•	Knowledge: We bring our expertise, skills, and experience to enhance our clients' spaces, improve designs, and create valuable opportunities. 
•	Quality: We uphold the highest standards of quality by adhering to industry norms and using state-of-the-art technology. 
•	Responsiveness: We pride ourselves on our ability to swiftly respond to client needs, providing tailored solutions that align with their requirements, while fostering strong relationships with clients, suppliers, and staff.
At ARCH & BUILD, we are committed to delivering superior architectural and contracting solutions that are innovative, sustainable, and built to last.

Name: Daniel Huber Architektur GmbH
Description: Visionen beginnen im Kopf – als zündende Idee, als Anstoss zu Wegweisendem oder einfach als Geistesblitz. Oft nehmen geniale Ideen ihren Lauf und enden wieder im Kopf, ohne je auf Papier weiter entwickelt und zum Leben erweckt worden zu sein. Hier kommen wir gerne ins Spiel: Wir bieten eine Dankfabrik als Plattform und bringen Ideen aufs Papier. Wir sind in einer inspirierenden Umgebung kreativ und haben den Mut zur Umsetzung. Unser Team hat ein umfangreiches Angebot für Sie: Wir sind spezialisiert in der Positionierung von Unternehmen sowie im Design und der erfolgreichen Entwicklung von Produkten. Wir entwickeln Corporate Identity für Architekturen, Shop- und Innendesign und kümmern uns auch um private Bauten, um die Sanierung bestehender Häuser sowie um die Innenarchitektur. Da wir mit unserer Architektur und Innenarchitektur Geschichten erzählen, schätzen wir unser inspirierendes Umfeld besonders. Wir arbeiten in der geschichtsträchtigen Mühle im Ried, einem der ältesten Bauwerke in der Region. Die Dokumentation reicht bis ins Jahr 1280 zurück. Am 3. November 1918 brannte die Mühle bis fast auf die Grundmauern ab und wurde anschliessend wieder aufgebaut. Wir haben das Gebäude saniert und die Bausubstanz sowie den noch bestehenden Maschinenpark möglichst bewahrt.

Name: Success by Design: Mastering the Business of Interior Design | Coaching & Podcast
Description:
As an interior designer, do you feel caught between your love for design and the realities of running a profitable business?
Whether you're launching your firm or scaling up, the business side of interior design can be complex—and often overwhelming. That’s where Katie Decker-Erickson comes in.

As a business coach for interior designers and founder of a multimillion-dollar design firm, she knows firsthand what it takes to build a thriving, sustainable business while staying true to your creative vision. With nearly 20 years in the industry and a Master’s in Business Administration, Katie is in the trenches—elevating her own firm while helping designers master the business of design.

 Podcast: "Success by Design: Mastering the Business of Interior Design" delivers real-world insight, actionable strategies, and candid conversations to help you streamline operations, build confidence, and reclaim your time. Tune in every Friday on YouTube or your favorite podcast platform for expert guidance designed to help you scale your business without sacrificing your passion.

 Personal Strategy Sessions: Ready for a one-on-one deep dive into your business? In Personal Strategy Sessions, you’ll work directly with Katie to develop a custom roadmap tailored to your firm’s unique challenges and goals. Whether you need help with branding, operations, confidence, or growth strategy, these personalized sessions are designed to elevate your business to the next level.

It’s time to stop spinning your wheels and start building a business that works for you—not the other way around.

Feel free to call anytime: 509-433-7710 or shoot us a quick message on here! Looking forward to conneting with you!

Name: Eureka Interieur
Description:
Eureka Interieur creëert uitnodigende speel- lees en leerplekken in het basisonderwijs en soortgelijke locaties. Ruimtes waar kinderen van 4 t/m 12 jaar graag leren, spelen, lezen en (samen)werken. 
Zoals in een gemeenschappelijke hal of op de gangen in school, een wachtkamer, een bibliotheek, etc.

Van grote verbouwing tot kleinere elementen, zoals:
- Leeshuisjes
- Themahoeken
- Bibliotheekpleinen
- Leeskuilen
- Lego- en Duplohoeken
- Blokkenhoek
- Bouwhoek
- oplossingen voor gang en hal
en meer.

Deze diensten van Eureka Interieurontwerp zijn geschikt voor de alle ruimtes in school waar een maatwerk oplossing nodig is. 
Uiteraard kan er ook gewerkt worden met bestaand en standaard-collectie meubilair.

SAMENWERKING en co-creatie vinden we belangrijk bij Eureka Interieur, tussen opdrachtgever, gebruiker, ontwerper én uitvoerende partijen. 

Tijdens het ontwerpproces zijn de wensen en eisen van de opdrachtgever de leidraad. Om deze goed in kaart te brengen vind er in de voorbereidende fase een uitgebreid oriënterend overleg plaats. Dit overleg, ‘de briefing’, wordt gevoerd met de directeur van een school en/of het kader van de organisatie, maar ook blijkt vaak de input van de leerkrachten wenselijk of zelfs noodzakelijk zijn. Binnen het basisonderwijs kan het zeer positief werken om de kinderen erbij te betrekken, d.m.v. bijvoorbeeld een leuke enquête wordt zichtbaar waar behoefte aan is.

De juiste input voor het ontwerp vinden wij erg belangrijk en dit is leidend voor de ontwerpfase. Bij de realisatie van het ontwerp wordt er in overlegd welke materialen gebruikt gaan worden. Hierbij wordt gekeken naar uitvoerbaarheid, veiligheid, budget én duurzaamheid. Deze mate van maatwerk is bij ons de standaard!  

MET DESKUNDIGE VAKMENSEN wordt het nieuwe interieur gerealiseerd. We werken met een fijne vakbekwame groep leveranciers en bedrijven, zoals interieurbouwers, schilders, vloerspecialisten, aannemers, etc.

Name: KUTCH
Description:
KUTCH - De l'idée à l'objet

Basée en Algérie, KUTCH est une agence de création spécialisée dans l'architecture intérieure, le design de mobilier et la conception sur mesure. Nous offrons des solutions créatives et fonctionnelles pour des espaces uniques, en collaboration avec nos clients.

**Notre mission**  
Chez KUTCH, nous mettons l'humain au centre de nos projets. Nous transformons vos idées en réalités tangibles, en créant des espaces qui allient esthétique, confort et fonctionnalité. Chaque projet est une réponse sur mesure aux besoins et aux aspirations de nos clients, qu’il s’agisse de résidences privées, de boutiques ou d'espaces de travail.

 **Notre atelier d'ébénisterie**  
Avec un atelier d'ébénisterie contemporaine, nous concevons et fabriquons des meubles sur mesure. Notre expertise repose sur l’utilisation de matériaux nobles. Le design est notre passion, et nous travaillons sans relâche pour créer des pièces uniques, durables et intemporelles.

Nos services
• Architecture d'intérieur : Conception et optimisation d’espaces, intégrant vos idées et nos propositions créatives.
• Design de Mobilier et Accessoire : Création de meubles et accessoires sur mesure, répondant aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet.
• Réalisation de mobilier :  
Sous demande, nous assurons la fabrication du mobilier dans nos ateliers, garantissant ainsi une qualité constante et une finition irréprochable.


Un partenariat créatif 
KUTCH, c'est aussi un engagement envers l'innovation, l'artisanat local et une relation de confiance avec nos clients. 
Vous avez un projet ? Contactez-nous, et ensemble, nous concrétiserons vos idées, de l’esquisse à la réalisation.

Whether in private homes or commercial spaces, each project is deeply grounded in the bespoke, tailor-made design uniquely crafted for the client. The outcome is a series of striking interiors—elegantly composed yet warm and inviting—where curated environments offer both visual intrigue and a palpable sense of comfort.

Name: tactinteriors
Description:
Crafting Timeless Spaces: A Chronicle of Tact Interiors from Egypt to Dubai

Established in the picturesque city of Alexandria,Tact Interiors embarked on its design odyssey in 2008 under the visionary guidance of Beshoy Youssef. Over the years, we've honed our craft, weaving narratives through design, and elevating living spaces to unparalleled realms of elegance and sophistication.

Chapter 1: Origin and Evolution

TACT INTERIORS sprouted from a humble seed, nurturing a passion for design that blossomed into a renowned entity in the Egyptian design landscape. From the onset, our mission has been to create spaces that transcend trends, embodying timeless elegance while embracing the cultural richness of Egypt.

Chapter 2: Foundational Values

Rooted in principles of innovation, functionality, and aesthetics, our journey began with a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail. These foundational values laid the groundwork for our expansion and success, setting the stage for our eventual venture into the bustling metropolis of Dubai.

Chapter 3: Egyptian Influence in Design

For over a decade, our designs were deeply influenced by the rich heritage and captivating landscapes of Egypt. The vibrant colors of the Nile, the allure of ancient architecture, and the warmth of Egyptian hospitality became the palette from which we drew inspiration, infusing our creations with a distinctive cultural identity.

Chapter 4: Crafting Masterpieces in Egypt

Our portfolio in Egypt boasts an array of iconic projects, from opulent residential abodes to avant-garde commercial spaces. Each project served as a testament to our commitment to design excellence, earning us a loyal clientele and a revered status in the Egyptian design sphere.

Chapter 5: Stepping into Dubai's Realm

Name: Hemverk
Description:
Scandinavian simplicity
Hemverk is a collection of wall clocks and wrist watches that unite form and function with their minimalist Scandinavian style and simplicity. The design is clean, simple and elegant, the better to highlight the most important function of the clock: to tell the time. After all, time is the most important feature. 
Time is always in motion, so it’s even more important to focus on the moment and spend our time on what we want to do. Hemverk’s clocks help remind us to be in the present, yet look to the future. 
All our clocks are produced and assembled by hand in a small workshop in Denmark, with great attention to detail. Every clock is made uniquely for each order, which ensures a responsible production process and avoiding overproduction. Their minimalist design gives our clocks a distinct character and there are many options for both clock hands and clock faces, combining colours and materials based on personal preferences.

Name: Nuance Interior Design Showroom
Description:
Nuance Interior Design is a legacy estate interior design and wellness advisory for families and family offices building and stewarding complex, high‑stakes homes.

We specialize in $20M+ primary residences, compounds, and multi‑estate portfolios, where misalignment between architect, builder, artisans, and principals can quietly turn into five‑year, multi‑million‑dollar mistakes. Our role is to prevent that and to turn each estate into a calm, wellness‑centered environment that is effortless to live in and straightforward to run.

1. Legacy Estate Interior Design – Core Engagement
One flagship home, done correctly from foundation to furnishings.
- Full interior design for primary family/guest spaces and household support areas
- Construction‑ready Design & Care Portfolio used by architect, builder, estate manager, and staff
- Whole‑Home Wellness Blueprint for sleep, focus, recovery, multigenerational living, and long‑term comfort
- Coordination with architect and builder, procurement, installation, and estate staff handover with a 90‑day comfort review

2. Estate Portfolio Design Plan – Multi‑Estate Alignment
A 5‑year design and wellness strategy across two or more key homes.
- Portfolio Map of how each estate is used, by whom, and when
- 5‑Year Estate Design Sequence so major projects unfold in the right order
- Cross‑estate design & wellness standards plus a unified Design & Care archive

3. Design Stewardship – Long‑Term Continuity
10–15 year portfolio‑level design and wellness governance.
- Annual whole‑portfolio audits
- Living 10–15 year estate roadmap aligned with relocations, capital events, and generational shifts
- Ongoing standards, annual Estate Portfolio Councils, and Life Event Reviews

Nuance works with a limited number of families each year alongside leading architects, custom builders, and family offices globally. If you are planning or overseeing significant estates and want homes that quietly support longevity, clarity, and ease of operation.

Gert Voorjans studied Interior Architecture in Hasselt, has a post-graduate degree in Art History from Siena and a post-graduate degree in Styles & Arts from Sotheby’s in London. He spent the first years of his career at the antiques collector and decorator Axel Vervoordt, for whom he worked for seven years. He built on Vervoordt’s philosophy and added to it his own sense of place, something that brought him to the attention of Belgian fashion designer Dries Van Noten, who commissioned him to design all his retail outlets around the world as from 1995 on. In 1997 he opened his own interior design studio in Antwerp and in 2013 Gert Voorjans Asia Limited was established in Hong Kong. AD Collector & AD France has named him one of the best interior architect.

Name: WE DON'T DESIGN
Description:
We are not a brand, not a collection, but a container of radical and non-conformist design experiences that transversally explore materials and formal lexicons, that involve a deep reflection on the quality of artefacts and a rejection of the fast disposal of things.

We promote the chance of experimenting with objects that explore art, play, dream and metaphor. We force the rigid rationalist form/function dichotomy, trying to suggest a freer, more personal, more conscious interaction with the objects.

We work on the idea of the “piece unique”, reproducible in series through limited and numbered editions, moving away from the economic and social dynamics of mass production and ideally touching on the idea of seriality of Pop Art. 

The main protagonist of each project is the concept, the ever-changing genesis that leads from the idea to the tangible form of the objects. They are pure objects, abstract objects, conceived without any decorative additions that might recall a trend, without any logos that might identify them as merchandise.

We create absolute objects, designed to evoke a feeling of affection in those who choose and live them, as if they had already been in their thoughts, be they dreams or utopias.

AN EXTENSIVE RANGE OF ACOUSTIC SOLUTIONS

NEXT Tasarım Mimarlık olarak, konut, ofis, kurumsal mekan ve mobilya tasarımı alanlarında müşterilerimizle güçlü ve sürdürülebilir iş birlikleri kurarak, estetik ve işlevselliği bir araya getiren yenilikçi çözümler üretiyoruz.

Her projede, mekanın ruhunu ve içinde yaşayacak veya çalışacak bireylerin tarzını, ihtiyaçlarını ve beklentilerini merkeze alarak tasarım sürecimizi şekillendiriyoruz. İş ortaklarımızla birlikte, konsept geliştirmeden uygulama sürecine kadar her aşamada yaratıcı ve stratejik bir yaklaşım benimsiyoruz.

 Özgün, fonksiyonel ve ilham veren mekanlar tasarlıyoruz.
 Akıllı bütçe planlamasıyla verimli çözümler sunuyoruz.
 Üretim ve uygulama süreçlerini titizlikle yönetiyoruz.
 Kaliteyi ön planda tutarak projeleri zamanında hayata geçiriyoruz.

Biz sadece tasarım yapmıyoruz; yeni nesil mekanlar yaratıyor, deneyimler inşa ediyoruz. Müşterilerimizle birlikte, estetik ve yeniliği harmanlayan, kullanıcı odaklı projelere imza atmaya devam ediyoruz.

#NEXTDesign #Mimarlık #İçMimarlık #Tasarım #ModernMekanlar #OfisTasarımı #MobilyaTasarımı #YeniNesilTasarım
