Name: Self.ly
Description:
Forget the "hustle fallacy". If your primary success strategy as a business leader is “hustling” and working as hard as you can, you'll eventually pay for it through flat-lining performance and burnout.

If your role demands creativity, focus, energy, problem solving and decision-making, then overworking will hamper your performance. According to the latest neuroscience, overwork makes your brain "dull" in the sense of being the opposite of "sharp." Overwork, in other words, kills your creativity.

When you learn how to balance work and renewal, you can sustain a higher level of productivity and creativity. The greater the performance demand, the greater the need for renewal. When energy is properly managed, business leaders can achieve more in less time.

Learn how to better manage your energy across four dimensions: physical, emotional, mental and spiritual. We look at the research to understand the key factors that drive each of those four sources of energy so you can build in the personal rituals that over time, reduce stress and anxiety and enhance emotional wellbeing and happiness.

Name: Comité de proyectos
Description:
We are Andrea Flores and Lucía Soto. We have worked designing together since 2010, and in 2014 we founded Comité de Proyectos, a company dedicated to interior design and furniture sales, located in Mexico City.
What we enjoy most about our work is translating emotions and sensations into utilitarian objects and living spaces; that is, internalization. We like to create transcendent, durable and timeless pieces, with a contemporary style working hand in hand in collaboration with craft workshops.
Together with our team of designers and artisans we have developed three collections of sculptural objects that have been exhibited in museums and galleries in Mexico and abroad; and we also have an extensive catalog of furniture for residential and commercial use.
Our thinking is a constant flow between the subjective and the functional, the craft and the market, technique and art.

Name: House of AA
Description:
We are a boutique interior architecture and design studio based in Delhi NCR, offering turnkey solutions and personalized design consultations. With a growing portfolio of residential and commercial projects, we bring a modern, detail-driven approach to interiors—where form meets function, and creativity meets clarity.

Led by a young and dynamic team, our studio is built on the energy of fresh perspectives, sharp instincts, and an intuitive understanding of how people live today. Our design sensibility leans toward warm minimalism—clean lines, layered textures, and a quiet sophistication that feels effortless yet intentional.

We don’t just create beautiful spaces—we create experiences that feel deeply personal and purposefully designed. Every project begins with listening. We take time to understand how our clients live, what they value, and how their space needs to function. From layout and materiality to custom furniture and finishing touches, we obsess over every detail to ensure it all comes together seamlessly.

Our strength lies in balancing aesthetics with practicality—designing spaces that are as functional as they are beautiful. We work closely with trusted craftsmen, vendors, and collaborators to bring each vision to life with precision, professionalism, and a sense of ease.

What sets us apart is our responsiveness, our creative agility, and the clarity we bring to the process. As a team of designers who live and breathe the modern lifestyle ourselves, we move with speed, intention, and a strong design point of view—while staying grounded in timeless principles.

Whether you’re starting from scratch or seeking a thoughtful refresh, we’re here to make the process inspiring, enjoyable, and tailored just for you.

Name: Öden Mimarlık
Description:
Öden Mimarlık: Estetik ve Fonksiyonellikte Mükemmeli Arayan Bir İç Mimarlık Deneyimi

Öden Mimarlık, iç mekan tasarımında öncü bir isim olarak Türkiye genelinde müşterilerine benzersiz ve işlevsel çözümler sunmaktadır. Firmamız, her projeye tutkuyla yaklaşır ve müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşan tasarımlar ortaya koymak için çalışır.

Uzmanlık Alanlarımız:

Konut İç Mekan Tasarımı: Ev sahiplerinin kişisel tarzını yansıtan ve yaşam tarzlarına uygun iç mekanlar tasarlamak için özgün yaklaşımlar sunuyoruz.

Ticari Mekan Tasarımı: Mağaza, ofis, restoran gibi ticari alanlarda marka kimliğini güçlendiren, işlevsel ve estetik açıdan etkileyici tasarımlar yapıyoruz.

Otel ve Konaklama Tasarımı: Misafirlerin konforunu ve memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak otel ve konaklama mekanları için özelleştirilmiş, davetkar ve sıcak atmosferler yaratıyoruz.

Fark Yaratan Yaklaşımımız:

Öden Mimarlık olarak, her projeyi bir sanat eseri gibi ele alıyor ve müşterilerimizle yakın işbirliği içinde çalışıyoruz. Müşterilerimizin isteklerini anlamak ve onların beklentilerini aşan çözümler üretmek için titizlikle çalışıyoruz. Tasarım sürecinin her aşamasında kaliteli malzemeleri ve detaylı planlamayı ön planda tutuyoruz.

Referanslar ve Başarılar:

Öden Mimarlık, gerçekleştirdiği başarılı projeler ve memnun müşterileriyle sektörde saygın bir konuma sahiptir. Yaratıcı ve işlevsel tasarımlarımızla birçok ödül kazanmış ve sektördeki liderliğimizi perçinlemiş bulunmaktayız.

İletişim Bilgileri:

Eğer siz de iç mekanınızı yeniden tasarlamak veya yeni bir projeye başlamak istiyorsanız, bize ulaşmaktan çekinmeyin. Öden Mimarlık ekibi olarak, size en iyi hizmeti sunmak için buradayız.

Name: Envisage Studio
Description:
we are an award-winning concept design agency known for crafting bold, powerful, fine, and sophisticated design concepts that transcend the boundaries of interior design and concept creation.

Design is not merely a profession; it's an art form that flows through us, taking on a life of its own. For us, design is a sensory experience where details, especially concealed ones, serve as the connective threads binding every project's elements. Our mission is to create spaces that breathe life into unique identities and personalities, creating spaces where a whole universe unfolds within.

As artists, design isn't just what we do; it's an integral part of who we are. We firmly believe that design holds immense power—it shapes and refines humanity, leaving an indelible mark on our culture. Our designs are not just visual; they are strong, atmospheric, and sensual experiences that inspire individuals to become their boldest, most poetic, powerful, and refined selves.

Our design philosophy mirrors that of a musician's relationship with silence and a poet's word selection. We create designs that invite you to explore the emotions concealed beneath the surface, to read between the lines, and to experience the ebb and flow of emotions.

Our style is a subtle fusion of the past and the future, where modernism and European classicism merge to craft clean, unique designs. Here, art harmonizes with science, yesterday's heritage transforms into tomorrow's promise, and every little detail unveils an evocative, witty interpretation of beauty.

Name: Smart Building System
Description: Interior design is the art and science of enhancing the interior spaces of a building to create a functional, aesthetically pleasing environment that meets the needs and preferences of its occupants. It involves a range of elements, including color, lighting, texture, materials, and furniture, that are carefully selected and arranged to create a harmonious and comfortable space. Successful interior design not only reflects the personality and style of its occupants but also considers the practical requirements of the space, such as its purpose, traffic flow, and storage needs. Ultimately, interior design seeks to improve the quality of life for those who use the space by creating an environment that is both beautiful and functional.

Name: Van Veen Spuiterij BV
Description:
Wie had dat gedacht…….

Dit jaar precies 20 jaar geleden begon het avontuur om eigenaar te worden en een doorstart te maken met Van Veen Spuiterij. Na mijn studie Museologie ben ik voor mezelf gaan werken en heb diverse bedrijfshistorische tentoonstellingen ontworpen en gerealiseerd voor o.a. Oranjeboom/ Dommelsche Bierbrouwerij/ Organon NV/ Damen Shipyards / Noordwijk Space Expo/ Pink Roccade etc.

In 2003 werd mij gevraagd om de interieurtak van Van Veen Autoschade te gaan runnen. Deze uitdaging ben ik aangegaan in een nieuw pand te Wassenaar met twee man personeel. Het idee was om dit enkele jaren te doen en dan weer verder te gaan. Niets is minder waar. We zijn in de loop van de jaren gezond gegroeid. In het begin lag de focus op de particuliere markt. Deze is ondertussen verschoven naar de zakelijke markt en dan voornamelijk de interieurbouw en retail. 

De groei heeft doorgezet met de verhuizing in 2018 naar Katwijk. Een ruime werkplaats waar we een 70m2 spuit/droogcombinatie met een spuitwand hebben geplaatst. Voorbewerkingsplekken met elk een eigen stofafzuiging heeft de routing tenslotte geoptimaliseerd. Dankzij deze investering konden wij grotere spuitopdrachten aannemen. 

Inmiddels verzorgt Van Veen Spuiterij met de nieuwste technologieën en ons gespecialiseerd team het spuit- en beitswerk van hele woning-, kantoor- en winkelinrichtingen.

We blijven voortbouwen op de ingeslagen weg  door mooie projecten op te leveren maar we zijn er ook nog zeker voor de particuliere markt om bij te dragen aan de circulaire economie. Tenslotte zijn we daar mee begonnen in 2003

Annabella Nassetti is a dynamic interior designer whose trademark style is an innovative use of space. Her work features architectural detailing that guarantees a modern, harmonious environment in which to live: beautiful, luxurious finishes complemented by great functionality, with many bespoke elements to make every space work its hardest and create a home that is unique. A Living Concept, developed by Annabella, is an approach that goes beyond the look, feel and function of home; it is about making the project itself seamless and trouble-free. A Living ConceptTM supports clients at every stage, from property sourcing, planning and listed building consents, through architecture, interior design and project management to accessorisation – including investment in modern and contemporary art, thanks to partnerships with a number of renowned art dealers.
 
"Our end-to-end approach simplifies your project, giving you control and peace of mind from start to finish. We take care of every aspect, avoiding the need for multiple contracts with a designer, architect, project manager and construction company."

Name: Dixie AB
Description:
Dixie is a well established Swedish brand and supplier of sustainable & timeless interior design items to several countries. Appreciated products of good quality to a reasonble price that help achieve friendly, natural settings. We are both proud and grateful to cooperate with so many shops working as retailers of our brand.
We offer e.g. doormats, rugs, wicker baskets & placemats in natural materials. Among our carefully selected materials you find jute sisal, seagrass & waterhyacinth. 

Interested in becoming an agent in a country we’re not represented in yet, become a re-seller or get in touch with the agent in your country? Don't hesitate to contact us, we're here to help.

More about us
We've navigated our way through expressions and trends for more than 25 years - the time it took to make us what we are today. The years brought wisdom and awareness, and not least the confidence to stand by what we think and feel.

We've corrected our course along the way on our heading toward simplicity and natural expression, and it seems we made the right important choices. A great many people agree, and appreciate our sustainable values and timeless Scandinavian heritage. In developing  our product range, we set out from the Scandinavian design tradition. Soft, natural colour, thoughtful functionality, and authentic materials & textures. 

For us, contemporary furnishing means more than colour schemes and latest trends. Our heritage also means taking responsibility for our products, the way they are made, and what they are made of. 

Over the years we've developed strong, cordial ties with carefully selected manufacturers,who know we demand materials, production methods and working conditions of the highest standard. We have great confidence in them. 

It's why we can produce and develop our products with materials best suited for their every purpose and expression. Functional, timeless interior design products that help achieve friendly natural settings. Today & tomorrow.

Description: Misura Studio es un estudio de interiorismo y mobiliario que nace en 2009 con el objetivo de ofrecer un mueble moderno y atemporal. Todos los productos son de la máxima calidad y el más alto diseño. Diseño y Creatividad evolucionan juntos para interpretar un estilo contemporáneo en diferentes ambientes: mobiliario domestico, mobiliario de jardín y mobiliario de oficina, áreas públicas y cocinas. Una completa gama de mobiliario que destaca por la belleza de sus materiales y de los detalles, diseñados con el máximo cuidado.

Name: Studio Barla Interiorismo
Description:
Estudio de arquitectura interior y diseño ubicado en Santiago de Chile, enfocado en la creación de espacios atemporales, sensibles y profundamente conectados con la materialidad. 

Cada proyecto se aborda como una experiencia integral, donde lo funcional y lo emocional conviven para dar forma a espacios que se habitan, se recorren y se sienten.

La inspiración nace del viaje, especialmente de Italia y de distintas ciudades del mundo donde el diseño, el arte y la arquitectura dialogan con la historia, el oficio y la cultura local. 
Estas experiencias han abierto nuevas miradas y han generado una conexión profunda con materiales nobles, en particular con la piedra natural y sus múltiples aplicaciones artísticas. Su origen, textura e imperfección se transforman en un lenguaje expresivo que aporta identidad, carácter y profundidad a cada proyecto.

El estudio desarrolla proyectos de arquitectura interior de manera integral, desde la conceptualización hasta el diseño de detalles, trabajando de forma interdisciplinaria junto a artesanos, proveedores y especialistas. 
La búsqueda constante es crear espacios que trasciendan las tendencias, con una estética contemporánea, serena y cuidadosamente curada, donde la materialidad y la luz juegan un rol protagónico.

Se han realizado proyectos residenciales y comerciales en Chile, Buenos Aires y Miami, adaptando cada propuesta a su contexto cultural, geográfico y humano, manteniendo una identidad clara y coherente. 
El diseño es entendido como una herramienta de conexión, capaz de contar historias, despertar emociones y reflejar la esencia de quienes habitan cada espacio

We foster knowledge sharing through education, advocacy, community engagement, and outreach. Our mission is to advance the interior design profession while demonstrating and celebrating the power of design to positively transform lives and environments.

ASID is the largest and most comprehensive professional organization for interior designers, representing both residential and commercial specialties. Through its chapters across the country, it unites designers, industry partners, educators, and students to promote design excellence and the impact of design on the human experience.

We believe that every project has a narrative waiting to be unveiled, and our mission is to bring that narrative to life through our visualizations.

What sets us apart is our commitment to capturing the complete picture, considering every aspect of the project. From the smallest detail to the grandest vision, we immerse ourselves in the story behind the architecture, ensuring that our visualizations not only depict structures but also convey the essence and emotion behind them.

In a world saturated with visuals, we stand out by placing storytelling at the forefront of our work. Our dedication to storytelling allows us to create immersive experiences that resonate with our clients and their audiences, leaving a lasting impression that goes beyond mere aesthetics. Name: Inge van Poppel Interieurarchitectuur
Description:
Inge van Poppel Interieurarchitectuur is een onafhankelijk en zelfstandig bureau, gevestigd aan de Lange Weide 142 in Breda, Nederland.
Van totaal interieurontwerp t/m de gehele realisatie & inrichting en styling. In binnenland en buitenland.

Het interieurarchitectenbureau is ingeschreven bij Bureau Architectenregister te Den Haag.

Ga je een nieuwe woning of bedrijfspand bouwen, of een verbouwing tegemoet? Ga je verhuizen, betrek je een nieuw kantoor / (thuis)werkplek, of wil je je interieur restylen? 
Wat je ook van plan bent, bij Inge van Poppel Interieurarchitectuur zit je goed!

Elk project pakt Inge met open vizier aan, waardoor ze met haar creativiteit en oog voor detail, een uniek, stijlvol en tijdloos interieur kan creëren.  
Van het ontwerpen en realiseren van totaal-interieurs tot het ontwerpen van keukens, badkamers en op maat te maken meubelen. Zelfs het inrichten van vakantiewoningen en buitenruimtes zoals een veranda, bijgebouw of tuinkamer. Inge heeft op alle vlakken veel praktijkervaring opgebouwd

“Mijn uitdaging ligt in het creëren van interieurs die inspireren en naadloos aansluiten bij de persoonlijkheid van mijn opdrachtgevers, aangevuld met mijn persoonlijke signatuur.
Zo krijg je persoonlijke en verrassende interieurs vol leven en verhalen. "

Als ervaren vakvrouw, met 25 jaar ervaring in het ontwerpen en realiseren van projecten in binnenland en buitenland, kent Inge de vaardigheden om haarzelf in te kunnen leven in verschillende interieursferen. Ze stelt daarbij de wensen van de opdrachtgever, de ruimte en de mogelijkheden ervan centraal. En zij streeft altijd naar de hoogst mogelijke kwaliteit en authenticiteit, waarbij zij ook het overzicht houdt over het budget

Inge begeleidt en ontzorgt je bij voorkeur vanaf het begin van je project en tijdens het gehele traject.
Op deze wijze kan Inge je interieur naar een nog hoger niveau tillen, voor het meest optimale resultaat. 

www.ivp-interieurarchitectuur.nl

Name: Phong Cách Mộc
Description:
Phong Cách Mộc (PCM) là đơn vị “Dẫn đầu giải pháp không gian ngành F&B”. 

Để làm được điều đó, PCM phát triển mạnh mẽ với 3 mảng chính: Thiết kế, Xây dựng và Sản xuất nội thất. Chúng tôi tạo ra cơ cấu tổ chức đặc biệt và quy trình khép kín. Từ đội ngũ phát triển dự án, thiết kế concept & branding đến giám sát thi công và xưởng sản xuất hiện đại. Tạo nên điểm mạnh vượt trội cho PCM đó là: Tốc độ - Đồng bộ - Sáng tạo - Chuyên. 

Trong gần 1 thập kỷ xây dựng và phát triển, Phong Cách Mộc đã từng bước chinh phục được sự tin tưởng và ủng hộ của khách hàng. Từ những vị khách đầu tiên đến nay, PCM đã tham gia hơn 5000 dự án và trên 500.000m2 không gian ở trong và ngoài nước. Những con số biết nói này không chỉ PCM đảm nhận mà còn là bảo chứng niềm tin của khách hàng dành cho PCM. 

Để phát triển bền vững và mang lại giá trị hữu ích cho xã hội, PCM chú trọng xây dựng văn hóa để mỗi nhân sự được thể hiện bản sắc và khai phóng tiềm năng cao nhất. Từ đó, cùng nhau xây dựng nơi mà khách hàng, đối tác nhận được sự đồng hành và an tâm trọn vẹn nhất. 


Đến với PCM, bạn sẽ nhận được giải pháp giá trị độc nhất. Bao gồm: 
- Hợp gu: Am hiểu gu thẩm mỹ khách hàng mục tiêu. 
- Hiệu quả: Giải pháp hướng đến hiệu quả kinh doanh. 
- Tiện lợi: Am hiểu công năng giúp vận hành tiện lợi.

Name: Sees Design
Description:
Sees Design, a second-generation design studio established in 1975, has earned a reputation for crafting modern and comfortable interiors that exude sophistication and elegance. Their signature approach involves a skillful blend of colors, materials, and textures, coupled with meticulous attention to lighting, mood, and detail.

The business was founded by Carson See, and his sons, Ross See, Allied ASID, and Corbin See, along with his wife Sara See, make up the team today. Together, they bring extensive knowledge and experience in architecture, interiors, furniture, and textiles, having worked with renowned designers and companies in New York, Chicago, and Dallas.

Following the success of their work on The Charles, Bar Charles, El Carlos, and Sister, Duro Hospitality expanded into hospitality design under the banner of Duro Design. Their design services are marked by a passionate and thoughtful approach guided by the belief that classicism can be reimagined as a possible future reality, rather than a caricature, as expressed by David Netto.

Sees Design has offices in Oklahoma City and Dallas and has been featured in national publications such as Architectural Digest, AD Pro, D Home, PaperCity, Dallas Modern Luxury, and the book Dallas Modern, among others.

Hemdem is specialized in residential custom design and furniture. Hemdem team proudly designed residentials in the US, UK, and MENA.

Name: Always Home Custom Designs
Description:
Always Home is founded and owned by Principal Designer Katie Baker. Growing up Katie was always the kid who was rearranging her room once or twice a month. Whenever her parents hosted family she would be the one to set up the bedroom and make sure the space was ready to receive guests. There were fresh towels, a lit candle, and the bed was made to perfection.

Katie has always had a keen eye when it comes to designing home spaces. She sees the aesthetic needs as well as the functional needs required for comfortable spaces. She has a strong passion for creating homes to resonate with their owners lifestyles. After receiving her Bachelor's degree in Interior Design, Katie dove right into expanding her knowledge base and obtaining the right experiences. She worked for high end designers in the Houston Texas area as well as worked as an Architectural Designer for a home builder before moving out to Indiana.

With the love and support of family and her passion for design, Always Home Custom Designs was formed. Katie and her team work to design spaces that are unique to each client and are ready for their particular lifestyle. Specializing in 3D visualization Always Home wants clients to feel at ease before each project commences. These visualizations help with communication throughout each project so your home can be your own with less hassle and quicker results!

Name: Nidhhi Singhania
Description:
At True Luxury, we redefine what it means to deliver high‑end interiors. Luxury is not just about flawless finishes or premium materials—it is about auditable excellence, clause‑bound accountability, and cradle‑to‑cradle sustainability.

We specialize in:

Rigorous compliance validation: Every product, every material, every segment tested and retested against global standards.

Forensic assurance: Retention samples, clause‑bound unconditional warranties, and segment‑wise validation to eliminate hidden fragility.

Sustainable luxury: Green interiors backed by cradle‑to‑cradle certification, zero VOC, and zero off‑gassing.

Design integrity: Finishing quality that lasts, proven through compliance—not assumed through brochures.

Our mission is to ensure that luxury in India is built to endure, not to fail. We drive industry reform by exposing gaps, demanding accountability, and setting new benchmarks for design leadership, sustainability, and credibility.

Name: Desjardins Bherer
Description:
Dédié aux projets résidentiels haut de gamme ainsi qu’à certains projets commerciaux et multi-résidentiels sélects, Desjardins Bherer a acquis au fil des ans une solide réputation et se classe aujourd’hui parmi les bureaux professionnels les plus importants dans le domaine de l’aménagement intérieur.

Chez Desjardins Bherer, le processus de création débute par la compréhension adéquate du contexte dans lequel ils interviennent, ainsi que des demandes du client.  Il se déroule dans le souci d’intégrer les préoccupations des intervenants au dossier et de trouver des solutions réalistes, sans sacrifier à l’esthétique.

Fervents du Bauhaus, Desjardins Bherer visent à harmoniser forme et fonction dans l’utilisation de l’espace et privilégie les matériaux naturels. De plus, leur travail a su échapper aux caprices de la mode ; leurs réalisations se caractérisent par leur simplicité, leur pérennité et leur fonctionnalité.

Ils ont notamment remporté le Grand Prix du design en 2013, 2014 et 2015 dans la catégorie Espace résidentiel de plus de 3 200 p.c.  Récemment, ils se sont mérité des prix en design d'intérieur lors des IDA Design Awards en 2017 et 2018, ont été finalistes lors du Sub-Zero Wolf Kitchen Design Contest 2017-2018 et récipiendaires du Prix d'Excellence de l'APDIQ, résidentiel - rénovation complète en 2021. En 2022, Desjardins Bherer s'est vu remettre une certification Or aux Grands Prix du Design, catégorie Résidence / Espace résidentiel > 5 400 pi2 (> 500 m2).

Born from a passion for design and backed by deep expertise in civil engineering, we offer clients a simpler, better way to create spaces they love—by uniting creativity, quality, and flawless execution under one roof.
At SRIE DECORS, we saw an opportunity:
Too many people struggle with managing different vendors, unclear timelines, and inconsistent quality in their interior projects.
Our founder, with years of civil engineering experience, wanted to change that.
We set out to create a one-stop destination where every client finds thoughtful design, reliable project management, and exceptional craftsmanship—from concept to completion. Because you deserve interiors that not only look beautiful but feel effortless to create.

Name: M&D Interior Designs
Description:
Welcome to M and D Interior Design Studio, where innovation meets elegance, and dreams transform into reality. Nestled at the intersection of creativity and craftsmanship, our studio is committed to curating spaces that resonate with your unique vision, lifestyle, and aspirations.

Our Approach:
At M and D, we believe that every space tells a story, and we are passionate about helping you narrate yours. Our collaborative approach begins with understanding your needs, preferences, and inspirations. From the initial consultation to the final reveal, our dedicated team works closely with you, ensuring transparency, communication, and impeccable attention to detail.

Services Offered:

Consultation & Conceptualization: Our journey begins by understanding your vision. Through detailed consultations, mood boards, and conceptual sketches, we translate your ideas into a cohesive design narrative.

Space Planning & Layout Design: Leveraging our expertise in spatial dynamics, we optimize layouts, ensuring functionality, flow, and aesthetic harmony tailored to your space's unique dimensions and requirements.

Custom Furniture & Millwork: Elevate your interiors with bespoke furniture pieces and exquisite millwork crafted to perfection. From conceptualization to installation, our craftsmen ensure unparalleled quality, durability, and aesthetic appeal.

Material & Finish Selection: With a keen eye for trends and quality, we guide you through a curated selection of materials, finishes, and furnishings, ensuring a cohesive palette that resonates with your style and stands the test of time.

Project Management & Execution: Our meticulous project management ensures seamless execution, timely delivery, and adherence to the highest quality standards. From procurement to installation, we oversee every detail, ensuring your vision is brought to life flawlessly.

Styling & Décor Services: Elevate your space with our comprehensive styling and décor services. #interior #design

Description:
Mimarlu Studio, un estudio especializado en interiorismo sostenible, construcción circular y consultoría hotelera. Ayudamos a profesionales del sector hotelero y propietarios de alojamientos turísticos a transformar sus alojamientos en negocios más rentables, sostenibles y competitivos.
En Mimarlu Studio creemos que el diseño tiene el poder de inspirar, emocionar y generar un impacto positivo en el entorno. Por eso, creamos proyectos que combinan estética, funcionalidad y responsabilidad ambiental, ofreciendo un servicio integral que abarca desde la conceptualización hasta la ejecución.
Creamos y transformamos alojamientos turísticos en espacios sostenibles que emocionan, respetan el entorno y ofrecen experiencias únicas.

Nuestros valores
- Conexión con el territorio: resaltamos la esencia cultural y artística de cada lugar, integrando materiales autóctonos, artesanía local y diseños que honran la identidad del entorno.

- Sostenibilidad integral: apostamos por proveedores locales, reducimos la huella de carbono y aplicamos principios de construcción circular para crear espacios que perduren.

- Experiencias sensoriales: diseñamos ambientes que estimulan los sentidos y generan bienestar, confort y conexión emocional.

- Innovación personalizada: cada proyecto es único. Creamos soluciones a medida que posicionan a nuestros clientes como referentes en exclusividad y diseño sostenible.

Queremos transformar tu alojamiento en un espacio que inspire, emocione y contribuya a un turismo más ético e innovador.
En Mimarlu Studio, convertimos la sostenibilidad en una experiencia de lujo y autenticidad.

Name: Granger-Margon
Description:
Elisabeth Granger et Jeanne de Margon se rencontrent sur les bancs de l’Ecole Camondo.

Fortes de leur approche complémentaire du métier, elles décident de créer l’agence d’architecture intérieure Granger-Margon en 2018.

En s’associant, elles forment un duo à la fois créatif et technique, avec un sens prononcé du détail.

Loin des tendances éphémères et uniformes de l’architecture d’intérieur, l’agence cherche à mettre en valeur l’histoire que vous souhaitez raconter, tout en respectant les fonctionnalités et usages auxquels votre projet est destiné́.

Le regard croisé des deux associées sur l’architecture permet de proposer une ambiance unique et intemporelle, élégante et raffinée, sans jamais imposer un style prépondérant. 

Ne rien laisser au hasard : cette philosophie guide nos dessins, nos recherches, et notre exigence du niveau de finition.

Meet the heart behind Bevli design

Name: The Vanguard Theory
Description:
The Vanguard Theory is an award-winning creative studio that collaborates with like-minded artists and designers globally. Discovery is at the heart of everything we do. Extracting the history of a place. Telling its story. Sharing the dreams of its people. Sometimes it’s on the surface, shining on anyone who seeks it. And other times it’s deeper, buried within its roots, covered over by changing tastes, forgotten by time. And sometimes those stories haven't happened yet. Those stories are just sketches. Ideas. Blueprints. All of these stories live around us; The past, the present, the rules and the visions to break them. The Vanguard Theory are storytellers whose stable of principles and artists are inherently curious. With nods to the past and ideas about the future, The Vanguard Theory is our idealized vision of what design can be. For our community and the rest of the world around us.

The Vanguard Theory has continued to be featured in The New York Times, Surface, Dezeen, Architectural Digest, The Wall Street Journal, Vogue, and other publications.  The studio has achieved the prestigious Gold Key Award in 2016 Best Lobby for The Surfjack Hotel, Gold Key Finalist in 2018 Best Guestroom for White Sands Hotel, and was awarded the Gold Key Award in 2023 Best Guestroom for Wayfinder Waikiki.  

Noteworthy accolades include IIDA Ho’ohuli Grand Award in 2019 for Renew Hotel, IIDA Jury’s Pick & Maker Award in 2021 for Eleven Cocktail Bar, IIDA Against All Odds Award in 2023 for Pacific 19, and IIDA Play & Ho’ohuli Grand Award in 2023 for Wayfinder Waikiki.

Name: Scheer & Co. Interior Design
Description:
Scheer & Co. is a boutique residential interior design firm based in Austin, TX. Killy Scheer founded Scheer & Co. in 2013 with the belief that a home should feel both elegant and familiar – perhaps with a dash of playfulness. Killy collaborates with clients to create spaces that reflect their spirit and aesthetic. 

Killy earned a bachelor's degree in English from the University of Michigan prior to obtaining a master's in interior design from Pratt Institute in Brooklyn, NY. She refined her skills under the tutelage of such tastemakers as Jonathan Adler and Fawn Galli as well as at architecture firms including The Phillips Group and Studio CMP. A 2011 relocation led her to Cravotta Interiors in Austin, TX for three years prior to launching Scheer & Co. 

In addition to her interiors practice, Killy has been a contributing writer with several design publications, including Houzz.com and is currently an interior design professor at Texas State University (formerly Southwest Texas State). An architectural, design and decorative arts history enthusiast, Killy participates on several committees with Preservation Austin and sits on Inherit Austin’s board of directors.

Each project at Max Dignam Interiors is meticulously tailored to reflect the unique personality and lifestyle of our clients. We blend timeless aesthetics with subtle nuances, resulting in a holistic and enduring design signature. Our spaces evoke layered comfort, sophistication, and a sense of belonging.

Description:
Atro Design is a leading provider of high-quality drapery hardware products, offering an extensive range of stylish and functional solutions for your window treatments. With years of experience in the industry, we pride ourselves on our commitment to innovation and excellence in design.

Experts in jouw interieur. In totaalconcepten. In exclusief maatwerk met doorgedreven specialisme in keukens en los meubilair. Daar staat Freja als familiebedrijf al meer dan 30 jaar voor!

Onze expertise? Home & Business Interior Concepts.

Onze Home Interior Concepts bestaan uit drie pijlers. Home interior, voor een ingrijpende verbouwing of (her)inrichting van je woning of appartement vanuit een totaalconcept op maat. Home styling , waarbij we jouw interieur – zonder grote breekwerken – doordacht (her)inrichten of aankleden volgens jouw persoonlijke wensen zodat alles klopt tot in het kleinste detail. En ten slotte Home decoration, waarbij we wand-, vloer- en raambekleding voorzien, schilderen en behangen, verlichting en losse meubelen aanbieden aangevuld met kleine decoratie-items die eyecatchers vormen in je interieur. 

Freja is er dus voor wie zijn woning, appartement of tweede verblijf wil verbouwen of (her)inrichten. Maar we bieden onze drie bovenstaande pijlers ook aan voor ondernemers die kiezen voor onze Business Interior Concepts omdat hun kantoor, B&B, boetiekhotel, restaurant … ongekende huiselijkheid, authenticiteit en persoonlijkheid mag uitstralen. 

Inspireren. Dat is voor ons altijd de sleutel. Als familiebedrijf, met expertise en vakmanschap als kernwoorden, willen we jou mogelijkheden tonen waar je zelf nog niet aan gedacht hebt. We ontwerpen eigentijdse, vernieuwende en onweerstaanbare concepten. Daarbij maken we het verschil met bijzondere materiaalkeuzes, doordachte vormgevingen, verrassende creaties en speciale kleurencombinaties. Allemaal met veel oog voor detail. En altijd afgestemd op jouw identiteit en situatie.

Vanuit onze oplossingsgerichte betrokkenheid ontzorgen we jou volledig met een nauwgezette opvolging van begin tot einde. Oprechte aandacht is hierbij voor ons team van ontwerpers, projectleiders en plaatsers een vanzelfsprekendheid waarmee we jou in elke fase willen ondersteunen.

Lead interior designer Kim Williams, has carved a niche for herself as a creative behaviour strategist focused on designing interior spaces. Kim’s deepest passion centres around designing to positively impact the physical and emotional health of her client’s so that they can live their best possible life – at home and work.

After a successful career (21 years) as a change management consultant and behaviour specialist in the corporate world, Kim fell ill and relocated back to Cape Town. In her 40s then, she discovered her true purpose and combined decades of business experience with a passion for beautiful spaces. 

Kim’s Blueprint – Design ID guarantees clarity of what each client needs and desires from their space and is where she applies her unique creative and behavioural strategic insights to making their dream space a reality. 

Her love for smart, fresh and ahead of trend, yet classic designs and interior architecture, plus her easy and vibrant personality helps create dream spaces that exceeds even the best imagination of her clients.  

Kim Williams’ portfolio adds up to millions of Rands in retail value. She has worked across building and construction projects, alongside developers and architects for over 142 new apartments, 19 residential homes, 10 renovations of which 7 are developments and 2 are medical practices, with many more in the pipeline.  These projects include a variation of interior architecture, design and finishing, as well as soft furnishing.

Name: Barriqade
Description:
“Trame di legno. Storie intessute”
Barriqade nasce da un’intuizione: ascoltare il legno delle barrique, raccoglierne la memoria e trasformarla in arredi che parlano di vino, tempo e territorio. Ogni pezzo è un frammento di racconto, scolpito a mano con cura, rispetto e sensibilità. Non è solo design, ma narrazione materica, capace di emozionare e lasciare un segno negli spazi che abita.

Il rovere che un tempo custodiva il vino si rigenera, mantenendo intatto il suo profumo, le sue venature, le sue imperfezioni: tracce vive di un passato che diventa forma nuova. Così nascono elementi unici, che uniscono artigianalità e visione, pensati per ambienti dedicati all’accoglienza, alla convivialità, alla cultura.

Barriqade accompagna architetti e interior designer in percorsi su misura, offrendo un servizio completo: dalla consulenza alla progettazione, fino alla realizzazione e all’installazione. Ogni creazione è pensata per armonizzarsi con lo spazio, per rispondere a esigenze funzionali ma anche per evocare suggestioni profonde.

Perfetti per ristoranti di charme, hotel di lusso, lounge riservate o cantine d’autore, gli arredi Barriqade portano con sé una storia che arricchisce l’esperienza di chi li vive. La sostenibilità si fa gesto poetico: recuperare, trasformare, donare una seconda vita. Il vero lusso è ciò che resiste al tempo, ciò che emoziona perché autentico.

Con Barriqade, ogni spazio si fa racconto. E ogni racconto, materia viva.

Welcome to Domexic L.L.C., your trusted partner for top-notch interior decoration, fitout, and handyman services in Dubai, UAE. Established in January 2021, we are led by a team with over a decade's worth of expertise in the industry.

At Domexic L.L.C., we are committed to excellence and have positioned ourselves as a leading provider in the domains of hotels, commercial and rental complexes, corporate offices, and showrooms. In addition to our core fitout and handyman services, we offer a wide range of interior design solutions. From gypsum partitions and ceilings to exquisite gypsum cornices and expertly finished paint jobs, we have you covered. Our expertise also extends to HVAC installations and civil construction. With a team of highly skilled professionals and a customer-centric approach, we've earned the trust of our clients.

Why Choose Us:

Experience and Expertise: With years of experience in fitout and interior decoration, we bring unparalleled expertise to every project.
Quality Craftsmanship: Our unwavering commitment to quality ensures exceptional workmanship in every detail of your fitout and handyman services.
Tailored Solutions: We understand that your needs for fitout and handyman services are unique, and we offer customized solutions to meet them.
Timely Delivery: We adhere to schedules and deliver fitout and handyman projects on time, ensuring your plans stay on track.
Client Satisfaction: Our focus on customer satisfaction has earned us trust as a reliable partner in Dubai's interior design, fitout, and handyman services landscape.

Nasce nel 2023 Studio Hïras, un sogno per poter far sentire le persone a casa nella loro casa.
La vera essenza del nostro lavoro sta nel rapporto che costruiamo con i nostri clienti. Non siamo solo professioniste che disegnano spazi, ma ascoltiamo storie, raccogliamo emozioni e trasformiamo desideri in ambienti concreti.
Quando progettiamo, mettiamo al centro la persona. Ci sediamo, ascoltiamo, cerchiamo di capire cosa significa per loro sentirsi a casa. Non proponiamo soluzioni standard, ma percorsi personalizzati che rispecchiano chi sono.
Perché per noi, design significa ascoltare, comprendere e poi trasformare.

Name: Studio'OW Interieurarchitecten
Description:
ONZE VISIE
Op zoek naar de twinkel. Voor ons staat voorop dat wij je meenemen tijdens het volledige traject. Noem het gerust een gezamenlijke reis. Van ‘hoi wij zijn Studio’OW’ tot en met de realisatie. Die verbinding vinden we belangrijk. Onze ontwerpen nodigen mensen uit om een ruimte in haar volledige potentie te gebruiken. We betrekken alles. De functionaliteit, materiaalcombinaties en lichtinval. Het comfort. De logica. En de ruimte zelf natuurlijk. Elk ontwerp brengt de juiste elementen samen en versterkt. Kleine gelukjes creëren voor een groot genot.

 EN ZIEN WE DE TWINKEL IN JOUW OGEN, DAN WETEN WIJ DAT WE ONS WERK GOED HEBBEN GEDAAN.

RUIMTE CREËREN VOOR BALANS, RUST EN GELUK
Eén ding hebben onze opdrachten gemeen. Opdrachtgevers zitten met een woon- of werkomgeving waar ze geen vat op krijgen. Men vindt veel dingen mooi, maar dat gevoel tastbaar maken is lastig. Een plek waar je veel bent vraagt om balans en rust. Ingrediënten die het geluk dat je erin ervaart laten groeien. Voor jezelf, voor je gasten, maar bijvoorbeeld ook voor je medewerkers. Laat dat gerust aan ons over.

BUITEN ERVAREN, BINNEN BELEVEN
Wij onderzoeken en combineren ideeën in één ruimte, zorgen voor rust en spanning en creëren altijd een oplossing of verrassend alternatief. De potentie van de ruimte rekken we graag op. Als wij ervan overtuigd zijn dat een aanbouw of een dakkapel de ruimte verbetert, stellen we dat voor. Daarom stappen we graag vroeg het traject in, met de architect als het even kan. Want wat je buiten ervaart, trekken we binnen door.

DE STUDIO
Werken vanuit het hart van Brabant. Onze Villa ligt middenin het centrum van Tilburg, met de gezelligheid en bedrijvigheid letterlijk om de hoek.
Perfect voor een inspirerende ‘change of scenery’. En leuk om te weten; De Villa geeft ons een fraaie ruimte om onze ideeën, concepten en ontwerpen helder te presenteren.

Name: LPT (Luxury Porcelain Tile)
Description:
LPT is an online brand of Design Di Lusso Limited (DDL Tiles) launched specifically for architects and interior designers looking to create luxurious and high-quality living spaces. Their range of porcelain tiles is both beautiful and highly durable available in formats all the way up to large slabs (300x150cm), making them ideal for use in both residential and commercial projects. However, what sets them apart is their ability to create custom fabrications from the tiles in their range, this allow architects and interior designers to create bespoke designs that perfectly suit their clients' needs.

One of the most popular fabrications offered by LPT are vanity units with integrated wash basins. Not only are they stunning to look at but also highly functional, providing a seamless and stylish way to incorporate a washbasin into a bathroom design. Coffee tables are another popular custom fabrication offered by LPT, these pieces can be created in a range of sizes and shapes, with the ability to customize every aspect of the design, architects and interior designers can create truly unique pieces that perfectly complement their overall design scheme.

The LPT website: www.luxuryporcelaintile.com is a valuable resource for design professionals looking to explore the possibilities of luxury porcelain slabs and custom fabrications. The website offers a range of resources and information, including inspiration galleries showcasing some of the most stunning creations, detailed product information, and technical specifications as well as showing the full range of stunning porcelain slabs available for wall/floor tiling or for custom creations.

With a focus on quality and attention to detail, LPT is a brand that is trusted by architects and interior designers. LPT is able to assist architects and interior designers to create stunning designs that elevate any living or commercial space to the highest level of luxury.

Name: Essis by Lasilinkki
Description:
This page is only for Essis by Lasilinkki artisan glasses that are available in Finland and abroad. Check out other mirror and glass solutions that are available in Finland from lasilinkki.fi

Do you have a project where you need unique and timeless glass solutions?
Look no further, we are the right partner for you.

We can offer you versatile artisan glasses for interior design. Handcrafted according to measurements, our individual artisan glasses can be used in a variety of ways, such as e.g. for glass doors and walls, shower screens and furniture just to mention a few. We are able to temper our artisan glass to safety glass therefore it is suitable for public places as well as home spaces.

Mainly our focus is on professionals such as designers, architects, interior designers, and visionaries. We are a great partner in glass solutions for example in hotels, restaurants, offices and other company spaces but also very suitable for home interiors as well.

You can purchase just the glass according to your measurements, the whole product e.g. glass door with frame, hinges and a knob or as a turnkey bespoke project.

We have 25 basic patterns that you can use as they are or modify them. We can also fused your own design on the glass or design something for you based on .e.g. a theme or an inspirational picture. See all basic patters here. 

In addition to our artisan glasses, we offer our glass and design expertise to our customers. Please be in contact with our sales team if you have any questions, we are more than happy to help you.

We want to bring the endless possibilities of using glass as inspiration and insight for every glass lover.

You don’t need to know glass, you just need know  us.

Name: La Maison Des Parquets
Description:
La Maison des Parquets a été fondée en 2003, à Libourne et n’a pas quitté la ville depuis. 

D’abord animée par une volonté d’être artisan et de proposer un service fourni/posé à une clientèle locale, la reprise par notre équipe a changé la donne : la volonté d’être plus commerçant. 
Même si nous n’avons pas totalement abandonné l’activité pose, elle ne demeure plus un segment stratégique. 

Notre priorité est de proposer à nos clients, particuliers et professionnels, des produits de l’univers sols, avec un approvisionnement direct usine et une surface de vente dédiée au choix et au conseil.

Vous y trouverez du stratifié, du parquet (contrecollé, massif et semi-massif), des vinyles (LVT-SPC), des produits à faible impact carbone, mais également une proposition de produits complémentaires riche, avec un spécialisation sur l’accessoire (notamment dans le domaine des plinthes et des sous-couches). 

En plus de distribuer, nous stockons également des produits dans chaque famille, pour vous proposer une plus grande réactivité et un positionnement tarifaire encore plus intéressant.

La Maison des Parquets by SARL LMP c'est CONSEIL - CHOIX - QUALITÉ - STOCK, pour la réussite de vos projets.

Name: Jamie Bush + Co.
Description:
Growing up on Long Island in an eccentric family of dairy farmers and as well as a small clan of renowned designers, photographers and artists in Manhattan was the foundation of Jamie’s interest in a design with an eye toward the natural world.  After studying architecture in New Orleans and in Italy, Jamie relocated to Los Angeles to focus his design practice on the unsung heroes of mid-century modern residential architecture.  It was here that he founded Jamie Bush + Co. in 2002, and has since worked on some of the most significant historical residential modernist homes in the US.

Recognized for his ability to blur the lines between architecture and interior design, his ethos has always been to approach the design of a space as one holistic vision.  Admired for his relevant and keen understanding of architecture and design, Jamie’s designs have been featured in over 100 publications worldwide including Architectural Digest, Interior Design, Vogue, Elle Decor, Wall Street Journal, Wallpaper, Los Angeles Times as well as several coffee table books.  Jamie is currently a member of the Tulane School of Architecture Board of Advisors and has been honored into both the AD 100 top global architects and designers of the year, as well as Elle Decor’s  A-List of top designers.

Name: Realm Studio Inc.
Description:
𝐌𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐬𝐧’𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐥𝐲 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫. 𝐄𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐭.

We believe the best design solutions maximize efficiency. This involves striking a balance between form and function, design and execution, budget, and end-user experience.

True creativity is about finding the middle ground between these elements and interpreting them as harmonious collective spaces that evoke unforgettable experiences.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐩𝐚𝐥:

Maria Tsang established her design career at YabuPushelberg in 2007. While there she worked with world-class clients such as the Hyatt Group, Hudson's Bay, Lane Crawford, Le Printemps, and the Hilton Group. Within six and a half years she progressed as a project leader with a deep understanding of and sense for design.

After concluding the Grand Hyatt Hotel project in Rio de Janeiro, she took a sabbatical to pursue a Master of Design degree at IED Madrid, Spain. She broadened her horizons through the program and exposure to European culture, and her leaders recognized her growing talent. They continued to challenge her even after accomplishing her degree by inviting her to design competitions in the Czech Republic and Poland.

When Maria returned to Canada, she had an opportunity to apply her new perspectives to lead exciting undertakings at Burdifilek. She led projects such as the Trump Champagne Lounge in Vancouver, rebranding of the Indigo bookshop and the Shinsegae department stores in Daegu, South Korea.

In 2016 she joined 2pi rdesign as Director of Interior Design. She accomplished numerous inspiring works such as the Park Hyatt Hotel renovations in Beijing, full renovations and rebranding of the Mumian Hotel in Shenzhen, and the new Mumian Hotel in Rizhao, Shandong. Working with 2pi r solidified her practice in solving design challenges and orchestrating projects of all scopes.

With her rich experiences, Maria along with her design associates and bonded consultants now brings about her practice, Realm Studio.

Furthermore, we offer engaging and interactive terrarium workshops designed to foster employee engagement and promote wellness within the workplace. Our workshops provide a hands-on experience where participants learn the art of terrarium making while discovering the therapeutic benefits of indoor gardening. Whether you're looking to transform your living space, add a touch of green to your office, or create a memorable corporate experience, Vida Verde is here to assist you every step of the way. Join us on our journey towards greener and happier urban environments. Connect with us to explore the endless possibilities of indoor gardening and experience the joy of bringing nature indoors.

Name: NYNE by Tanya Sen
Description:
NYNE Design is a transformative and exclusive interior styling and designing firm based out of Kolkata. Nyne works closely with you to understand how you imagine your home and help you discover and conceptualize your aesthetic visions. The result creates well-thought-out, functional and beautiful spaces that suit your lifestyle and that build a warm and enjoyable living space.

Nyne Design’s prime domain is creating expressive art and geometry in your living spaces. And it achieves this through an amalgam of layout, furniture styling, visual depiction of open spaces, lighting and ceiling vista and of course meticulous attention to design.

Launched in 2020, Nyne was founded by Tanya Sen, (who is also known to many in the city’s performing art circuit as a virtuoso vocalist) with the vision to make people’s dream homes come to life. Tanya has a unique sensibility infused with an infectious passion for art and design. Tanya’s design vision through Nyne has served many trend conscious customers as well as those who prefer a classic style with an exclusive feel.

Nyne shares a passion for the sophisticated, the delightfully unexpected, and making the old new again. Mixing clean straight lines with soft edges, Nyne is on a mission to inspire and enrich its clients’ lives by creating artful, timeless, and fulfilling personal spaces.

The uniqueness of Nyne is to play around with a variety of styles. Mixing old with very minimal modern designs. The interior designers at NYNE have an idea to create a unique style for every client whether it’s their home or a commercial project.

Whether Nyne is engaged in a full-scale remodel or styling a house with pre-existing furniture, its goal is to provide a well-conceived, functional design plan that can be implemented in a time frame, budget and style consistent with the client’s desires. Nyne designers take pride in using their imaginative power to craft aesthetic interiors for people.

Name: AmpQuartz Kitchen Cabinets & Countertops Johor
Description:
AmpQuartz: We don’t just sell cabinets. We build them with homeowners.

That’s what sets us apart.

Every project begins with time — real time — spent listening, guiding, and co-creating. Our customers aren’t buying off-the-shelf. You are building something personal, meaningful, and functional, with professionals who care.

We’re not just in the cabinet business. We’re in the trust business.

Every cabinet is custom-crafted and designed together with the homeowner. It’s built for real Johor homes, not showroom displays. Projects are delivered fast — kitchens within 30 days, full-house cabinets in 90 upon confirmation of 3D Drawings — and we ensure smooth project flow, even if someone’s on leave. With over 30 skilled carpenters and more than 10 dedicated consultants, we’ve built a system that keeps things moving without compromise.

You’ll get free 3D designs, flexible 24-month 0% instalment plans (even without a credit card), and up to RM2,000 in complimentary home appliances. After installation, we provide formaldehyde removal and a free 4-hour house cleaning — because our support doesn’t end when the cabinets are installed.

We also give lifetime membership perks, including gifts from ZERO and priority invitations to events. Materials matter to us — that’s why we use solid plywood, aluminium doors from 3G to 8G, honeycomb panels, ACP, full and welded aluminium. For countertops, we carry trusted brands like Dekton, Estrella, Caesarstone, Silestone, Sensa Granite, OTTO, and KompacPlus — which we distribute in Johor.

We install smart storage systems using BLUM, PIO, and KEN-B hardware.

Our showroom is family-friendly, child-safe, and built for real decision-making — coffee lounge, stroller access, and all.

AmpQuartz is Johor’s most trusted cabinet brand — one that puts service, quality, and experience at the heart of everything.

Designed by you. Built by us, Protected for life.

Name: Derun Studio
Description:
DERUN STUDIO olarak, yaşam ve çalışma alanlarını sadece işlevsel değil, aynı zamanda ruhu besleyen, iyileştiren ve dönüştüren mekanlara dönüştürmek için varız.
Doğadan ilham alıyor, insanın içsel denge ve farkındalık ihtiyacını odağa alıyoruz.
Mekanların, insanın zihinsel ve duygusal hali üzerindeki etkisinin farkındayız. Bu yüzden tasarımlarımızda biyofilik ve biyomimetrik ilkeleri rehber ediniyoruz. Doğal malzemeler, yumuşak dokular, ışık ve yeşil uyumu, yalnızca estetik değil; aynı zamanda şifalı bir deneyim sunmak için hizmet veriyoruz.
Amacımız, yaşam alanlarını birer iyileşme alanına dönüştürmek; kişinin kendine dönebildiği, nefes alabildiği ve dengede kalabildiği mekanlar yaratmaktır.
Sadelikten doğan estetikle, doğanın zamansız ilhamını birleştiriyor; her projede kullanıcıların kendilerini yeniden keşfedebileceği alanlar inşa ediyoruz. Onlara geliştiren bir deneyim sunmayı vaat ediyoruz.
İç huzura açılan kapı, bazen bir mekânla başlar. Sizi kendinize iyi gelen alanlarla tanışmaya davet ediyoruz.
DERUN STUDIO olarak her adımda insanın içsel dünyasına, doğayla olan bağlarına ve yaşam kalitesine odaklanıyoruz. Tasarımdan uygulamaya, danışmanlıktan eğitime kadar her alanda; iyileştirici, bütünsel ve estetik çözümler sunuyoruz.
Hizmetlerimiz
1. İç Mimarlık Tasarım Hizmeti
2. Uygulama Süreci Takibi
3. Kurumsal Danışmanlık Hizmeti
4. Üniversitelerle Eğitim & İş Birliği

Name: KEEEN
Description:
Welcome to the innovative world of KEEEN, where creativity meets technology and sustainability! We are pioneers in 3D printed furnishings, specializing in creating unique and customizable pieces that transform any space into a one-of-a-kind experience.

 Sustainability and Innovation: Every KEEEN piece is a testament to our commitment to the environment. We use recycled and recyclable plastics, merging eco-friendly design with cutting-edge technology to offer products that are not only beautiful but also kind to our planet.

 Unparalleled Customization: With our state-of-the-art 3D printing technology, we offer unprecedented customization. From colors to sizes, patterns to materials - every element can be tailored to reflect your unique style. Your space, your rules!

 Innovative MagClap System: Our exclusive MagClap system takes modularity to new heights. With a simple "clap", components magnetically connect, offering unmatched versatility. Change, adapt, reinvent your spaces with ease never seen before!

 Parametric Design Approach: At KEEEN's core is a revolutionary approach to design. We use computational design algorithms to create shapes and structures that challenge convention, bringing to life products that are true masterpieces of functional art.

 Unique Collection: From ultra-modern seating to elegant vases, each KEEEN product is a style statement. Our ever-expanding catalog showcases innovation and exceptional design.

 Global Sales and B2B Co-Design: Whether you are an individual design enthusiast or a business looking for tailor-made solutions, KEEEN is your ideal partner. We offer easy and fast online sales, as well as B2B collaborations for customized design projects.

 Follow us to explore a world where design meets the future. With KEEEN, it's more than just furniture - it's a revolution!

#KEEENDesign #3DPrintedFurniture #SustainableDesign #InnovationInFurniture #MagClapSystem

Description:

From bath spaces and modular kitchens to paint, tiles, and wardrobe solutions, our unwavering commitment to perfection is evident in every aspect of our work. We understand that creating a dream home is an emotional journey, and our years of experience crafting exceptional living spaces allow us to connect deeply with your aspirations and discerning tastes.

At Unispace, we take immense pride in housing more than 15 prestigious international brands, including renowned exclusive Indian collaborations.  These esteemed partnerships ensure you have access to the best in design, quality, and innovation.

Name: SENS Interior Design
Description:
Sens is an interior design firm based in Costa Rica, founded in 2008 by partners Mariamalia García and Raquel Fischel, who currently lead the company. Over the years, a team of 25 architects, designers, and draftsmen has been assembled to undertake interior design projects of varying magnitudes. We are dedicated to crafting the highest quality luxury homes.

SENS is a full-service firm, offering services from initial conceptual design to final installation on select projects. Our range of services includes interior design, interior architecture, OS&E (Operating Supplies and Equipment), and art procurement.

Driven by our mission to create high-quality goods and services, connecting customers with the natural and cultural heritage of Costa Rica, SENS channels its energy into teamwork. We aim to cultivate relationships with clients, architects, and artists to achieve successful projects on both aesthetic and functional levels.

Sens has received recognition from the International Property Awards 2023 for Best Residential Interior Private Residence Costa Rica and the Luxury Lifestyle Awards as the Best Villa Interior Design of 2023.

Name: Madison Art Consulting
Description:
Madison Art Consulting is a women and minority owned business out of the mid-Atlantic region, founded in 2001. With a team of highly creative problem solvers, Madison Art is a full-service firm made up of project managers, creative consultants, interior designers, graphic designers, studio artists, and installers. The consulting and design team is committed to creating exceptional experiences through a collaborative process with clients through extensive training in healthcare design, wayfinding, healing and holistic art concepts, psychology of color theory, and therapeutic space planning. Thoughtful project development is based upon research, data collection, and the consideration of evidence-based practices. 

An art package from Madison meets project goals and acts as an extension of design intent. Programs establish connections and create an engaging human experience, while fostering a sense of place, accompanied by moments of wonderment. By coordinating designs, specifications, and installation details with design partners, the artwork becomes an integral piece within the built environment. Open lines of communication with partners and clients ensure the evolution of concepts along with design process from start to finish. 

Providing unmatched services and specialities below for the following industries nationwide: Hospitality, Healthcare, Marine, Corporate, Education, and Residential design.

We offer both online and in person consultations from the simplest requirements to more detailed ideations. Start your styling journey with us.

Interior Design & Renovations

Sourcing & Styling

Our focus is on creating a visual aesthetic that will run throughout the space, we source items from across the world that complement and reflect the character of the client and their space.

Your office should be somewhere colleagues and customers choose to visit. To be creative. To collaborate. And to connect.

So we design, furnish and fit out flexible workspaces that do more. Because we believe your office space should work as hard as you do.

We offer free site surveys, space planning and design to help our clients find the easiest route to creating their ideal environment and best usage of space.

Wir hinterlassen Zeichen mit minimalistischer und prägnanter Designsprache und realisieren komplette Projekte - wenn es sein muss, auch mit vollem Körpereinsatz. Von der ersten Entwurfsidee, über die Planung bis hin zur Bauleitung kann man mit uns rechnen - auf Detailverliebtheit und Krisenmanagement ist Verlass.

why the friday? Wir erklären es Ihnen beim ersten Treffen!

Çözüm ortağı olduğumuz siz değerli müşterilerimiz için üst seviyedeki AR-GE çalışmaları, tasarımdan, montaj sonrası hizmete kadar ihtiyaçlarınızı en iyi şekilde anlayarak, bütçenize, sergileme tercihlerinize en uygun Fuar Standı Tasarımını sunmayı ve müşteri memnuniyetini amaçlar. KirpiDizayn olarak biz Müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına yaratıcı çözümler üretirken yorulmayan ve sıkılmayan, Yenilikçiliği ve sürekli gelişimi kendisine ilke edinmiş, Genç ve dinamik bir firmayız.. As authorized dealers of over 20 world-class brands, including B&B Italia, Living Divani, Tribù, and TechnoGym, we bring you the pinnacle of contemporary design, quality, and craftsmanship. Our curated selection ensures that you receive only the finest in modern furnishings and decor.

Name: Thorp
Description:
Founded in 1985 by Philippa Thorp, Thorp is a London-based design studio celebrated for creating beautifully considered, timeless spaces. Uniting architecture, interior design, landscape, and art curation under one roof, the studio’s work is defined by thoughtful detail, refined craftsmanship, and enduring quality.

Guided by the principles “Invest well, once,” “Living in the details,” and “Bespoke design,” Thorp has cultivated a quiet yet influential global reputation. Clients value the studio’s discretion, artistic integrity, and its ability to create homes that are not only elegant, but deeply personal.

Thorp offers a fully integrated and collaborative process, one that honours the client’s vision while offering expert guidance at every stage. The result is a space of uncompromising quality: a true reflection of the individual, designed to last a lifetime.

Name: Michele Marcon Designer
Description:
Welcome to our design studio founded by Michele Marcon in Asolo, Italy, where we specialize in both interior and industrial design for the furniture industry. What sets us apart is our deep understanding and comprehensive knowledge of every aspect of our industry. From the latest trends to the most advanced production techniques, we stay up to date with all the latest developments to deliver the best possible results to our clients.

Our team of experienced designers and craftsmen are passionate about creating beautiful, functional designs that exceed our clients' expectations. From the initial concept to the final product, we work closely with our clients to ensure that every detail is perfect. We believe that great design is not just about aesthetics, but also about functionality, durability, and sustainability.

Our expertise in both interior and product design allows us to provide a full range of services to our clients, from designing entire spaces - such as homes, contract spaces, exhibition stands and showrooms - to creating bespoke furniture pieces. Our clients appreciate our ability to combine style and functionality to create designs that are both beautiful and practical.

In short, our studio is a all-in-one design hub for all your interior and product design needs. Whether you're a furniture manufacturer looking to create a new line, or a homeowner looking to redesign your living space, we have the expertise and experience to help you achieve your goals.

Contact us to learn more about how we can help bring your vision to life.

Name: Uniscent
Description: Uniscent är en doftbyrå som startades för över tio år sedan med en tydlig vision. Att introducera professionell doftsättning för företag i Sverige och Norge. Inspirerade av internationella framgångar valde vi att fokusera helt på doft – inte som en detalj vid sidan av, utan som ett kraftfullt verktyg för att skapa upplevelser och stärka varumärken. Vår mission är att förvandla utrymmen och ge människor djupare och mer meningsfulla intryck genom att förmedla rätt doft vid rätt tidpunkt. Vi vet hur starkt dofter påverkar, både hur en plats upplevs och hur människor känner sig i den – och den insikten driver allt vi gör.

Rose Design’s goal is to offer interior spaces and experiences that embody the companies and individuals they represent.  

For the past decade, Rose Design has collaborated across the Bay Area and beyond to help growing businesses, startups, Fortune 500 Companies, and individuals translate their brand, culture, and vision into physical spaces. 

Offering remote and full-service design packages, Rose Design helps commercial and residential clients translate their vision and goals into physical space.

Name: Joy First Interiors
Description:
Joy First Interiors is the definition of skill, quickness, workmanship, and punctuality. Joy First Interiors was founded in 2020 under the visionary leadership of Mr. Arjun J. Joy First has always adhered to the ethics, moral values, and practical training advice given to us by Mr. S.K. Peter, MD&CEO of Ocean Lifespaces India Pvt Ltd. In just three years, Joy First Interiors has made a name for itself as a premier interior infrastructure provider with a focus on Design-Build Services. Our ISO 9001:2015 accreditation distinguishes us as industry leaders and is a badge of distinction.

Joy First Interiors is well-positioned to emerge as one of the few sincere businesses that can provide customers with a true one-stop shop for the full range of interior services, from planning to execution, including infrastructure, interiors, and maintenance.

Name: JIO SPACE INTERIOR DESIGN LLC

mais aussi pour les particuliers : salles de bain, mobilier-sur-mesure, dressing... 

Nous sommes situés à Saint-André-sur-Orne, près de Caen. Notre production est 100% française , dans notre atelier normand.

Name: D Elevates International
Description: At D Elevates International, we transform visions into reality through our comprehensive suite of services. From innovative interior design and meticulous architectural planning to top-notch construction, we bring creativity and precision to every project. Our advanced 3D rendering, immersive video walkthroughs, and cutting-edge virtual reality experiences allow you to visualize your project with stunning clarity. Whether it's residential, commercial, or industrial, we elevate your environment to new heights of innovation and elegance.

Name: GC Interiors Limited
Description: Established in 1978, GC Interiors is a family run business in Cumnor, near Oxford, with a wealth of knowledge and experience in bespoke kitchen and bathroom design and installation, and home renovations

Name: Blue Design Studio
Description: Blue Design Studio is a dynamic architecture and interior design firm, specializing in creating innovative and functional spaces. Our team of talented designers bring together creativity, expertise, and attention to detail to deliver bespoke solutions that exceed our clients' expectations. From concept to completion, we are committed to delivering exceptional design that is both beautiful and practical. Let us bring your vision to life and create a space that inspires and delights.

Name: Striv Designs
Description: Striv Designs’ expertise runs deep within the hospitality industry. We are proud to have years of experience in developing and designing multiple hotel properties and also taking ownership of our designs throughout the lifecycle of a property. This means living with and improving our designs with each property we touch. Our established relationship spans many different brand flags from Hilton, Marriott, IHG, and more. We bring you exceptional designs from the perspective of design, renovation, and sustainability that we’ve experienced as designers, and renovators.

Name: Studio Casco Interiors | Interieur Concept & Styling
Description:
INTERIEURONTWERP
Wij geloven dat elk project persoonlijk is. De connectie en verbinding met onze klant is essentieel voor het eindresultaat van het werk dat Studio Casco Interiors levert. We willen onze klanten begrijpen en een band met hen opbouwen. Deel uitmaken van hun doel en droom.

Een ontwerp ontstaat vanuit een verhaal, afhankelijk van wensen, verlangens en persoonlijke smaak.

Onze diensten lopen uiteen van concept tot realisatie. Wij begeleiden, inspireren en adviseren graag hierin.

Voor zakelijke klanten is het belangrijk dat de uitstraling van het interieur volledig past binnen de eigen bedrijfsvisie en huisstijl.

Wij richten ons op particulieren, projectontwikkelaars en bedrijven.

STYLING
Als onderdeel van het interieurconcept kan Studio Casco Interiors na de realisatie fase de volledige styling verzorgen. Hierdoor kan het concept tot leven worden gebracht.

Dit kan zowel voor residentiële als commerciële projecten.

PROJECTMANAGEMENT
Wij verzorgen projectbegeleiding op maat voor de realisatie van het interieurplan.
Wij kunnen het project zo plannen en begeleiding, zodat alles in een zo kort mogelijke termijn uitgevoerd kan worden. Nadat er definitieve keuzes zijn gemaakt, kunnen wij doorgaan met bestellen van materialen en meubels. Maar ook de communicatie, het inhuren van vakmensen, zoals bijvoorbeeld een schilder of elektriciën, kunnen wij verzorgen. 

Benieuwd wat Studio Casco Interiors voor jou kan betekenen?
Neem gerust contact met ons op of kijk op onze website https://studiocasco.com/

Name: Glow Interior Designs, LLC
Description: Glow is a Portland, OR Interior Design firm specializing in Senior Living, Multifamily, Residential and Aging in Place design. We offer full services from programming through FF&E Installations. Contact Us to learn more about partnering on a project!

Name: Kitch & Co Interiors
Description:
Kitch & Co. is an authentic interior design house. Our passion, creativity professional approach and reliability has enabled us to build a reputation as a trusted interior design partner.

We understand how much your project means to you. Our aim is to make the whole experience simple, seamless, stress-free – and above all, fun.

Name: KATJA HAUSER Interior & Lighting Design
Description:
KATJA HAUSER Interior & Lighting Designsteht für Innenarchitektur & Lichtplanung aus einer Hand. Die Ausarbeitung unter einem Dach gewährleistet die von Anfang aufeinander abgestimmte Konzeptausarbeitung sowie Planung.

In der Funktion als gestalterische Leitung wird Ihr Projekt von A bis Z begleitet und die korrekte Ausführung des geplanten Designs wird sichergestellt. Grosser Wert wird daher vor allem auf die fachübergreifende Koordination der verschiedensten Schnittstellen sowie die regelmässige Abstimmung mit dem Auftraggeber gelegt.

Projekte werden gesamtheitlich über alle Phasen hinweg betreut – von der Ausarbeitung der Idee über die detaillierte Planung bis hin zur Ausführung und Fertigstellung.

Das ausgearbeitete Design ist individuell auf den Auftraggeber bzw. seine Anforderungen zugeschnitten, wobei persönliche Aspekte (Werte, Lebenserfahrung, Reisen, etc.) aber auch die des Objekts (Lage, Ausrichtung, Tradition, etc.) im Prozess berücksichtigt und so zum einzigartigen Projekt werden.

Name: Halo Design Copenhagen
Description:
Halo Design is a Danish lighting manufacturer. we create functional lighting solutions based on almost 25 years of experience and an equal passion for technology, knowledge and aesthetics.

Halo Design was founded in 1994 by Michael Waltersdorff with the objective to create lamps based on modern technology and functional design solutions that everyone can relate to. Michael is still as entrepreneurial and fascinated by light now as he was back then, with a passion for innovative materials and lighting technologies.

Today, we are a fast-growing brand working with Danish and international designers to constantly evolve our collection to make it even more flexible and interesting for both private and public interior spaces.

At Halo Design, we create light!

Name: Fidelitus Projects
Description: Being in the field for almost a decade and having served 4000+ clients, Fidelitus Projects is a techno-commercial organization that is known to provide world-class services. Blending traditional industry knowledge with the latest market needs, we offer innovative solutions to not only take your business on a journey of success but also make it happen smoothly.

Name: ilicut
Description:
Depuis plus de 10 ans, les équipes ILICUT mettent à disposition de leurs clients leur savoir-faire dans la conception et la découpe de bois massifs pour les aider à réaliser tous leurs projets d'aménagements intérieurs sur-mesure.

Plan de travail de cuisine, bureau, dressing, table, bibliothèque, escaliers… nous intervenons sur tous types de projets pour proposer une alternative qualitative aux produits standardisés de la grande distribution, et une alternative économique à la prestation d’un artisan.

Que vous soyez professionnel, amateur de bricolage ou non, laissez libre court à votre créativité avec des matériaux de qualité découpés et usinés selon vos souhaits.

Créée en 2009 sous le nom La Boutique du Bois, la Société a évolué au fil des années pour vous proposer toujours plus de matériaux et plus de services à la carte pour vous simplifier la vie :

•    Nos panneaux sont entièrement personnalisables : forme, dimensions, découpes internes et externes, usinages des bords, application d’un produit de finition…
•    Notre configurateur en ligne vous permet de maîtriser la conception de votre projet, notre bureau d’étude vous accompagne dans vos projets les plus complexes
•    Tous vos produits vous sont livrés à domicile en quelques jours.

ILICUT, dont le site de production est situé en Bourgogne, propose aujourd’hui ses produits dans de nombreux pays européens : France, Monaco, Allemagne, Belgique, Luxembourg, Pays Bas, Autriche, Italie, Espagne, Portugal.

Soucieux de son impact sur l’environnement, ilicut privilégie les circuits courts et transforme des matériaux de qualité, neutres en carbone et issus de forêts gérées de façon responsable. Ilicut dispose des certifications FSC et PEFC. Engagés pour la préservation des ressources naturelles, nous collaborons avec Reforest’Action, un programme permettant d’œuvrer à la restauration des forêts en France et dans le monde.

Name: DESIRIN PROJECTS
Description:
Desirin Projects is a premier interior design company dedicated to transforming spaces into inspiring environments. With a meticulous eye for detail and a passion for innovation, we specialize in creating bespoke designs that cater to the unique tastes and needs of our clients.

At Desirin Projects, we believe that every space has a story to tell. Our talented team of designers, architects, and project managers work collaboratively to bring your vision to life, ensuring each project is a seamless blend of functionality, aesthetics, and personal style. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and our ability to exceed expectations. By staying ahead of industry trends and incorporating the latest technologies and materials, we ensure that our designs are not only timeless but also sustainable and efficient.

Our mission is to enhance the way people live, work, and interact within their spaces. We invite you to explore our portfolio and discover how Desirin Projects can transform your environment into a masterpiece of design.

Connect with us today and let’s embark on a journey to create extraordinary spaces together.

Desirin Projects – Reimagining Spaces, Redefining Possibilities.
