Name: Usdesign İç Mimarlık
Description:
2015 senesinde İç Mimar Alp Usluduran tarafından kurulan Usdesign İç Mimarlık Ofisi; mekan tasarımı, mimari projelendirme, mobilya tasarımı ve anahtar teslim uygulama alanlarında müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamaktadır. Her projeyi kendi bağlamı içinde ele alan ve o bağlama değer katacak, yenilikçi, karşılanabilir ve fonksiyonel iç mimari çözümlemeler getirmeyi hedefleyen ofisimiz; kurumsal ve ticari alanlar, ofis projeleri, konut projeleri gibi çeşitli tür ve ölçeklerde projeler gerçekleştirmektedir.

Usdesign İç Mimarlık ofisi; yer aldığı projelerde müşterisinin, mekanın ve kullanıcının ihtiyaçlarını özümseyerek, bir terzi edasında kişiye özel olarak çalışır. Ofisimiz kurumsal ve ticari projelerde bir partner gibi iş geliştirici çözümler sunarken, konut projelerinde empati yaparak tasarlanan mekanın kullanıcı ile özdeşleşmesini sağlar. Sahip olduğumuz dinamik ve genç ekibimizle sorumluluğunu aldığımız her projeyi idealist bir yaklaşımla el alırız.

Avant-garde, influential, innovative and progressive, The Kan Kollection  is introducing a modern approach to FF&E design specification process servicing the A&D community throughout Florida, the Carribean & nationwide for cruise.

Name: Pooja Arts
Description:
A young man left his impoverished village in Uttar Pradesh to pursue a dream of prosperity: to build a a life for himself and his family. The dream got him to Pune. A few years of struggle and hardship ensued, and after a couple of failed business attempts, he made it in the contracting business. That was about 35 years ago. 

He did not possess the necessary qualifications or valuable experience for the job, but he had a vision, a sense of purpose, and an unwavering commitment to discipline. 

He discovered that painting contracting was about adding beauty to every space through masterful craftsmanship and high-quality materials. In addition, he chose to add value by incorporating integrity and sincerity into every project. Over the years, we have retained this accession. Not just retained, we thrive on it.

Our strength lies in our uncompromising commitment to quality materials, craftsmanship and integrity. Each project is an opportunity to support our clients’ goals and serve the community. From energising workspaces with colour, laminates and coats to now preserving and restoring assets from the hazards of waterproofing, Pooja Arts has come a long way.

Following the footsteps of our founder, we continue to prioritise relationships above all else. We believe in the art of our work and the science that goes with it. We consistently invest in new techniques, materials, and people training to enhance our capabilities. We uphold our project commitments and ensure quality work.

As we look to the future, Pooja Arts remains dedicated to our foundational mission: enriching relationships and environments through superior painting, lamination, and coating services. And now, waterproofing!
Pooja Arts. Delivering spaces that finish with finesse.

Name: Projeto & Cia
Description:
A Projeto & Companhia está no mercado desde 1997, mas nós Paloma e Paola, atuamos na empresa desde 2020, criando projetos personalizados para cada cliente e reformando seus apartamentos, entregando 100% completos de acordo com o projeto aprovado.

Agora vamos conhecer melhor as irmãs, Paola é formada em engenharia civil na Anhembi Morumbi com pós graduação em gestão de obras e a Paloma é formada em design de interiores e feng shui no SENAC e diversos cursos de especializações em projetos e detalhamentos.

As irmãs prezam por atendimentos personalizados, cada projeto é único, e totalmente planejado para ter a sua identidade e essência. Contamos também, com a ajuda de uma equipe preparada e multidisciplinar.
Somos especializadas em apartamentos na planta, criamos seu projeto ainda em fase de obras, para assim que receber as chaves começar a reformar e seguindo todo o cronograma a fim de que possam se mudar o quanto antes, afinal, já foram anos de espera e a ansiedade bate forte, não é mesmo?

Temos nossos profissionais super capacitados que nos ajudam a realizar o sonho do seu cliete: Azulejista, pintor, gesseiro, encanador, eletricista, marceneiro, marmorista, tapeceiro, vidraceiro e técnico em ar condicionado.

Name: Michetti Project&Design
Description: Da oltre 70 anni, Michetti Project&Design è un punto di riferimento nel settore dell'arredamento e del design d'interni. Il nostro negozio offre una selezione curata dei migliori brand Made in Italy, garantendo qualità e stile in ogni dettaglio. Affianchiamo architetti e imprese edili con un servizio di progettazione su misura, trasformando idee in spazi eleganti e funzionali. La nostra esperienza decennale ci permette di creare soluzioni personalizzate che soddisfano le esigenze dei nostri clienti, combinando tradizione e innovazione.

Name: Lumstone
Description:
Bienvenido a la experiencia de la nueva colección de lámparas Lumstone! Nuestro producto representa la vanguardia en diseño, fusionando elementos naturales con la tecnología más avanzada. Estás a punto de disfrutar de una sofisticada lámpara elaborada con materiales únicos y con un toque artesanal.

Características Principales:

La Lámpara Lumstone es una pieza de iluminación exquisita, creada con ónix macizo, un mineral de la familia del cuarzo de la más alta calidad. Cada lámpara es una obra maestra única, con un patrón de vetas naturales y diversas tonalidades miel que le otorgan carácter y elegancia. El cubo de ónix se encuentra en una base de madera nogal, logrando una fusión perfecta entre elementos naturales. La luz LED interior resalta la belleza del ónix, y su sistema eléctrico con baterías recargables permite un resplandor duradero y sostenible.

Name: Deroanne Office Design
Description:
Basée à Liège, Deroanne Office Design est une entreprise familiale qui, depuis plus de 27 ans, est spécialisée dans le mobilier de bureau et le mobilier design. Au fil des années, nous avons appris à comprendre et à répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients, que ce soit pour des espaces professionnels ou privés.

Notre philosophie est simple : créer des environnements où le bien-être, la créativité et la productivité peuvent cohabiter. Name: MTMDESIGN
Description:

MTMDESIGN is specialized in Food & Beverage and hospitality projects, but we also love to have fun with challenges in other areas of commercial design. We craft every project as a unique narrative: each client, brief and location deserve different creative solutions. Our studio engages with the final user, crafting environments and emotional experiences with a our unique vision. MTMDESIGN also have an extensive network of partners that can provide architectural, branding and lighting design services.

Name: Petra Revest Spain
Description:
Petra Revest Spain 
Es una empresa especializada en la producción semi artesanal de revestimientos de hormigón de alta calidad, somos una empresa con orígen en Palotina (Brasil) y actualmente está en proceso de expansión en europa teniendo su sede en Valencia (España). Nuestros revestimientos están diseñados para dar a los espacios arquitectónicos un protagonismo muy  especial, siendo utilizados por los profesionales para mejorar la calidad de sus proyectos. Nuestras piezas suman una mayor experiencia del espacio interior o exterior para el usuario, jugando con la manipulación del volumen y el tratamiento de superficies. La decoración geométrica se basa, principalmente, en el uso de elementos para embellecer espacios. Es una decoración que no quiere pasar desapercibida y  capta todas las atenciones, convierte los espacios en una decoración alegre y dinámica que proporciona un efecto único que no se conseguiría con otro tipo de materiales. Desde Petra Revest sabemos lo importante que es la calidad en los materiales, su durabilidad y la eficiencia estética en cada proyecto decorativo, por ello nuestro objetivo es ofrecer un producto que cumpla y supere las espectativas más exigentes de nuestros clientes, de ahí que nuestros procesos de fabricación manual y nuestro control de calidad asegura la máxima calidad de cada pieza, además ponemos a disposición de nuestros clientes toda nuestra experiencia, asesorandoles para que sus proyectos cumplan perfectamente sus objetivos y aporten un gran valor añadido. Todo esto se traduce en nuestros principales valores.
• Perseverancia en nuestros objetivos 
• Entusiasmo en cada pieza 
• Trabajo en equipo 
• Respetable con el medio ambiente 
• Amor por lo que hacemos

Name: uppercase
Description:
Thoughtful interiors that resonate at every scale.

Our goal is always for our clients and partners to say “they get it”. We take what we do very seriously without taking ourselves too seriously.

uppercase represents the idea that it is time to capitalize the “I” in interiors.

Name: Leena Interior Design Studio (LIDS)
Description:
Singapore-based boutique design firm, LEENA INTERIOR DESIGN STUDIO (LIDS), founded by Leena Goh in 2021, has quickly made a name for itself in the realm of luxury residential and hospitality design. With a strong emphasis on authenticity and a dedication to creating spaces that tell a unique story, the studio has garnered a reputation for its exceptional design approach.
Each project undertaken by the studio is approached with a fresh perspective, ensuring that every space receives its own distinct identity and narrative. The studio believes in the power of collaboration, working closely with clients, craftsmen, and suppliers to gain a deep understanding of materials, learn traditional crafting methodologies, and leverage technological advancements. This collective knowledge is then applied in the most creative and appropriate manner to breathe life into the design.
One of the distinguishing factors of LIDS is its unwavering focus on authenticity. The team believes that every space should have its own unique character and narrative, reflecting the client’s personality and aspirations. By incorporating elements that are true to the client’s story, the studio creates interiors that resonate deeply and evoke a sense of emotional connection. 
As the studio continues to grow, LIDS remains dedicated to pushing boundaries and seeking new design horizons. By blending artistry, craftsmanship, and technology, the studio aims to deliver unparalleled design experiences for its clients. With a passion for creating interiors that transcend the ordinary and capture the essence of each unique story, LEENA INTERIOR DESIGN STUDIO is poised to leave an indelible mark on the luxury interior design landscape.

Description:
We specialize in bespoke residential projects ranging from turnkey solutions for new homes to alterations and renovations to existing ones. Our key work area is Bangalore, but we undertake projects remotely as well.

Design is a medium of expression. The essence of design is about people and how they live. It is about what makes for an attractive, utilitarian and meaningful environment, and not about trends. We believe the best homes have something to say about the people who live in them.

We believe that good design comes for building relationships and a keen understanding of the family’s needs. We work closely with both clients and artisans to customise, create and perfect the best possible solutions for their home.

Name: IIDA Oregon Chapter
Description:
The International Interior Design Association (IIDA) is the global professional membership association for commercial interior design—uniting designers, industry partners, educators, students, firms, and clients.

The IIDA Oregon Chapter represents a vibrant community of nearly 300 members across the state. Through a robust calendar of events, programs, and advocacy initiatives, we foster connection, celebrate design excellence, and create opportunities for professional growth. At the heart of our work is a commitment to cultivating belonging—ensuring that every voice in Oregon’s design community is seen, valued, and empowered.

Our Mission
Connecting our design community • Amplifying our impact • Elevating the profession

We strengthen the interior design profession by building community, advancing recognition, and supporting career development. We champion the critical role of interior design in shaping healthy, safe, and inspiring environments that enhance the lives of individuals and communities alike.

Name: The Design Compound
Description:
Compound1
(Verb)
to put together (parts) to form a whole.

Compound2
(Noun)
an enclosure, having a shared or associated purpose.

”Compound” is a playful homograph to suggest a process of design that borrows from both of its meanings. It is an alchemy of client’s needs, expectations, and their story while exploring narratives in a metaphorical compound. This derives personalized concepts that are molded into stunning spaces that speak deeper than its aesthetic.

The studio’s focus remains in crafting spaces with a personality. Evocative designs that are of far greater value than passing trends that lose its luster over time. The Design Compound strives for solutions that are functional, unique, and timeless.

Name: Facau
Description:
We are specialized in consultancy, design and implementation of "turnkey" business environments aimed to enhance the well-being of individuals in the workplace and improve overall company performance.
Operating in this field since 1938, in response to market evolution, we have developed a comprehensive service strategy for businesses. We adopt a general contractor approach providing the client with a single point of contract, ensuring adherence to budget , timelines, and quality of the expected result.
Operating through our proprietary method, iOlab, projects always start with a functional consultation to define the client's objectives and identify the best paths to achieve them.
To the greater advantage of the client we have also created the SMART approach, a commitment-free process aimed at providing in-depth consultation, followed by a complete project proposal with specifications and cost estimates for implementation.
We are certified in compliance with the UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 standard and we operate with a focus on sustainability, ethics, transparency and correctness in relationships between all players in the supply chain.

Architects and developers choose KINDLY for our ability to bridge vision with execution, translating design intent into calm, meaningful spaces that feel both beautifully resolved and deeply personal to the eventual homeowner.

Name: OKER&GOUD - interieurarchitectuur, meer dan mooi
Description:
Zoek je een expert in renovatie? Bij OKER&GOUD ligt de focus op renovatieprojecten waarbij de functies en indeling van ruimtes nog niet optimaal zijn. Soms zijn ruimtes te klein, ongezellig of ontbreekt het aan een logische indeling die aansluit bij de wensen van de opdrachtgever.

OKER&GOUD richt zich vooral op ingrijpende verbouwingen. Maar ontwerpt daarnaast ook op kleinere schaal maatwerk dat perfect past bij een ruimte. Ook hier staan functionaliteit en het stimuleren van goede uitvoering centraal. Elk ontwerp is tot in detail uniek.

Al jaren begeleid ik gezinnen om hun woning te optimaliseren tot een écht thuis. Geen onrealistische tv-transformaties, maar haalbare, slimme oplossingen afgestemd op jullie situatie en budget. Misschien kijk je wel eens naar woonprogramma’s zoals “Kopen zonder Kijken” of “Van Woonvilla naar Droomvilla”. Deze programma’s geven slechts een glimp van de mogelijkheden die er zijn wanneer je de juiste deskundige hulp inschakelt.

Als ervaren interieurarchitect en verbouwadviseur begeleid ik gezinnen stap voor stap:
- We kijken naar de mogelijkheden binnen je huidige woning.
- Of ontdekken samen een verborgen parel op de woningmarkt.
- Je krijgt een persoonlijk en realistisch verbouwplan.
- Ik begeleid van ontwerp tot aan de oplevering.
Samen zorgen we ervoor dat jullie gezin kan wonen, leven en groeien in een huis dat klopt, nu én later.

Name: Grandinetti srl
Description:
Grandinetti began in San Severino Marche, in centre of Italy, in the first years of the twentieh century. The surrounding area, rich in raw materials suitable for the production of marble chip tiles, and the historical period, which saw Art Nouveau and “Liberty” style, contributed to the creation of one of the most prestigious plants in Italy for the production of marble chip tiles.
Grandinetti emerged from the transformation of an old kiln (Testi), and went on to grow and develop within the context of the ferment of new trends at the beginning of the 1900s.
Over the years, Grandinetti has been able to establish itself as a leader in the sector thanks to its wise production decisions which have always given precedence to craftsmanship and hand-made production.
This attentive procedure also involves the use of selected, natural materials, the masterly care of every creation, a taste for beauty that goes beyond a steadfast faith in the timeless classical canons. From all this flows the success of a company that has more than one century of experience.
Today, Grandinetti marble chip composites are the expression and symbol of elegance, of refinement, of imagination and of the virtuosity of a craftsmanship which is brimming with experience.

Vi bygger ikke bare et nytt selskap – vi former et nytt rammeverk for hvordan mennesker, teknologi og organisasjon kan spille sammen.

De første månedene brukes til å utvikle modeller, prosesser og partnerskap som legger grunnlaget for en fremtidig virksomhet med høy presisjon og sterk verdiskaping.
Fokuset ligger på å forene teknologisk innsikt, designforståelse og kulturforankring – og å etablere en struktur som er like menneskelig som den er digital.

Vi kommuniserer bevisst lite om detaljer og produkter i denne fasen, men deler gjerne litt av tankesettet bak: Vi tror på et arbeidsliv der teknologi og organisasjonskultur balanserer hverandre, der effektivitet og mening går hånd i hånd, og der løsninger ikke bare fungerer – men også berører og varer.

Vår erfaring fra ledelse, innovasjon og transformasjon i den norske innredningsbransjen gir oss et solid fundament – og et klart mål: å skape en virksomhet som kombinerer kreativitet, innsikt og bærekraft i én samlet bevegelse.

Over de kommende månedene vil vi gradvis åpne døren for nye mennesker, samarbeidspartnere og leverandører som deler denne visjonen.
Hvis du er nysgjerrig på reisen, kan du følge oss her – det er her den tar form, steg for steg.

Studio Haak – med mennesket i sentrum og fremtiden i fokus.

Name: BOETHIC
Description:
L’origine de BOETHIC ? 

Ma passion pour l’upcycling & l’artisanat…

                                  +

… Une quête de justice écologique et sociale 


        Nous sommes convaincus qu’il est possible d’avoir une décoration d’intérieur éthique, écologique, saine, personnelle et abordable… Et nous avons à cœur de relever ce défi


                    Notre Mission ?

Vous guider, vous inspirer et vous proposer une décoration durable et unique 


              Nos pépites BOETHIC ?

 un bel objet artisanal : fabriqué en petites quantités

 composé de matériaux certifiés ecoresponsables : naturels et recyclables

 made in pas loin : made in France, made in Europe, made in Morocco

 dans des conditions de travail respectueuses

 à un prix équitable pour vous, nous, nos partenaires et nos artisans

Soigneusement sélectionnées, nos pépites éthiques sont pensées et fabriquées par de talentueux artisans en France, en Europe et en Méditerranée, avec qui nous partageons les mêmes valeurs écologiques et sociales


Le savoir-faire des artisans est précieux… Nous les soutenons.
Les ressources naturelles de la planète Terre sont vitales… Nous les préservons. 
Votre bien-être est essentiel… Nous en prenons soin.

Notre santé, la biodiversité, les artisans et nos enfants nous disent merci… 

Byebye fast-deco, exploitation humaine, destruction de l’environnement et toxicité de l’air de nos intérieurs. 

Oui à une décoration qui fait du bien au vivant et à nous.

                  Vive le slow design ! 
                 Vive la déco durable !


Ps : 

Produisons et consommons moins mais mieux. Demain se construit aujourd’hui... 

Alors, prod'acteurs & consom'acteurs... Allons-y ! 

La transition écologique, climatique, sociale & donc économique n'attend pas 



Cécile Dorsemaine

Name: CUBIK³ Innenarchitekten GmbH
Description: Since 2000 Cubik³ had been able to realize a variety of interior design projects of all kinds.  Together with our customers and our fantastic team, we develop holistic concepts and yet distinctive. Name: Laura Brophy Interiors
Description:
At Laura Brophy Interiors, design is more than aesthetics—it’s the art of intentional living. Based in Newport Beach, California, the studio is recognized for creating custom environments that balance refined luxury with livable ease. Each project is grounded in a nuanced understanding of how people feel in a space—how light moves, how textures engage the senses, and how thoughtful design can shape everyday rituals.

Laura Brophy’s design philosophy is rooted in the belief that well-designed spaces should be both soul-stirring and highly functional. With a focus on organic materials, subtle tonal palettes, and a quiet sense of luxury, the studio’s work reflects a distinctly California point of view—warm, elevated, and quietly confident. Her interiors are not over-styled or trend-driven; they’re timeless, tailored, and deeply personal.

The firm’s portfolio includes high-end residences, curated commercial environments, and boutique hospitality spaces, all unified by a disciplined design process that honors architecture, context, and client lifestyle. Whether collaborating with architects and builders from the earliest conceptual stages or integrating seamlessly into a larger project team, Laura Brophy Interiors brings clarity, precision, and creativity to every engagement.

The firm’s work has garnered notable recognition, with features on the covers of Luxe Interiors + Design and Modern Luxury magazines, as well as in numerous other design and real estate publications. In 2025, Modern Luxury Interiors honored Laura Brophy Interiors as the Best Organic Modern Design Firm in California—further cementing the studio’s reputation for crafting spaces that are as elevated as they are livable.

Name: AMID
Description:
AMID specializes in luxury interiors, furniture, wardrobe, millwork, lighting, decor and turnkey projects. At Amid, we believe that design is not just about walls, table and chairs- it’s about the families that live and grow in beautiful homes. With the mission to ensure that every product is created to enhance and transform the lives of our client we have taken customization one step further to personalization- highlighting the human side of design and truly incorporating the needs and desires of our clients into their homes.
We don’t only provide bespoke customised and immaculate luxury designs, but also end to end solutions from designing to installation as a whole. This helps us to ensure that the aesthetics and the functionality of these spaces go hand in hand and compliments the specific needs of each client .  Our team can get your spaces up and running by offering a wide range of services ranging from creative interior styling, customised detailing of-  kitchen, furniture and wardrobes for those who love to add personal touches to their special spaces to providing the right kind of decor to add final touches to these spaces.

Name: U Interior Design
Description:
En U Interior Design creamos o transformamos espacios con identidad.

Nuestro equipo de expertos en el sector hotelero cuenta con una amplia experiencia en el desarrollo de exclusivos proyectos integrales de decoración e interiorismo de hoteles, restaurantes y spas.

Trabajamos desde cero con independencia y máxima confidencialidad, aunque también nos adaptamos a proyectos ya establecidos.

Nuestros servicios van desde el desarrollo de proyectos de interiorismo completos incluyendo todas sus fases, pasando por servicios de consultoría de interiorismo, así como la redacción de manuales de diseño y construcción.

Durante nuestra trayectoria, hemos realizado el rediseño de espacios y la creación de nuevas identidades para marcas en España, Europa y LATAM, pero estamos abiertos a todo el mundo.

Entre nuestros clientes se encuentran TRS, BLESS Hotels, Only You Hotels, Ayre Hoteles, Hard Rock, Palladium Hotels, Grand Palladium Hotels & Resorts, Fiesta Hotels & Resorts y Ushuaïa.

Nos apasiona nuestro trabajo, y te ayudamos a desarrollar tu propia identidad de marca a través de tus espacios aportando ideas, soluciones y alternativas basadas en nuestro expertise.

Name: 31 Grammes Studio
Description:
31 grammes c’est le poids d’une feuille A3. 
Ce papier qui, même à l’heure du tout numérique, est capable de créer une émotion hors du commun. 

Chez 31 grammes Studio nous croyons que tout commence ici, sur ce rectangle de 29,7 sur 42cm. Cette feuille de papier qui porte le poids de vos idées qui rencontrent les nôtres. Là où les projets naissent, où ratures et gribouillis révèlent leurs potentiels pendant que la créativité s’exprime sans limite. 31 grammes qui permettent de passer de l’idée au concret. Là où, sur un coin de table, des marques naissent et des espaces prennent vie.  

Ici, chaque projet est une nouvelle page blanche que nous prenons plaisir à remplir. Nous combinons nos expertises en design d’espaces, branding et communication pour donner du poids à vos idées – bien plus que 31 grammes.

Name: Studio Trataka
Description:
"Design is not a thing to be done but a way of living."
Sustainable, innovative, and cutting-edge; Studio Trataka is a lifestyle design house based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Shiv Sharma and Manya Pandit are the creative minds behind the brand, redefining luxury with a highly curated vision. The founder's accomplishments include years of expertise and insight into the design industry to bring forth a promising partnership.
At Studio Trataka, we say this with conviction that channeling our collective positive energies into building our products, encourages us to forge an impeccable collection that exudes elegance. "Trataka" is a method of meditation that embodies the essence of our brand.
The House accommodates a serene mix of products concerning interior, spaces, lifestyle accessories, home decor, furniture, lighting, installations, bespoke furniture, and much more catering to the 21st-century clientele. 
India is a country that harbours a diverse group of cultures, traditions, and people. We believe that design should be an amalgamation of our historical artisanal skills to preserve our traditional craft forms and modern technology. The culmination of which is a unique blend of classical and contemporary India.
At Trataka, we promote and support the livelihood of the artisans by incorporating the traditional craft practices passed down from generation to generation into our design language. The artisans are the backbone of our establishment, and their extensive knowledge and exceptional craftsmanship aid in achieving unsurpassed excellence.

Name: Assure Interiors
Description:
Assure Interiors is a Miami-based practice specializing in residential projects across the US and the Caribbean region.  Established by Carola Pimentel in 2000, the studio bridges modern and timeless design delivering highly personal interiors. Assure‘s visual language expressed through well-considered interior architecture, natural materials and subtle color schemes incorporates bespoke elements with contemporary art and collectible design.

The studio’s international clientele includes many repeat clients and often younger generations of one family. Clients who come mostly via word of mouth, appreciate Assure’s discretion and cultural sensitivity.

Assure’s approach to design often channels the lifestyle of places such as Florida, California and especially Rio, Sao Paolo and Angra dos Reis in Brazil subtly blending indoors and outdoors.  Structured planning, considered lighting, and special finishes create a finely detailed envelope for decoration.  Known for their fresh and respectful approach to historical buildings the practice is regularly commissioned to create comfortable and clearly resolved interiors in buildings by some of the world’s top architects ranging from Rem Koolhaas and OMA to Foster + Partners.

Every project we undertake is supported by a robust network of collaborators, including consultants, engineers, contractors, quantity surveyors, and project managers. This integrated ecosystem allows us to deliver comprehensive solutions that align with operational goals, aesthetic vision, and long-term value.

Whether working on a single space or a multi-phase development, we bring clarity, precision, and creativity to every stage—from concept to completion. Description:

RS AGENCEMENT fait partie d’un réseau solide de professionnels du bâtiment. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des architectes, des architectes d’intérieurs ou des entreprises générales. Description: Kaen Studio is a Dubai-based interior design practice specializing in immersive, bespoke interiors for residences, boutique hotels, cafés, creative workspaces, and high-end retail. Our designs are rooted in storytelling, materiality, and spatial intelligence.

Name: McCabe By Design
Description:
Based on Bainbridge Island, Washington, McCabe By Design is a full-service residential interior design and specification firm specializing in transforming homes into beautiful and highly functional spaces. Led by Principal Designer Molly McCabe—an AKBD, CAPS, CGP, and CLIPP-certified professional—the firm integrates sustainable practices, universal design principles, and wellness-focused strategies to create environments that support clients' lifestyles today and into the future.

With over two decades of design and construction experience, McCabe By Design offers a comprehensive suite of services, including kitchen and bath design, whole-home renovation designs, product specification including furnishings and decor, space planning, and detailed design documentation. Their collaborative approach ensures that each project is tailored to the client's needs, promoting accessibility, sustainability, and aesthetic harmony.

Recognized for excellence in design and innovation, McCabe By Design has been featured in numerous publications, including Forbes, Kitchen & Bath Business, WestSound Magazine, and more. The firm is committed to creating spaces that enhance well-being, functionality, and overall quality of life for its clients.

Name: èdoc architects
Description:
èdoc architects is an Italian architecture and interior design studio founded in 2017 by architects Hande Yildiz Dottorini and Federico Dottorini, a multidisciplinary atelier of creative research focused on high-end Hospitality - SPA & Wellness - Residential Design
A young and dynamic practice unifies two distinct training and professional paths, which complement each other; makes heterogeneity and the exchange of ideas, collaborations and comparison, an indispensable base of work to face the challenges of an increasingly specialized world.
At èdoc architects we base our philosophy on an artisan way of working and by connecting deeply with the nature of the project to be realized.

Our work aims to express a product of quality and authencity, whose characteristics are always connected to the natural environment and to the human factors that determine the context.

Name: Studio Athena Calderone
Description:
Using curiosity as a guiding principle, designer Athena Calderone seeks to amplify the quiet connectivity between objects to craft her visual chemistry. This creative doctrine is at the essence of Athena’s multidisciplinary approach that spans interior design and product development. Studio Athena Calderone is built upon the ethos that every project embraces the unexpected, replacing symmetry with spontaneous opposition to curate elevated, nuanced, and soulful homes. Athena’s process is defined by an innate yearning for emotion and experimentation, seeking both tension and restraint to bring the inarticulate to life. By engaging in this hidden dialogue, Studio Athena Calderone projects offer a unique lens on the aesthetic world.
Athena is the best-selling author of design tome, Live Beautiful which has sold over 250K copies, holding the position of the #1 décor book on Amazon for years after its launch. Her podcast, More Than One Thing, focuses on multi-hyphenate talents like herself whose creative interests have led them on a nonlinear career path. Athena has designed collections for Beni Rugs and Crate & Barrel. Athena Calderone is also the founder of EyeSwoon, an editorially-driven, shoppable platform that offers her original and curated pieces for the home.
Athena’s work has been featured in Vogue, Architectural Digest, The New York Times, Wall Street Journal, Vanity Fair, Harper’s Bazaar, InStyle, Elle Décor, and New York Magazine. As an internationally recognized designer, Athena has graced the covers of Vogue Living, AD Spain, and Living Etc.

Transformando espaços em ambientes -

Name: DekorAI - Home Improvement & Inspiration powered by AI
Description:
DekorAI, un motor de inteligencia artificial diseñado para ayudarte a diseñar tu hogar con estilo y elegancia.
Este revolucionario motor de IA utiliza algoritmos avanzados para analizar tus preferencias de diseño y estilo y recomendarte las mejores opciones para cada habitación de tu casa. Ya sea que estés buscando una decoración minimalista y moderna o un estilo más clásico y acogedor, DekorAI te ayudará a encontrar los productos de decoración perfectos para tu hogar.
No solo eso, la IA también puede ayudarte a ahorrar dinero en tus proyectos de decoración. Puede identificar las mejores ofertas y promociones en línea, así como recomendarte opciones económicas que se ajusten a tus gustos y presupuesto.
Además, esta herramienta también será de gran utilidad para los retailers que venden productos de decoración de interiores, ya que podrán personalizar su oferta en función de los gustos y preferencias de sus clientes y así brindar una experiencia de compra más satisfactoria y personalizada.
La inteligencia artificial puede ayudar a mejorar las ventas de las marcas de home improvement de varias maneras:

Análisis de datos: La IA puede analizar grandes cantidades de datos sobre los clientes y su comportamiento de compra para identificar patrones y tendencias. Esto puede ayudar a las marcas a mejorar sus estrategias de marketing y aumentar las ventas.

Personalización de la experiencia de compra: La IA puede utilizarse para personalizar la experiencia de compra de los clientes en línea y en la tienda. Por ejemplo, los recomendadores basados en IA pueden sugerir productos relevantes y aumentar la probabilidad de que los clientes realicen una compra.
Predicción de la demanda: La IA puede utilizarse para predecir la demanda de los productos y ajustar la producción y el inventario en consecuencia. Esto puede ayudar a las marcas a evitar los desequilibrios y a maximizar las ventas.

Name: Joolsdesign Interieurprojecten
Description:
Wij ontwerpen functionele en creatieve interieurs! Joolsdesign verzorgt de totale verbouwing en inrichting van jouw kantoor, school of woning. Wij maken een outside the box interieurontwerp op maat en zorgen voor professionele begeleiding bij de realisatie hiervan. 
Dit doen we aan de hand van de drie O’s: Ontdekken, Ontwerpen en Ontzorgen. Door dit concept weet jij als opdrachtgever altijd vooraf waar je aan toe bent. 

1. Ontdekken
> Jij vertelt ons jouw wensen en eisen voor jouw nieuwe interieur, zoals een nieuwe bedrijfsinrichting of indeling van jullie leerplein. 
> Aan de hand van bijv. een moodboard op Pinterest bepalen we de gewenste stijl en sfeer.
> Wij maken een duidelijk plan van aanpak, zodat jij weet wat je kunt verwachten.

2. Ontwerpen
> Joolsdesign maakt inspirerende 3D-designs vanaf het eerste schetsontwerp. 
> Elk interieurontwerp dat wij maken is een maatwerkoplossing, toegespitst op jou, jullie kantoor of jullie schoolinrichting. 
> Het interieurdesign en de maatwerkmeubels resulteren in een creatief, verrassend maar altijd functioneel interieurontwerp. Jullie moeten er immers vooral fijn kunnen werken of wonen.

3. Ontzorgen
> De realisatie en projectbegeleiding van het nieuwe interieurproject kunnen wij jullie volledig uit handen nemen.
> We maken een duidelijke planning, begroting en regelen alles wat nodig is om de verbouwing van jullie kantoor of woning, of jullie projectinrichting te realiseren.

Joolsdesign heeft veel kennis en ervaring op het gebied van de inrichting van kantoren, scholen en zorgorganisaties.

Name: Sora Décoration 86
Description:
"Pourquoi Sora ?
 Sora est un prénom mixte japonais signifiant : « oiseau qui prend son envol ».  Cette symbolique très parlante pour Moi L’oiseau étant un symbole de d’amitié et réussite. A ce jour , à travers Sora je prend mon envole. 
Vous pouvez constater que Sora décoration a choisi des couleurs particulières. Le Nude  symbole sérénité, de délicatesse et d'élégance.  Le Beige représente  la chaleur humaine et spontanéité et le noir la sobriété et la modernité.
Sora est aussi une entreprise qui se veut être éco-responsable !"

Name: Pavia & Pavia International Design
Description:
The history of Pavia & Pavia International Design is rooted in the craftsmanship of luxury furniture, spanning over three generations. In 1987, family members Vincenzo, Elisabetta, and Fabrizio laid the foundations for a new venture by establishing Pavia & Pavia International Design. Their primary goal was to complement the family’s extensive experience in furniture design and production with a showroom and a design studio led by architect Vincenzo Pavia. Today, the integration of these core activities allows the company to support clients throughout the entire process, from design to installation, offering a high-quality, turnkey service.

The creation of tailor-made projects is an intrinsic feature of Pavia & Pavia International Design’s approach. Our culture of craftsmanship, deep knowledge of materials, and constant dialogue with clients contribute to the production of technically and aesthetically unique pieces.

With over 30 years of experience, Pavia & Pavia International Design has assembled an exceptional team of professionals, including architects, designers, artisans, and carpenters who collaborate to deliver outstanding projects.

In recent years, the company has expanded beyond European borders, reaching renowned cities such as Tel Aviv, New York, and Nassau. Today, the Pavia & Pavia style represents excellence in Italian design and is recognized as a brand synonymous with exceptional quality.

Name: Aroma Interior
Description:
Aroma Interior is a leading interior and architectural design firm based in Jaipur, specializing in budget-friendly home renovations, office designs and custom interior solutions. We create luxury interiors for residential and commercial spaces, tailored to meet your specific needs while ensuring affordability and style.

Our services include home remodeling, custom home design, kitchen & bathroom renovations and affordable office space planning. We also offer architectural design and 3D architectural rendering to help clients visualize their projects before construction begins, ensuring a seamless and precise design process.

At Aroma Interior, we take pride in delivering personalized services that blend modern trends with Jaipur's rich cultural heritage, offering unique and timeless designs. We handle every aspect of the design process, from space planning and material selection to color consultation and furniture sourcing, ensuring every detail is managed with care. Our goal is to create spaces that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also functional and comfortable.

Whether you’re looking to renovate your home, build a custom house, or design a modern office, we work closely with our clients to deliver tailored solutions that fit both their design aspirations and financial goals. Our team of experienced designers and architects ensures that your vision comes to life while staying on budget and on time.

Our affordable yet high-quality interior and architectural services have made us a trusted name in the industry. We believe that great design doesn’t have to be expensive—it just has to be smart.

For those searching for affordable home renovations, budget-friendly office design or custom architectural solutions in Jaipur, Aroma Interior is your trusted partner for transforming your space into something extraordinary.

Name: Mumutane
Description:
Mumutane is a home interior brand with an inspirational mix of Nordic aesthetics and vibrant African expression. African wax print textiles contain many tales and stories of life in Africa, which give the products a special dimension and story.

Minimising textile waste, creating social impact, B Corp certified. 

Every cushion is unique. The front is made of wax print textile purchased from small, local textile shops in West Africa. The back is made of high-quality wool-blended leftover textiles.

The objective is to create ’products with purpose’, which is why Mumutane has a sustainable approach with a focus on minimising textile waste, improve work conditions in low-income countries and support production with social impact businesses in Denmark.

The environment and social responsibility agenda together with the give work philosophy is a mindset that is rooted in the core of Mumutane’s strategy. Therefore, Mumutane has also become certified as a B Corporation in 2021.

The cushions are adaptable to your preferences: one side express Nordic minimalism and the other African liveliness. This cultural crossover adds a personal and playful interior experience to any conscious, modern home.

By incorporating our innovative finishing techniques, we are able to breathe new life into your existing fixtures, while also reducing the environmental impact of a traditional refurbishment.
 
At WRAPT, we understand that the majority of refurbishments involve removing existing items, often only because they are considered outdated or simply not in fashion. However, we believe that there is value in preserving these pieces, and giving them a new lease of life through our sustainable refurbishment services.
 
Our team of skilled professionals works closely with each client to understand their specific requirements and vision. We then curate a diverse selection of around 3000 finishes, which we use to transform and enhance your existing interiors. By doing so, you can enjoy a high-quality, stylish, and environmentally friendly re-design tailored to your personal taste and needs.
 
Furthermore, we understand that sustainability is a top priority for many clients. That's why we are committed to using only the finest, sustainably manufactured materials. This not only ensures the highest quality products, but also minimises your carbon footprint and reduces the waste sent to landfills.
 
In summary, WRAPT offers a unique and sustainable refurbishment solution that combines fashion-forward updates with environmental consciousness.
 
By choosing WRAPT, you can transform your existing furniture into beautiful and functional pieces that not only last longer, but also have a positive impact on the planet.

Name: Bells + Whistles
Description:
We built our first interiors by hand. With grit, grace, and rebel energy we’ve been grinding for 20 years. We grew from a design-build studio to a full-service, boutique interior design firm now executing 15-20 projects per year. Our studio specializes in restaurant design, but our annual project list has expanded to include offices, health and wellness spaces, retail, multi-unit residential, boutique hotels and pop-ups.

We’re not your typical design firm, we playfully refer to ourselves as the “Unicorn Gang.”  We are a non-hierarchical studio, meaning all team members are heavily involved in each one of our projects. We all wear many hats, sometimes too many. We are 50% woman owned and have quite an eclectic team.

We strive to create deeply personal connections with our clients and the stories they are trying to tell. Our goal is to express genuine authenticity in each space we design by weaving those personal narratives into every detail. 

We aim to strike a balance between aesthetic relevancy and longevity. We hit the pulse of what’s happening right now, while also interpreting it in a way that the heart keeps beating for years to come. Some of our projects have become cult-classics in their communities--still winning awards 10+ years since opening. 

Because we began our design story as fabricators, our interiors reflect our expertise as not only designers but also builders. Our fabrication background gives us the technical know-how to pull-off completely custom interiors. As we’ve grown, we’ve curated a wildly talented collective of artisans and makers who help us execute our designs.

Over the years, we’ve built a diverse network of clients. Quite often, we are in the business of dream-fulfillment for sole owners, chefs, creators, and the like. Because we work so closely with our clients, we’ve been lucky enough to develop long-lasting relationships with many. It’s typical for us to go on to design several projects for each of our clients.

Why ‘Unite’?

Because great design isn’t just about walls, furniture, and colors.

It’s about people.

We bring together designers, architects, and craftsmen from different cities, cultures, and backgrounds—uniting ideas, skills, and vision to create spaces that feel like home and inspire like a dream.

But our work goes beyond design.

When a client hires us, they’re not just paying for layouts and furniture.

They’re trusting us with their vision, emotions, and future.
And we take that responsibility seriously.

Unlike large firms where projects are passed down across multiple layers, at Unite Design Studio, we stay involved—personally—every step of the way.

That’s why we prioritize:

CALM HOME staat voor ontwerp, interieuradvies en styling.Een huis/werkplek is meer dan een plek om te wonen/werken. Bij Calm Home krijg je meer dan alleen een interieurontwerp. Ik combineer creativiteit, bouwkundige expertise en persoonlijke betrokkenheid om een huis/werkplek te creëren dat niet alleen mooi oogt, maar volledig functioneert en rust geeft. Het is jouw basis, jouw rustpunt, een weerspiegeling van wie jij bent en wat voelt als thuiskomen.

Door een unieke aanpak, verfijnd, doordacht en volledig afgestemd op jouw wensen en levensstijl. Geen standaardoplossingen, maar een interieur dat kalmeert, klopt en helemaal van jou is.  

Van de eerste ontwerp tot de realisatie, neem ik het proces uit handen, zodat jij zonder keuzestress overzicht en rust behoudt. Zelfs tijdens een ingrijpende verbouwing. Met Calm Home kies je voor een huis dat 'ademt', een plek waar alles samenkomt.

#drapery #blinds #curtain #shades #fabric #interiordesign #designstudio #sustainability

Name: Tarre Design Studio
Description:
Tarre Design Studio is a Dubai based interior architecture and design studio specializing in hospitality, commercial, and selective residential projects across the Gulf region.

We provide end-to-end design solutions, including:

- Concept and detailed interior design

- Design supervision

- Project management

- Furniture, façade, and focal element design

Our approach is rooted in strategic thinking, clarity, and disciplined execution. We design spaces that are not only visually refined, but also operationally efficient, commercially sound, and built to perform over time.

Tarre Design Studio works with:

- Business owners, founders and managers

- Boutique hospitality brands

- Investors and landlords

- Homeowners who value process, quality, and long-term results

We intentionally limit the number of projects we take on to maintain focus, transparency, and a stress-free experience for our clients. Our projects typically run from a few months up to one year, allowing for complete execution without open-ended timelines.

We are not a high-volume studio, and we do not offer shortcut-driven or visual-only services. Instead, we partner with clients who respect design as a strategic investment.

Based in the Dubai, serving the Gulf region.

Finally, we offer customers the opportunity to book a free consultation, and find the right design for their project.

This may seem like an easy task, but there are many factors to take into consideration when designing an interior space. The size and shape of the room, the purpose of the room, client’s tastes, budget constraints and more all play a role in how a room will be designed. 

AE DESIGN INNOVATION uses the art and science of enhancing the interior of a building to achieve a healthier and more aesthetically pleasing environment for the people using the space. Description:
Servicing national and international clients, Studio de la Haye crafts fully bespoke interiors including kitchens, bedrooms, media rooms and other furniture pieces.  We proudly uphold a legacy of artisanal cabinetry, handmade in the UK, with sustainability in the heart of our product. 

In partnership with our Wiltshire based factory since 2001, using the finest eco-conscious raw materials combined with decades of cabinet making skills, we proudly produce furniture our clients cherish for years to come.

Studio de la Haye was established by Tristan de la Haye; a recognized name in the luxury interiors and furniture design industry.  With over 30 years’ experience, earning prestigious awards including the International Kitchen Designer of the Year and British Kitchen Designer of the Year, Tristan and his team are invested in creating sustainable interiors across the globe.  

Beyond his own accolades, Tristan has also been involved in the industry awards as a panel judge for over a decade.  The Studio's commitment to excellence is evident in its long-standing partnership with its primary production factory since 2001, where private tours are available to share the manufacturing process with their clients.  Through continuous collaboration with trusted suppliers, Studio de la Haye maintains an impeccable quality supply chain, consistently executing projects to the highest standard.

Name: J&S Interiors
Description:
J & S interiors, a Kolkata based interior design firm engaged in designing and executing residential, retail, Office projects by recognizing individual personality and available spaces and turn it into visual realty using a spectrum contrasting textures. At J & S it’s our endeavour to find the understated luxury in each environment and bring it to life with a design that balances minimalism & eclecticism.

Interior design by J&S aims to consolidate each client's needs as well as the specific project's requirements into a form which imbues elegance and good taste! J&S signature style is "simple flair" and captures the inherent character of a particular space, which is often lost in Minimalist design. J&S marries comfort and functionality with beauty and style in contemporary designs born out of timelessly classic tastes. We aim to recognise the charm and unique character of each home or commercial space and develop it into a complimentary interior aesthetic! Working mainly in neutral tones with colourful accents we use combinations of textures to create an extravagantly simple atmosphere. We focus on the physical effect of being in a room, incorporating tactile materials which exude quality through the way they look as well as the way they feel. Our spaces are uncluttered without feeling sparse, fusing international and local styles. We like to use a combination of locally made and imported products.

Although the “J&S " is the central thread running through all our projects we colour interiors with personal touches and will always endeavour to source the perfect piece. Each interior is perfectly tailored to fit snugly and stylishly!

Name: ARTEFIKO
Description:
ARTEFIKO est une entreprise de décoration et d’ameublement d’intérieur qui célèbre le savoir-faire artisanal et la beauté du travail manuel. Nous proposons des pièces uniques, allant du mobilier aux objets de décoration, toutes fabriquées à la main par des artisans talentueux. Chaque création est conçue pour sublimer les espaces de vie tout en racontant une histoire.

Chez ARTEFIKO, nous croyons fermement que la qualité, la durabilité et l’authenticité des produits faits à la main surpassent largement ceux fabriqués par des machines. Dans un monde où l’automatisation remplace souvent l’humain, nous avons choisi de raviver l’art du travail manuel. Nous mettons en lumière des savoir-faire parfois oubliés et montrons qu’il est possible de créer des pièces à la fois belles, intemporelles et profondément humaines.

Notre mission est double : embellir les intérieurs avec des produits uniques et durables, tout en redonnant ses lettres de noblesse au travail de l’homme. ARTEFIKO, c’est l’alliance de l’artisanat, du design, et d’une philosophie qui valorise le talent humain au cœur de chaque création.

Name: Möbelmanufaktur Brakonier

Unsere Philosophie ist der verantwortungsbewusste Umgang mit dem Naturmaterial Holz, mit unseren Mitarbeitern sowie mit unseren Kunden. Trotz zeitgemäßer Planungs- und Fertigungstechnologien halten wir mit Überzeugung an der traditionellen Produktion und den Werten unseres Handwerks fest. Unsere Formensprache ist klar und minimalistisch, die Entwürfe auf der Höhe der Zeit und an die aktuellen Impulse in der Architektur angepasst. In jeder Phase Ihres privaten oder öffentlichen Projektes werden Sie von uns, einem Team aus Architekten, technischen Zeichnern, Schreinern und Monteuren, persönlich betreut und begleitet.

Vakbladen vertellen wat er gebeurt, maar zelden waarom het ertoe doet. En merken? Die zoeken een manier om hun verhaal niet alleen te tonen, maar te laten voelen.

Daar, precies tussen die twee werelden, ontstaat Magazine.

Name: DreamLux  Italia
Description:
I tessuti luminosi DreamLux sono un’innovazione esclusiva nel campo tessile e nascono dall’applicazione ai tradizionali tessuti della più avanzata tecnologia della fibra ottica sin dalla fase di tessitura a telaio.

Ogni creazione DreamLux è unica; per lo sviluppo di ogni singolo progetto è prevista una fase di studio di fattibilità per determinare la tipologia e la composizione più adatta del tessuto, i disegni e le misure. La fibra ottica viene collegata alla fonte luminosa (LED) e alimentata da batterie o direttamente dalla presa di corrente.

L’effetto sorprendente è quello di un “cielo stellato”. Tutte le creazioni DreamLux sono totalmente Made in Italy.

Name: Pani Jurek
Description: Pani Jurek straddles the border between fine arts, craft and design. Applied art objects are created in an artisanal manner. The brand was founded in 2010 by Magda Jurek. A painting graduate, Magda rarely designs under a brief. She thinks of her objects as signs, sculptures or installations, treating them as a canvas for building compositions. Utility forms are  as means of expression: colors, stains, textures, shapes that form an abstract composition.

Name: ELMO STUDIOS
Description:
Elmo Studios is a multidisciplinary Architecture and Interiors practice based in New York. Working across high-end residential, retail, and hospitality projects – the studio is dedicated to creating timeless spaces of sophistication and sensitivity. With a keen sense of materiality and rigorous attention to detail, each project is uniquely crafted to address its specific context, program, and end user. The resulting spaces are original, refined, and thoughtfully curated to reflect their distinctive identity. While it can be said that design is constantly recycled, the studio seeks to question rather than take for granted each element of a project as an opportunity to innovate.

Elmo Studios offers a full range of services including ground-up architecture, interiors, and furniture.  The studio believes in a holistic approach to design in which the architecture and interiors are carried out in complete synchronicity.

Name: Tayseer Abdel Aziz Designs
Description: نحن مكتب تصميم داخلي متخصص في إنشاء تجارب فريدة ومبتكرة في المساحات الداخلية. نحن نؤمن بأن التصميم الداخلي يمكن أن يحدث تحولًا كبيرًا في حياة الناس ويعزز راحتهم وسعادتهم. مهمتنا هي تحويل رؤية عملائنا إلى واقع ملموس من خلال تصميم مبتكر واستخدام الألوان والمواد والإضاءة بشكل فني. نحن نعمل مع عملائنا بشكل وثيق لفهم احتياجاتهم ورغباتهم ونقدم لهم حلولًا مخصصة تعكس شخصيتهم وتلبي احتياجاتهم الفريدة. سواء كنت ترغب في تصميم منزلك الجديد أو تجديد مساحة عملك أو إنشاء تصميم داخلي لمشروع تجاري، فإننا هنا لمساعدتك. نحن نقدم خدمات شاملة تشمل التصميم الداخلي، واختيار الأثاث والإكسسوارات، وتنسيق الألوان، وتصميم الإضاءة، وإدارة المشروع. فريقنا مكون من مصممين محترفين ومهرة في مجال التصميم الداخلي، ونحن نستخدم أحدث التقنيات والأدوات لتحقيق أفضل النتائج. نحن نضمن جودة العمل والالتزام بالمواعيد وتقديم تجربة تصميم استثنائية لعملائنا.

Name: BYE Interior Design, S.L.
Description:
Somos un estudio de interiorismo con sede en Madrid, especializado en diseñar espacios que van más allá de lo estético: espacios que se sienten, que emocionan y que conectan con quienes los habitan.

Nos dirigimos a personas y empresas que buscan algo más que un lugar bonito: buscan identidad, bienestar, funcionalidad y emoción. Ya sea una vivienda, una oficina o un local comercial, nuestro enfoque se basa en captar la esencia de cada cliente y traducirla en atmósferas únicas, personales y memorables.

Creemos que el verdadero diseño es el que no solo se ve, sino que se vive. Por eso, nuestro proceso es profundo y cercano: escuchamos, interpretamos, proponemos y ejecutamos con una mirada creativa y estratégica. Desde el concepto inicial hasta la entrega final, cuidamos cada detalle para que cada proyecto refleje la autenticidad y los valores de quienes lo van a habitar.

Name: sister*hood vienna
Description:
We are a Vienna-based interior studio & concept store that believes in the power of good design to unlock social change. The artisan sector is the second largest employer worldwide - especially for women, the youth & rural community - yet it only receives 0.3% of impact investing. 

At sister*hood, we connect talented artisans from underprivileged regions to a global market place to help them build a sustainable livelihood based on their craft.

We have 3 core principles:
- Trade, not aid. 
- Ethics & Aesthetics.
- Collaboration on eye-level.

Name: WoOd architekt
Description:
Dom zaczyna się od Ciebie. 

Jesteśmy WoOd Architekt – pracownią architektury wnętrz, specjalizującą się w projektowaniu przestrzeni prywatnych. Nazwa WoOd to nie tylko ukłon w stronę natury, ale także skrót naszych wartości: Wizja, Oryginalność, Odpowiedzialność, Doświadczenie. To filary, na których opieramy każdy projekt. Tworzymy wnętrza, które zaczynają się od rozmowy, a kończą w miejscu, do którego naprawdę chce się wracać. Wierzymy, że dom to coś więcej niż układ ścian i funkcji. To osobista opowieść – zapisana w materiałach, świetle, rytmie dnia i detalu. Tworzymy przestrzenie, które odpowiadają na potrzeby, emocje i styl życia osób, dla których projektujemy. Każdy projekt traktujemy indywidualnie – z uważnością i szacunkiem. Szukamy równowagi między estetyką a codziennym komfortem. Cenimy naturalne materiały, zrównoważone podejście i świadome decyzje – bo wnętrze powinno być nie tylko piękne, ale też prawdziwe.

Name: California Closets of the Texas Hill Country

Name: Nirmala Furnisherss , (Since 1967) ISO 9001 Certified Company.
Description:
Nirmala Furnisherss, established in 1967 believes that sincerity, perseverance and an insatiable thirst for progress makes Nirmala Furnisherss a progressive and a youthful company.

Our Founder Mr. Jasbir Singh Chass is a veteran in the Fit-Out Interior Office Space Industry.Nirmala Furnisherss was founded in 1967.

One can never forget their first love; we did our first large Interior work with State Bank of India at Opera House.Thereafter with the support of our clients who are with us even today, and a team who shared the same commitment as their leader, NirmalaFurnisherss delivered projects relentlessly, gaining goodwill among vendors, clients and sub contractors. We do a wide gamut of projects for Banks, Data Centers, Corporate Offices, adhering to their Interior, HVAC, Civil needs, providing complete Turn Key solutions.We have delivered more than 670 branches of SBI, repeatedly worked with TATA group, Turner International, IBM, WIPRO, HP, Indian Oil Corp., Ministry of External Affairs, Air India, done Lakme store in Moscow , Russia, Pedilite Industries to name a few.
In the year 1982, Nirmala Furnisherss started a new workshop and shifted office to Laxmi Industrial Estate, Andheri West. In the year 2002 Mr. Rashpaal J Singh joined in as parther to Nirmala Furnisherss bringing in fresher ideas and newer method of business into the company.
Further, in 2011, Mr. Rashpaal J Singh envisioned a need for Multifunctional Furniture in the market and started Ekseption, Alive Spaces, an Import and Manufacturing house, importing furniture primarily from Italy, later Manufacturing in India.Since 2017, we have a workshop at Bhiwandi  to cater to faster production schedules to deliver our projects on a timely basis while handling multiple projects at a time.

Name: Sernya Spaces

Welcome to the Multi Disciplinary, Multi-National & International award-winning firm SERNYA SPACES, led by Design Principal, Ar. Nupur Magdum.

We are a forward-thinking architecture and interior design firm that is passionate about creating extraordinary environments from ordinary spaces. With a talented team of architects, designers, and creative minds, we bring extensive experience and a fresh perspective to every project we take on. Our mission is to design spaces that fulfil our client's functional needs while also inspiring and uplifting the people who inhabit them.

We firmly believe that architecture and interior design have the ability to shape lives and enhance experiences. We strive to create designs that are harmonious, sustainable, and seamlessly integrated into their surroundings, all while incorporating the latest trends & technologies.

Our portfolio encompasses a wide range of projects, including residential, commercial, hospitality, and institutional spaces. Whether it's a cozy home, a dynamic office, a welcoming hotel, or an innovative healthcare facility, we approach each project with a comprehensive and client-centric mindset.

Collaboration lies at the core of our design process. We work closely with our clients to understand their vision, goals, and specific requirements. We ensure that the final outcome reflects their dreams and aspirations by fostering open communication and incorporating feedback at every stage.

At SERNYA, we take pride in delivering exceptional design solutions that exceed expectations. Our commitment to quality, attention to detail, and adherence to timelines have established our reputation for excellence in the industry. We have had the privilege of working with esteemed clients who value our dedication to delivering outstanding results.

Stay connected with us on LinkedIn to explore our latest projects, gain industry insights, and find design inspiration. We look forward to sharing our journey with you

Name: Ghirardelli srl
Description:
GHIRARDELLI SQUARE

Una piazza dedicata alla casa, incorniciata dalle facciate storiche ed eleganti di Palazzo Zanchi in via Tasso. Un luogo che accoglie i nuovi spazi espositivi pensati e realizzati da Ghirardelli come veri modelli di abitazioni. Da un lato viene ricreata un’unità abitativa dove la domotica fà da padrona: le funzioni di video, audio e illuminazione rispondono ad un unico centro di comando per rendere facile la gestione elettronica generale di ogni scenario abitativo. 
Dall’altro lato della piazza è allestito un loft dinamico e giovane nel look, dove gli elementi d’arredo dalle forme essenziali, esaltano la purezza del design. Con l’esposizione delle cucine Bulthap, presenti in piazza da più di 20 anni , si chiude il cerchio perfetto di “Ghirardelli square” , un angolo bellissimo della città, da vivere. 

Il nostro obbiettivo è fornire soluzioni per lo spazio nella sua globalità. Per i nostri clienti del resto ciò che più conta è una progettazione perfetta e un’assistenza completa. Nello studio del progetto più adatto a voi il nostro staff terrà in considerazione più di ogni altra cosa…voi! Tale approccio focalizzato sull’individuo prima ancora che sugli aspetti più propriamente 	progettuali ci consente di creare ambienti fortemente personalizzati, ergonomici e ottimali allo svolgimento armonico della vita quotidiana, senza nulla togliere alla grande forza comunicativa che contraddistingue ogni nostro progetto.

Name: Beth Krupa Interiors
Description:
Beth Krupa Interiors (BKI) is an award-winning Interior Design firm with an international perspective coming from Beth’s life and experiences living in London, India, Hong Kong, NYC, Chicago, and presently Connecticut. Her past and present travels throughout dozens of countries continue to inspire her firm’s designs by creating a collected and meaningful “sanctuary” for her clients, and her generous nature loves seeing how they thrive when this is accomplished at the end of each project.

At BKI we rely on international experience, over 15 years of design expertise and impeccable integrity to complete projects that provide design solutions for a traveled, collected, timeless interior legacy. Our goal is to make the design-renovation process an enjoyable one for our clients. Experience has shown us that familiarity into our systemized phases nourishes our clients’ comfort level for the duration of the project.

To Beth great style also requires restraint and the ability to edit well. It’s true in fashion where she led international teams as a retail executive for 20 years with Bergdorf Goodman, Henri Bendel, and fashion houses Calvin Klein and Anteprima.

Over the years, BKI has developed a clear and transparent practice that lets their clients understand each project from the largest overview to the smallest detail. They demystify the design process via collaborative and creative considerations leading to each clients’ unique and personal story being told. This personalization and legacy is a luxury of its own.

Name: Greenmood UK
Description:
Founded in 2014 by Sadig Alakbarov, in Belgium, at Greenmood we produce green walls and other 100% natural indoor acoustic solutions to meet the needs of modern workplaces. Using specially preserved greenery, the products reduce noise pollution, add beauty, and boost productivity – all while promoting respect for the natural environment and encouraging sustainability.

Nowadays, we are one of the most renown manufacturers and exporters of biophilic elements worldwide. Present in Belgium, France, North America, United Kingdom, Norway, South Korea, Poland, Denmark,Taiwan, Romania and Azerbaijan, we export to more than 20 countries all over the globe.

The brand’s founding was catalyzed by this idea: how to bring nature indoors and create more comfortable and productive workspaces with minimum impact on the environment. Therefore, we select carefully our suppliers and expeditors, always looking for the greenest solution.

Wir unterscheiden uns von unseren Mitbewerbern durch unsere hohe Designkompetenz: Wir sind Experten, die in der Lage sind, sich jeder Art von Unternehmen anzunähern, indem wir von einem rigorosen Verständnis der Bedürfnisse des Unternehmens ausgehen und den
“italienischen Stil” in Innenarchitektur umsetzen.
Die meisten unserer Kunden sind internationale Konzerne: Wir sind es gewohnt, mit unseren Kunden zusammenzuarbeiten, um während des gesamten Prozesses eine starke Markenkonsistenz zu schaffen. Dank unserer Erfahrung halten wir hohe Qualitätsstandards pünktlich und im Rahmen des Budgets ein.
Seit den Anfängen unserer Karriere haben wir stets eine kosmopolitische Denkrichtung beibehalten und Verbindungen zu Europa und den USA aufgebaut, wobei wir nicht nur als lokale, sondern auch als produktive Unterstützung bieten und neue Geschäftsmöglichkeiten im In- und Ausland erkunden.

Name: BOLD spaces
Description:
Wij bouwen schaalbare interieurformules voor groeiende merken.

Een sterk merk bouwen is één ding. Dat merk consistent uitrollen naar 5, 10 of 50 vestigingen is een tweede. Bij BOLD Spaces geloven we dat je niet voor elke nieuwe locatie het wiel opnieuw moet uitvinden.

Wij helpen Retail-, Horeca- en Kantoorformules om te schalen. Niet met losse ontwerpen, maar met slimme systemen.

Wat wij doen: Wij vertalen jouw DNA naar een modulaire 'Blueprint'. Hiermee borgen we je merkidentiteit en maken we de uitrol van nieuwe vestigingen sneller, foutlozer en rendabeler.

 Concept & Strategie: Het merkfundament vertaald naar ruimtelijk design.

 The Blueprint: Een modulair handboek (S/M/L formats) voor schaalbare groei.

 Roll-out Management: Snelle implementatie bij nieuwe locaties.

 Optimize & Refresh: Jaarlijkse updates voor blijvend rendement.

Trackrecord: Wij werken voor merken die kiezen voor eenheid en beleving, waaronder Simon Lévelt, Kwantum, Aquanova en Scents.

Zoek je een strategische partner voor jouw expansie? www.boldinterieurdesign.nl

Description:
Vanaf jongs af aan heeft mijn fascinatie voor interieur en architectuur zich ontwikkeld; ik keek graag naar woonprogramma's en besteedde veel tijd aan tekenen. 
Deze vroege interesse vormde de basis voor mijn huidige streven naar een langgekoesterde droom. Na het succescol afronden van mijn studie tot interieur stylist aan het Cibap in Zwolle, heb ik mijn kennis verder uitgebreid door interieurarchitectuur te studeren aan de kunstacademie van Maastricht. 

Het creëren van op maat gemaakte interieurontwerpen is mijn passie. Ik streef ernaar u te verrassen met ontwerpen die zorgvuldig zijn afgestemd op uw eensen en eisen op het gebeid van stijl, kleur en functionaliteit. 

Naast mijn werk als ontwerper ben ik als freelancer actief, waar ik interieurarchitecten ondersteun bij het maken van zowel 2D- als 3D-tekeningen. 

Als mijn verhaal uw nieuwsgierigheid heeft gewekt, nodig ik u uit om een kijkje te nemen op de website of om direct contact met mij op te nemen. 

Pauline Termijtelen

Name: TINGE by Rhea Truptesh
Description:
Welcome to ‘TINGE by Rhea Truptesh’, a boutique architecture and interior design firm where big ideas come to life in the smallest of spaces. With a passion for creative solutions and attention to detail, we specialize in crafting bespoke designs that redefine the way you experience your surroundings.

As a small firm, we pride ourselves on providing personalized attention to every project, tailoring our services to suit your unique needs and aspirations. Our talented team of architects and interior designers work hand in hand to create harmonious spaces that blend functionality and aesthetics seamlessly.

From residential to commercial projects, we believe in maximizing the potential of each square foot, transforming ordinary spaces into extraordinary experiences. Let us turn your dreams into reality, elevating your living and working environments to new heights of elegance and efficiency. Discover the transformative power of design with ‘TINGE by Rhea Truptesh’.

Name: Third Paragraph Interior
Description:
Third Paragraph is a Singapore-based interior design studio dedicated to creating thoughtful, liveable homes shaped around the way people truly live.

We believe that good design is not defined by trends alone, but by intention, proportion, and longevity. Every space we design is guided by a quiet balance of form and function—where materials are chosen with care, layouts are planned for everyday rhythms, and details are considered beyond first impressions.

From HDB apartments to private residences, our work is rooted in understanding each homeowner’s lifestyle, routines, and aspirations. We approach every project as a narrative—translating personal stories into spaces that feel calm, cohesive, and deeply personal. Our designs are meant to age gracefully, supporting life as it evolves rather than competing with it.

At Third Paragraph, we guide clients through the renovation journey with clarity and transparency. Our process emphasises collaboration, craftsmanship, and honest communication, ensuring that each home is not only beautiful, but practical, enduring, and well-considered.

Every home we create is a composition—carefully planned, thoughtfully detailed, and written to stand the test of time.

Description: Interior Designer, Interior Design, Interior Designers, Interior Decorator, Interior Decorators.

Name: The Fourth Wall Designs
Description: At The Fourth Wall, we have been motivated by a desire to better serve our customers, gracing their homes with the style, sophistication, elegance and warmth that captures the essence of those who live in them. We understand the value of establishing true lasting relationships with our clients, and we embrace the opportunities we have to create their dream homes. Customer service & Satisfaction is the cornerstone of our company, and from concept to completion, our design team will honor your style and functional needs while guiding you through the process and exceeding your every expectation.

Description:
A Só-Lar dedica-se a design interiores, com foco em projetos 3D personalizados para cada cliente. Trabalhávamos de perto com os nossos fornecedores garantindo sempre a máxima excelência e qualidade do resultado final.

Somos uma equipa profissional com grande experiência no sector, acompanhando o processo desde a fabricação à montagem e acabamentos.

Name: Studio MAK Co.
Description:
Studio MAK is a team of innovative creatives, but above all, they are savvy business professionals with a deep understanding of designing projects that deliver a strong ROI. The three partners bring a wealth of expertise to each client and project, drawing from their diverse backgrounds in billion-dollar commercial real estate, high fashion + branding, and the financial strategy of an established CPA from a Big Four firm.

Headquartered in Chicago, with projects spanning both residential and commercial spaces across the city and suburbs, the team has built lasting trust with a distinguished clientele, ranging from entrepreneurs, executives, developers, and private families. 

Their portfolio includes everything from Gold Coast penthouses, Lincoln Park brownstones and weekend retreats for the family to boutique spas and large-scale rental complexes. Known for their meticulous standards and seamless execution, Studio MAK is widely recognized for its comprehensive, full-service approach to design.

Name: Domisilium Studio
Description:
Domisilium Studio is an Indonesia-based interior design firm with a wide range of expertise in custom residential, hospitality and commercial projects. We offer a full range of architectural and interior design services from programming, initial design conceptualization, space planning, design development, construction documents to hands-on construction administration and punch listing.

We operate with a singular vision of and an endless dedication to creating functional and livable spaces, fostering innovations in environmentally responsible construction, and designing sophisticated, timeless and uplifting spaces for the fullest enjoyment of life.

Our dedication to the client, great attention to detail, and tailoring of each specific project to our client’s unique individual needs and aesthetic values is what sets Domisilium Studio apart from other firms. Our hands-on approach in every aspect of project development and construction, whilst establishing good relationships with our clients, contractors and vendors, accomplishes our ultimate goal of providing our clients with only the highest quality finished product achievable.

Name: Brittagh Lynn Design
Description: Offering a deeply holistic approach where design, marketing & PR, as well as ethical & sustainable considerations collide to turn your holiday home or brand into a beautiful, thoughtful and thriving business model.

Name: RIART - Atelier Rita Costa
Description:
“Existem diversas formas de resolver um único problema, mil caminhos para completar uma tarefa, infinitas possibilidades de partilhar nossas ideias. Desenvolvemos com os clientes as diversas possibilidades do seu espaço, criando projetos que assumem um compromisso artístico.”

Detentor da marca RIART, o Atelier Rita Costa é especializado em Arquitetura de Interiores e Decoração de Interiores. 

Fundado por Rita Costa, que estudou Arquitetura de Interiores na Faculdade de Arquitetura em Lisboa e mais tarde, uma especialização em Design de Interiores, tem por objetivo humanizar os projetos criados, tendo em conta a importância da situação geográfica, social e cultural na aplicação dos seus ideais de interiores.

Name: F&I DEKOR Interior Decorators
Description: At F&I DEKOR, we believe that interior design is more than great functionality and beautiful aesthetics. We aim to make your home interiors a reflection of your personality. Your home should be something that you and your family take pride in and love to spend time in. Our efficient, customized home interior designs incorporate your needs in every nook of your home, so your space meets your every requirement. Our dedicated home interior designers work with you tirelessly to tie your style with their design expertise, creating the perfect interior design plan. They will also ensure that the plan is executed using the materials of the highest standards. In addition to great interior design ideas, you can expect our unwavering support and service for years to come because all our products come with up to 10 year warranty. Think we are the right fit for your journey to your new home? Get a free estimate or a book a free consultation with our interior design team for beautiful home interiors. We offer interior design ideas for living room, bedroom and kitchen. We specialize in complete modular kitchens, stunning wardrobe designs, timeless TV unit designs, and space-saving furniture among other.

Name: ROOM2
Description:
Das Design Studio ROOM2 plant, designed und realisiert anspruchsvolle Konzepte für Kunden, die Raum in seiner schönsten Form (er)leben möchten. Expertise, Erfahrung und Einfühlungsvermögen sind dabei die tragenden Säulen. 
Es geht nicht allein ums Einrichten; um die Böden, die Türen, Fenster oder Möbel an sich. Es geht um Feinheiten und Details. Um Farbnuancen in Kombination mit einer bestimmten Form. Darum, wie das Licht im Raum wirkt und darum, welches Material die gewünschte Atmosphäre am besten hervorruft. Es geht … genau: darum, ein in sich stimmiges Ergebnis zu erzielen. Dies sind die Werte und die Vision, die ROOM2 antreibt.  

Ob dein Zuhause, dein Geschäft, dein Restaurant oder Hotel; ob du ein Gesamtprojekt wünschst oder die Leistungen nur teilweise in Anspruch nehmen möchtest: Der Grundgedanke bleibt derselbe – ROOM2 verwandelt Raum in einen Ort zum Sein.
