Name: Revisions of Wilmington, LLC
Description:
Whether you're searching for your dream home or seeking an investment property, my keen eye for design and genuine passion for people will guide you towards achieving your real estate goals.

In addition to my extensive background in home staging and design, I hold a graduate degree in Conflict Resolution Management. This means that I've completed over 30 graduate level hours of negotiation and mediation courses. These skills prove invaluable, especially when navigating tough deals in today's competitive market.

With nearly 8 years of experience owning a home staging and design firm, I bring a wealth of knowledge, expertise, and resources to the table. I'll ensure your listing is staged to perfection, utilizing your existing items to ensure stunning photography that stands out from the crowd.

Having staged and participated in the sale of over $20 million in real estate, I understand what it takes to make your home shine in a competitive market. Whether it's selecting the perfect design elements or optimizing space planning for your next home, I'll be there to guide you every step of the way.

As an expert communicator, I've served the community as an ASL interpreter and educator of Deaf children since 2000. 

As an experienced short term rental host, I also run family friendly rental properties in Wrightsville Beach, NC. Check out our direct booking website: www. revisionsofwilmington.com when you plan your next Wrightsville Beach vacation. 

When I'm not immersed in all things real estate, you'll find me training for my next race or planning our family's next adventure abroad.

Let's work together to turn your real estate dreams into reality.

Name: White Fortuity
Description:
White Fortuity is a company that is passionate about creating beautiful and functional spaces. We are a leader in the home decor and interior design industry, offering a range of products and services that are designed to elevate the look and feel of any space. From furniture and lighting to textiles and accessories, our products are made from sustainable resources and promote handicrafts.

Our team of skilled designers and decorators work closely with clients to create custom solutions that meet their unique needs and preferences. We believe that a well-designed space can improve quality of life, increase productivity, and enhance overall well-being. Our design process is collaborative, and we work closely with clients to ensure that their vision is realized.

In addition to our product line, we also offer interior design services for homes, offices, and flats. Our team can assist with everything from space planning and furniture selection to color palettes and lighting design. We are committed to providing personalized attention and exceptional service, from concept to completion.

To further promote awareness and education about the interior decoration industry, we operate blogs that cover a range of topics, including design trends, sustainability, and product spotlights. We sell our products through leading e-commerce platforms, our website, and social media channels, making it easy for clients to shop from anywhere at any time.

Join us in our mission to create beautiful, functional, and sustainable spaces that inspire and delight. Follow us on LinkedIn to stay up-to-date on the latest trends and insights in the home decor and interior design industry, and contact us today to learn more about our services and products.

Name: AUGUST+CO
Description:
AUGUST+CO is embarking on a mission to champion on-shore and European artisanal-industrial savoir-faire excellence in interior design. We proudly showcase exceptional weavers, craftsmen, and designers hailing from Scotland, England, France, and Italy, across the UK & Ireland. All joined in an innovative gallery space nestled in the heart of the Design Centre Chelsea Harbour.

Bound together by our fervour for craftsmanship and exceptional design, we weave narratives around exquisite, one-of-a-kind products. We unravel the tales of the skilled artisans who craft magnificent wools, luxurious cashmere, delicate lace, all woven in the picturesque landscapes of Scotland. We celebrate striking prints from visionary artists and handcrafted treasures such as rugs, furniture, and lighting fixtures. These companies, many of them with a heritage spanning over a century, remain family-owned, with production facilities conveniently located within a day's drive from London.

At AUGUST+CO, we are the exclusive UK distributors for renowned textile brands like Metaphores (part of the Hermes Group), Bisson Bruneel, Alhambra fabrics, Perrine Paris, Imogen Heath, Johnstons of Elgin, and MYB Textiles. Additionally, we proudly serve as the exclusive UK agents for esteemed furniture and lighting brands such as Moissonnier, Pouenat, and Secolo. Not to forget, we are the exclusive UK representatives for the revered French rug maker and tapestry weaver, Atelier Pinton.

Name: The Design Impact

Experience the transformative power of your living and working spaces with The Design Impact located in New York, NY. Description:
At Studio Seven, we curate the passion and skill needed to satisfy enthusiasts looking for originality when it comes to Architecture, Design, Furniture and an Art Gallery. Listening is the core of our customer service; we merge your ideas with our vision and expertise to create results that strike a balance between quality, functionality and aesthetics.

The core of our philosophy is Revival and Innovation. Our work is inspired by the intricate details found in traditional Islamic Architecture and then placed within the landscape of modern design. Our work is rendered with the aim of creating an international presence through an engagement with local crafting talent. Our furniture is handcrafted by artisans within the local community. Sustainability is important to us as well; our products are made through nature friendly/ eco-friendly methods and materials.

Description:
Integrity and Passion – fuel for the fire that drives our award-winning team. OD&A’s team is constantly evolving and improving, and always ready to handle challenging designs and high-level projects. Active client integration means we usually develop great relationships with our clients-we believe good communication and integrity is key to a great project experience. Passionate designs, attention to detail, and healthy communication are OD&A’s winning mix for satisfied clients and results that speak for themselves every time.

Our expertise and experience cover a wide range of projects, from high-end residential addresses to commercial, retail, and food and beverage spaces.

We pride ourselves on the ability to provide completer solutions. From the initial design, construction, and complements, to final touches like accessories and decor, our clients can rest easy knowing our team will give their best from start to finish.

“Good design is obvious, great design is transparent.”
– Joe Sparano

Description:
Somos JUGA, especialistas en Trade Marketing. Sabemos que, en Barcelona, destacar es un desafío constante. Nuestra misión va más allá del diseño: elevamos la visibilidad de su marca para que genere el máximo rendimiento comercial. Combinamos una visión ejecutiva con el cuidado artesanal en cada detalle. Tenemos un enfoque especializado en el sector HORECA, donde su presencia lo es todo.

En JUGA, su inversión se convierte en resultados medibles y duraderos.

Trabajamos de forma metódica y cercana para asegurar la máxima eficiencia y el resultado óptimo en cada iniciativa:

-Asesoramiento Estratégico y Cercano: Ofrecemos una visión ejecutiva y acompañamiento profesional para diseñar las acciones más pertinentes. Trabajamos con proximidad para integrarnos en sus objetivos y garantizar una correcta alineación con la fuerza de ventas.

-Diseño Funcional con Sentido Práctico: Desarrollamos soluciones estéticas que, ante todo, son prácticas y rentables. Nuestro proceso es artesanal, cuidando la calidad y la personalización para optimizar los espacios y mejorar la experiencia del cliente.

-Gestión Integral del Proceso: Para garantizar la calidad y la eficiencia, asumimos la ejecución completa de los proyectos. Controlamos cada fase, desde la conceptualización hasta la logística final, liberando a su equipo de la complejidad operativa.

Description:

Name: Homestorey Interior design and Construction Services
Description:
HomeStorey is a full-service remodeling, renovation and design company. 
 With Over 10 years of work experience, its been a great journey from being a freelancer to an Interior Design Studio with over 30 employees. 

1.Space Planning: One of the core aspects of interior design services is space planning. This involves analyzing the layout and dimensions of a room or entire property to optimize its functionality and flow. Interior designers use their expertise to determine the best furniture arrangement, traffic patterns, and utilization of available space to create a harmonious and efficient environment.

2.Concept Development: Interior designers work closely with clients to understand their preferences, style, and vision for the space. Based on this, they develop a comprehensive design concept that incorporates color schemes, materials, furniture selections, lighting solutions, and decorative elements. The concept serves as a roadmap for the entire design process, ensuring a cohesive and personalized outcome.

3.Material and Finishes Selection: Interior designers have an extensive knowledge of various materials and finishes available in the market.

4.Custom Furniture and Cabinetry: For a truly unique and tailored interior, designers often collaborate with skilled craftsmen to create custom-made furniture and cabinetry.

4.Project Management: Interior design services extend beyond conceptualization and planning. Designers take on the role of project managers, overseeing the entire execution process. They coordinate with contractors, suppliers, and artisans to ensure that the design is implemented correctly and within the designated timeline and budget. Managing the project effectively helps to avoid potential pitfalls and ensures a successful and satisfactory end result for the client.

We are proud to announce our expansion of services to the areas like Moradabad, Agra, Chandigarh, Jaipur and Uttarakhand.

Name: Leonie Lauterbach – Interior Design & Architecture
Description:
Stell dir vor, deine Geschäfts- oder Hospitality-Räume werden zu einem Ort, an dem Funktionalität auf Emotion trifft – ein Raum, der sowohl deine Marke widerspiegelt als auch den Erfolg deines Unternehmens fördert. 

Wir gestalten Räume, die nicht nur ästhetisch überzeugen, sondern auch die Effizienz steigern und deinen Betrieb optimieren. Egal ob Hotel, Restaurant oder Büro – wir helfen dir, deinen Raum zu einem Ort zu machen, der beeindruckt und begeistert.

Warum wir das tun?
Unsere Leidenschaft für Design und Architektur ist, Räume zu schaffen, die mehr sind als nur funktionale Flächen. Wir wollen Orte kreieren, die Emotionen wecken, deine Marke stärken und deinem Business helfen, langfristig erfolgreich zu sein.

Was wir tun:
Wir entwickeln maßgeschneiderte Raumkonzepte für gewerbliche Projekte – vom kreativen Design über die funktionale Optimierung bis hin zur Markenstärkung. Unser Ziel ist es, Räume zu schaffen, die nicht nur schön sind, sondern auch die Produktivität steigern und Gäste oder Mitarbeiter begeistern.

Warum das wichtig ist:
Gutes Design geht über Ästhetik hinaus. Es kann den Arbeitsalltag verbessern, die Effizienz steigern und dazu beitragen, dass sich Menschen in deinem Raum wohlfühlen. Wir schaffen nicht nur Design, sondern Erlebnisse, die den Erfolg deines Unternehmens fördern.

Wie wir dir helfen:
Mit unserer Expertise in Innenarchitektur und unserem Fokus auf B2B- und Hospitality-Projekte bieten wir kreative, funktionale Lösungen, die deinen Raum in einen Ort verwandeln, der sowohl deine Marke stärkt als auch die Bedürfnisse deiner Kunden und Mitarbeiter erfüllt.

Bereit, den nächsten Schritt zu gehen? Lass uns gemeinsam dein Projekt verwirklichen und deinen Raum zu einem einzigartigen Erlebnis machen!

Name: Just.A - From Maker to Designer
Description:
CHI SIAMO? 
Siamo un team di persone con passioni diverse (arredamento, design, informatica, marketing) e l’unione di tutte le nostre competenze e della nostra esperienza ci ha permesso di realizzare un progetto bellissimo: JUST.A

DI COSA SI TRATTA? 
Just A è la prima webapp pensata per connettere nello stesso luogo digitale e in "real-time" i professionisti del design: mobilieri, architetti e interior designer hanno la possibilità di tenere sotto traccia lo stato dell'arte dei progetti in essere.

MISSION DEL PROGETTO
Valorizzare e potenziare la relazione tra negozio di arredamenti e architetti
Gestire progetti, tempi, rapporti di sintesi dove e quando si vuole.
Unire tradizione ad innovazione, in un percorso dove i vari partner collaborano sinergicamente a livello di tempi e contenuti ("from maker to designer").

VALORE AGGIUNTO DEL PROGETTO
Costruire una rete di N architetti che vuole ++N clienti finali
Rafforzare e facilitare la relazione con l’architetto e posizionarsi nella sua testa come fornitore di riferimento
Rendere la relazione digitale, semplice e accessibile in modo smart..ma sempre attiva e connessa
Utilizzare i dati ed i contenuti condivisi come cuore e motivo forte al centro di tale relazione

Sei un mobiliere? 
Hai a disposizione di fatto un gestionale per lavorare con più architetti su N progetti
Valorizzi la relazione con i tuoi partner di fiducia
Migliori di conseguenza il rapporto con il cliente finale
Ottimizzi tutta la "filiera commerciale" con a disposizione dati in real time

Sei un architetto? 
Valorizzi la relazione con i mobilieri che ti coinvolgono quotidianamente nei progetti
Aumenti la tua visibilità
Relazione digitale: accessibile, sempre a portata di mano
Utilizza dati e contenuti per migliorare le performance

COME CONTATTARCI
Visita la nostra landing page e compila il form per contattarci: https://www.just-a.net

Name: İç Mimarlık İstanbul
Description:
‘İç Mimarlık İstanbul’, İstanbul merkezli bir iç mimarlık şirketidir. Şirketin kurucusu ve baş tasarımcısı olan Gizem Sevilmiş, müşterilerine özgün ve kaliteli iç mekan tasarımları sunmaktadır. Gizem Sevilmiş'in liderliğindeki ekip, her projede müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına uygun çözümler üreterek, süreci başından sonuna büyük bir özenle sürdürerek, yaşam alanlarını işlevsel, estetik ve konforlu hale getirmektedir.

İç Mimarlık İstanbul'un hizmetleri arasında konut, ofis, mağaza, otel gibi farklı mekan türlerinin tasarım danışmanlığı, ölçümler, bütçe hazırlama, malzeme seçimi ve uygulama süreci yönetimi gibi pek çok farklı hizmet bulunmaktadır. Şirket ayrıca müşterilerine özel mobilya tasarımı ve üretimi de sunmaktadır.

Şirket, müşteri memnuniyetine büyük önem verir ve her projede müşterileriyle yakından çalışarak onların beklentilerini en iyi şekilde karşılamayı hedefler. Şirketin tasarımları işlevsellik, estetik ve kalite açısından dikkat çekici ve özgün olma özellikleri taşımaktadır. 

Bizim için işimizi tutkuyla yapmak sadece bir slogan değil, bir yaşam tarzıdır. Müşterilerimizin beklentilerini karşılamak ve onlara en iyi hizmeti sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Sektördeki tecrübemiz ve uzman kadromuz ile size kaliteli ve güvenilir çözümler sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

İçmimarlık İstanbul'un portfolyosu web sitesinde ve sosyal medya hesaplarında görülebilir.

Name: RRP (Rees Roberts + Partners LLC)
Description:
RRP (formerly Rees Roberts + Partners) is an award-winning interior and landscape design firm formed in 2007 to give those departments formerly of Steven Harris Architects a distinct presence and identity. Rees Roberts + Partners has completed projects worldwide, including townhouses and apartments in Manhattan and Brooklyn; residences in upstate New York, Connecticut, the Hamptons, Miami, San Francisco, and New Mexico; a house in Cape Town, South Africa; a lakefront home in Geneva, Switzerland; and a boutique hotel and spa on an island off the coast of Croatia. Lucien Rees Roberts was inducted into the Interior Design Hall of Fame in 2008. 

Known for interiors that defer to the elements of art, light, and views, the firm creates spaces that are tailored to both the context of each location and the character of the individual. While inventive and informed by a well-rounded knowledge of architectural styles, the designs remain true to clients' practical realities and varied lifestyles. Rees Roberts + Partners is also recognized for its innovative landscape design and skill in integrating the built structure and natural environment. The firm understands that landscapes are key in defining the character of a place—particularly in New York, where a garden can provide a welcome respite within the urban cityscape. The firm seeks sustainable and ecologically meaningful design solutions that respect each project’s surroundings.

Name: Casamara ApS
Description:
Jeg hedder Luisana, og jeg er en erfaren og kreativ indretningsdesigner, der elsker, når æstetik og funktionalitet smelter sammen til et harmonisk design. Jeg har øje for detaljerne, men ser samtidig rummet som en helhed, der skal skabe glæde, velvære og god energi for alle, der træder ind.

Min stil er enkel og klassisk, stærkt inspireret af den nordiske minimalisme med et touch af varme farver. Men mine indretningsløsninger er mere end det; de er essensen af dine drømme og dine ønsker for rummet.

Jeg prakker dig ikke noget på. Jeg inddrager dig derimod i alle beslutninger og holder et tæt samarbejde gennem hele processen, så vi er sikre på, at resultatet matcher dig og dine behov.

Jeg er uddannet Feng Shui Konsulent og tager derfor udgangspunkt i principperne om at indrette hvert enkelt rum efter rummets formål. Uanset om hensigten er fordybelse, koncentration, selskabelighed eller afslapning kan jeg skabe et hyggeligt rum med god energi.

Ob Wohnräume, Bürokonzepte, Gastronomie oder die Zusammenarbeit mit Immobilienentwicklern und Maklern – nutze unseren Erfahrungsschatz aus all diesen Bereichen, um das Optimum für Dein Projekt herauszuholen! Unser Ansatz ist es, Dir als Begleiter und Sparringspartner im Projekt von A bis Z zur Seite zu stehen – von der strategischen Planung über die Grundrissanalyse bis hin zur Umsetzung. Ziel unserer Arbeit ist es, gemeinsam inspirierende Räume zu gestalten, die sowohl ästhetisch ansprechend sind und zugleich alle gewünschten und notwendigen Funktionen erfüllen. Dabei arbeiten wir stets mit der Architektur und nicht dagegen - versprochen.

Name: dp Design Studio+
Description:
dp Design Studio+ is a Full-Service Interior Design Boutique that works with the discerning client whose time is precious.

When looking for an interior designer they first want to make a true connection with someone who holds integrity as a personal core value so they can collaborate with ease and feel comfortable passing off their vision, knowing they do not have to manage the project or find time to organize the mundane details.  Enter Dianne Pascoa, CEO + Creative Director of dp Design Studio+.

Our clients want to have a space that feels like a haven while also being functional for years to come.  At dp Design Studio+ we believe you deserve to have your home feel like a personal oasis that functions in just the right ways for your lifestyle. Our process is crafted to provide you with a tailored design and white glove experience, so you are not only able to have clarity - from investment to timeline - but also feel cared for and catered to in bringing your vision to life.

dp Design Studio+ was born out of passion. It’s ignited when we get to create spaces for engaged clients in a tailored, intimate way that provides assurance and leadership while exceeding what’s expected. 

We believe your vision for your space is in the realm of possibility — we believe your haven is waiting — and we are standing by to craft it for you, with meticulous attention to detail.

Inspired by high-end luxury client experiences, we provide turnkey - white glove service and offer it to each client who chooses to partner with us. Luxury experiences do not always translate to a luxury design you feel as if you can’t be at home in. Instead, it is the opposite, as our bespoke design practices are founded on the partnership of both stunning and skillful design that’s curated for your lifestyle. 

You deserve a space that invites in more memories and more experiences - because that is worth investing in.

Name: Flora Atelier
Description:
Ayudamos a negocios a aumentar su rentabilidad y el bienestar de sus colaboradores a través del rediseño de espacios de trabajo enfocados en promover la productividad.

Nos inspiramos en la ciencia del mindfulness, para diseñar espacios que buscan reducir el estrés e incentivar la productividad. 

Somos una empresa donde destaca la empatía, la confiabilidad y una visión artística y sostenible. 

¿Cómo lo hacemos?
Priorizamos espacios abiertos sin distracciones, nos basamos en un estilo minimalista para mantener solo lo esencial. 
 Dejamos lo llamativo a un lado y buscamos la armonía de colores, objetos y texturas de materiales.
Usamos materiales naturales como los tejidos, las plantas y los materiales sin añadidos, como la madera, el barro y la piedra, para fortalecer el espacio vital, haciéndolo parte de un todo.
 Adquirimos solo los objetos y las piezas de interior esenciales con el propósito de fomentar una vida consciente ya sea en el trabajo, el estudio o la reflexión.
Fomentamos espacios desconectados de la tecnología, que sean espacios de calma donde podamos encontrar tranquilidad.

Name: DraftC
Description:
At DraftC, we embed design thinking at the core of our process, fostering creative solutions tailored to the specific needs of our clients. Our collaborative approach and commitment to co-creativity allow us to generate cutting-edge strategies, essential for shaping memorable experiences. We believe in working together to predict and create the future, embodying our motto: 

"The best way to predict the future is to create it together."

What We Do? 

DraftC specializes in the development of innovative concepts and creative solutions, meticulously designed to meet our clients' unique requirements. Our services are built on a foundation of collaborative creativity and excellence in customer experience, ensuring that every project we undertake is a step towards transforming ideas into memorable realities.

Services We Provide : 

* Conceptualization and Creativity: We excel in generating innovative ideas and creative concepts that stand out in the market.

* Production Coordination and Sourcing: DraftC efficiently manages client projects, ensuring smooth execution through rigorous planning and proactive management. We assist our clients in finding the right resources and partners for production, providing continuous support throughout the process.

* Project Management: Our strategic guidance helps clients develop effective strategies to achieve their business objectives, from inception through to completion.

* Strategic Support: DraftC offers strategic advice to help clients navigate the complexities of project execution and market entry, ensuring that every strategy is aligned with their overarching business goals.

Let's Work Together!

Name: ARI interiors
Description:
Welcome to ARI Interiors: Elevating Your Property Investments

At ARI Interiors, we are passionate about transforming spaces and maximising your property investments. With a dedicated focus on premium HMOs, commercial to residential conversions, property developments, and Airbnb accommodations, we offer bespoke interior design solutions that guarantee not only visually appealing spaces but also substantial financial gains.

Crafting Profitable Spaces:

Our expertise lies in carefully curating every aspect of interior design to ensure your investment's profitability. For premium HMOs, we design spaces that not only attract high-paying tenants but also optimise the property's layout for increased rental yields. In commercial to residential conversions, we breathe new life into spaces, enhancing their market value. Our innovative approach to property developments ensures that your projects are not just buildings but thriving, desirable spaces that stand out in the market.

Tailored Designs, Smart Investments:

At ARI Interiors, we understand the importance of tailoring designs to the target audience. Whether you're catering to professionals in HMOs or travellers in Airbnb accommodations, our designs are meticulously crafted to meet their specific needs. This targeted approach not only enhances the appeal of your property but also ensures maximum occupancy and profitability.

Visualising Your Future Space:

Our services extend beyond traditional interior design. We provide detailed 3D visualisations and realistic renders, allowing you to see your future space before it's even built. This immersive experience not only helps in decision-making but also ensures that every design element aligns with your vision, guaranteeing a space that is both aesthetically pleasing and financially rewarding.

Partner with ARI Interiors: Your Gateway to Profitable Investments

Choosing ARI Interiors means choosing a partner dedicated to elevating your property investments.

Artha Interior Design LLC is an Interior Design Studio based in Dubai, recognized as a symbol of refined craftsmanship and design excellence. Interior design is the heart of our practice, encompassing a holistic range of services that take a project from its earliest vision to its final realization. Driven by our ethos “The Way We Live,” we design spaces that reflect the aspirations, lifestyles, and identities of our clients. Dubai’s dynamic and ever-evolving landscape presents limitless possibilities and people seeking distinctive and personalized design solutions. AIDL stands ready to meet this growing demand, transforming new properties and developments into extraordinary spaces that resonate with luxury, character, and comfort.

Our design philosophy is anchored in three essential pillars:- Beauty, Expressiveness, and Functionalism 

At Artha Interior Design LLC, we believe that design is an experience - a delicate balance of the tangible and the ethereal, the practical and the poetic. Our mission is simple yet profound: to create spaces that inspire, uplift, and endure.

Name: Higham Copenhagen
Description:
At Higham Copenhagen, we believe true design is a personal journey, an endless quest for beauty. 

We create for ourselves, bring the beauty we see from our eyes. By keeping it away from commercial trends or the whims of an audience, we aim to preserve the truth and originality of each design.

Our products are designed in dialogue with our philosophy. They speak to an audience that looks at furniture beyond its functions, whisper to those who crave more than a piece of object. They reach out to the soul, to the unspoken desires for depth and meaning.

Our design language is innovative, carrying a unique artistic signature you won’t find anywhere else. Each product at Higham Copenhagen must justify its existence, not just through functionality, but through originality and enduring appeal. We believe that’s the job of any artist—to convey personality and truth through form.

At Higham Copenhagen, we hold fast to the belief that when you create something truly for yourself, the result becomes something profoundly meaningful for others. Authenticity resonates, making each design unique, original, and true. We’re here to push the boundaries of the ordinary - so that your home can be a place where art and life come together seamlessly.

Creative Direction: Steen Higham & Bastian Higham

Name: INVITA Hillerød
Description:
INVITA til både private, erhverv og professionelle indkøbere. 

Velkommen til vores verden af skræddersyede løsninger! 

INVITA er en af Danmarks førende leverandører af skræddersyede kvalitetskøkkener, badeværelser og garderober. Med over 40 års erfaring og mere end 500.000 individuelt designede løsninger, er vi stolte af at være dem vi er.

Hos INVITA har vi fokus på at levere unikke løsninger i højeste kvalitet, dansk designet og produceret.  

Oplev INVITA Hillerød A/S, hvor vi bringer dine boligdrømme til livs med vores eksklusive sortiment inden for køkken, bad og garderobe. Vores passionerede indretningskonsulenter står klar til at forvandle dit hjem med skræddersyede løsninger, der afspejler din unikke stil.

Vi er stolte af at være mere end bare en leverandør af kvalitetsmøbler og -designs. Vi er nemlig også dine erfarne indretningskonsulenter, dine drømmes arkitekter og dine projekters håndværksmestre. Vores mission er at skabe rum, der ikke kun er æstetisk tiltalende, men også funktionelle og personlige.

Ekspertise i Totalentrepriser.  
Vi har i over 25 år håndteret hele processen fra idé til færdiggørelse, så du kan trygt overlade det fulde projekt til os. 

Totalløsninger til erhverv og professionelle indkøbere:  
Er du developer, totalentreprenør, storentreprenør, offentlig bygherre, boligselskab, arkitekt, advokat, ejendomsadministrator, tømrer, snedker eller typehusfirma? Så leverer og monterer vores erhvervsafdeling inventar til et stort antal af små og store byggeprojekter. 

Gensidig vækst og succes - Bliv INVITA partnerkunde. 
Vi tror bæredygtige partnerskaber giver mulighed for vækst og succes for begge parter. Lad os tage en dialog om, hvordan vi sammen kan skabe enestående køkkenløsninger og opbygge varige relationer med vores fælles kunder. 

Vi ser frem til at skabe smukke, funktionelle og personlige rum sammen med dig.

Name: BARAQ architecture intérieure
Description:
BARAQ est une agence d’architecture intérieure spécialisée dans l’aménagement tertiaire et les espaces de travail.

Nous accompagnons les entreprises et leurs dirigeants dans la conception et la réalisation de bureaux et sièges d’entreprise, avec une approche globale, rigoureuse et orientée usage.

Chaque projet est pensé pour répondre aux besoins réels des utilisateurs, traduire l’identité de l’entreprise et garantir une organisation des espaces claire et fonctionnelle.

Nous intervenons en mission complète, de la phase de réflexion à la livraison, en assurant :

-l’analyse des besoins et des usages,
-la conception architecturale et l’organisation des espaces,
-le cadrage budgétaire et la coordination du projet,
-le suivi du chantier jusqu’à la livraison.

Nous défendons une architecture intérieure sobre et durable, où chaque choix est justifié par l’usage, le contexte et les contraintes du projet.

Si notre cœur de métier est l’aménagement tertiaire, nous intervenons également sur des projets retail, hôtellerie-restauration, santé et enseignement, lorsque les enjeux d’usage, de fonctionnement et de cohérence des espaces sont centraux.

Notre conviction :
un aménagement réussi est avant tout un espace bien pensé, lisible et adapté à ceux qui l’utilisent au quotidien.

BARAQ — Conception architecturale, réalisation maîtrisée.

Collaboration is at the heart of our approach. By maintaining strong relationships with architects, builders, and developers, we ensure every project reaches its full potential. Our passion lies in creating well-crafted, inclusive interiors that combine aesthetic appeal with practical functionality, ensuring every space is tailored to meet the needs of our clients while promoting accessibility for all.

Tatareal Interior Design stands as a leading force in bespoke design and interior decorations, boasting a rich legacy that began in 1988. Faire de votre univers un lieu unique qui vous ressemble et où vous, vos convives, vos client·e·s, vos patient·e·s vous sentirez choyés, sereins et accueillis, voilà ce qui m’anime!

MON OBJECTIF est de renforcer l’identité de votre espace en vous accompagnant dans votre projet. Ensemble nous transformerons votre espace commercial en un lieu attractif, votre intérieur en un cocon harmonieux ou encore votre cabinet médical ou dentaire en un endroit où l’on se sent bien et rassuré.

Elle saura respecter votre budget, il ne faut pas toujours de gros travaux pour faire basculer une ambiance. La réalisation de projets abordables et personnalisés répondant à vos attentes fait partie de l’ADN de Sur un Autre Ton.
MON POINT FORT est sans aucun doute ma passion mais aussi ma créativité, ma vision globale et mon sens de l’adaptation, en fonction de vos envies et de vos besoins. J’aime utiliser des matériaux bruts et naturels et mélanger les matières et les styles.
MON EXPÉRIENCE PASSÉE en tant que professionnelle dans le domaine médical, ma pratique et mes échanges avec les patients, sont des atouts indéniables pour me projeter dans vos cabinets dentaires ou médicaux, je connais les contraintes et je saurai vous guider afin de rendre vos espaces d’accueil agréables et esthétiques.

Description:
Founded in 2005, Alya Architecture is an architectural firm providing customized interior design and application services for residential and commercial projects. In our interior architecture projects across Istanbul, we prioritize creativity while focusing on simplicity and refined craftsmanship. Our modern approach is shaped by an experienced team of architects, interior architects, and engineers who combine technical expertise with artistic vision. Operating from our headquarters on Istanbul’s European side, we have successfully completed over 300 projects both in Turkey and internationally.

As an interior architecture studio, we deliver turnkey interior design and application services for residential, office, retail, restaurant, manufacturing facility, and hotel projects. In every project, we work meticulously to maximize both functionality and aesthetics, carefully planning each detail to develop solutions that best meet our clients’ needs.

What sets us apart is our ability to manage electrical and mechanical works in-house in addition to interior architecture services. Through our partner companies, Alya Elektrik and Alya Mekanik, we deliver projects under a single roof, ensuring faster execution and higher quality outcomes. This integrated structure strengthens interdisciplinary coordination and enables us to provide seamless, holistic solutions. We believe that the success of any project depends on the quality of its connections.

Kdo jsme
Oživujeme interiéry řemeslně čistě a kvalitně.
Fabrik8 je studio řemeslníků a umělců, kteří se specializují na zakázkové truhlářství a interiérový design pro soukromé klienty i architektonické projekty. Od jedinečného nábytku až po interiéry v plném rozsahu, vyrábíme s precizností, vášní a respektem k designové integritě.

Co děláme
Vytváříme promyšlené, špičkově zpracované interiéry, které jsou funkční i estetické.
Ať už realizujeme podrobný architektonický plán, nebo vyvíjíme koncept od základů, úzce spolupracujeme s architekty, designéry i klienty, abychom přenesli nápady do reality, a to bez kompromisů.
Naše služby:
Nábytek na míru
Kuchyně, vestavěné skříně a samostatné kusy, tvořené na míru vašemu prostoru a životnímu stylu
Návrh interiéru
Kompletní služby od konceptu až po realizaci návrhu a instalaci
Společné stavby
Spolupráce s architekty a návrhářskými týmy pro komerční a rezidenční projekty
Věříme, že dobrý design si zaslouží dobré provedení. Neomezujeme se na jednoduchá řešení a nehrajeme si na prostředníky. Záleží nám na každém detailu. Dbáme na integritu každého projektu a zajišťujeme, aby kvalita nebyla nikdy na druhém místě.
Neexistuje nic takového jako dokonale hladký projekt, ale se správným týmem výsledek vždy stojí za to.

Description:

From the very beginning, the company stood out by offering integrated solutions that include kitchens, wardrobes, interior doors, and vanities — all crafted with high quality and attention to detail.

With a specialized team and over 25 years of experience, ZBOM continues its journey with confidence, offering design solutions that suit every home and reflect each client’s individuality.

Name: L'Design
Description:
Silver medalist twice in World Championships in Aesthetic Group Gymnastics


I’m passionate about designing inclusive, healthy, and truly unique work environments that prioritize people—both their mental and physical wellbeing. In a world where mental health challenges are on the rise, it’s more important than ever to create spaces where everyone feels safe, valued, and inspired to do their best work.

My approach is deeply rooted in empathy and backed by science. In collaboration with Humboldt University in Berlin, one of Europe’s leading institutions in psychology, we’re scientifically analyzing how the work environment directly impacts mental health, creativity, and overall performance. This research underpins my design philosophy, ensuring that every choice—from layout to materials—serves a higher purpose.

As someone committed to ESG principles, I prioritize working with brands and products that uphold high standards of sustainability, ethical practices, and social responsibility. Creating spaces that align with these values isn’t just good for people—it’s good for the planet.

**What I Offer:**
- Comprehensive demand analysis
- Interior design tailored for inclusivity and wellbeing
- Negotiations with ESG-compliant brands and suppliers
- Cost balance calculations and financial planning
- Project management from concept to completion
- Expertise in European Public Tenders
- Delivery and assembly management

At Urve.Berlin, people always come first. I’m here to build environments where tolerance, empathy, and wellbeing are at the core of every decision. Let’s create spaces where everyone can thrive.

Element7 is the leading brand in award-winning engineered wood flooring, specialising in wide-plank and parquet (patterned) styles. We focus primarily on prime and ultra-prime residential properties, with a select offering for exclusive commercial projects.

As pioneers in the engineered wood flooring revolution, Element7 floors are the preferred choice of architects and interior designers. Our engineered wide-plank floors are renowned for their exceptional stability, making them the most reliable option in the industry.

With our "balanced and blocked" planks, we offer an unparalleled range of widths (up to 500mm) and lengths (up to 5m). Starting from £135 per square meter, Element7 brings luxury, durability, and innovative design to every space.

Discover why Element7 is the trusted name for luxury wood flooring and why our floors are the first choice for discerning design professionals.

Name: Build with Rosa
Description:
Rosa Santiago Zimmerman is the Founder and CEO of RSZ Design + Development, a woman and Latina-owned design & build firm. Born and raised in Ponce, Puerto Rico, Rosa has spent nearly three decades mastering interior design, construction, and project management. Rosa built her career on resilience and creativity while breaking barriers in an industry where women and Latinas remain underrepresented. 

Rosa is the creator and executive producer of Build with Rosa, a bilingual docuseries that brings audiences inside the realities of design and construction, showcasing both artistry and the challenges behind the scenes. She is also the author of Rosita’s Design Adventures - Las Aventuras de Diseño de Rosita, a bilingual children’s book that introduces design through the eyes of a spirted Puerto Rican girl, Rosita. She introduces children to design concepts, teamwork, and cultural identity, inspiring them to see the world as a place of limitless possibilities. 

On stage, Rosa weaves her personal story with actionable insights, showing how intention, grit, and gratitude drive both business and life. She empowers audiences to lead with confidence, embrace authenticity, and transform challenges into opportunities. Whether addressing industry peers, women leaders, or aspiring entrepreneurs, Rosa inspires people to reimagine what is possible and to build not just spaces but futures.

Cuvântul cheie al studioului este “atmosfera”, cred eu cel mai important aspect al unei amenajări. Cum te simți într-un spațiu este decisiv în perceperea spațiului ca fiind “acasă”.

Name: We Are Sparrow Studio
Description:
We are a hospitality-focused interior design studio guided by curiosity, craft, and experience. Our work is rooted in thoughtful storytelling and careful execution, shaping spaces that feel considered, inviting, and meant to be lived in.

At Sparrow Studio, our approach begins with curiosity and care. We pay close attention to how spaces are experienced, how they unfold over time, and how they quietly support the people within them. Design, for us, is not about excess. It is about intention, clarity, and thoughtful restraint.

We are a collaborative studio of designers and creative partners, working in close conversation across disciplines. Each project is guided from early vision through realization with shared intention, allowing ideas to take shape thoughtfully and function seamlessly in the real world.

Working across hospitality, restaurant, and lifestyle environments, we balance storytelling with a deep understanding of how spaces operate. We value early clarity, measured decision-making, and design choices that hold up over time. The result is work that feels composed and inviting, layered yet effortless, and grounded in both experience and use.

In onze werkplaats beschikken wij over de modernste houtbewerkingsmachines. We doen alles zelf, of het nu gaat om plaatverwerking, bewerken van massief hout, CNC freeswerk en afwerken van diverse materialen in onze spuiterij. Onze meubel-interieurmakers zijn stuk voor stuk vakmensen. Wat uw wensen ook zijn, wij denken met u mee en zoeken naar oplossingen die niet alleen verrassend en vernieuwend zijn, maar ook altijd praktisch en betrouwbaar. Name: Aker Interiors
Description:
Aker Interiors is a boutique interior design studio based in Los Angeles specializing in high-end, full-service residential design with an eye for quiet luxury & style. We thoughtfully curate unique & personal spaces reflecting who our clients are and how they live.

Featured in publications such as Architectural Digest, Domino, Remodelista, Luxe, & Rue Magazine, Aker Interiors has established a reputation for highly personalized interiors spanning an array of design styles, all reflecting the marriage of our client’s individuality and the studio’s detailed eye for style. Our small, powerhouse team, led by Principal Gabrielle Aker, achieves the balance between vision and implementation, knowing that concept without execution is fruitless.

Our team begins each project with client discovery to understand who our clients are and how they live, setting the foundation for a personal, informed design process. We create with person and place in mind, stretching our clients to think outside the box and inspiring them along the way. Core to who we are is our ability to move between creative interior visualization and project management with a focus on kindness and respect for every person involved from beginning to end. We walk our clients through the highs and lows of the design & construction process, managing each and every step from concept to completion with empathy, professionalism, and humor (as needed). The process can feel uncertain, but trust produces something better than imagined.

In a world of visual inundation, we look to new forms of inspiration, allowing us to evolve and create in unique and authentic ways, always seeking to push beyond the expected.

Our mission is to transform the often opaque practices of the interior design industry, making the process clearer and more accessible. To date, we have remodeled over 2,000 apartments and secured US$44 million in Series C funding from notable investors, including SoftBank and Samsung Ventures.

We’ve reimagined the interior design and remodeling process to make it customer-centered and enjoyable. With a dedicated Design Manager by your side, a wide selection of quality materials to choose from, and a user-friendly app that puts everything in one place, we help you create your dream home without the worry.

- Apartments Remodeled: Successfully remodeled over 2,000 apartments

Name: Square Interio
Description:
Welcome to Square Interio, your go-to source for interior design and home and office decor inspiration. Our company is dedicated to helping you transform your space into a reflection of your unique personality and style.

Whether you're a homeowner, renter, or design enthusiast, we've got something for everyone. Our website features a wide range of topics, from furniture selection and color schemes to DIY projects and budget-friendly design ideas. We believe that everyone deserves to live in a beautiful space that makes them feel happy and comfortable.

At Square Interio, we're passionate about staying up-to-date with the latest design trends and techniques. We use our blog to share our knowledge and expertise with our readers, so you can feel confident that you're getting the most accurate and reliable information.

Who We Are

Founded by Rohit Chhajer and co-founded by Divya Chhajer, Chisel & Wood has been revolutionizing the interior design landscape since 2016. Our newly opened 3000 sq.ft experience center in Newtown, serves as a hub of creativity, offering clients an immersive design journey. We specialize in turnkey interior solutions, ensuring a seamless transition from concept to completion. Our expertise spans:
 Bespoke Interior Design – Tailored solutions that bring your dream spaces to life
 Custom-Built Modular Furniture – High-quality, space-efficient designs

 Turnkey Execution – From planning to installation, we handle it all

Our Mission

Our goal is to simplify your interior journey. We provide personalized, one-stop solutions that seamlessly blend style, color, and budget, eliminating the stress of material sourcing and vendor coordination. By leveraging our extensive product range and hands-on approach, we save time, optimize costs, and ensure a smooth, enjoyable experience from start to finish.

Who We Work With

 Interior Designers & Architects – Enhancing creative visions with our expertise

To help teams thrive, we incorporate tools that enhance collaboration and connection through data-informed design. HTH og uno form- gruppens historie starter i 1986, hvor Fred Karlsen ble forhandler for HTH kjøkken i Trondheim. Vi har i dag 10 butikker i Norge, og forhandler 2 sterke danske merkevarer på det norske markedet, HTH og uno form

I dag er vi Norges største spesialist på kjøkkeninnredninger med en omsetning på 850 millioner, og har butikker i Trondheim, Bergen, Stavanger, Drammen, Fredrikstad, Ski og Oslo. Fred Karlsen er fortsatt eier og øverste leder av selskapet.

I sum er vi i underkant av 200 ansatte som ønsker å hjelpe deg til å kunne ønske velkommen hjem i flotte omgivelser. Vi leverer både til privatmarkedet og proffmarkedet, og jobber kontinuerlig for å levere gode kundeopplevelser for våre kunder, store som små. 
Sammen jakter vi nå 1 Milliard i omsetning, og forventer å nå det i løpet av 2025. 

Enten du er kunde, leverandør, ansatt eller bare nysgjerrig håper vi du vil følge oss på ferden videre, og vi vil gjerne ønske deg velkommen hjem i en av våre butikker.

Name: Morell architektura wnętrz
Description:
Mirella Pawliczek | Architekt wnętrz – MORELL

Jako architekt wnętrz tworzę przestrzenie, które są funkcjonalne, estetyczne i ponadczasowe. Specjalizuję się w projektowaniu minimalistycznych, nowoczesnych wnętrz, ale z radością łączę różne style – od loftowego po klasyczny. Moje projekty to nie tylko estetyka, ale przede wszystkim komfort i funkcjonalność, które odpowiadają na potrzeby Klientów.

W MORELL traktuję każdy projekt indywidualnie, z pełnym zaangażowaniem. Dobrze zaprojektowane wnętrze to inwestycja, która zwraca się w komforcie życia codziennego i trwałości rozwiązań.

Dzięki doświadczeniu zdobytemu na Politechnice Śląskiej w Gliwicach i pracy w biurach projektowych, znam wartość precyzyjnego planowania i doboru materiałów. Minimalizm, nowoczesność i funkcjonalność to elementy, które szczególnie mi leżą, ale z równą chęcią łączę je z klasycznymi akcentami.

Stawiam na innowacyjne rozwiązania, które usprawniają życie codzienne, np. praktyczne zabudowy i funkcjonalne schowki. Uwielbiam łączyć różne style, ale styl glamour nie jest tym, w którym się odnajduję – preferuję subtelną elegancję i prostotę.

Moje projekty to efekt współpracy z Klientami, którzy szukają przestrzeni, w której życie będzie łatwiejsze i przyjemniejsze. Dzięki profesjonalizmowi, wszechstronności i dbałości o detale, moje projekty są realizowane z pełnym zaangażowaniem.

Działam głównie w Gliwicach, Katowicach, Siemianowicach Śląskich, ale projekty realizuję również zdalnie na terenie całej Polski. Zapraszam do kontaktu i wspólnej podróży w projektowanie wnętrz, które będą pasować do Twojego stylu życia i przekształcą przestrzeń w miejsce, które będzie Cię inspirować każdego dnia.

Le nostre proposte includono opere d’arte murale in muschio, installazioni innovative in lichene stabilizzato e soluzioni di arredo biofilico su misura per arricchire gli interni residenziali e commerciali.

Ci impegniamo a promuovere la sostenibilità e il design ecologico, utilizzando materiali di origine responsabile e tecniche eco-friendly per ridurre l'impatto ambientale.

Un'Esperienza Anglo-Italiana 

Arte Muschio è un’azienda anglo-italiana, che unisce esperienza internazionale e artigianalità. Prima di stabilirci in Italia, abbiamo operato con successo nel Regno Unito, affinando la nostra competenza nel settore del verde stabilizzato per progetti di interior design di alto livello.

In Arte Muschio crediamo che la natura abbia il potere di trasformare gli spazi in ambienti armoniosi e rigeneranti, migliorando il benessere e favorendo una connessione più profonda con il mondo naturale.

Unisciti a noi nella missione di rendere gli ambienti più verdi e ispiratori. Creiamo insieme qualcosa di straordinario.

The art of creating your home

Om een interieur te creëren waarin kleuren, materialen en structuren allemaal in balans voelen, is het belangrijk om de perfecte blend te vinden tussen contrast en samenhang. Kleuren die elkaar aanvullen, materialen die warmte en textuur toevoegen, en structuren die diepte en levendigheid creëren. Zo ontstaat een ruimte die niet alleen esthetisch aantrekkelijk is, maar ook rust en warmte uitstraalt. Een interieur waar jij elke dag van kunt genieten.

Ik help je met keuzes te maken en ontzorg je tijdens het uitvoerende proces zodat jij kan uitkijken naar een prachtige nieuwe inrichting.
Vooral vertaal ik jouw nieuwe interieurwensen met veel vakkennis én enthousiasme.
Als interieurontwerper werk ik dan ook zelf graag met vrolijke, ondernemende particulieren en gezinnen. 

Elke ruimte waarin je je bevindt, zou een hoog niveau van verfijning, rust en verrassende details moeten weerspiegelen. Dit creëer ik graag voor jou tijdens onze samenwerking.

Wat mag je verwachten van mijn ontwerpstijl:
Tijdloos interieur in een eigentijdse warm Scandinavische interieurstijl.
Interieur met een ruimtelijke indeling en heldere zichtlijnen.
Interieur met een rustige sfeervolle basis, oog voor detail en een interieuradvies dat professioneel is uitgewerkt.

Sterk in totaalontwerpen waarbij we vanaf de eerste stap samenwerken.

Lijkt het je leuk om samen aan de slag te gaan?
Neem gerust contact op om te bespreken wat ik voor je kan betekenen.

Name: Jeid Studio
Description:
We work on new construction and remodel projects as interior designers, but also as detailed communicators. We've invested in automation to save ourselves time and improve the accuracy of our work. Moreover, we’re able to generate detailed materials for our clients and the other people involved in the home-building process, like builders and subcontractors.

We believe the home-building industry is full of talented people, but they often don't communicate effectively. One dynamic that leads to this issue is underutilized diversity. There are stark differences across all the typical personas involved in the creation or remodel of a home. From the client to the builder to the tradesperson, there is a wide array of education levels and personalities. Often, this leads to communication issues. But we don't think it has to. Instead of wasted materials, lost time, and disappointed clients, we see a solution through customized playbooks for each persona involved. We want to be talented furnishers of beautiful homes, but we also want to be translators who can maximize the talents of others involved, thereby reducing frustration and material waste.

Name: Joshua Lux Innenarchitektur
Description:
Die Entwürfe und Projekte von Joshua Lux Innenarchitektur bauen auf ein starkes Storytelling, ein grundlegendes Konzept, eine fesselnde Erzählung. Nur so kann in unserer Auffassung ein Interior als ganzheitliches Konzept seine Funktion erfüllen. Unsere Stärke liegt in der Konzeption individueller Atmosphären und der Fähigkeit diese Ideen technisch und gestalterisch zu realisieren. Der Arbeitsprozess umfasst dabei die kreative Entwicklung und exakte Detaillierung der Projekte – von den Innenräumen über die Gebäudehülle bis hin zum individuellen Möbel oder Objekt. Ein sparsamer Umgang mit Ressourcen, die Verwendung von heimischen Materialien sowie energie- und kosteneffiziente Lösungen stehen dabei im ständigen Austausch. Der Fokus des Studios Joshua Lux Innenarchitektur liegt auf privaten Residential- und Hospitality-Projekten. Private Wohnträume – von der Stadtvilla bis zum Penthouse, gehobene Gastronomie, Bars und exklusive Stores stellen dabei den Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeit dar.

Unsere Leistungen reichen von konzeptioneller und design-strategischer Beratung bis hin zu den klassischen Leistungsphasen der HOAI, sind immer den individuellen Ansprüchen unserer Auftraggeber angepasst und am Erfolg des Projektes ausgerichtet. Grundlage ist die individuelle Interpretation von Kontext, Nutzung und Wünschen in der Beratung und Konzeption von einzigartigen Räumen und Erlebnissen. Wir sind ein Team junger Innenarchitekten, Architekten, Designer & Fachplaner in Wiesbaden und Hamburg mit dem Anspruch eine harmonische Kombination von außerordentlichem Design und optimaler Funktion zu schaffen.

Description:

At Krita Designs, we believe that architecture is not just about buildings, but about creating experiences. That's why we take a holistic approach to design, considering every aspect of the space from the layout and lighting to the materials and finishes. Whether it's a residential or commercial project, we are committed to delivering innovative and timeless designs that exceed our client's expectations.

We understand that every project is unique, and that's why we take the time to listen to our clients' needs and preferences, ensuring that our designs reflect their vision and lifestyle. From the initial concept to the final execution, we are dedicated to providing personalized attention and exceptional service every step of the way.

Name: Pi2 studio
Description:
Jesteśmy zespołem kreatywnych projektantów wnętrz, specjalizujących się w tworzeniu przestrzeni, które łączą estetykę, funkcjonalność i indywidualne potrzeby naszych klientów. Realizujemy projekty wnętrz prywatnych, biurowych oraz medycznych, nadając każdemu z nich wyjątkowy charakter i harmonię.

Nasze wartości:
Indywidualne podejście: Każdy projekt jest dla nas unikalny – słuchamy Twoich potrzeb i przekuwamy je w spersonalizowane rozwiązania.

Funkcjonalność: Tworzymy przestrzenie, które nie tylko zachwycają wizualnie, ale także odpowiadają na codzienne wyzwania użytkowników.

Jakość i precyzja: Dbamy o każdy detal, współpracując z najlepszymi dostawcami i wykonawcami.

Co oferujemy?

Wnętrza prywatne: Domy i mieszkania, które stają się Twoim azylem.

Biura: Funkcjonalne i inspirujące przestrzenie pracy, sprzyjające produktywności i komfortowi.

Obiekty medyczne: Ergonomiczne i przyjazne wnętrza, które spełniają najwyższe standardy branży.

Dlaczego my?
Wierzymy, że dobrze zaprojektowane wnętrze ma moc pozytywnego wpływu na życie i pracę. Dzięki naszej wiedzy, doświadczeniu i pasji tworzymy przestrzenie, które wyrażają Twoją osobowość i spełniają Twoje oczekiwania.

Zaprojektujmy razem coś wyjątkowego! Skontaktuj się z nami, aby rozpocząć współpracę.

#ProjektowanieWnętrz #Architektura #DesignWnętrz

For project inquiries, feel free to email us at jigaroffice.talati@gmail.com, send us a direct message here on LinkedIn, or reach out to us on Instagram (@jtandassociates). You can also request a call.

Name: Walls With Souls
Description:
Postoje prostori koji ostavljaju dojam već pri prvom ulasku.
U njima se osjećaj lakoće i pripadnosti događa spontano. Prostor umiruje, ali istovremeno potiče energiju. U njemu se zadržava dulje, a u mislima mu se rado vraća.

Takvi prostori ne nastaju slučajno. Oni su rezultat promišljenog pristupa u kojem svaki element ima svoju svrhu – boja, tekstura, kompozicija. Zidovi pritom nisu samo pozadina, već važan nositelj atmosfere.

Zidne dekoracije koje pažljivo nadopunjuju koncept interijera mogu postati ključan faktor u stvaranju prepoznatljivog i emocionalno snažnog prostora – bilo da je riječ o hotelu, vili za odmor, poslovnom ambijentu ili ekskluzivnom smještaju.

Walls with Souls spaja umjetnost, materijal i arhitektonsku viziju u zidne dekoracije koje oplemenjuju prostor, podržavaju dizajnersku ideju i ostavljaju snažan dojam na krajnjeg korisnika.
Radimo u suradnji s arhitektima, dizajnerima interijera i investitorima koji žele više – ne samo estetsku vrijednost, već i emociju, priču i identitet prostora.

Zahvaljujući kvalitetnoj izvedbi, individualnom pristupu i pomno razvijenim kolekcijama, postajemo partner na kojeg se možete osloniti kada prostor treba zračiti posebnošću.

Name: Hashtag Interiors
Description:
WHO WE ARE...

We are a close-knit team of genuine people. We are also passionate about delivering the best design ideas for residence and workplaces environments.

We believe in building long-term relationships with our clients and we live our values.

Our design team are packed with inspirational design ideas and also bespoke furniture options for your residence and workspaces. Our designers can also be available to walk you through the design and creative process.

DESIGN CONSULTANCY
Workplace consultancy is the process of discovering what your office needs to include and how it should look. It provides the data and insights needed to create a great office design.

We are constantly coming up with creative new ideas, using our showroom as a testing ground to see what works. It helps us to push the boundaries of interiors and the use.

WHAT WE DO...

COMPLETE OFFICE DESIGN AND FIT OUT SOLUTION FROM INITIAL CONCEPTS TO COMPLETION AND BEYOND.

We specialise in delivering complete turnkey packages where clients trust us with a complete project from end-to-end. The range of services we offer include:

PROJECT MANAGEMENT AND BUILD
The office design process follows on from consultancy and includes initial space planning and test-fits, creating mood boards and look & feel designs. As a design takes shape it usually includes creating a 3D virtual model which allows CGI images and walk-through videos to be created.

HYBRID WORKING
The pandemic has driven a huge shift towards more flexible working arrangements. Hybrid Working is becoming the new normal for many companies.
co-working spaces have fast gained popularity due to various factors such as the economic and practical benefits they provide for new businesses. Aside from that, they highlight independent employees’ social and collaborative advantages.

Name: Grayscale Homes
Description:
The definition of grayscale is a range of gray shades from white to black. Our company name, Grayscale Homes (GH), was inspired by the simplicity, traditional nature and monochromatic display of grayscale artwork. Owner and Founder, Tiffany Acosta, realized her appreciation for this style of art during a college course where she practiced the technique of creating two-dimensional art with just white and black paint.

She soon discovered she was not only skilled in this specific expression of art but found the aesthetic that spoke to her most. This artistry, while simple, possesses character and resonates with an older time period before color print and TV. The juxtaposition of modern meets traditional exhilarated Tiffany and this trickled into her passion for interiors.

GH specializes in creating simple, monochromatic interiors with bold touches of black and mixing styles - old and new. In addition to our traditional services we offer e-design packages and a wide range of minimalistic home decor pieces online.

Things were a lot simpler back then and we pride ourselves on creating beautiful spaces that embody that from a fresh and new perspective. There are real benefits to minimalism - one major benefit being, reduced clutter contributes to less feelings of stress and anxiety. Our company was established with your home and quality of life in mind. 

Thank you for your support and we look forward to working with you in the future and seeing GH pieces throughout your home for years to come!

Van idee tot eindproduct

Name: Diaz-Caneja Interiors
Description:
Diaz-Caneja Interiors is a Luxembourg based interior design & decoration company specialising in residential interiors for private clients and developers.

Our mission is to create unique homes for our clients that make a strong statement. Each and every client has their own personality, tastes and requirements that need to be reflected in their home. At the same time, each property has its own set of characteristics and originality that need to be respected to bring the most out of a redesign.

We believe the key to creating a functional and beautiful home requires blending our clients’ needs and personality while respecting the origin of the property.

We help clients reflect on what defines them and help them visualise what their living space could become. Because each client has their own personality and lifestyle, no two of our designs will ever be similar to each other. Each design is created from scratch to stand on its own.

We work with independent furniture makers to deliver tailor made designs made to fit our clients’ homes. Transforming a home can be a complex project with many moving parts. We aim to make this process easier for our clients through our designs, precise planning, and monitoring of the construction sites to make sure design plans are respected.

Name: منزلك | Manzilik
Description:
Manzilik is an innovative online platform revolutionizing the interior design and decoration industry in Saudi Arabia and the Arab World. With a mission to be the top choice for homeowners and professionals, Manzilik offers a comprehensive range of services and features to create dream homes.

One standout feature is the "Find Professionals" section, where homeowners can easily connect with a remarkable group of interior design and decor professionals. They can request services and receive expert advice and assistance directly through the Manzilik platform. This streamlined process saves homeowners time and effort in finding reliable professionals for their projects.

Furthermore, Manzilik offers an exciting opportunity for homeowners to explore a curated selection of interior design gigs. Professionals create encapsulated interior design services, known as "Gigs," based on their expertise and preferences. Homeowners can conveniently browse these gigs, select the one that suits their needs, and order it directly through the platform. This seamless integration of service inquiries and gig purchases simplifies the process for homeowners, empowering them to access professional services with ease.

By offering both personalized service inquiries and pre-packaged gigs, Manzilik provides flexibility and convenience for homeowners, catering to a variety of project requirements and budgets. This unique approach sets Manzilik apart as a platform that not only connects homeowners with professionals but also facilitates direct transactions, enhancing the overall user experience.

With its commitment to user satisfaction, continuous updates, and user-friendly interface, Manzilik is reshaping the way homeowners and professionals collaborate, making it the go-to platform for interior design and decoration needs. Join Manzilik today and unlock a world of possibilities to transform your home.

Description:
Welkom bij Wiebeke á Table. 
Waar passie voor horeca, dienstverlening, vormgeving en klantbeleving samenkomen.
Mijn bedrijf adviseert (hospitality) bedrijven met het geven van een interieur advies, website-ontwerp en social media.
--
Bij Wiebeke a table begrijp ik als geen ander de essentie van groei en het belang van goed doordacht (interieur)advies. Met mijn kritisch oog en expertise wil ik uw ruimte tot leven brengen, waarbij ik alle zintuigen prikkel. Mijn advies zorgt ervoor dat elk element harmonieus samenkomt en de gewenste sfeer en emotie op een zintuiglijke manier overbrengt. Ik streef ernaar uw visie te integreren en elk detail perfect af te stemmen op uw concept, waardoor uw zaak een unieke en betekenisvolle plek wordt waar gasten keer op keer naar terugkeren. Samen creëren we een onvergetelijke ervaring die alle zintuigen betovert! Ik geloof in eigenheid, look en feel, identiteit en uitstralingen van een horeca bedrijf. 
Wil je een nieuwe zaak beginnen of de puntjes op de i zetten dan kan ik jou hierbij adviseren.

Name: BRINDLE Inredning STHLM
Description:
Brindle Inredning AB skapar genomtänkta, hållbara och funktionella miljöer där estetik, affärsnytta och människors vardag möts.

Vi arbetar med helhetslösningar inom inredning och renovering för företagskunder – såsom kontor, lobbyer, restauranger och andra publika miljöer – där vi tar ansvar för hela processen: från koncept, planering och materialval till färdig miljö. Med stor förståelse för verksamhetens behov skapar vi miljöer som stärker varumärket, trivseln och funktionen i det dagliga arbetet.

Parallellt har vi en stark närvaro inom privata bostäder, där vi hjälper våra kunder genom hela renoverings- och inredningsresan. Oavsett om det gäller ett enskilt rum eller ett helt hus arbetar vi strukturerat, personligt och med stor omsorg om detaljerna.

Det som särskiljer oss är vårt personliga arbetssätt, breda leverantörsval och vår förmåga att hålla ihop komplexa projekt – alltid med kundens behov, estetik och långsiktighet i fokus.

 Verksamma i Stockholm med omnejd
 Kontakta oss för rådgivning eller projektförfrågan

Name: Casa Paradox Luxe
Description:
Established in 1993 by the visionary partnership of Raseel Gujral Ansal and Navin Ansal, Casa Paradox Luxe stands as an embodiment of the finest in living and design. This esteemed brand was conceived with a profound design philosophy, aiming to bring to life exquisite furniture and lifestyle products.

Casa Paradox Luxe seamlessly melds global refinement with an indigenous design sensibility, offering a captivating blend of contemporary and timeless creations. These pieces not only reflect the intrinsic essence of both traditional and modern India but also come in a captivating array of colours and styles, all meticulously tailored to meet the unique requirements of discerning clients.

Distinguished by its unwavering commitment to quality craftsmanship and innovative design, Casa Paradox Luxe has elevated every piece into a collectible, and each collection into an artistic legacy. A notable milestone in its journey was achieved when Casa Paradox Luxe became India's first brand to grace the prestigious Maison et Objet Paris show in 2013, garnering acclaim from connoisseurs worldwide.

In essence, Casa Paradox Luxe remains dedicated to the pursuit of excellence, continually striving to surpass its own standards. It proudly retains its status as India's foremost Lifestyle brand, with each piece serving as a design marvel, a tangible manifestation of Raseel Gujral Ansal's exceptional design prowess.

'The Spirit of Alchemy' infuses every facet of Casa Paradox Luxe, ushering in a sense of transformation and wonder in the world of design and living.

 We collaborate with the best Italian companies, whose Made in Italy production guarantees the quality and reliability of the products.

Description:
Wenn Ihre Räume einen neuen individuellen Look brauchen, dann sind Sie hier richtig. Wir setzen alles daran, Ihnen den Raum zu erschaffen, den Sie brauchen, um Ihre Träume zu leben. Name: Alican Çetinkaya İç Mimarlık

Name: FG Fabrics
Description:
Worldwide there is an enormous amount of so called ‘deadstock textile’ from fashion and interior industry, catching dust on a shelf. These fabrics are either ‘overproduced’, rejected because of a deviation in color or just not used anymore for unknown reasons. They are stored as leftovers after a garment production run and are not part of a plan for immediate or future use. Missed opportunity if you ask us! That is why we call these fabrics FEEL GOOD FABRICS.

Textile production produces an estimated 1.2 billion tonnes of CO2 and consumes 79 billion cubic meters of fresh water annually. FEEL GOOD Fabrics contributes to less waste, by turning the high end leftover textiles into new quality products, without making our footprint any deeper! 
To give you an idea; through “textile recovery” we avoid the production of new fabrics. Saving up to 20,000 liters of water for every kg of fabric (i.e. organic cotton) being repurposed.

By buying these FEEL GOOD Fabrics, we contribute to improving the environment and sustainability in the textile industry, because these leftover fabrics do not go to waste. Instead, they become part of an effective circular flow, in which textile resources are taken care of in a productive and responsible way.

With production in the Netherlands only, we also minimalize our transports.

Due to the fact sometimes the fabric stock we buy is just small, the amount of products can be minimal too…but exclusive it is! On the other hand, sometimes larger fabric amounts offer the possibility for custom orders, suitable for, for example, hospitality industry. Should you have any questions or requests in that regard, please do let us know! We like to think along…

Together we can make a contribution to the reduction of leftover fabrics…and that Feels Good! So let us make the world even more beautiful with what’s already there…

Vi ved, at en skræddersyet erhvervsindretning giver resultater, der sender din virksomhed til stjernerne!

Name: Curv Arquitetura
Description:
Curv Arquitetura nasceu da união de dois profissionais com um propósito comum: integrar a essência da natureza humana com o espaço físico, criando ambientes que conectam funcionalidade e bem-estar.

 Isabela Peverari, designer de interiores, arquiteta e urbanista, atua como CEO e Diretora de Projetos e Operações, liderando com visão estratégica e uma sensibilidade única para detalhes.

 Pedro Stuchi, arquiteto e urbanista, é pesquisador na área de Desempenho e pós-graduando em Neuroarquitetura. Como CEO e Diretor de Criação e Marketing, ele une inovação e criatividade no desenvolvimento de projetos e conteúdos impactantes.

 Juntos, Isabela e Pedro idealizam e realizam projetos únicos e personalizados, com um rigoroso detalhamento técnico e soluções práticas que desafiam o comum. A Curv Arquitetura se destaca pela originalidade, sempre em busca de aliar estética, funcionalidade e criatividade, mantendo uma conexão profunda com os desejos e necessidades de cada cliente.

Siga nossas publicações no Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/curvarquitetura/

Name: Bastir
Description:
José Pedro Vieira & Diogo Rosa Lã have been working in both Interior Design and Architecture for almost three decades.

The team got together in 2001 and created Bastir, dedicated to Architecture Interior Design and Decoration Projects, for both institutional and private clients. It is based in Oporto, Portugal.

Amongst its most important works are the Interior design and decoration of the Bairro Alto Hotel, in downtown Lisbon (2003 2005), the Vidago Palace Hotel, in Chaves, inaugurated in 2010, the Valverde Hotel, in Avenida da Liberdade, in Lisbon 2014 and the Valverde Santar Hotel & SPA, in Santar 2023.

Other interior design projects stand out, such as several restaurants for the Bbgourmet restaurant chain in Oporto, the Envy Health Club in Rua do Carmo, Lisbon, the remodeling of the UBS private banking area also in Lisbon, the project for the same swiss bank Oporto offices, the Clérigos “food court” 2012 in the historic centre of Oporto, and the decoration of The Artist Hotel 2013 and The House Ribeira Hotel 2016 also in downtown Porto. In the Oporto Serviced Apartments project 2015 the company signed both the architecture and interior design projects.

Originally associated with very modern and minimalist ambiances, the hotel projects have shown Bastir’s versatility in the interpretation and fusion of classical elements and materials with a contemporary look.

Name: HOME2BE
Description:
Bei HOME2BE haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, die Zukunft von Pflegeeinrichtungen und -heimen aktiv, sozial und effektiv neu zu gestalten. Mit der gebündelten Kompetenz, Forschung und jahrelangen Erfahrung unserer Vereinsmitglieder bieten wir unseren Kunden einzigartige, schlüsselfertige Raumkonzepte, die ganz auf die Bedürfnisse der Einrichtungen zugeschnitten sind – und den Bewohnern ein echtes Gefühl von Zuhause bieten. Dank unserer ganzheitlichen Konzeptionsweise und Planung für Ihr gesamtes Haus – Eingangsbereich, Flure, Aufenthaltsräume, Essbereiche, Wohnräume – ist dieses neue Wohlgefühl überall zu spüren und zu erleben.

Mit der klaren Vision gemeinsam mehr zu bewirken, haben sich unsere Vereinsmitglieder zusammengeschlossen und space4life e.V. ins Leben gerufen. Verbunden in der Leidenschaft und der festen Überzeugung für das Projekt, vereinen wir nicht nur die einzigartige Expertise unserer Mitglieder, sondern entwickeln uns auch stets gemeinsam weiter. Dabei verlieren wir nie aus dem Auge, was wirklich zählt – die Lebensqualität der Menschen.

Name: Nannette Brown
Description:
Nannette Brown is a New York–based interior design and media firm known for its cultured modernity and editorial sensibility. Founded in 1999, the firm established its reputation through refined, architectural spaces that balance curation with individuality.

Today, NB 2.0 reflects an evolution: from designing homes to shaping a philosophy of living across multiple media platforms. While the firm continues to deliver comprehensive design services, it now expands into what Brown calls Life Architecture—a multidisciplinary approach that merges her design philosophies of curated space and self-expression into topics of thought, wellness, food, and more. The goal: to empower others to design not just their homes, but their world.

At the core of this transition is the concept of The Living Edit—the belief that both our spaces and our lives are never finished, only refined. Through this lens, design becomes more than aesthetic; it becomes a tool for clarity, confidence, and transformation.

This expanded vision continues to attract a diverse and discerning clientele—from private residences to creative partnerships—and positions the firm as both a design authority and cultural thought leader. Nannette Brown’s work has been featured in Vogue, Elle Decor, Town & Country, and Forbes, a testament to a practice where beauty and intention are inseparable—and where home is the first draft of the life you’re creating.

Name: AVERYLILY
Description:
In 2022, a dynamic collaboration between interior designer Avery Solmssen and serial entrepreneur Lily Kanter led to the creation of the Averylily Design Studio, which is dedicated to transforming spaces in the Hawaiian Islands and beyond.

Avery noticed that her clients were always eager to receive recommendations for where to replenish their bedding and bath products after projects are complete. A desire to fill that need with locally-designed products that are readily available in Hawaiʻi led to the 2024 launch of the Averylily Home Collection. 

Our collection showcases high-quality move-in basics, including bedding, bath, and decor—all of which celebrate our commitment to local materials and dedication to the community.
